adebf382.title: IAM Architect
adebf382.description:
1\. Position Summary:
  

Identity \& Access Management (IAM) Architect is a strategic Cyber Security leadership role responsible for designing, architecting, and implementing modern Identity and Access Management solutions across IT and OT environments. The role drives enterprise IAM transformation initiatives leveraging Microsoft Entra ID, AI\-enabled security capabilities, Zero Trust architecture, and advanced authentication technologies to strengthen cyber resilience, privacy, and regulatory compliance for employees, partners, suppliers, and customers.
  

  

2\. Key Job Responsibilities
  

  

2\.1 Identity \& Access Management Platform


* Define and establish enterprise Authentication and Authorization reference architectures for current, emerging, and next\-generation IAM technologies, and drive global adoption across IT, OT, cloud, and manufacturing environments.
* Enforce enterprise Cyber Security standards and controls including Identity Governance, Access Management, Encryption, Logging, Conditional Access, and Privileged Access controls as part of the IAM reference architecture.
* Design and implement scalable Identity and Access Management solutions to strengthen Cyber Security posture across enterprise IT systems, manufacturing plants, and digital platforms.
* Architect and deploy integrated IAM solutions for hybrid environments spanning on\-premises and cloud platforms, ensuring scalability, reliability, reusability, and alignment with strategic business and technology roadmaps.
* Develop, maintain, and align enterprise Information Security policies, standards, and governance processes with industry best practices, Zero Trust principles, regulatory requirements, and secure cloud adoption strategies.
* Lead and champion modern Identity solutions for digital transformation initiatives including Data Lakes, Smart Manufacturing, Industry 4\.0, eCommerce, Factory Digitization, SaaS modernization, and AI\-enabled business platforms.
* Design secure identity architecture leveraging Microsoft Entra ID, SailPoint, CyberArk, PKI, Single Sign\-On, adaptive authentication, and passwordless technologies to enhance user experience and enterprise security resilience.

  

2\.2 Privileged Account Management


* Design, implement, and mature the enterprise Privileged Access Management (PAM) program to secure privileged, administrative, and service accounts across global applications, infrastructure, cloud platforms, and OT environments.
* Lead onboarding of critical and SOX\-regulated applications into the CyberArk platform and standardize privileged access controls to ensure SOX ITGC compliance is implemented by design.
* Ensure secure password vaulting, credential rotation, privileged session monitoring, and secrets management capabilities are implemented for all onboarded administrative and privileged accounts.
* Define and execute the enterprise roadmap for privileged identity governance and elevated access management leveraging CyberArk, Microsoft Entra PIM, and Zero Trust security principles.
* Implement least privilege, Just\-In\-Time (JIT), and Just\-Enough\-Administration (JEA) strategies to minimize identity attack surface and strengthen enterprise cyber resilience.
* Develop and publish enterprise standards, architectural guidelines, and operational controls for Privileged Access Management platforms, ensuring consistent adoption and governance across global IT and business environments.
* Enhance privileged access security through integration with Identity Governance, Multi\-Factor Authentication (MFA), PKI, adaptive authentication, and AI\-driven risk analytics capabilities.
* Drive continuous improvement of PAM controls aligned to Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availability (CIA) principles, regulatory requirements, and industry best practices.

  

2\.3 Single Sign\-on and Access Governance


* Design and implement a unified enterprise authentication platform supporting Single Sign\-On (SSO) and Multi\-Factor Authentication (MFA) across diverse enterprise, cloud, OT, and SaaS technology platforms.
* Define secure authentication architecture leveraging Microsoft Entra ID, federation services, Conditional Access, adaptive authentication, and Zero Trust principles to protect against modern cyber threats, credential compromise, and MFA bypass techniques.
* Ensure all critical enterprise applications are integrated with secure SSO, centralized identity governance, and phishing\-resistant authentication mechanisms.
* Drive enterprise\-wide Least Privilege and Role\-Based Access Control (RBAC) initiatives to strengthen identity security, regulatory compliance, and operational efficiency.
* Implement and enhance integrated Identity Governance and Administration (IGA) capabilities including automated provisioning, access certifications, Segregation of Duties (SoD), Joiner\-Mover\-Leaver (JML) processes, and policy\-based access controls.
* Improve digital workplace experience by delivering seamless, secure, and frictionless authentication services for employees, partners, suppliers, and customers.
* Enhance passwordless authentication architecture using Kerberos, PKI, certificate\-based authentication, Windows Hello for Business, FIDO2, biometrics, and device\-based trust technologies.
* Champion enterprise security architecture best practices and promote global cross\-functional collaboration for standardization, knowledge sharing, and continuous improvement of IAM and access governance capabilities.
* Integrate AI\-driven identity analytics, User and Entity Behavior Analytics (UEBA), and risk\-based access controls to enable intelligent and adaptive authentication decisions.

  

  

3\. Education / Qualifications
  

* Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology or related discipline

  

4\. Experience
   

12\+ years of IT experience and 8 years of Identity Management. Must have delivered the role of Identity Management Lead/ Identity Management Technical Manager for 3 years
  

  

5\. Key Skills and Knowledge
  

* Strong hands\-on experience with Identity Governance and Administration (IGA) platforms such as SailPoint IdentityIQ, SailPoint Identity Security Cloud, IBM Tivoli Identity Manager, or equivalent IAM technologies, including workflow configuration, Role\-Based Access Control (RBAC), Attribute\-Based Access Control (ABAC), birthright provisioning, access certifications, and user lifecycle management.
* Deep technical expertise in Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD), Active Directory, hybrid identity integration, user and group provisioning, directory synchronization, and enterprise identity federation.
* Strong experience in designing and implementing Public Key Infrastructure (PKI), certificate lifecycle management, certificate\-based authentication, and cryptographic security controls.
* Hands\-on experience with Privileged Access Management (PAM) solutions such as CyberArk including privileged credential vaulting, session monitoring, secrets management, and Just\-In\-Time privileged access.
* Proven expertise in Single Sign\-On (SSO) and federation technologies including Microsoft Entra ID, Ping Identity, Okta, SAML, OAuth2, OpenID Connect (OIDC), and SCIM integration frameworks.
* Strong experience implementing Multi\-Factor Authentication (MFA), passwordless authentication, Windows Hello for Business, FIDO2, biometric authentication, and adaptive/risk\-based access control solutions.
* Good understanding of contemporary and emerging identity security technologies including Zero Trust architecture, AI\-driven identity analytics, Identity Threat Detection \& Response (ITDR), blockchain\-based identity models, decentralized identity, and machine identity security.
* Experience securing cloud and SaaS environments across platforms such as Microsoft Azure, AWS, Google Cloud Platform, ServiceNow, SAP, and Salesforce.
* Strong understanding of cybersecurity, governance, risk, and compliance frameworks including SOX, NIST, ISO 27001, GDPR, and global data privacy and security regulations.
* Ability to perform risk assessments, business impact analysis, identity security reviews, control assessments, and vulnerability analysis using manual and automated security tools.
* Strong leadership, stakeholder management, interpersonal, presentation, and communication skills with the ability to influence and collaborate effectively across all organizational levels globally.
* Ability to translate business requirements, cybersecurity objectives, and digital transformation strategies into scalable IAM architecture and actionable implementation plans.
* Proven ability to work effectively within global and regional operational support models while promoting collaboration, innovation, and knowledge sharing across teams.
* Highly organized, analytical, and solution\-oriented professional with strong problem\-solving, service design, architecture, and implementation capabilities.

  
With a legacy of over 70 years, Garrett Motion is a cutting\-edge technology leader enabling emission reduction and energy efficiency. We design, manufacture and sell highly engineered turbocharging, air and fluid compression, and high\-speed electric motor technologies for customers in the mobility and industrial fields.

6aaf8f96.title: Senior Technical Architect
6aaf8f96.description:
**Role Summary:** 




 We are seeking a
 **Senior Technical Architect** 
 to lead the design, governance, and delivery of scalable, secure, and cloud\-native web applications. In this role, you will bridge business needs with technical execution defining end\-to\-end architectures, driving AWS\-based microservices, and establishing DevOps excellence. You will also mentor engineering teams and support pre\-sales solutioning, making a direct impact on product evolution and client success.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  





**Architecture \& Design** 



* Define and own the end\-to\-end technical architecture for web and full\-stack applications, ensuring alignment with business goals and non\-functional requirements (scalability, security, reliability).
* Architect cloud\-native, highly resilient solutions leveraging microservices, event\-driven patterns, and API\-first design principles.
* Lead technology selection, architectural governance, and trade\-off analysis across delivery teams.



  





**Cloud \& Infrastructure** 



* Design and oversee AWS cloud architecture including compute (EC2, Lambda, EKS), storage (S3, RDS), networking (VPC, CloudFront), and security (IAM, WAF).
* Drive infrastructure automation using Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, AWS CDK). DevOps \& Delivery
* Establish and evolve CI/CD pipelines, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and deployment strategies (blue/green, canary).
* Review designs, code, and deployment artifacts to enforce performance, security, and observability standards. Collaboration \& Leadership
* Partner with product management, business stakeholders, and delivery leads to translate requirements into robust technical solutions.
* Mentor technical teams, define coding and architecture best practices, and conduct architecture reviews.
* Support pre\-sales and solutioning activities, including effort estimation, proposal creation, and client presentations (as needed).



  





**Required Technical Skills** 



* Web \& Full\-Stack Architecture – Deep understanding of front\-end (React/Angular/Vue) and back\-end (Java, Node.js, Python) ecosystems.
* Cloud\-Native \& Scalable Design – Proven experience building 12\-factor apps, distributed systems, and high\-throughput platforms.
* Microservices \& Event\-Driven Systems – Hands\-on with message brokers (Kafka, RabbitMQ, SQS/SNS) and orchestration/choreography patterns.
* API\-First Design – REST, GraphQL, OpenAPI/Swagger, API gateways, versioning, and security (OAuth2/JWT).
* AWS Expertise – EC2, EKS, Lambda, RDS/Aurora, DynamoDB, S3, CloudFront, IAM, CloudWatch.
* DevOps \& Automation – CI/CD (Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions), Docker, Kubernetes (EKS), Terraform / AWS CDK.



  





**Nice to Have** 



* Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments with distributed teams.
* Background in SaaS or enterprise\-scale system architecture (multi\-tenancy, high availability, disaster recovery).
* Client\-facing solution architecture experience in consulting or product companies.
* Relevant certifications (AWS Solutions Architect – Professional, Kubernetes CKA, or Terraform Associate).



  





**Soft Skills \& Behavioral Attributes** 



* Strategic Communication – Ability to articulate complex technical decisions to business and technical audiences.
* Leadership \& Influence – Proven ability to mentor teams, drive consensus, and elevate engineering standards.
* Problem\-Solving Mindset – Systematic approach to diagnosing performance bottlenecks, security gaps, and scale limitations.
* Ownership \& Delivery Focus – Balances architectural purity with pragmatic delivery timelines.

042af077.title: Cloud Architect
042af077.description:
**Job Summary**
 Synechron is seeking an experienced Cloud Architect to lead the design, implementation, and management of scalable, secure, and highly available multi\-cloud platforms supporting enterprise applications. This role is essential in driving organizational cloud strategy, ensuring operational agility, and optimizing costs across cloud environments. The ideal candidate will architect and refine cloud solutions across AWS, GCP, and hybrid cloud environments, collaborating with cross\-functional teams to deliver robust cloud ecosystems aligned with business and technical objectives.
   

  

**Software Requirements**
*Required Software Proficiency:*
* Cloud Platforms: AWS, GCP, or Azure — extensive experience in designing and managing enterprise cloud architectures supporting mission\-critical workloads (supporting a 10\+ year background in cloud support/architecture)
* Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Terraform (preferred), CloudFormation, or similar — demonstrated ability to automate cloud environment provisioning and management
* Containerization \& Orchestration: Docker, Kubernetes (2\+ years) — deep experience in containerized deployment, scaling, and orchestration of cloud applications
* Monitoring \& Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, CloudWatch — solid track record in system health monitoring, alerting, and incident response support
* Network \& Security: Cloud networking, firewalls, IAM policies, encryption — for establishing secure, compliant cloud environments supporting enterprise standards


**Preferred Software Skills**
* Hybrid and multi\-region cloud architecture design supporting high availability and disaster recovery strategies
* Cloud security tools and compliance frameworks supporting standards like PCI DSS, GDPR, HIPAA
* DevOps automation: Jenkins, Azure DevOps, GitLab for CI/CD pipelines supporting infrastructure automation


**Overall Responsibilities**
* Lead the architecture, deployment, and management of scalable and secure multi\-cloud and hybrid cloud solutions supporting enterprise applications and data workloads
* Develop cloud strategy frameworks supporting agility, operational efficiency, and cost management aligned with organizational objectives
* Collaborate with product, engineering, security, and DevOps teams to implement cloud\-native solutions supporting high performance and security compliance
* Drive automation initiatives for infrastructure as code, deployment, configuration, and continuous integration/delivery pipelines
* Support cloud migration projects, environment configuration, and ongoing optimization for large, complex enterprise systems
* Monitor cloud environment health, troubleshoot incidents, and implement performance improvements and security controls
* Conduct security assessments, compliance audits, and governance practices supporting industry or regulatory standards
* Provide technical leadership, mentorship, and knowledge sharing within cloud teams and across the organization
* Maintain comprehensive documentation including architecture diagrams, operational procedures, and security policies


**Technical Skills (By Category)**
* Cloud Platforms:
+ Essential: AWS, GCP, or Azure supporting enterprise cloud deployments (supporting multi\-cloud and hybrid architectures)
+ Preferred: Management of multi\-region architectures, cross\-cloud integration, and cloud service orchestration


* Infrastructure as Code:
+ Essential: Terraform (preferred), CloudFormation supporting automated, repeatable environment setup


* Containerization \& Orchestration:
+ Essential: Docker, Kubernetes supporting scalable deployment supporting high availability and disaster recovery


* Monitoring \& Security:
+ Prometheus, Grafana, CloudWatch for operational visibility
+ Security: IAM, encryption protocols, security policies aligned with industry standards (PCI DSS, GDPR, HIPAA)


* Networking:
+ VPC design, traffic routing, firewalls, VPNs supporting enterprise security architectures


**Experience Requirements**
* 10\+ years of enterprise cloud architecture and implementation experience supporting large\-scale, secure, and compliant multi\-cloud and hybrid environments
* Proven track record designing, deploying, and managing cloud\-native solutions supporting mission\-critical enterprise systems and applications
* Extensive experience automating infrastructure and deployment processes using IaC tools (Terraform, CloudFormation)
* Strong knowledge of cloud security, governance, and regulatory compliance frameworks supporting regulated industries (preferably finance, healthcare)
* Demonstrated leadership in managing cloud strategies, designing scalable architecture, and mentoring technical teams


**Day\-to\-Day Activities**
* Architect and deploy scalable, secure cloud infrastructure supporting enterprise applications and data workflows
* Lead cloud migration, modernization, and multi\-region deployment projects
* Automate infrastructure provisioning, deployment, and configuration across cloud environments using IaC tools and pipelines
* Monitor system security, performance, and availability, proactively troubleshooting and resolving issues
* Conduct security reviews, risk assessments, and compliance audits supporting enterprise standards
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to optimize architecture, implement best practices, and ensure security standards
* Maintain detailed architecture diagrams, operational procedures, and security policies
* Evaluate new cloud features, tools, and industry trends, recommending strategic improvements


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field
* 10\+ years of enterprise cloud architecture and deployment expertise supporting complex, regulated, and high\-availability environments
* Certifications: AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect, Azure Solutions Architect (preferred)
* Proven experience supporting large\-scale cloud infrastructures that meet security, compliance, and operational excellence standards


**Professional Competencies**
* Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills supporting complex, high\-availability cloud environments
* Leadership in guiding cloud architecture strategies, mentoring teams, and driving cloud adoption best practices
* Excellent stakeholder communication and documentation skills
* Adaptability to evolving cloud technologies, security standards, and regulatory requirements
* Strategic thinking for optimizing performance, security, and costs across multi\-cloud and hybrid platforms
* Effective organizational skills to manage multiple initiatives in dynamic, fast\-paced environments


***S***
***YNECHRON’S DIVERSITY \& INCLUSION STATEMENT***
 Diversity \& Inclusion are fundamental to our culture, and Synechron is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. Our Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) initiative ‘Same Difference’ is committed to fostering an inclusive culture – promoting equality, diversity and an environment that is respectful to all. We strongly believe that a diverse workforce helps build stronger, successful businesses as a global company. We encourage applicants from across diverse backgrounds, race, ethnicities, religion, age, marital status, gender, sexual orientations, or disabilities to apply. We empower our global workforce by offering flexible workplace arrangements, mentoring, internal mobility, learning and development programs, and more.
   

  

 All employment decisions at Synechron are based on business needs, job requirements and individual qualifications, without regard to the applicant’s gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, disabled or veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

c6cb317e.title: Lead AWS Solutions Architect
c6cb317e.description:
Role \& Responsibilities
   

  

 We are looking for a Lead AWS Solutions Architect to own and run our AWS practice end\-to\-
   

  

 end. This is not a pure design\-only architect role — you will be the single point of accountability for
   

  

 the entire AWS business line, from the first customer conversation through solutioning, estimation,
   

  

 implementation, migration, and post\-go\-live support. You will also lead and mentor the AWS
   

  

 delivery team and represent us as the primary technical contact in our capacity as an AWS
   

  

 Partner.
   

  

 This role suits someone who has been an individual contributor architect, has led
   

  

 migrations/implementations end\-to\-end, and is ready to take ownership of a full practice — people,
   

  

 process, delivery quality, and customer relationships.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Pre\-Sales \& Customer Engagement


  Lead initial discovery calls with prospective and existing customers to understand business
   

  

 needs, current infrastructure, and cloud goals.
   

  

  Translate business requirements into technical solutions and cloud strategy.
   

  

  Prepare Statements of Work (SOW), Level of Effort (LOE), and cost estimates for AWS
   

  

 projects (migration, greenfield builds, modernization, managed services).
   

  

  Own the proposal and pitch process for AWS engagements, including RFP/RFI responses.
   

  

* Architecture \& Solutioning


  Design secure, scalable, cost\-optimized AWS architectures (Well\-Architected Framework
   

  

 aligned) across compute, storage, networking, database, containers, serverless, and
   

  

 security domains.
   

  

  Create architecture diagrams, HLD/LLD documents, and migration/implementation plans.
   

  

  Evaluate and recommend the right mix of AWS services for a given use case (cost vs.
   

  

 performance vs. complexity trade\-offs).
   

  

  Conduct architecture reviews and Well\-Architected Framework Reviews (WAFR) for
   

  

 existing customer workloads.
   

  

* Migration \& Implementation


  Plan and execute cloud migrations (rehost, replatform, refactor) using AWS\-native and
   

  

 third\-party tools (e.g., AWS MGN, DMS, Migration Hub).
   

  

  Lead implementation of new AWS environments — landing zones, networking (VPC, Direct
   

  

 Connect, Transit Gateway), IAM, security baseline, CI/CD pipelines, and workload
   

  

 deployment.
   

  

  Ensure infrastructure is built using Infrastructure as Code (Terraform / CloudFormation /
   

  

 CDK) and follows DevOps best practices.
   

  

  Own project delivery timelines, technical risk management, and quality of implementation.
   

  

* Operations, Support \& Escalation Management


  Act as the final technical escalation point for critical/complex issues raised by customers or
   

  

 internal team members.
   

  

  Define and oversee incident management, RCA (Root Cause Analysis), and post\-mortem
   

  

 processes for AWS\-managed environments.
   

  

  Set up and refine monitoring, alerting, cost governance, and security compliance practices
   

  

 across managed AWS accounts.
   

  

  Own SLAs for support/managed services engagements.
   

  

* AWS Partnership \& Practice Management


  Own and maintain our organization's AWS Partner relationship — partner tier requirements,
   

  

 certifications, competencies, and partner funding/programs (MAP, POA, etc., where
   

  

 applicable).
   

  

  Track and help the organization achieve/maintain AWS Partner competencies (e.g.,
   

  

 Migration, DevOps, Well\-Architected).
   

  

  Liaise with AWS Partner Development Manager (PDM) / AWS account teams for co\-sell
   

  

 opportunities, funding programs, and technical enablement.
   

  

  Keep the practice updated on new AWS services, pricing changes, and best practices.
   

  

* Team Leadership


  Build, lead, and mentor the AWS engineering/architecture team (Cloud Engineers, DevOps
   

  

 Engineers, Support Engineers).
   

  

  Define technical standards, coding/IaC guidelines, and delivery methodology for the AWS
   

  

 practice.
   

  

  Conduct technical interviews and contribute to hiring for the AWS team.
   

  

  Own resource planning and capacity allocation across ongoing customer engagements.
   

  

 Ideal Candidate
   

  

* Strong Lead / Senior AWS Solutions Architect Profiles
* Mandatory (Experience 1\) – Must have minimum 10\+ years of overall experience in IT Infrastructure, Cloud Engineering, Cloud Architecture, DevOps, or Enterprise Cloud Solutions.
* Mandatory (Experience 2\) – Must have minimum 8\+ years of hands\-on experience as an AWS Solutions Architect, AWS Cloud Architect, or AWS Technical Lead, designing and delivering enterprise\-scale AWS solutions.
* Mandatory (Experience 3\) – Must have end\-to\-end ownership of AWS engagements, including pre\-sales discovery, solution architecture, effort estimation (LOE), SOW preparation, implementation, cloud migration, delivery, and post\-production support/escalation management.
* Mandatory (Experience 4\) – Must have strong hands\-on expertise in designing secure, scalable, and cost\-optimized AWS architectures using core AWS services including EC2, ECS/EKS, Lambda, VPC, Direct Connect, Transit Gateway, Route 53, S3, RDS, DynamoDB, Aurora, IAM, KMS, GuardDuty, Security Hub, and AWS Config.
* Mandatory (Experience 5\) – Must have hands\-on experience leading AWS cloud migration and modernization projects using AWS Migration Hub, AWS MGN, AWS DMS, along with implementing AWS Landing Zones, networking, IAM, security, and production workloads.
* Mandatory (Experience 6\) – Must have strong experience with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation, or AWS CDK) and CI/CD pipelines using tools such as CodePipeline, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or equivalent DevOps platforms.
* Preferred (Experience 1\) – Must have experience leading technical teams, mentoring cloud engineers, managing technical escalations, conducting RCA, and owning delivery quality across AWS projects.
* Preferred (Experience 2\) \- Experience with Azure and/or GCP in hybrid or multi\-cloud environments.


 Perks, Benefits and Work Culture
   

  

 What Success Looks Like in This Role
   

  

  AWS practice runs with a repeatable pre\-sales → delivery → support pipeline, without every
   

  

 deal requiring founder/leadership involvement.
   

  

  Consistent, high\-quality architecture and estimation output across proposals.
   

  

  Reduced escalation resolution time and improved customer satisfaction on managed AWS
   

  

 accounts.
   

  

  Growth/maintenance of AWS Partner tier and competencies.
   

  

  A trained, capable AWS team that can operate independently under this person's
   

  

 leadership.
   

  

 Skills: security,cloud,devops,management,infrastructure,architecture,aws

baef6813.title: IT Solution Architect
baef6813.description:
**Hello Visionary!**
 We empower our people to stay resilient and relevant in a constantly changing world. We’re looking for people who are always searching for creative ways to grow and learn. People who want to make a real impact, now and in the future. Does that sound like you? Then it seems like you’d make a great addition to our vibrant international team.
   

  

**We are looking for: IT Solution Architect**
**You’ll break new ground by:**
* Translate business and functional requirements into architectural models and technical roadmaps for frontend solutions
* Define and evolve enterprise\-wide software architecture, ensuring alignment with business goals and technology strategy
* Lead architectural governance, technology evaluations, and strategic decision\-making
* Establish and implement architectural standards, frameworks, and Siemens guidelines
* Ensure architecture is secure, scalable, maintainable, and efficient
* See opportunities to incorporate AI/ML capabilities into products and processes to deliver business value
* Stay informed on emerging AI technologies and assess their applicability to the organization’s digital roadmap
* Lead and guide development teams in sophisticated implementation challenges around security, integration, data modelling, app performance, deployment strategies and more, based on Siemens requirements.
* Analyze risks, develop architecture roadmaps and handle technical debt
* Act as technical key authority for IT partners and Software providers with regards to future development of frontend components and the integration into the Siemens landscape


**You’re excited to build on your existing expertise, including:**
* At least 8 years of experience in design \& implementing frontend components
* Demonstrable experience as a Software Architect
* Solid grasp of architectural patterns (microservices, event\-driven architectures, APIs, cloud\-native compose)
* Experience with modern programming languages (e.g., Java, C\#, Python)
* Familiarity with containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes)
* Experience with AI/ML fundamentals, including model lifecycle, MLOps, and data engineering concepts
* Know\-how of (Siemens) regulatory requirements in IT compliance, e.g. Information Security, Data privacy, etc.
* Proficient \& hands\-on experience in architecting, designing and handling continuous delivery systems using Agile methodologies.
* Ability to work on sophisticated issues autonomously as well as team\-based
* Strong critical thinking
* Strong problem solver with strong analytical skills
* Excellent communication skills
* Strong stakeholder management of internal as well as external stakeholders
* Experienced working with and in international teams


**Create a better \#TomorrowWithUs!**
 This role is based in Pune / Bangalore, where you’ll get the chance to work with teams impacting entire cities, countries \- and the shape of things to come.
   

  

 We value your unique identity and perspective and are fully committed to providing equitable opportunities and building a workplace that reflects the diversity of society. Come bring your authentic self and create a better tomorrow with us.
   

  

 We’re Siemens. A collection of over 312,000 minds building the future, one day at a time in over 200 countries. We're dedicated to equality, and we encourage applications that reflect the diversity of the communities we work in. All employment decisions at Siemens are based on qualifications, merit and business need. Bring your curiosity and imagination and help us shape tomorrow.
   

  

**Find out more about Siemens careers at: www.siemens.com/careers**
**Find out more about the Digital world of Siemens here:** 
 www.siemens.com/careers/digitalminds

b6f56193.title: Lead Solution Architect - AI & Java - Senior Vice President
b6f56193.description:
The Applications Development Group Manager is a senior management level position responsible for accomplishing results through the management of a team or department in an effort to establish and implement new or revised application systems and programs in coordination with the Technology Team. The overall objective of this role is to drive applications systems analysis and programming activities.
   

  

**Responsibilities:**
* Manage multiple teams of professionals to accomplish established goals and conduct personnel duties for team (e.g. performance evaluations, hiring and disciplinary actions)
* Provide strategic influence and exercise control over resources, budget management and planning while monitoring end results
* Utilize in\-depth knowledge of concepts and procedures within own area and basic knowledge of other areas to resolve issues
* Ensure essential procedures are followed and contribute to defining standards
* Integrate in\-depth knowledge of applications development with overall technology function to achieve established goals
* Provide evaluative judgement based on analysis of facts in complicated, unique, and dynamic situations including drawing from internal and external sources
* Influence and negotiate with senior leaders across functions, as well as communicate with external parties as necessary
* Appropriately assess risk when business decisions are made, demonstrating particular consideration for the firm's reputation and safeguarding Citigroup, its clients and assets, by driving compliance with applicable laws, rules and regulations, adhering to Policy, applying sound ethical judgment regarding personal behavior, conduct and business practices, and escalating, managing and reporting control issues with transparency, as well as effectively supervise the activity of others and create accountability with those who fail to maintain these standards.


**Recommended Qualifications:**
* 10\+ years of relevant experience
* Experience in applications development
* Experience in management
* Experience managing global technology teams
* Working knowledge of industry practices and standards
* Consistently demonstrates clear and concise written and verbal communication


**Education:**
* Bachelor’s degree/University degree or equivalent experience
* Master’s degree preferred
* Experience Level: 15\+ years of progressive experience in software development, with a strong emphasis on solution architecture and leadership.
* Enterprise Solution Architecture: Proven ability to design and build enterprise\-level solutions leveraging Java/J2EE, Python, and advanced Generative AI (GenAI) technologies.
* Technical Leadership \& Hands\-on Expertise: Drives technical strategy, provides hands\-on guidance, and leads cross\-functional teams in implementing complex AI\-driven projects from inception to deployment.
* AI/ML \& GenAI Proficiency: Good experience with AI/ML methodologies, including practical application and architectural integration of Generative AI (GenAI) and Large Language Models (LLM) into business solutions.
* Robust Software Engineering Principles: Expert knowledge of software design patterns, architectural principles (e.g., microservices, event\-driven architectures), and adherence to SOLID principles, ensuring scalable, secure, and maintainable systems.
* Data Strategy \& Management: Strong expertise in data modeling, database design (SQL and NoSQL), data pipelines, and strategies for managing data within AI ecosystems.
* Comprehensive SDLC \& Best Practices: Mastery of the entire software development life cycle, including DevOps practices, cloud\-native deployments, security considerations, and agile methodologies.

d59256f4.title: Enterprise Architect
d59256f4.description:
**Job Description – Enterprise Architect**
**Position**
**Enterprise Architect – AI, Cloud \& Digital Transformation**
**Experience**
**15\+ years**
**Location**
 Hybrid
   

  

**Reports To**
 Head of Technology Director
   

  

**Role Summary**
 We are looking for a highly experienced
 **Enterprise Architect** 
 with 15\+ years of experience in Enterprise Architecture, Solution Architecture, Cloud, Digital Transformation, AI, and Technology Consulting. The ideal candidate will drive enterprise\-wide technology strategy, define target architectures, lead large transformation initiatives, and architect AI\-enabled business solutions aligned with organizational objectives.
   

  

 The role requires close collaboration with business stakeholders, engineering teams, product owners, and delivery organizations to build scalable, secure, and future\-ready technology platforms while leveraging AI, Generative AI, automation, and modern cloud\-native architectures.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Enterprise Architecture**
* Develop and maintain enterprise architecture strategy, principles, standards, and governance.
* Define current\-state, target\-state, and transition architectures.
* Lead architecture review boards and design governance.


**Solution Architecture**
* Lead architecture and solution design for large enterprise transformation programs.
* Design scalable cloud\-native, API\-first, event\-driven, and microservices\-based solutions.


**AI \& Generative AI**
**Lead Enterprise AI Adoption Including**
* Enterprise AI roadmap
* AI governance


**Cloud \& Platform Architecture**
**Lead Cloud Transformation Initiatives Involving**
* Platform Engineering


**Technology Strategy**
* Define enterprise technology roadmap.
* Develop reference architectures and reusable technology patterns.
* Evaluate COTS, SaaS, PaaS, and custom engineering approaches.
* Recommend modernization strategies (Retain, Rehost, Refactor, Replatform, Repurchase, Retire).
* Lead technology standardization initiatives.


**Architecture Governance**
**Establish Governance For**
* Architecture reviews
* Solution approvals
* Security architecture
* API governance
* Design standards


**Required Technical Skills**
**Enterprise Architecture**
* TOGAF
* Zachman Framework
* ArchiMate
* Business Capability Mapping
* Value Stream Mapping
* Enterprise Architecture Repository


**Solution Architecture**
* Microservices
* Domain Driven Design (DDD)
* Event\-Driven Architecture
* API Management
* Enterprise Integration Patterns
* SOA
* Cloud\-native Architecture


**Leadership Responsibilities**
* Lead enterprise architecture practice.
* Mentor solution architects and technical leads.
* Drive architecture governance.
* Build reusable architecture assets.
* Lead architecture communities of practice.
* Support strategic bids and presales activities.
* Participate in executive steering committees.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
* Master's degree (preferred).


**Preferred Certifications**
**Enterprise Architecture**
* TOGAF Certified
* ArchiMate


**Cloud**
* Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert
* AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional
* Google Professional Cloud Architect


**Ideal Candidate Profile**
 The ideal candidate is a strategic technology leader who can bridge
 **business strategy, enterprise architecture, AI innovation, and engineering execution** 
 . They should be comfortable leading executive discussions, shaping large transformation programs, governing enterprise architecture, and driving adoption of cloud, data, and AI technologies to deliver measurable business outcomes.
   

  

 Must have skills
   

  

* Enterprise Architecture
* TOGAF
* Solution Architecture

893360f4.title: Oracle Cloud Solution and Technology Architect - Senior Manager
893360f4.description:
At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.
   

  

 We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.
   

  

 Join EY and help to build a better working world.
   

  

**Oracle Cloud Solution and Technology Architect – Senior Manager**
**Job Summary:**
 We are seeking an accomplished Oracle Cloud Solution \& Technology Architect (Senior Manager) to lead the enterprise\-wide architecture, design, governance, and delivery of Oracle Cloud solutions across Applications (ERP, HCM, SCM, CX, EPM), Technology (OCI, PaaS), Integrations, security domains. and a strong understanding of enterprise business processes. This role requires strategic leadership, collaboration with senior stakeholders, technical teams, and end\-users to drive successful enterprise\-wide Oracle application deployments.
   

  

**Primary Responsibilities and Accountabilities:**
* Own and lead the end‑to‑end architecture across Oracle Cloud Applications and Technology platforms.
* Develop and maintain target‑state architecture, reference architectures, and roadmaps.
* Govern architectural decisions through ADRs, design reviews, and standards.
* Lead multi‑pillar solution architecture across ERP, HCM, SCM, EPM, CX and establish common security, workflow, data, and integration frameworks
* Define and oversee data migration strategies and integrations with third\-party applications using Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC) and middleware solutions.
* Architect solutions using OCI networking, IAM, compute, OKE, Functions, API Gateway, Autonomous DB, etc.
* Establish enterprise integration strategy using OIC, APIs, events, and canonical models.
* Govern data models, MDM alignment, and data migration and design hybrid\-cloud and coexistence strategies with HA/DR.
* Establish cloud security architecture covering IAM, encryption, audit and ensure compliance with regulatory standards
* Partner with C\-suite executives, business leaders, IT teams, and external vendors to align technology strategies with business goals.
* Stay current with OCI and Oracle Cloud releases, AI/ML, GenAI, industry trends, and best practices to drive innovation


**Experience** 
 :
   

  

* 15\+ years of experience in Oracle applications, with at least 7 years in Oracle Cloud solutions.
* Proven experience designing, deploying, and managing Oracle Alloy and Oracle Dedicated Region environments.
* Expertise in architecting hybrid multi cloud ecosystems spanning on premises, colocation facilities, and multiple public cloud providers.
* Strong understanding of data residency, data sovereignty, and regulatory compliance requirements across MENA or global regions.
* Hands on experience implementing and governing Cloud Marketplace and Service Catalog capabilities.
* Industry experience across Telecommunications, Energy, and Government \& Infrastructure (G\&I) sectors.
* Expertise in one or more of the Oracle application modules: ERP, HCM, SCM, or CX preferred.
* Strong knowledge of Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC), Oracle PaaS, and middleware solutions.
* Hands\-on experience with data migration, API\-based integrations, and security configurations.
* Deep understanding of enterprise business processes in finance, HR, supply chain, or customer experience domains.
* Experience leading multi\-country, multi\-currency, and global Oracle application implementations.
* Strong problem\-solving and analytical skills with the ability to troubleshoot complex issues.
* Excellent communication, leadership, and stakeholder management skills.
* Oracle Cloud certifications (preferred).


**Competencies / Skills:**
* Experience in Agile methodologies and DevOps for Oracle Cloud implementations.
* Knowledge of emerging technologies such as AI, ML, and Blockchain in enterprise applications.
* Prior experience in industries such as manufacturing, retail, banking, or healthcare
* Strong project planning, risk management, and stakeholder communication skills.
* Ability to manage complex projects with priorities while meeting deadlines and budgets.
* Advanced analytical thinking, with a focus on integrating data\-driven insights and predictive models into financial planning processes.
* Experience in diagnosing and solving technical and process challenges efficiently.
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to present complex concepts to diverse audiences.
* Strong relationship\-building skills to foster trust and credibility with clients and internal teams.
* Adaptability to evolving technologies, including Oracle Cloud updates and AI\-driven solutions.
* Commitment to continuous improvement, learning, and innovation in enterprise performance management.
* Must possess a valid passport and be willing to travel for client site work (domestic and international)


**Education** 
 :
   

  

* Graduate from a reputed educational institution; MBA or equivalent preferred.
* Oracle Cloud (SaaS \+ OCI), TOGAF, PMP, Agile certifications preferred


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY is building a better working world by creating new value for clients, people, society and the planet, while building trust in capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data, AI and advanced technology, EY teams help clients shape the future with confidence and develop answers for the most pressing issues of today and tomorrow.
   

  

 EY teams work across a full spectrum of services in assurance, consulting, tax, strategy and transactions. Fueled by sector insights, a globally connected, multi\-disciplinary network and diverse ecosystem partners, EY teams can provide services in more than 150 countries and territories.

3b9377ab.title: Senior Manager- AI Strategy & Solutions
3b9377ab.description:
**About Our Company**


Ameriprise India LLP has been providing client based financial solutions to help clients plan and achieve their financial objectives for 20 years. We are part of Ameriprise Financial Inc., a US financial planning company headquartered in Minneapolis with a global presence and diversified financial services leader with more than $1\.5 trillion in assets under management, administration and advisement as of year\-end 2024\. The firm’s focus areas include Asset Management and Advice, Retirement Planning and Insurance Protection.


Be part of an inclusive, collaborative culture that rewards you for your contributions, and work with other talented individuals who share your passion for doing great work. You’ll also have plenty of opportunities to make your mark at the office and a difference in your community. So, if you're talented, driven and want to work for a strong, ethical company that cares, take the next step and create a career at Ameriprise India LLP.

**Job Description**


Integral role in supporting AIM’s data analysis, system control, and database needs. Provide strategic ideas and thought leadership. Has/can apply solid financial industry data systems knowledge to support decision and strategy problems in key business areas. Demonstrates strong technical/problem solving skills. Manages multiple projects collaboratively. Works with HR in recruitment and performance appraisal process. Mentor the team members and layout their growth path.**Role Summary**


Leads the execution and operationalization of enterprise AI initiatives, ensuring AI strategy is translated into scalable, business\-impacting solutions. Partners across business and technology teams to drive delivery, adoption, and measurable outcomes, while maintaining strong alignment to enterprise priorities and governance. Acts as a senior program leader with end\-to\-end accountability for execution, value realization, and executive alignment across priority AI initiatives

**Key Responsibilities**

**1\) Enterprise AI Execution \& Operationalization:** Translate enterprise AI strategy into actionable roadmaps, delivery plans, and implementation milestones**.** Drive end\-to\-end execution of priority AI initiatives across multiple business areas. Ensure AI solutions move from concept to pilot to scaled deployment, and ultimately to sustained adoption. Own delivery outcomes across initiatives, including scope, timelines, and measurable business impact.

**2\) Program \& Portfolio Delivery:** Lead a portfolio of AI use cases and programs across the enterprise. Establish and manage delivery discipline (prioritization, dependencies, timelines, risk mitigation). Ensure outcomes are tied to clear business value (e.g., productivity, growth, cost, risk). Drive integrated program plans, track KPIs and milestones, and proactively manage risks, dependencies, and execution challenges, escalating as needed.

**3\) Cross\-Enterprise Partnership** Partner with Business leaders across functions, Technology, Data \& Analytics team, and Risk, Legal, and Governance teams.Align stakeholders around what gets delivered and how, while shaping execution priorities and ensuring alignment to enterprise AI strategy. Engage senior leaders, including ELT stakeholders, to drive alignment, inform decision\-making, and ensure transparency on progress, risks, and outcomes. Act as a clear point of accountability for progress and results.

**4\) Technical \& Solution Leadership:** Provide informed direction on AI/ML and GenAI solutions to ensure fit\-for\-purpose design.Bridge strategy and execution by helping teams define use cases, select appropriate approaches/models, and ensure scalability and integration. Stay current on emerging AI capabilities and translate into practical application.

**5\) Adoption, Change \& Value Realization:** Drive business adoption of AI solutions, not just delivery. Define metrics and success measures and track realization of expected outcomes. Partner with HR / change / comms teams to support workflow integration and behavior change. Ensure value realization is clearly defined, tracked, and communicated, with a focus on measurable outcomes.

**6\) Governance \& Responsible AI:** Ensure adherence to enterprise AI governance, risk, and compliance frameworks. Operationalize responsible AI practices (e.g., transparency, fairness, controls). Support approval processes and risk assessments for AI deployments. Ensure alignment to the enterprise AI operating model, embedding best practices across data, technology, risk, talent, and change management.

**7\) Matrix Team Leadership:** Lead through influence and build strong execution capability and accountability across a broad cross\-functional team. Create consistency in delivery methodologies and standards. Foster a high\-performance, results\-oriented environment; drive clarity, accountability, and continuous improvement across teams.

**Qualifications**

**Required**

* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent
* 8–10\+ years in AI, data/analytics, digital, or large\-scale transformation (preferably experience in strategy consulting)
* Demonstrated success in operating with an enterprise mindset and delivering complex, cross\-functional initiatives
* Strong understanding of: AI/ML and GenAI applications, data platforms and enterprise technology environments
* Strong communication skills, including the ability to communicate clearly and influence across technical and business stakeholders to drive alignment and decisions
* Ability to build strong relationships and lead effectively in a matrixed environment without direct authority. Experience aligning stakeholders on priorities, trade\-offs, and timelines
* Experience driving execution across multiple stakeholder groups
* Ability to translate strategy into clear, actionable plans and delivered outcomes
* Experience driving adoption and change, ensuring solutions are embedded and delivering business value
* Proven ability to exercise sound judgment, make timely decisions, and navigate ambiguity confidently
* Experience leading large\-scale programs or transformation initiatives with clear accountability for outcomes
* Strong problem\-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to use data to inform decisions and optimize execution

**Preferred**

* Advanced degree (e.g., MBA, Data Science or related field)
* Experience leading enterprise programs
* Financial services or regulated industry experience
* Background balancing technical depth with program leadership
* Familiarity with AI governance and responsible AI frameworks
* Experience in consulting, strategy, or similar roles supporting enterprise transformation initiatives

**In\-Office Collaboration**


We are a client\-centric, relationship\-based business. Working together, in\-person, is foundational to how we achieve results. By fostering a culture of face\-to\-face collaboration, idea sharing, productivity and personal connection, we deliver for our stakeholders — clients, advisors, employees and shareholders. Our employees work in the office at least three (3\) days per week, with flexibility to work from home two (2\) days per week. Some roles may require additional in\-office time or different in\-office expectations, and specific requirements will be discussed during the hiring process.

**Full\-Time/Part\-Time**


Full time**Timings**


(2:00p\-10:30p)**India Business Unit**


AWMPO AWMP\&S President's Office**Job Family Group**


Data*Ameriprise India LLP is an equal opportunity employer. We consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, genetic information, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, military status, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy, family status or any other basis prohibited by law.*

*We are committed to fostering an inclusive and accessible recruitment process for individuals with disabilities. If you require a reasonable accommodation to participate in the application or interview process, speak to your recruiter to discuss how we can support you.*

024abf0e.title: Digital Products Delivery Lead - Everyday Banking
024abf0e.description:
**Job Description**
 Emirates NBD is a market leader across the MENAT (Middle East, North Africa and Türkiye) region with a presence in 13 countries, serving over 9 million customers. Emirates NBD is the leading financial services brand in the UAE with a Brand value of approximately USD 4 billion. We serve our customers and help them realize their financial objectives through a range of banking products and services including retail banking, corporate \& institutional banking, Islamic banking, investment banking, private banking, asset management, global markets and treasury, and brokerage operations. We are a key participant in the global digital banking industry, with 97% of all financial transactions and requests conducted outside of our branches. We also operate Liv, the lifestyle digital bank by Emirates NBD. With over half a million users, it continues to be the fastest\-growing digital bank in the region.
   

  

 The Delivery Lead – Digital Products role is responsible for Co\-Owning and facilitating the delivery of the digital products for their tribe along with Product Owners and Global Product Owners.
   

  

 Delivery Lead’s main responsibility is managing the interfaces and dependencies of Digital Product’s Epics / Features which need to be delivered by IT Platforms. They need to ensure that required feature is placed on the backlog of the relevant IT Teams with right priority and delivery commitments as needed. They are also responsible to track those dependencies as per agreed cadence while highlighting and mitigating associated risks.
   

  

 Delivery Lead to lead the end\-to\-end design and development squads of CDD workflow Platform and responsible to ensure scalability, resilience, reliability, security and performance.
   

  

 Delivery Lead is also Scrum Master of Scrum Masters team with their tribe (Scrum of Scrums). Responsible for facilitating and coordinating of the activities within the tribe. In addition, the Delivery Lead also act as a point of escalation for any issues or risks, ensuring complete focus on delivering efficiency and business value in the Agile delivery squads for their respective tribes.
   

  

 Delivery Lead also facilitate and support the Tribe Leads and Product Owners in managing and tracking product’s funding while providing the budget utilization updates to the relevant stakeholders. They are also responsible to conduct the Product’s Portfolio Reviews for their tribes with relevant Tribe Leads, Business Owners and IT Leadership Teams as well as providing the portfolio updates to the PMO’s Portfolio Management Team for their tribes for Business Portfolio Review Meetings.
   

  

 Delivery Leads are also responsible for Managing Resource Capacity of their tribes with the help of Tribe Leads and Products Owners. Delivery Leads help the Product Owners in raising the resourcing demands and ensuring the resource hiring and placement in the squad with the help of workforce management team. If needed, they are also responsible to participate in the resource fitment interviews along with respective Chapter Leads and Workforce Management Team to assess the right fitment for their tribe.
   

  

 Delivery Leads are also responsible to facilitate the Tribe Leads/ POs in setting up new squads and assisting in sizing the new demands as and when needed.
   

  

 Delivery Leads are also responsible to oversee vendor based deliveries and turn key teams with vendors for their respective tribes as needed.
   

  

 While Tech Leads in the squads are responsible for release management, Delivery Leads are responsible for facilitating them by aligning all dependent IT Platforms and Teams for their respective releases and owning end to end release management process.
   

  

 The Delivery Lead will be responsible for the end\-to\-end management and delivery of Customer Due Diligence (CDD) platforms, ensuring alignment with regulatory requirements, business goals, and operational efficiency.
   

  

 Delivery Leads are also responsible to track and manage the product’s AMCs and overseeing the product’s technical health, resilience, and production issues resolution as per required SLAs.
   

  

 The Delivery Lead must be a proficient communicator able to raise and discuss issues and conflicts with senior stakeholders. They must be an expert problem solver by providing the structural resolutions of the blockers in their respective delivery tribe.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Ability to work under pressure, manage client expectations effective and not get overwhelmed by client pressures on team
* Facilitating getting the work done without coercion, assigning, or dictating the work.
* Assisting with internal and external communication, improving transparency, and radiating information Excellent planner who can plan 2\-3 steps ahead of the team and surface hidden risks 2\-3 levels deep within the team
* Establish strong relationships with Scrum / product owners to understand strategic, tactical and operational challenges in Business units, define technology solutions to address and arrive solutions
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to influence senior client business and IT executives on transforming towards agile
* In\-depth understanding of API design principles, RESTful architecture, and microservices.
* Experience with API security protocols, OAuth.
* Enjoys and gets energized by complex problem solving and ability to push the innovation on solutions
* Ability to work at an abstract level and continuously ‘pivot’ to arrive at the highest impact answer for the client
* Well versed with automated build and test strategies using DevOps tools
* Building a trusting and safe environment where problems can be raised without fear of blame, retribution, or being judged, with an emphasis of healing and problem solving
* Excellent leadership skills and enjoys teaching / mentoring others
* Facilitating discussion, decision making, and conflict resolution


**Skills \& Experience:**
* Prince 2, PMP
* Agile Methodology
* Under Graduate Degree in Engineering or Computer Science
* Agile: 4\+ Years
* Release Management: 3\+
* Banking/ Financial: 3\+ Years
* Overall Experience : 8 \+ Years
* Leadership and Agile management
* Conceptual Thinking, Strategic Orientation, Team Leadership, Analytical Thinking, Innovation, Flexibility, Integrity.


**There’s never been a better time to join Emirates NBD.**
 We’re one of the region’s most recognizable brands. We’re banking innovation leaders. We’re growing across both the UAE and our global offices. We offer a huge range of professional development opportunities to accelerate your career. It also goes without saying that we provide extremely competitive rewards, benefits and perks too, like our flexible work policy so you can work from home whenever it suits. At ENBD, we encourage interested candidates to review the key responsibilities and qualifications for each role and apply for positions that match their skills and capabilities.

e0bf106a.title: Program Manager
e0bf106a.description:
Roles and Responsibilities
   

  

* We are looking for a technical program manager with the ability to manage and oversee several complex IT projects. Your primary responsibility is the efficient workflow of all software development teams to ensure regular software delivery.
* Ensuring an efficient workflow includes regular work schedule adjustments, process improvement methods, and Agile project management. That said, you need to be familiar with agile tools, including JIRA.
* You also need a working knowledge of agile practices and how they work. The ideal candidate is someone who works well with Scrum Master, various software engineering teams, and relevant product teams.
* You need to initiate programs, monitor their progress, and introduce adjustments to improve process efficiency.
* Meanwhile, we expect the technical program manager to provide relevant suggestions and solutions to problems within the product development cycle. You're an ideal candidate if you have a knack for identifying problems and inefficiencies and fixing them.


**Qualifications Required**
 Qualifications required:
   

  

* B.E / B.Tech / M.E / MTech / M.S / MCA graduate (preferably from a reputed college or University)


**The Knowledge Manager Needs To**
* Set teamwork schedules for all teams under your supervision and delegate and prioritize tasks to improve process efficiency.
* Improve product delivery times by introducing relevant business solutions for better implementation and integration.
* Train, mentor, and guide team members and foster teamwork.
* Develop a system for regular performance metrics checks and then report your findings to upper management and other stakeholders.
* Ensure every team is following agile practices.
* Work with software architects, software engineers, technical consultants, and other technical staff to come up with solutions for clients.
* Collaborate with relevant consultants in each project to ensure product development follows organizational requirements and goals.
* Maintain a record of all customer escalations regarding technical issues. Communicate these issues to relevant project teams, follow through until there's a solution, and report the customer resolution.
* Ensure that all projects are following their budgets and delivery times. Make a habit of tracking project milestones and dependencies. Include these things in your regular reports.
* Collaborate with other relevant departments, including the product, sales, and support departments. You must ensure positive customer engagement across the board.
* Develop a system to plan, track, and document every single program you manage.
* Provide regular feedback to core teams, including the product team, engineering team, and development team.


**Technical Program Manager Requirements**
* At least 5\+ years of experience in program management with IT projects is crucial.
* It is mandatory to speak Arabic.
* Working knowledge of agile practices is a requirement.
* A PMP or Scrum Master certification is a plus.
* Excellent project management and communication skills are crucial.
* You need excellent leadership skills, along with a knack for problem\-solving.
* An ability to manage project timelines, prioritize tasks, and align teams based on those tasks is crucial.
* It's preferable if you are proficient with programming languages and some coding. We prefer that you have working knowledge with either .Net/Java background.
* It's crucial to have the ability to solve problems and technical issues as they present themselves.
* Strategic thinking is key in ensuring the efficient management of several complex projects.


 ‍
   

  

**Skill And Experience Required**
* Opportunity to work on technical challenges with global impact.
* Vast opportunities for self\-development, including online university access and sponsored certifications.
* Sponsored Tech Talks \& Hackathons to foster innovation and learning.
* Generous benefits package including health insurance, retirement benefits, flexible work hours, and more.
* Supportive work environment with forums to explore passions beyond work.
* This role presents an exciting opportunity for a motivated individual to contribute to the development of cutting\-edge solutions while advancing their career in a dynamic and collaborative environment.

fd6f2f37.title: Specialist - Presales (Palo Alto)
fd6f2f37.description:
**It's fun to work in a company where people truly BELIEVE in what they're doing!**

Job Description:


**Key Responsibilities**

**Pre\-Sales \& Solution Engineering**

* Act as the Technical Subject Matter Expert (SME) for the Palo Alto Networks security portfolio, including:
	+ Next\-Generation Firewalls (PA\-Series \& VM\-Series)
	+ Panorama
	+ Prisma Access (SASE)
	+ Prisma SD\-WAN
	+ Prisma Cloud
	+ Cortex XDR
	+ Cortex XSOAR
	+ Cortex XSIAM (preferred)
* Support technical pre\-sales activities including:
	+ Requirement gathering
	+ Security assessments
	+ Solution architecture and design
	+ Technical presentations
	+ Product demonstrations
	+ Proof of Concept (POC) deployment and validation
* Assist the Product and Sales team with:
	+ RFP/RFI responses
	+ Bill of Materials (BOM) preparation
	+ Licensing guidance
	+ Subscription sizing
	Solution positioning  
	+

**Partner \& Customer Engagement**

* Participate in:
	+ Distribution Managed Partner Round Tables
	+ Partner Technical Workshops
	+ Customer Technical Round Tables
	+ Executive Briefing Sessions
	+ Security Days and Roadshows
* Engage directly with partners and enterprise customers to position Palo Alto Networks solutions.
Act as a trusted technical advisor throughout the complete sales lifecycle.  
* 

**Training, Enablement \& Onboarding**

* Conduct partner enablement sessions on Palo Alto Networks products.
* Deliver technical workshops and hands\-on labs.
* Support new partner onboarding and technical readiness.
* Assist partners in preparing for Palo Alto Networks certifications.
* Build and maintain demo environments, lab guides, and technical documentation.
Conduct internal enablement sessions for sales and pre\-sales teams.  
* 

**Collaboration \& Vendor Interaction**

* Work closely with:
	+ Internal Sales Teams
	+ Product Managers
	+ Palo Alto Networks Channel Teams
	+ Palo Alto Networks Systems Engineers
* Stay updated with:
	+ New product releases
Gather customer and partner feedback to improve Go\-To\-Market (GTM) strategies.  
* 

**Required Skills \& Experience**

**Technical Skills**

Strong hands\-on experience with Palo Alto Networks security solutions, especially:


* Next\-Generation Firewalls
* Panorama
* Security Policies
* NAT
* VPN (Site\-to\-Site \& GlobalProtect)
* App\-ID
* User\-ID
* Content\-ID
* WildFire
* DNS Security
* Threat Prevention

Good understanding of:


* Secure Access Service Edge (SASE)
* Zero Trust Security
* SD\-WAN
* Endpoint Security
* SOC Operations
* XDR Concepts
* Cloud Security
* Container Security (Preferred)

**Certifications (Mandatory / Preferred)**

**Preferred Certifications:**

* Palo Alto Networks Certified Network Security Engineer (PCNSE)
* Palo Alto Networks Certified Network Security Administrator (PCNSA)
* Palo Alto Networks Systems Engineer (PSE) Foundation
* PSE Strata Professional
* PSE Prisma Access Professional
* Cortex XDR / Cortex XSOAR certifications (Preferred)

**Professional Skills**

* Excellent presentation and communication skills.
* Ability to explain complex cybersecurity concepts to technical and non\-technical audiences.
* Strong customer\-facing and partner engagement skills.
* Experience working in a distribution or channel\-driven environment.
* Ability to manage multiple opportunities simultaneously.
* Self\-motivated with strong problem\-solving and troubleshooting skills.

**Experience Requirements**

* 3–5 years of experience in:
	+ Technical Pre\-Sales
	+ Solution Engineering
	+ Network Security Consulting
	+ Cybersecurity Engineering
* Hands\-on experience with:
	+ Palo Alto Networks solutions
	+ Enterprise firewalls
	+ Network Security
	+ Cloud Security
	+ Endpoint Security
* Prior experience working with a distributor, system integrator, or value\-added reseller (VAR) will be an added advantage.

304ba7ee.title: Manager, Consulting Services - Marketing Solutions
304ba7ee.description:
TransUnion's Job Applicant Privacy Notice
   

  

****What We'll Bring:****
 We Are TransUnion:
   

  

 TransUnion (TU) is a major credit reference agency globally, and we offer specialist services in credit solutions; marketing solutions; fraud, identity and risk solutions; and trusted call solutions. TransUnion CIBIL is a household name in India when it comes to credit score and related solutions. We support organizations across a variety of sectors including finance, retail, travel, telecommunications, utilities, gaming, government and insurance.
   

  

 TU India has harnessed the power of our data, technology and IP which is either owned or partnered with to create a suite of Marketing Solutions that enable companies to more effectively manage their cost per acquisition, acquire better customers, and be more effective in where they spend their marketing budget. If you are looking for the benefits of working in a large organisation and the dynamism of a start\-up, then this could be the right opportunity for you.
   

  

**What You'll Bring:**
 We’re looking for a talented individual with a passion for marketing analytics and consulting to help our clients address their most challenging marketing effectiveness needs. The ideal candidate has a strong quantitative background, marketing solutions experience, and is well versed in the art of client management.
   

  

 In the Manager, Marketing Solutions Consulting Services role, you’ll manage customer engagements. You’ll build your network with the top marketing leadership in major companies across virtually all industries. You’ll work hands on with quantitative marketing data to analyse and reveal the business drivers for big brands. You will develop expertise at the intersection of data, marketing, and consulting. Our work is not just about delivering a project and moving on to the next challenge. Instead, it’s about delivering an evolving stream of value and enabling fact\-based decision making.
   

  

****What You'll Bring:****
**Responsibilities**
* You’ll be on the team that is the face of the company, the customer's go\-to person who delivers on the promise of TransUnion.
* You will be the project lead on multi\-faceted engagements, with the responsibility to organise internal teams and to develop enduring, trusted relationships with our clients.
* You will work to diagnose business needs, to translate them into questions that we will answer through our solutions and to architect ways to wrangle data from multiple sources.
* You will help our clients to understand their data and how it relates to their business objectives.
* You will identify and interpret trends and patterns in datasets to locate influences.
* You will conduct quantitative analyses (e.g. data investigations, UI analyses, data model assessments) in a defect\-free manner to provide valuable insights for our clients.
* You will construct forecasts, recommendations and strategic / tactical plans based on business data and market knowledge.
* You will translate our analytics into the stakeholder’s native language, to tell stories to make complex ideas simple and to translate our findings into measurable, data\-driven actions.
* You will establish a vision, frame key issues, and set a strategy while influencing key client executives and stakeholders to support significant change management.
* You will mentor the team (within Consulting Services and beyond) for growth and development.
* You will be responsible for a smooth and efficient delivery of products in TU’s Marketing Solutions portfolio while balancing client satisfaction, timing and budget targets.
* You will develop project scopes, project plans, risk mitigation strategies, and manage the daily implementation commensurate with project management and TransUnion best practices.
* You will support our sales team in business development initiatives as a subject matter expert.


****Essential Skills \& Experience:****
* Track record of experience in analytics, strategy consulting and / or marketing consulting. Client facing experience required.
* Exceptional data, analytics, and quantitative acumen with an understanding of solutions like marketing mix models, multi\-touch attribution, customer segmentation, identity management and / or data management platforms (or similar experiences in predictive analytics)
* Significant presentation experience with client audiences explaining data, insights, marketing optimisation and analytics.
* Advanced Excel and PowerPoint skills.
* Strong client management skills and an ability to build relationships with senior executives working with large brands.
* A highly effective cross functional communicator in both written and verbal skills.
* Ability to mentor and lead junior analysts, whilst this role doesn't have direct reports immediately, this individual will be responsible for coaching and mentoring the junior team members.


****Impact You'll Make:****
**Desirable Skills \& Experience:**
* Advanced technical (Master’s) degree in Marketing, Statistics, Data and / or Analytics (or equivalent) preferred.
* Good understanding of Indian marketing data landscape and players in the market.
* Media agency experience/exposure and fluency in local media buying practices.
* Ability to represent complex data insights in simple visuals through experience of visual tools (e.g. Tableau etc.)
* Resilient work ethic with the capability to adapt to the situation, flexibility and nimbleness in terms of work planning, and the ability to think quickly on your feet.
* Experience in enterprise digital analytics tools such as Google Analytics and Adobe Analytics or ad serving technologies (such as DSPs etc.) is a plus.


 This is a hybrid position and involves regular performance of job responsibilities virtually as well as in\-person at an assigned TU office location for a minimum of two days a week.
   

  

 TransUnion Job Title
   

  

 Manager I, Consulting Services

755190a3.title: Technical Project Manager (Cloud Migration)
755190a3.description:
Noida
Lab49 – Product and Delivery /
Full\-time /
On\-site
apply for this job

**Overview**



Lab49 is an award\-winning specialist consultancy that creates bespoke technology solutions for the world's leading financial services firms. We are seeking a Cloud Migration Project Manager to lead and deliver large\-scale cloud transformation initiatives, working closely with engineering, infrastructure, security, and business stakeholders.



The ideal candidate will have a strong track record of managing complex cloud migration programs, driving execution across cross\-functional teams, and ensuring successful delivery within scope, budget, and timeline expectations.



### **Key Responsibilities:**


* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of enterprise cloud migration projects, from initiation through post\-migration stabilization.
* Develop and manage project plans, timelines, resource allocation, budgets, risks, and dependencies.
* Partner with stakeholders to define migration strategies, roadmaps, and execution plans aligned with business objectives.
* Coordinate cross\-functional teams across Infrastructure, Application Development, Security, Networking, DevOps, and Operations.
* Manage application and data migration activities to AWS cloud environments.
* Drive dependency tracking, cutover planning, testing coordination, and go\-live execution.
* Monitor project progress, identify risks and issues proactively, and implement mitigation strategies.
* Ensure adherence to security, compliance, governance, and quality standards throughout the migration lifecycle.
* Facilitate Agile ceremonies, including sprint planning, daily stand\-ups, retrospectives, and stakeholder reviews.
* Track and report project KPIs, milestones, deliverables, and overall program health.
* Manage vendor relationships and coordinate third\-party resources where applicable.
* Provide regular executive\-level status updates, escalation management, and strategic recommendations.
* Support continuous improvement initiatives and contribute to cloud transformation best practices.
### **Required Skills \& Experience**


* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, Business, or a related field.
* 8\+ years of project or program management experience, including leading enterprise technology initiatives.
* Proven experience delivering AWS cloud migration and cloud transformation programs.
* Strong understanding of AWS services, cloud architecture concepts, and migration methodologies.
* Experience coordinating large\-scale, cross\-functional technology teams.
* Demonstrated expertise in project planning, risk management, stakeholder management, and dependency tracking.
* Experience managing application migration, infrastructure modernization, and cloud adoption initiatives.
* Strong knowledge of Agile delivery methodologies and project governance frameworks.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and executive stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast\-paced, client\-facing environment.
### **Preferred Qualifications:**


* PMP, PRINCE2, Agile, Scrum Master, or equivalent project management certification.
* AWS Cloud certifications preferred.
* Experience working within financial services, capital markets, fintech, or other highly regulated industries.
* Familiarity with cloud security, compliance, and governance frameworks.
* Experience managing global distributed teams and third\-party vendors.


**Why Join Lab49?**



At Lab49, you will work with some of the most prestigious financial institutions globally, helping them solve complex technology challenges and accelerate their cloud transformation journeys. You will collaborate with highly talented teams in a culture that values innovation, ownership, and technical excellence.



We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.
