* Manage multiple projects simultaneously while maintaining design quality and meeting deadlines.
* Support clients with design decisions, material selections, and project\-related recommendations.

Pay: ₹12,000\.00 \- ₹35,000\.00 per month

Work Location: In person

cfe2470e.title: Solution Consultant II
cfe2470e.description:
Job description
 Company and benefits


Job ID
SOLUT019386
Employment Type
Regular
Work Style
on\-site
Location
Noida,UP,India
Role
Solution Consultant II
Why UKG:


At UKG, the work you do matters. The code you ship, the decisions you make, and the care you show a customer all add up to real impact. Today, tens of millions of workers start and end their days with our workforce operating platform. Helping people get paid, grow in their careers, and shape the future of their industries. That’s what we do.


We never stop learning. We never stop challenging the norm. We push for better, and we celebrate the wins along the way. Here, you’ll get flexibility that’s real, benefits you can count on, and a team that succeeds together. Because at UKG, your work matters—and so do you.
  

  

Description:
  

  

UKG Ready (UKGR) is an exciting division of Ultimate Kronos Group which continues to experience incredible growth! If you are interested in taking your career to the next level by utilizing and enhancing your software implementation and consulting skills, then this is the job for you! We are seeking talented software implementation professionals who are interested in being part of our dynamic, fast\-paced environment and are eager to develop their career and make a difference for UKG.  

  

  

  

You will be joining the Professional Services Consulting (PSC) job family under the workgroup of Global Delivery Services (GDS) for the new customer deployments of UKGR product and work with UKG customers in multiple geographies.
  

  

The PSC projects’ scope has multiple roles including Solution Consultants, Integration consultants, Business Analysts and Quality analysts interacting with onsite teams and customers on a regular basis.
  

  

We hire people having knowledge in Human Capital Management domain for projects like ADP, Oracle HCM, PeopleSoft, Ramco, SAP SuccessFactors, Workday
  

  

As a Solution Consultant II within our UKG Ready implementation team, you will do the following:
  

  

* Engage with our Project Teams in various geographies in order to understand their business needs regarding the various modules of UKG Ready product
* Leverage your training in designing and building a solution that meets their needs
* Work cross\-functionally and amongst a team on New client implementation, upgrade, and change order projects
* Utilize your technical aptitude to configure \& re\-configure our software solution
* Stay up\-to\-date on the latest product features and functionalities
* Act as a knowledgeful consultant in the product implementation area
* Contribute to designing the best practices for product implementation
* Provide significant transfer of UKG product knowledge to UKG customer

  

Ability to work in a business required shift (3:00 PM to 12:00 AM)
  

  

Qualifications:
  

  

Individuals looking to be a part of our talented team should possess the following:
  

  

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent in Computer Science or related field
* 2 to 5 years of industry experience with exposure to Global implementations
* Experience in implementing HCM or WFM software
* Ability to work in a fast\-paced team environment
* Ability to adapt to new technologies and changing environments
* Excellent analytical, communication and consulting skills

  

Company Overview:


UKG is the Workforce Operating Platform that puts workforce understanding to work. With the world's largest collection of workforce insights, and people\-first AI, our ability to reveal unseen ways to build trust, amplify productivity, and empower talent, is unmatched. It's this expertise that equips our customers with the intelligence to solve any challenge in any industry — because great organizations know their workforce is their competitive edge. Learn more at ukg.com


UKG is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and is committed to promoting diversity and inclusion in the workplace, including the recruitment process.


Disability Accommodation in the Application and Interview Process


For individuals with disabilities that need additional assistance at any point in the application and interview process, please email UKGCareers@ukg.com


NOTICE ON HIRING SCAMS
  

UKG will never ask you for a copy of your driver’s license, social security card, or passport during a job inter  

  

  

ABOUT OUR JOB DESCRIPTIONS
  

All job descriptions are written to accurately reflect the open job and include general work responsibilities. They do not present a comprehensive, detailed inventory of all duties, responsibilities, and qualifications required for the job. Management reserves the right to revise the job or require that other or different tasks be performed if or when circumstances change.

From autonomous cars to life\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.

* Drive

 experience

**What you'll love about working here**

65a8e792.title: Solution Architect
65a8e792.description:
* Works with project team to ensure smooth and efficient implementation and integration between technical and functional system requirements.
* Ability to deliver in faster go\-lives using agile methodology
* Ability to lead faster deployments focused on value delivery.
* Works as a functional liaison between Project Team and key customer executives. Has knowledge of either Blue Yonder Demand \& Fulfillment, Assortment Planning, Allocation or Category Management Solutions.
* Has working experience of AI/ ML algorithms in supply chain
* Works with all levels of Blue Yonder associates in developing functional specifications, analysis of user needs and testing.
* Participates in business process analysis or design/construction phase of the project that leads to writing functional specifications.
* Works on development of functional specifications for modifications, interfaces, reports, and screens that meet the customers' business objectives and are of sound design.
* Provides advice to customers regarding industry best practices and process methodology.
* Understands how Blue Yonder solutions (Demand, Fulfill, Assortment, Allocation, Assortment Planning, Category Management) can be configured to better facilitate client business processes.
* Escalates issues that may have negative scheduling impact. Always conducts oneself in a professional manner with Blue Yonder customers and internal associates.
* Ensures the security and integrity of corporate assets and intellectual property. Ensures compliance with the internal and external company policies and procedures


**What You’ll Do**
* Assists Project Managers in planning efforts including detailed project plan task detail (work breakdown structure) based on the specific phase/need of the project
* Communicates and/or supports the business cases to Product Management Group and Product Development regarding specific trends for future product functionality and enhancements.
* Expert in developing / utilizing AI/ ML algorithms in statistical forecasting space
* Working experience of R, python packages
* As required, ability to represent Blue Yonder in industry conferences workshops preferred
* Ability to execute projects single\-handedly with high delivery quality
* Facilitates/leads business diagnostics, process analysis and/or design workshops to help flush out as\-is and desired to\-be solution state and ultimately writes a solution design document to support business requirements
* Leads the writing of functional specifications during the design phase of the project that supports the documented solution design
* Develops functional business process test scripts (step by step instructional how to do) which outline new or updated end\-user functional processes supported by the solution design which may include standard application functionality, customized modifications, data interfaces, reports/layouts, … Prepares for and conducts customized end\-user training workshops to support application training content outside of base application knowledge / Blue Yonder Certifications
* Is a thought leader in their Product Solution area of focus and is able to apply that knowledge to customer situations
* Provides advice to customers regarding industry best practices and process methodology
* Recognizes and highlights incremental revenue opportunities with existing customers/projects.
* Serves as a functional liaison and attends and contributes to key meetings between Blue Yonder project team, key customer contacts, and customer users, up to and including key executive project sponsors
* Understands how the Blue Yonder solutions within the area of focus can be configured and delivered to better facilitate customer business processes (ensuring the ability to design, execute, and deliver)
* Setup and coordinate user acceptance testing efforts which will support final acceptance and critical phase sign\-off by the business owners
* Follows up on cases opened with Blue Yonder Support Services to help in resolving defects for the customer.
* Provides non\-technical end user support during the 'go\-live' and post\-go\-live period
* Ensures knowledge transfer is conducted with key customer project team/end users to maximize the customers on their own success after Blue Yonder’s project roll\-off
* Communicate project risks that may have a negative impact on the project schedule, scope or budget
* Escalate project issues which surface and cannot be quickly resolved which will have an impact on the project schedule, scope, or budget
* Completes assigned and agreed to work within the allotted time and with a high level of quality
* Always conducts oneself in a professional manner with Blue Yonder customers and internal associates


**What We Are Looking For**
* 10\-12 years of hands on experience, as a functional consultant providing supply chain solutions for customers required. Either a customer of Blue Yonder or as a consultant implementing Blue Yonder solutions for customers preferred.
* Advanced degree in Supply Chain, Operations, Logistics or Operations Research preferred. A combination of Bachelor ’s degree and relevant industry experience may be considered in lieu of advanced degree
* Relevant solutions consulting and implementation experience with other leading supply chain planning solutions such as Oracle, SAP, or leading ERP may be considered.
* Strong business analysis skills, understanding and usage of statistical algorithms, SCM concepts, awareness of tactical planning on overall supply chain required
* Relevant industry certification from APICS , TOGAF will be a plus
* Current or prior experience working in Management consulting organization or Supply Chain Center or Excellence settings preferred
* Skill set and availability requirements as per the organization's needs
* Knowledge in performance tuning techniques is added advantage.
* Provides guidance to Support Services in responding to base technical issues.
* Understanding and experience with the technical requirements for the product line assigned.
* Understanding of Database structures. Understanding of various technical platforms and infrastructures.
* Understands Blue Yonder product suite to convey relationships and touch points to the customer.
* Works with appropriate parties to ensure issues are resolved.
* Ability to prepare and deliver presentations for user and management. Strong verbal, written and interpersonal skills required
* Extensive Travel required.


**Our Values**
 If you want to know the heart of a company, take a look at their values. Ours unite us. They are what drive our success – and the success of our customers. Does your heart beat like ours? Find out here: Core Values
   

  

 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status.

cdeb76e9.title: Enterprise Product Solution Consultant
cdeb76e9.description:
**Company Description** 
 GoComet is a leading AI\-powered Transportation and Freight Management solution provider transforming the supply chain and logistics industry. In just five years, the company has partnered with over 500 global brands, including multiple Fortune 500 organizations. GoComet focuses on delivering intelligent, data\-driven platforms that optimize freight operations and enhance visibility across global logistics networks. Team members contribute to innovative solutions that directly shape the future of global commerce. The organization values collaboration, curiosity, and a strong drive to solve complex challenges in a dynamic market.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




 Solution Architecture: Design end\-to\-end global logistics workflows that leverage our SaaS
 



 platform to solve complex cross\-border pain points (e.g., automated duties/taxes, landed cost
 



 calculations, and carrier integrations).
 



 Product Evangelism: Lead technical product demonstrations that move beyond features to focus
 



 on business outcomes, ROI, and operational efficiency.
 



 Discovery \& Scoping: Conduct deep\-dive discovery sessions to understand prospective clients'
 



 current "as\-is" shipping processes and define the "to\-be" state using our TMS.
 



 Cross\-Functional Collaboration: Act as the "voice of the customer" for the Product team,
 



 providing feedback on market trends and specific localized requirements (e.g., Brexit\-related
 



 compliance or IOSS/OSS changes).
 



 RFP/RFI Ownership: Lead the technical response for Requests for Proposals, ensuring all
 



 security, integration (API/EDI), and functional requirements are met.
 



 Implementation Hand\-off: Ensure a seamless transition from the pre\-sales phase to the
 



 Professional Services/Implementation teams by providing detailed solution blueprints.
 



  





**Required Qualifications** 




 Experience: 5\+ years in Pre\-Sales, Solutions Consulting, or Sales Engineering within the SaaS
 



 Supply Chain or Logistics sector.
 



 Domain Expertise: Deep understanding of Cross\-Border logistics, including Incoterms, HS
 



 Codes, Customs Brokerage, and Freight Forwarding.
 



 Technical Proficiency: Strong grasp of API integrations, EDI standards, and how TMS platforms
 



 interact with ERPs (like SAP, Oracle, or NetSuite).
 



 Communication: Proven ability to explain complex technical or regulatory concepts to
 



 non\-technical audiences.
 



 Education: Bachelor’s degree or Masters Degree in relevant field.

81aeee37.title: QE Solution Architect
81aeee37.description:
**Job Summary** 




 We are seeking hands\-on
 **Quality Engineering (QE) Solution Architect** 
 to define, transform, and drive the overall quality strategy across our enterprise applications and digital engineering ecosystem. In this role, you will architect scalable automation frameworks, establish enterprise\-grade quality governance, and champion modern DevSecOps and continuous testing practices.
 



 You will serve as the Quality Engineering SME across enterprise applications (ERP/CRM), digital platforms, APIs, and cloud\-native solutions, ensuring scalable, resilient, and high\-quality software delivery. You will also partner with business and sales teams to shape solutions, support proposals, provide effort estimations, and drive quality engineering transformation initiatives for our clients.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* **Strategy \& Governance:** 
 Define and execute the enterprise Quality Engineering strategy, testing standards, governance framework, and quality KPIs across enterprise applications and digital platforms.
* **Architecture \& Automation:** 
 Architect and evolve scalable automation frameworks using modern tools and reusable design patterns, promoting an automation\-first and quality\-by\-design approach.
* **Enterprise Applications \& Digital Platforms:** 
 Lead end\-to\-end quality initiatives across ERP, CRM, HRMS, digital applications, APIs, integrations, cloud services, and third\-party ecosystems.
* **DevOps \& Continuous Testing:** 
 Embed continuous testing into CI/CD pipelines, driving Shift\-Left practices, service virtualization, test data management (TDM), and release quality.
* **AI\-Assisted Quality Engineering:** 
 Drive the adoption of AI\-powered testing solutions, self\-healing automation, intelligent test generation, predictive quality analytics, and GenAI\-enabled testing accelerators to improve productivity and quality outcomes.
* **Solutioning \& Pre\-Sales:** 
 Partner with sales, delivery, and client stakeholders to define QE solution approaches, prepare technical proposals, respond to RFPs/RFIs, conduct discovery workshops, and present solution recommendations.
* **Estimation \& Planning:** 
 Lead effort estimation, resource planning, delivery planning, and risk assessment for Quality Engineering engagements and digital transformation programs.
* **Leadership \& Mentorship:** 
 Provide technical governance, conduct architecture and code reviews, mentor distributed QE teams, and foster engineering excellence.
* **Innovation \& Modernization:** 
 Evaluate, pilot, and implement modern testing technologies, automation frameworks, and quality engineering accelerators.
* **Vendor \& Stakeholder Management:** 
 Collaborate with business stakeholders, application teams, delivery managers, and external vendors to define quality objectives, manage risks, and ensure successful project delivery.
* **Risk \& Metrics:** 
 Establish quality dashboards, monitor automation coverage, defect trends, release readiness, and proactively identify and mitigate quality risks.



  





**Technical Skills \& Qualifications** 




**Required Experience** 



* 12\+ years of experience in Software Quality Engineering, with at least 4\+ years in a Lead, Architect, or QE Leadership role.
* Expert\-level experience designing enterprise automation frameworks using
 **Playwright, Selenium, or Cypress** 
 with
 **Python, Java, or C\#** 
 .
* Proven experience testing enterprise platforms such as
 **SAP, Oracle ERP, Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics, ServiceNow, Workday** 
 , or similar business\-critical applications.
* Strong expertise in API and microservices testing (REST, GraphQL) using tools such as
 **Postman, SoapUI, or RestAssured** 
 , along with solid SQL skills.
* Experience integrating automated testing into CI/CD pipelines using
 **Azure DevOps, Jenkins, GitHub Actions** 
 , and Git\-based workflows.
* Experience with test management platforms such as
 **Azure Test Plans, Jira/Xray, Zephyr, or qTest** 
 .
* Strong understanding of Agile, Scrum,
 **SAFe** 
 , DevOps, Release Management, Shift\-Left/Shift\-Right testing, and Quality Engineering best practices.
* Experience in solution architecture, effort estimation, proposal development, and client\-facing consulting engagements.
* Excellent leadership, communication, stakeholder management, mentoring, presentation, and solution architecture skills.



**Preferred Skills** 



* Hands\-on experience with cloud platforms such as
 **Azure, AWS, or GCP** 
 .
* Exposure to performance, security, accessibility, and reliability testing using tools such as
 **JMeter, Load Runner, K6, Burp, OWASP\-based security tools**
* Experience with AI\-assisted testing platforms, self\-healing automation frameworks, LLM\-powered test generation, or GenAI\-based quality engineering solutions.
* Experience with observability and application monitoring platforms such as
 **Datadog, Dynatrace, New Relic, Azure Monitor, Grafana, or Splunk** 
 to support release validation, production monitoring, and quality analytics.
* ISTQB Advanced/Expert certification or relevant Cloud, DevOps, AI, or Automation certifications.

cc73b71a.title: Tech Lead – Automation Solutions (Power Platform, K2) - Husky (Guindy, Chennai)
cc73b71a.description:
At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.



Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state\-of\-the\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.



Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.



Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!

  


**Job Description**



Are you ready to shape the next generation of enterprise automation while keeping mission\-critical workflows running smoothly?



As Tech Lead for the Automation Team, you will play a pivotal role in Husky’s transition from legacy workflow platforms to a modern, scalable automation landscape centered on the Microsoft Power Platform. You’ll lead by example—guiding your team in designing, governing, and delivering Power Apps and Power Automate solutions—while also ensuring the reliability, continuity, and evolution of existing automation solutions such as K2\.



This role sits at the intersection of innovation and responsibility: driving modernization, setting technical standards, and mentoring engineers, while safeguarding the automation backbone that supports our global business operations.



If you enjoy combining hands\-on technical leadership, platform thinking, and pragmatic enterprise automation, this is your opportunity to make a lasting impact.


**Responsibilities**


**Technical Leadership**


* Understand the E2E high level architecture (big picture)
* Translate the HLD (high level design) into the LLD (low level design) in collaboration with architects and own the LLD
* Technical direction for the product area
* Contribute to coordinating cross\-team dependencies and integration points


**Delivery \& Execution Excellence**


* Contribute to the feature definition and review
* Generate concepts and facilitate the concept selection
* Breaking down complex features into actionable tasks
* Helping with estimation and sprint planning
* Addressing technical impediments
* Own production readiness (incl. non\-functional requirements)


**Quality, Governance \& Security**


* Ensuring quality
* Conducting meaningful reviews and ensuring adherence to DoR (Definition of Ready) / DoD (Definition of Done) criteria
* Ensure adherence to applicable standards, policies, and practices (e.g. DevSecOps)


**Incident Response**


* Leading incident response, root cause analysis (RCA), and post\-mortems


**Mentorship \& Team Growth**


* Mentoring team members
* Documenting key design decisions
* Participate in interviews and hiring decisions
* Promoting engineering best practices and driving continuous improvement


**Collaboration \& Communication**


* Act as the primary technical point of contact across Product, Architecture, and Platform teams
* Clearly communicate technical decisions and trade\-offs to non\-technical stakeholders


**Qualifications**


* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field.
* 10\+ years professional experience in software development, 5\+ years’ experience with Power Platform
* **Power Platform Expertise**
* Deep, hands\-on experience with Microsoft Power Platform, including: Power Apps (Canvas \& Model Driven)
* Power Automate (cloud flows, approvals, error handling)
* Dataverse (data modeling, security, performance)
* Proven ability to design enterprise\-scale Power Platform solutions
* Strong understanding of solution layering, Application Lifecycle Management, and environment strategies
* **Power Platform Governance**
* Hands\-on experience implementing Power Platform governance, including DLP policies, environment strategies, Center of Excellence (CoE) Starter Kit
* Strong understanding of: Role\-based security in Dataverse
* Tenant\-level Power Platform administration
* Experience working in regulated or enterprise environments (e.g., GDPR, ISO, SOC)
* **Azure \& Microsoft Ecosystem**
* Solid experience in integrating Power Platform with Azure services (Azure Functions, Logic Apps, Service Bus, Entra AD) and Microsoft 365 (SharePoint, Teams, Outlook, OneDrive)
* Experience with authentication and authorization: Entra AD, OAuth, service principals, managed identities
* **DevOps \& ALM**
* Proven experience with Power Platform ALM, including: Managed vs unmanaged solutions
* Versioning and deployment strategies
* **Experience with:**
* Azure DevOps or GitHub
* CI/CD pipelines for Power Platform
* Automated testing strategies (where applicable)
* Familiarity with source control best practices for low\-code assets
* **Development \& Customization Skills**
* Strong proficiency in: Power Fx
* JavaScript (for model\-driven apps)
* Understanding data modeling best practices and normalization
* Experience working with web services / APIs (e.g., SOAP, REST)
* Working knowledge of Agile development practices
* Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a team
* Fluency in English (spoken and written)
* Strong problem\-solving skills and attention to detail
* Ability to adjust quickly to changing assignments, and priorities


**Assets**


* K2 Five / K2 BlackPearl – Workflows, Smart Objects, Forms and Views, Administration \& Troubleshooting, End\-to\-End testing
* Certifications: PL 600 \- Microsoft Power Platform Solution Architect Expert
* Experience setting up or running a Power Platform Center of Excellence
* Prior experience in citizen development enablement
* Exposure to AI Builder, Copilot Studio, or Power Platform \+ AI scenarios
* Background in enterprise integration


**Why Husky?**


**Regulated Working Hours:** Enjoy a structured work schedule that promotes a healthy work\-life balance, allowing you to excel professionally while maintaining personal well\-being.


**Visible Impact:** Experience the satisfaction of seeing the direct outcomes of your work, as you contribute to projects that visibly enhance our company's technological capabilities and efficiency.


**Strategic Influence:** Participate in architectural and technical reviews, contributing to the strategic direction of our cloud initiatives and making a tangible impact on our company's technological landscape.


**Empowered Involvement:** Take an active role in decision\-making processes and architectural reviews, where your expertise helps shape the future of our cloud solutions and overall business strategy.


**Valued Contributions:** Be more than just a number in a large organization; at our company, every individual's input is valued and can lead to significant, tangible improvements in our operations and services.


**Impactful Role:** Play a crucial part in both developing new applications and maintaining existing systems, ensuring their optimal performance and reliability.


**Cutting\-Edge Projects:** Work on innovative cloud solutions that are transforming our and our customer’s business, giving you the opportunity to be at the forefront of technological advancements.


**Supportive Community:** Work in an environment that recognizes and celebrates individual achievements, fostering a sense of community and mutual respect among team members.


**Collaborative Environment:** Join a global team of skilled professionals around the globe where your ideas are valued, and collaboration is encouraged to solve complex challenges and drive success.

  

  



Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

052f052c.title: Pre-Sales and Technical Engineer
052f052c.description:
Bitamin builds a WhatsApp marketing and automation platform that helps businesses run campaigns, automate conversations, and drive repeat sales on WhatsApp.
 



  





 As
 **Technical Pre\-Sales and Support Engineer,** 
 you are the technical face of the product: you run demos alongside the sales team, onboard new clients, build their automations, and resolve their issues so they stay and grow with us.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




 \* Deliver technical product demos and proof of concept setups alongside the business development team.
 



 \* Onboard new clients end to end: WhatsApp Business API setup, number verification, template approvals, and integrations.
 



 \* Build chatbots, auto reply flows, campaign journeys, and CRM or website integrations for client use cases.
 



 \* Provide first line and second line support over phone, WhatsApp, and email, and resolve tickets within SLA.
 



 \* Train client teams to use the dashboard, campaigns, and reports on their own.
 



 \* Reproduce bugs, document them clearly, and coordinate with the development team for fixes.
 



 \* Create help guides, FAQs, and short tutorial videos to reduce repeat queries.
 



  





**Requirements:** 




 \* 1 to 4 years in technical support, sales engineering, or implementation, preferably for a SaaS product.
 



 \* Working knowledge of APIs, webhooks, and basic integrations; comfort reading JSON and API docs.
 



 \* Familiarity with WhatsApp Business API, chatbot builders, or CRM tools is a strong plus.
 



 \* Clear communicator who can explain technical concepts to non technical business owners.
 



 \* Fluency in Assamese, Odia, Bengali, Hindi and English.
 



  





**What We Offer:** 




 \* Fixed salary plus incentives linked to onboarding and retention outcomes.
 



 \* Hands on exposure to the WhatsApp Business ecosystem and a fast growing
 



 \* Direct work with founders, sales, and product teams SaaS product.

40e15a62.title: Full Stack Engineer – .NET/C#, Angular, SQL, Cloud
40e15a62.description:
**Where Ambition Meets Innovation**

  

At LPL’s Global Capability Center, you'll find a collaborative culture where your voice matters, integrity guides every decision, and technology fuels progress. Your skills, talents, and ideas will redefine what's possible. LPL's success reflects its exceptional employees, who together pursue one noble purpose: empowering financial advisors to deliver personalized advice for all who need it. We’re proud to be expanding and reaching new heights in Hyderabad.

  

Join us as we create something extraordinary together.


GCC India is seeking a skilled Full Stack Engineer with expertise in .NET/C\#, Angular, SQL, and Cloud technologies to design, develop, and maintain robust web applications. The candidate will join our

**Direct Business and LPL Data Experience (LDX) team**. This role is critical to designing and implementing modern, cloud‑based data and application capabilities that will transform how Direct business data is injested, managed and leveraged for various business functionalities within the firm for advisors, investors cross the enterprise. This role is critical to designing and implementing modern, cloud‑based data and application capabilities that will transform how compensation processing, data flows, validation, and automation operate across the enterprise.


The ideal candidate will bring strong experience in Angular or REACT with **Python**, **AWS and .NET API development with strong SQL database experience**.


You will work closely with architects, product teams, compensation SMEs, and engineering partners to deliver scalable, resilient, and future‑ready systems that modernize the compensation platform end‑to‑end.

 **Job Responsibilities:\*\***  

  

* Design, develop, and implement scalable and high\-performance web applications using .NET/C\# for backend services and Angular for front\-end development.
* Develop and optimize SQL databases, including schema design, query optimization, and stored procedures.
* Integrate applications with various cloud platforms (e.g., Azure, AWS) and services, leveraging cloud\-native features.
* Collaborate with product managers, UX/UI designers, and other engineers to define, design, and ship new features.
* Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code following best practices and coding standards.
* Participate in code reviews to ensure code quality and knowledge sharing.
* Troubleshoot and debug production issues, providing timely resolutions.
* Contribute to the entire software development lifecycle, from requirements gathering to deployment and support.
* Stay up\-to\-date with emerging technologies and industry trends to recommend and implement innovative solutions.

  

**Job Qualifications:\*\***  

  

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
* Proven experience as a Full Stack Engineer or similar role.
* Strong proficiency in .NET and C\# for backend development.
* Extensive experience with Angular (2\+) for building responsive and dynamic user interfaces.
* Solid understanding of relational databases, particularly SQL Server, including database design, T\-SQL, and ORM frameworks (e.g., Entity Framework).
* Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., Azure, AWS, GCP) and services (e.g., App Services, Functions, Databases, Storage).
* Familiarity with RESTful APIs and microservices architecture.
* Proficient with version control systems (e.g., Git).
* Experience with Agile development methodologies.
* Excellent problem\-solving skills and attention to detail.
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to work effectively in a team environment.

LPL Global Business Services, LLP \- PRIVACY POLICY

7cb1337c.title: Enterprise Architect - Cloud & Compute
7cb1337c.description:
**Job Description**
**Job Title:** 
 Enterprise Architect \- Cloud \& Compute
   

  

**About** 
**us** 
 : With over 200 brands sold in nearly 180 countries, we’re the world’s leading premium drinks company. Bring your passion and use your curiosity as you explore, collaborate, and innovate to build brands consumers love. Together with passionate people from all over the world, you’ll test new ideas, learn and grow, and unlock a brighter, more exciting future.
   

  

 Join us to create a career worth celebrating.
   

  

**About The Function**
 Our Digital and Technology (D\&T) team are innovators, delivering ground\-breaking solutions that will help shape the future of our iconic brands. Technology touches every part of our business, from the sourcing of sustainable ingredients to marketing and development of our online platforms. We utilise data insights to build competitive advantage, supporting our people to deliver value faster.
   

  

 Our D\&T team includes some of the most talented digital professionals in the industry. Every day, we come together to push boundaries and innovate, shaping the digital solutions of tomorrow. Whatever your passion, we’ll help you become the best you can be, creating career\-defining work and delivering breakthrough thinking.
   

  

**About the team: (TE)**
**About The Role**
 The "Enterprise Architect – Cloud \& Compute " role will report into the Enterprise Architecture Security \& Network Domain Lead and will be focused on developing the target architecture, standards and roadmaps to achieve Diageo’s business goals through a multi\-cloud strategy. This role will partner closely with the Cloud, Security and Functional Architects along with key stakeholders from Enterprise Services team. A trusted advisor to senior leadership in the Digital \& Technology function, the successful candidate will need to demonstrate strong influencing and communication skills to ensure that the strategic EA perspective gains the support required to allow it to become a reality.
   

  

**Role Responsibilities**
* Strategic thinking to take business strategies into architecture
* Collaborating with business stakeholders to develop Diageo’s strategic vision for IT/OT and future\-state business/technology architecture, developing 3\-5 year roadmaps to achieve our business ambitions through technology with key focus on Cloud and Compute Architecture
* Providing thought leadership to architect next generation cloud, providing technical direction to D\&T leadership around emerging trends and integrating cutting edge technical solutions for products and services
* Creating the target and interim architectures that support the roadmap, leading the review of the maturity assessment of current\-state capabilities and the technology selection process for new capabilities
* Collaborating with stakeholders to ensure alignment to the architecture strategy, vision and principles
* Governing the changes in Cloud and Compute to ensure they are strategically aligned, provide value for money, and are fit for purpose, whilst managing architectural risk and debt
* Champion adoption of architecture roadmap by working closely with the Enterprise Services team
* Influence portfolio investments for key technology solutions in line with our roadmaps
* Building and maintaining relationships with technology vendors and suppliers
* Maintaining knowledge of external trends and business priorities to proactively identify transformation opportunities in our data centre and cloud technologies


**Experience / Skills Required**
* Demonstrated expertise with architecting, designing and implementing solutions in a global enterprise environment
* In\-depth knowledge and proven experience in developing capability models, reference architecture and technology roadmap artefacts.
* Significant experience in the development of strategy and enterprise architecture to enable modern Cloud and Compute capabilities, including:
* Strong track record of designing and implementing Azure and/or AWS services in a variety of distributed computing environments.
* Experience with service\-oriented architecture for cloud\-based services.
* Deep knowledge on the tools for the security, deployment, implementation, management, monitoring and reporting of Cloud workloads.
* Experience with public cloud automation DevOps tools and techniques
* Demonstrated experience delivering automation and other optimization techniques to modernize legacy infrastructure
* Experience in evaluating and implementing appropriate storage and container solutions
* Experience with infrastructure automation technologies
* Successful track record selecting and evaluating new network technology that provide the foundations for innovative and scalable enterprise practices
* Expert working knowledge of both Information Technology (IT) and Operations Technology (OT) environments.


**Leadership**
* Bold and strategic thinker – able to develop stretching and ambitious future vision
* Fantastic communicator – able to articulate and sell the vision to senior stakeholders
* Demonstrated ability to deliver integrated Business\-IT strategy, establishing a high level of trust among both business and technical stakeholders
* Building International and cross\-functional relationships to drive engagement
* Experience working with executive sponsors and senior business leadership teams developing and delivering strategy and operating plans with demonstrated competency


**Flexible Working Statement:** 
 Flexibility is key to our success. From part\-time and compressed hours to different locations, our people work flexibly in ways to suit them. Talk to us about what flexibility means to you so that you’re supported from day one.
   

  

**Rewards \& Benefits Statement:** 
 (TE)
   

  

**Diversity statement:** 
 Our purpose is to celebrate life, every day, everywhere. And creating an inclusive culture, where everyone feels valued and that they can belong, is a crucial part of this.
   

  

 We embrace diversity in the broadest possible sense. This means that you’ll be welcomed and celebrated for who you are just by being you. You’ll be part of and help build and champion an inclusive culture that celebrates people of different gender, ethnicity, ability, age, sexual orientation, social class, educational backgrounds, experiences, mindsets, and more.
   

  

 Our ambition is to create the best performing, most trusted and respected consumer products companies in the world. Join us and help transform our business as we take our brands to the next level and build new ones as part of shaping the next generation of celebrations for consumers around the world.
   

  

 Feel inspired? Then this may be the opportunity for you.
   

  

*If you require a reasonable adjustment, please ensure that you capture this information when you submit your application.*
**Worker Type**
 Regular
   

  

**Primary Location:**
 Bangalore Karle Town SEZ
   

  

**Additional Locations :**
 Budapest
   

  

**Job Posting Start Date**
 2025\-06\-30

00a765ad.title: Cloud Architect
00a765ad.description:
Join Delphi \- Where Innovation meets transformation
 



 At Delphi, we believe in creating an environment where our people thrive. Our hybrid work model empowers you to choose where you work—whether it's from the office, your home, or a mix of both—so you can prioritize what matters most. We are committed to supporting your personal goals, family, and overall wellbeing while driving transformative results for our clients.
 



  





 We welcome exceptional talent from anywhere across the globe. Interviews and onboarding are conducted virtually, reflecting our digital\-first mindset. Rooted in the region, we specialize in delivering tailored, impactful solutions in Data, Advanced Analytics and AI, Infrastructure, Cloud Security, and Application Modernization. Whether it’s enabling predictive analytics, transforming operations with automation, or driving customer engagement with intelligent platforms, we are the trusted partner for organizations ready to embrace a smarter, more efficient future.
 



  





**About the Role:
 
 Cloud Infra \& App Modernization (Presales Architect)** 




**Location:
 
 India/Remote** 




  





 We are seeking a skilled Presales Azure Solution Architect to design and present innovative Microsoft Azure solutions tailored to client needs. This role blends technical expertise in Azure IaaS, PaaS, AKS, and cloud security with strong presales capabilities, including solution design, proposal creation, and client engagement. You will work closely with sales teams to demonstrate the value of Azure solutions and support client success.
 



  





**What You’ll Do:**



* Architect and deploy Azure solutions, including IaaS (Virtual Machines, AVS) and PaaS (App Services).
* Manage Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) for scalable, secure containerized workloads.
* Implement robust networking and security solutions using Azure tools (Security Center, Key Vault, AAD).
* Automate deployments with Azure DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, and IaC tools (Terraform, ARM).
* Collaborate with sales teams to design solutions, create proposals, and present to clients.



  





**What You’ll Bring:**



* 10\+ years of experience in Azure IaaS, PaaS, AKS, and networking.
* Strong presales experience, including solution design, technical presentations, and proposal writing.
* Expertise in Azure security, DevOps, and automation tools.
* Ability to communicate technical concepts effectively to diverse audiences.
* Certifications: Azure Solutions Architect Expert preferred; additional certifications in Azure DevOps and security are a plus.
* A sense of humor



  





**What We Offer:**




 At Delphi, we are dedicated to creating an environment where you can thrive, both professionally and personally. Our competitive compensation package, performance\-based incentives, and health benefits are designed to ensure you're well\-supported. We believe in your continuous growth and offer company sponsored certifications, training programs, and skill\-building opportunities to help you succeed. We foster a culture of inclusivity and support, with remote work options and a fully supported work\-from home setup to ensure your comfort and productivity. Our positive and inclusive culture includes team activities, wellness and mental health programs to ensure you feel supported.

0757fdac.title: Solutions Architect
0757fdac.description:
**Company Description:** 




 Woodfield Systems International specializes in the design, manufacturing, and service of customized bulk fluid handling and safety access solutions for industries including oil and gas, chemicals, petrochemicals, and aviation. With a team of dedicated engineers and an experienced global sales network, Woodfield Systems delivers high\-quality products such as loading arms, safety systems, and integrated metering and pumping packages. Headquartered in Thane, the company operates in international markets, including the Middle East, Far East, Indian Subcontinent, and CIS regions. Valuing excellence, integrity, and customer satisfaction, Woodfield adheres to internationally recognized standards, including ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 45001:2018\. The organization fosters a culture of innovation, quality, and safety, ensuring both client and team member needs are met with excellence.
 



  





**Preface:** 




 We are seeking a highly capable Solution Architect to establish and lead our software architecture function from the ground up. As the first member of the software team, you will play a pivotal role in designing scalable, reliable, and future\-ready digital solutions to support our customized engineering and manufacturing operations. This role combines hands\-on architecture, strategic thinking, and execution, with a strong focus on scalability, system integration, and digital transformation.
 



  





**Responsibilities:** 




**1\. Architecture \& System Design** 




  Define end\-to\-end architecture for engineering, manufacturing, and business systems
 



  Design scalable and modular software solutions tailored to customized manufacturing workflows
 



  Select appropriate technology stacks, frameworks, and platforms
 



**2\. Scalability \& Performance** 




  Architect systems with a strong emphasis on scalability, performance, and reliability
 



  Build solutions that can evolve from initial deployments to enterprise\-scale operations
 



  Establish best practices for system performance monitoring and optimization
 



**3\. Digital Transformation** 




  Identify opportunities to digitize and automate engineering and manufacturing processes
 



  Design solutions integrating CAD/PLM, ERP, MES, and shop\-floor systems
 



  Enable data\-driven decision\-making through well\-architected data pipelines
 



**4\. Hands\-on Development \& Prototyping** 




  Act as an individual contributor initially designing, building, and deploying solutions
 



  Develop proof\-of\-concepts (POCs) and MVPs for critical systems
 



  Write high\-quality, maintainable code where needed
 



**5\. Integration \& Interoperability** 




  Architect integrations between internal systems and third\-party platforms
 



  Ensure seamless data flow across engineering, production, and business systems
 



**6\. Governance \& Best Practices** 




  Define coding standards, architecture guidelines, and documentation practices
 



  Establish DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud infrastructure standards
 



  Ensure security, compliance, and data integrity across systems
 



**7\. Team Building \& Leadership** 




  Lay the foundation for the future software team (processes, tools, hiring plans)
 



  Mentor future engineers and guide architectural decisions as the team scales
 



  





**Qualifications \& Experience:** 




  Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
 



  8\+ years of experience in software development, with 3\+ years in architecture roles
 



  Experience designing scalable, distributed systems
 



  Strong understanding of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
 



  Proficiency in one or more programming languages (e.g., Java, Python, C\#, or similar)
 



  Experience with APIs, microservices architecture, and system integration
 



  Knowledge of databases (SQL/NoSQL) and data architecture  Experience in manufacturing, engineering, or industrial domains
 



  Familiarity with ERP, MES, PLM, CAD integrations
 



  Exposure to IoT, Industry 4\.0, or smart manufacturing systems
 



  Experience building systems from scratch in early\-stage or growing organizations
 



  Understanding of DevOps, containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and CI/CD
 



  





**Key Competencies:** 




  Strong problem\-solving and systems thinking
 



  Ability to work independently in a zero\-to\-one environment
 



  Strategic mindset with hands\-on execution capability
 



  Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
 



  High ownership and accountability
 



  





**What Makes This Role Unique:** 




  First software hire with full ownership of architecture decisions
 



  Opportunity to shape the company’s digital and technology roadmap
 



  Direct impact on scaling a customized engineering manufacturing business
 



  Blend of strategy, architecture, and hands\-on execution

30a76aa4.title: Atlassian Solution Architect
30a76aa4.description:
**This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for an Atlassian Solution Architect based in India.**
 This is an exciting opportunity for an experienced Atlassian professional to lead enterprise\-scale platform transformations, complex migrations, and strategic solution design initiatives. The role combines architecture, technical leadership, and hands\-on expertise to build scalable and high\-performing collaboration ecosystems. You will work closely with cross\-functional stakeholders to optimize workflows, integrate business\-critical systems, and drive platform innovation across large and complex environments. The position offers exposure to cutting\-edge technologies, cloud transformation projects, and enterprise agility initiatives. Ideal for professionals who thrive in dynamic environments, this role provides significant influence over technology strategy while offering opportunities to mentor teams and shape best practices across the organization.
   

  

**Accountabilities**
* Architect, design, and implement scalable Atlassian solutions aligned with business objectives and technical requirements.
* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of new platform implementations, optimization initiatives, and complex migrations across Cloud, Server, Data Center, and third\-party environments.
* Assess existing Jira and Confluence environments and define comprehensive migration strategies, including risk identification and mitigation planning.
* Develop and maintain architectural documentation, including system blueprints, integration designs, workflows, configuration standards, and data models.
* Build and maintain custom automations and platform enhancements using Groovy scripting, ScriptRunner, Python, and related technologies.
* Design and implement integrations with external applications using REST APIs, webhooks, middleware platforms, and DevOps toolchains.
* Conduct platform health assessments, performance tuning activities, and gap analyses to improve usability, scalability, and operational efficiency.
* Establish governance frameworks, best practices, and standards for configurations, security, permissions, and user management.
* Collaborate with business stakeholders, development teams, operations, and external partners to translate functional requirements into robust technical solutions.
* Provide technical leadership, mentorship, training, and ongoing support to internal teams and end users.
* Manage multiple projects simultaneously, ensuring timelines, deliverables, and stakeholder expectations are effectively maintained.
* Stay informed about developments within the Atlassian ecosystem, marketplace applications, emerging technologies, and certification advancements.


**Requirements**
* 8\+ years of experience working with Atlassian products, including Jira Software, Jira Service Management, Confluence, Bitbucket, Atlassian Guard, and related tools.
* Proven expertise in designing and implementing enterprise\-scale Atlassian solutions in complex environments.
* Strong experience leading migrations across Atlassian Cloud, Server, and Data Center environments.
* Hands\-on expertise in Groovy scripting, particularly with ScriptRunner, and familiarity with Python for automation initiatives.
* Advanced knowledge of REST APIs, webhooks, and integration frameworks for connecting Atlassian tools with enterprise applications.
* Deep understanding of workflows, permission schemes, custom fields, automation rules, configuration management, and platform architecture.
* Experience implementing and configuring Atlassian Marketplace applications based on business requirements.
* Familiarity with DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, and modern software delivery ecosystems is highly desirable.
* Strong analytical thinking, problem\-solving capabilities, and attention to detail.
* Excellent communication, documentation, stakeholder management, and presentation skills.
* Proven ability to lead projects, mentor teams, and influence technical decision\-making in enterprise environments.
* Atlassian certifications such as ACP\-100, ACP\-120, ACP\-600, or other Atlassian accreditations are considered strong advantages.


**Benefits**
* Competitive compensation package aligned with experience and expertise.
* Opportunity to work on large\-scale digital transformation and enterprise modernization projects.
* Exposure to innovative technologies, AI\-driven initiatives, and industry\-leading enterprise platforms.
* Flexible work arrangements and a collaborative, globally distributed work environment.
* Access to continuous learning opportunities, professional development programs, and certification support.
* Inclusive and diverse workplace culture that values collaboration, innovation, and individual growth.
* Opportunities for career advancement and leadership development within a rapidly evolving technology environment.
* Engagement with Fortune 500 organizations and complex, high\-impact enterprise initiatives.


**How Jobgether Works**
 We use an
 **AI\-powered matching process** 
 to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top\-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
   

  

 We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
   

  

 Why Apply Through Jobgether?
   

  

**Data Privacy Notice:** 
 By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre\-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

f97a87a8.title: Security Architect: - Cloud + CSPM + GitHub
f97a87a8.description:
**About Position:** 




  





 We are seeking a Security Architect to define, maintain, and govern security architecture across infrastructure, cloud, and product environments. The role is responsible for embedding securitybydesign principles throughout the technology landscape, ensuring that security policies, standards, and risk requirements are translated into scalable and practical architectural controls. You will work closely with Security Operations, IT, Cloud, Product Security, and GRC teams to design secure solutions that align with industry standards and organizational objectives.
 



  




* **Role: Security Architect**
* **Location: Bengaluru**
* **Experience: 8 to 12 Years**
* **Job Type: Full\-Time Employment**



  





**What You'll Do:** 




  




* Define and maintain security reference architectures, design patterns, and security standards across infrastructure, cloud, and product environments.
* Design secure architectures for applications, platforms, integrations, APIs, and cloud services.
* Ensure securitybydesign principles are incorporated throughout the system development lifecycle.
* Review new systems, applications, infrastructure changes, and technology initiatives to identify security risks and architectural gaps.
* Conduct security architecture assessments and provide remediation recommendations.
* Perform threat modeling and define appropriate security controls and mitigation strategies.
* Translate security policies, standards, and frameworks into actionable technical security controls.
* Define and govern controls related to identity and access management, network security, data protection, logging, monitoring, and encryption.
* Design and assess cloud security architectures across Azure, AWS, GCP, and hybrid environments.
* Review cloud platform configurations, IAM models, network segmentation, and cloud\-native security controls.
* Support secure design and implementation of DevSecOps, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), and cloud\-native architectures.
* Partner with Product Security and Engineering teams to establish secure design patterns and application security controls.
* Provide guidance on secure SDLC practices, API security, authentication, authorization, and data protection strategies.
* Collaborate with Security Operations teams to ensure monitoring, detection, and response requirements are embedded into architectural designs.
* Support logging, observability, security monitoring, and detection use case development.
* Participate in architecture review boards, governance forums, and security advisory activities
* Support internal and external audits by providing architecture documentation and security control evidence.
* Drive continuous improvement of security standards, architecture frameworks, and organizational security capabilities.
* Act as a trusted security advisor to business, technology, cloud, and product stakeholders.



  





**Expertise You'll Bring:** 




  




* 8 to 10\+ years of experience in Cybersecurity, Information Security, Security Engineering, or Security Architecture.
* Strong experience designing secure architectures across cloud, infrastructure, applications, and enterprise platforms.
* Deep expertise in Identity and Access Management (IAM), authentication, authorization, privileged access management, and modern identity architectures.
* Strong knowledge of network security, segmentation, zero\-trust principles, and secure enterprise architecture.
* Experience designing and securing cloud environments across Azure, AWS, GCP, and hybrid infrastructures.
* Strong understanding of cloud\-native architectures, container security, Kubernetes security, and Infrastructure as Code security practices.
* Expertise in security frameworks and standards including ISO 27001, NIST Cybersecurity Framework, and CIS Controls.
* Hands\-on experience conducting security architecture reviews, risk assessments, and control evaluations.
* Experience translating security requirements into practical, scalable, and business\-aligned technical solutions.
* Knowledge of data protection, encryption technologies, key management, and privacy\-focused security design.
* Experience supporting secure application development, API security, secure SDLC, and product security initiatives.
* Strong understanding of logging, monitoring, threat detection, and security operations integration.
* Experience working with DevSecOps practices and integrating security into CI/CD pipelines.
* Knowledge of threat modeling methodologies such as STRIDE, PASTA, or similar frameworks.
* Familiarity with security technologies including SIEM, EDR/XDR, IAM, PAM, CSPM, DLP, and vulnerability management platforms.
* Experience supporting governance, compliance, audit, and risk management activities.
* Strong stakeholder management, consulting, and communication skills.
* Ability to communicate complex security concepts to both technical and non\-technical audiences.
* Experience participating in enterprise architecture reviews and strategic technology initiatives.
* Experience implementing Zero Trust security architectures.
* Expertise in modern identity models and federation technologies.
* Knowledge of DevSecOps, Secure SDLC, and shift\-left security practices.
* Experience with threat modeling and attack path analysis.
* Familiarity with cloud security tooling, CSPM, CWPP, and security automation solutions
* Security certifications such as CISSP, CCSP, SABSA, TOGAF, Azure Security EngineerAWS Security Specialty, or equivalent.
* Experience working in SaaS, telecom, cloud\-native, or highly regulated enterprise environments.



  





**Benefits:** 




  




* Competitive salary and benefits package

7c0eed78.title: Security Architect: - Cloud + CSPM + GitHub
7c0eed78.description:
**About Position:** 




  





 We are looking for a skilled Security Architect: \- Cloud \+ CSPM \+ GitHub to support security initiatives, delivery excellence, and operational outcomes within the Security Practice.
 



  




* **Role: Security Architect: \- Cloud \+ CSPM \+ GitHub**
* **Location: Bengaluru**
* **Experience: Between 12 to 15 Years**
* **Job Type: Full Time Employment**



  





**What You'll Do:** 




  




* Security Architect Security Architecture Design
* Define and maintain security reference architectures, design patterns, and standards across infrastructure, cloud, and product environments
* Design secure architectures for applications, platforms, integrations, and cloud services
* Ensure security\-by\-design principles are embedded across the full system lifecycle Architecture Review Risk Assessment
* Review new systems, applications, and major changes to identify security risks and architectural gaps
* Perform security architecture assessments and provide structured remediation guidance
* Support threat modelling activities and define appropriate security controls Policy Control Translation
* Translate security policies, standards, and frameworks (ISO 27001, NIST, CIS) into actionable technical controls and architecture requirements
* Define security controls related to identity, access, data protection, network segmentation, logging, and monitoring
* Ensure consistency and scalability of security controls across environments Cloud Platform Security
* Define and assess cloud security architectures (Azure, AWS, or hybrid environments)
* Review IAM models, network segmentation, and platform configurations



  





**Expertise You'll Bring:** 




  




* 12\-15 years of experience in Cyber Security, Security Architecture, Cloud Security, or Enterprise Security Engineering.
* Proven experience designing and governing enterprise security architectures across cloud, infrastructure, applications, and platform environments.
* Strong knowledge of security\-by\-design principles, secure architecture frameworks, and zero\-trust security models.
* Experience conducting security architecture reviews, security assessments, and risk evaluations for enterprise applications and cloud platforms.
* Strong hands\-on experience in securing cloud environments across Azure, AWS, and Hybrid Cloud platforms.
* Expertise in Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) tools and practices.
* Experience reviewing and securing Cloud IAM Models
* Network Segmentation
* Security Groups
* Security Policies
* Cloud Configurations
* Data Protection Controls
* Strong understanding of cloud\-native security services and governance frameworks.
* Experience implementing cloud security controls aligned with organizational and regulatory requirements.
* Hands\-on experience securing GitHub repositories, source code management platforms, and developer ecosystems.
* Experience implementing DevSecOps practices and integrating security controls into CI/CD pipelines.
* Knowledge of GitHub Advanced Security
* Secret Scanning
* Code Security Reviews
* Dependency Management
* Software Supply Chain Security
* Vulnerability Management
* Experience embedding security controls across the software development lifecycle.
* Strong understanding of industry security frameworks and standards including ISO 27001
* NIST
* CIS Benchmarks
* OWASP
* Security Architecture Best Practices
* Experience translating policies, standards, and regulatory requirements into actionable technical controls.
* Ability to define and govern security controls related to Identity \& Access Management
* Data Protection
* Logging \& Monitoring
* Network Security
* Encryption
* Privileged Access Management
* Experience conducting threat modeling exercises and security architecture reviews.
* Ability to identify architectural risks, security gaps, and remediation strategies.
* Strong understanding of Secure Application Architecture
* Attack Surface Analysis
* Security Risk Management
* Vulnerability Assessment
* Threat Detection \& Prevention
* Strong stakeholder management and executive communication skills.
* Ability to influence architecture decisions across business and technology teams.
* Excellent analytical, problem\-solving, and decision\-making capabilities.
* Strong documentation, governance, and technical review experience.
* Ability to mentor architects, engineers, and security teams on security best practices.
* Relevant experience aligned to the role and security domain.
* Strong communication, documentation, troubleshooting, and stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to work in structured delivery environments and follow security best practices.



  





**Benefits:** 




  




* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Culture focused on talent development with quarterly growth opportunities and company\-sponsored higher education and certifications
* Opportunity to work with cutting\-edge technologies
* Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
* Annual health check\-ups
* Insurance coverage: group term life, personal accident, and Mediclaim hospitalization for self, spouse, two children, and parents



  





**Values\-Driven, People\-Centric \& Inclusive Work Environment:** 




  





 Persistent is dedicated to fostering diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We invite applications from all qualified individuals, including those with disabilities, and regardless of gender or gender preference. We welcome diverse candidates from all backgrounds.
