6f793a9d.title: Managed Services Service Delivery
6f793a9d.description:
**Managed Services**  

**Service Delivery, Staff**

 **Job Description:**  

  

The Service Delivery Consultant delivers contracted Managed Services by executing operational, data, and system\-based work on behalf of clients. Acting as an extension of the client’s internal team, this role emphasizes accuracy, consistency, and timely execution while adhering to defined Statements of Work (SOWs) and service standards.


In this role, you will provide professional, courteous, and efficient services across Blackbaud’s suite of CRM products. You will manage file imports and exports, maintain data hygiene, build and deliver reports, and support high\-volume, detail\-driven work—making strong organizational and time\-management skills essential. Working in a structured, fast\-paced team environment, you will help prioritize requests, troubleshoot issues, and communicate effectively with both internal teams and clients regarding schedules and delivery. As part of a collaborative team of analysts, you will report to a functional area manager and adapt quickly as client needs and services evolve.  

  

**Major Objectives:**


Client Service \& Delivery

* Deliver Managed Services work in accordance with executed Statements of Work (SOWs), service catalogs, and internal standards
* Manage assigned client deliverables across multiple accounts while meeting schedules and service\-level expectations
* Communicate clearly with internal stakeholders regarding status, priorities, risks, and dependencies
* Complete Donation Processing \& support Fundraising Operations
* Perform manual gift entry accurately and consistently in client systems
* Process and manage batches, ensuring completeness, accuracy, and proper balancing
* Execute batch imports, validate results, and resolve exceptions
* Perform batch reconciliation to ensure gifts, payments, and financial records align
* Generate and process acknowledgments, including letters, emails, and receipts
* Build and deliver advanced reporting
* Build and deliver sophisticated, segmented lists for direct mail and digital fundraising

Quality, Compliance \& Documentation

* Maintain data integrity through quality checks and standard operating procedures
* Adhere to documented delivery processes and data handling policies
* Ensure work complies with contractual commitments and security requirements
* Document work performed and outcomes in required systems
* Identify and escalate risks or scope concerns

Collaboration \& Continuous Improvement

* Collaborate with Service Delivery Managers and peers to prioritize work
* Contribute to process improvements that increase efficiency and quality leveraging AI and automation wherever possible
* Support onboarding of new services or processes as Managed Services evolve
**Experience and Skills**

* Excellent client\-facing skills and experience, including a high proficiency in written and spoken English
* 2–4 years of experience in service delivery, operations, or managed services
* Experience with donation processing, gift entry, batch management, or reconciliation
* Strong attention to detail and time\-management skills
* Ability to manage multiple priorities in a delivery\-driven environment
* Strong written and verbal communication skills

Preferred Qualifications

* Experience with CRM or fundraising platforms
* Experience in nonprofit or mission\-driven organizations
* Familiarity with SOW\-based or subscription service delivery models
* Advanced Excel or reporting skills (Power BI is a plus)
**What Success Looks Like**

* Client deliverables are completed accurately, on time, and within scope
* High\-quality, consistent service delivery is achieved
* Data is accurate, secure, and well\-documented
* Effective collaboration and contribution to team improvements
**Additional Information:**

* **Job Level:** Staff
* **Number of Openings:** 1
* **Years of Experience:** College graduate or equivalent experience
* **Level of Education:** College graduate
* **Time Zone****/Shift Expectation****:** US ET business hours

Stay up to date on everything Blackbaud, follow us on Linkedin, X, Instagram, Facebook and YouTube  



Blackbaud powers social impact through purpose‑driven technology and responsible AI. Guided by our *Intelligence for Good®* vision, we’re building a culture where innovation, trust, and human expertise come together to help organizations make a greater difference in the world.

  

Blackbaud is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and is committed to maintaining an inclusive work environment. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, physical or mental disability, age, or veteran status or any other basis protected by federal, state, or local law.

3370e482.title: Engagement Manager
3370e482.description:
Job Snapshot
Updated Date
20\-07\-2026
Job ID
Job\_397
Department
Engagements
Location
Bengaluru, Karnataka, India
Experience
8 \- 12 Years
Employee Type
Full Time
  
Job Description
**JOB DESCRIPTION –Engagement Manager Organic Growth (SEO \& GEO)**


**Location:**


Bangalore \- work on\-site 3 days per week


**Reports To:**


Director \-Engagements


**Role Overview**


The Engagement Manager – Organic Growth (SEO \& GEO) will lead strategic organic growth engagements for enterprise clients, helping them maximize visibility, customer acquisition, and business outcomes across both traditional search engines and emerging AI\-powered discovery platforms.


This individual will serve as the primary client\-facing lead, partnering with clients and internal SEO, Content, Analytics, UX, Data Science, and Technology teams to develop and execute integrated search strategies. The role requires expertise in Enterprise SEO, Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), Technical SEO, Content Strategy, Search Analytics, AI\-driven search experiences, and digital business strategy.


The ideal candidate combines strong consulting and stakeholder management skills with deep search expertise and the ability to translate business challenges into scalable organic growth solutions.


**What You’ll Be Doing**


**Client Leadership \& Strategic Advisory**


* Serve as a trusted advisor to clients on SEO, GEO, search trends, AI\-driven discovery, and evolving search ecosystems.
* Develop organic growth roadmaps aligned to client business objectives, customer acquisition goals, and revenue targets.
* Partner with senior client stakeholders to integrate organic growth strategies into broader digital marketing and business initiatives.
* Lead Quarterly Business Reviews (QBRs), strategic planning sessions, and executive\-level client discussions.
* Build strong client relationships and become a trusted partner for search and organic growth strategy.

**Organic Growth Strategy (SEO \& GEO)**


* Lead enterprise SEO and GEO strategies across:
* Technical SEO, Content Strategy \& Optimization, Information Architecture, Authority Building, Entity Optimization, AI Search Visibility, Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).
* Develop strategies to improve visibility across: Google Search, Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity
* Emerging AI\-powered discovery platforms
* Identify growth opportunities through keyword, audience, competitive, market, and search behavior analysis.
* Drive forecasting, opportunity sizing, and business case development for organic growth initiatives.
* Collaborate with content, analytics, and data science teams to create AI\-ready content and scalable search frameworks.

**Analytics \& Problem Solving**


* Analyze organic traffic, rankings, conversions, engagement metrics, and business KPIs to identify growth opportunities.
* Translate complex business challenges into actionable SEO and GEO strategies.
* Utilize data from: GA4, Google Search Console, Adobe Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs Screaming Frog, Looker Studio, AI\-powered search and content intelligence platforms.
* Conduct SEO/GEO audits and prioritize recommendations based on business impact and implementation effort.
* Present findings, recommendations, and growth opportunities to executive stakeholders.

**Program \& Delivery Management**


* Own end\-to\-end management of organic growth engagements from strategy through execution and measurement.
* Lead cross\-functional teams comprising SEO specialists, content strategists, developers, UX teams, analytics resources, and data scientists.
* Drive implementation of recommendations and ensure timely delivery against agreed roadmaps.
* Monitor project health, identify risks, and proactively manage stakeholder expectations. Ensure delivery of measurable outcomes including traffic growth, AI search visibility, rankings, conversions, and revenue impact.
* Manage client escalations and drive resolution in partnership with delivery teams.

**Commercial \& Account Management**


* Drive client satisfaction, retention, and long\-term account health.
* Identify opportunities for account expansion, upsell, and cross\-sell of iQuanti capabilities.
* Support proposal development, solutioning discussions, and growth initiatives. Ensure scope, priorities, and client expectations remain aligned throughout the engagement.
* Partner with internal teams to maintain strong delivery quality and commercial performance.

**Team Leadership**


* Mentor and guide SEO specialists, analysts, and consultants.
* Foster a culture of analytical rigor, innovation, accountability, and continuous learning.
* Share best practices across teams and contribute to capability development.
* Support hiring, onboarding, and skill development initiatives

**Who You Are**


* 8–12\+ years of experience in SEO, Organic Growth, Digital Marketing Consulting, or related fields.
* Minimum 5\+ years of experience managing enterprise SEO programs for large websites.
* Strong expertise in Technical SEO, Content Strategy \& Optimization, Site Architecture, Keyword Research, Core Web Vitals, Indexation \& Crawl Optimization, International SEO, and BFSI/E\-commerce SEO.
* Experience managing client\-facing SEO engagements and presenting recommendations to senior stakeholders.
* Strong analytical skills with expertise in GA4, Google Search Console, Adobe Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Screaming Frog, and Looker Studio.
* Proven experience driving measurable improvements in organic traffic, rankings, conversions, and revenue.
* Strong project management, stakeholder management, and communication skills. Experience leading cross\-functional teams and mentoring junior team members.

**Preferred Experience**


* Experience with Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) and AI\-powered search ecosystems.
* Understanding of Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and emerging AI search experiences.
* Experience leveraging AI tools for SEO analysis, content optimization, workflow automation, and insight generation.
* Familiarity with entity\-based search, semantic search, and knowledge graph optimization.
* Experience working with enterprise clients in Financial Services, Telecom, Retail, Healthcare, or E\-commerce sectors.
* Experience in consulting, digital agencies, or enterprise SEO environments

**Desired Qualifications:**


* MBA from a premier institute (preferred but not mandatory).
* Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Business, Marketing, or related field.
* SEO certifications from Google, SEMrush, Ahrefs, or equivalent platforms are a plus.

**Success Measures**


* High client satisfaction and retention.
* Growth in organic traffic, conversions, and business impact across managed accounts.
* Improved visibility across both traditional search and AI\-powered discovery platforms.
* Successful adoption of SEO and GEO best practices across client engagements.
* Increased account growth through expansion opportunities.
* Strong stakeholder feedback on strategic thinking, execution quality, and business impact.
* Development of scalable organic growth frameworks and methodologies.

**About Us**


iQuanti is an independent performance marketing company that generates value for clients by utilizing data to drive better business outcomes through digital channels. Beyond campaign strategy, management, and optimization, we engage with clients to understand their business and produce proprietary insights that lead to stronger business results.


Through a data science\-led approach to client problem\-solving, we've created a differentiated suite of product\-driven service offerings that we deploy to clients, including a search\-predictive efficacy platform called ALPS. We're 350\+ people strong worldwide, with hubs in Jersey City and Bangalore.


**Why You’ll Like Working for iQuanti**


* Opportunity to work with Fortune 500 brands and the Top 5 US Banks on high\-impact, long\-term strategic projects.
* Gain hands\-on experience with patented, enterprise\-grade platforms like ALPS™ and LEAP.
* Benefit from a fast\-growing environment and cross\-channel learning in SEO, Paid, and CRO.
* Enjoy a hybrid work model and flexible timing in a culture that prioritizes both excellence and well\-being.

**Explore More**


* **Who We Are:** iQuanti Official Website
* **Our Success Stories:** Case Studies
* **Our Culture:** Check us out on LinkedIn and Instagram
* **Our Tech:** Explore ourALPS Platform and Leap
* **Insights:** Explore the iQuanti Blog

2f6e5516.title: Senior Technical Consultant- Managed Services
2f6e5516.description:
**About the Company** 
 : 89 Solutions is a pure\-play ServiceNow EmployeeWorks (Moveworks) partner delivering enterprise\-grade AI solutions that transform employee support and productivity at scale. With a proven track record globally, we are recognized for leading the market in successful Moveworks implementations and advanced Agent Studio use cases that deliver measurable business impact.
 



  





  





**About the Role** 
 : As a Senior Technical Consultant in our Managed Services practice, you’ll responsibilities will be as follows:
 



  





  





**Responsibilities** 
 :
 


* Own the end\-to\-end health and stability of live Moveworks environments through regular platform monitoring, including integration health, user ingestion, and content pipelines.
* Lead Moveworks incident management and triage — act as the first line of support, resolving production issues and coordinating with internal specialists for complex escalations.
* Fine\-tune existing Moveworks configurations (plugins, utterances, workflows, access rules) to improve resolution rates, accuracy, and user experience.
* Conduct Moveworks configuration optimization reviews, identifying technical debt, misconfigurations, and opportunities to align with best practices.
* Analyze interaction metrics, user behaviour, and feedback trends to identify adoption gaps and recommend targeted improvements.
* Manage incremental change requests — knowledge source updates, ingestion filters, credential rotations, connector changes, and access adjustments.
* Deliver knowledge and ServiceNow service catalogue uplift, including content gap analysis, knowledge ingestion reporting, and ITSM form remediation.
* Design, build, and deploy new AI agents using Moveworks Agent Studio, integrating with enterprise systems (ServiceNow, Workday, Okta, etc.)
* Act as a trusted technical advisor to customer stakeholders — leading platform strategy, presenting insights in service reviews, and aligning improvements to business outcomes.



  









**Qualifications** 
 :
 


* 5\+ years in a customer\-facing technical role (Senior Technical Consultant, Support Engineer, Implementation Engineer, or similar)
* 3\+ years hands\-on experience with integrations (REST APIs) between enterprise applications
* Hand\-on admin and development experience on ServiceNow. Preferred modules – ITSM, HRSD, ESC, Now Assist, Now Platform (service catalogue, server side scripting etc)
* Proficiency in at least one scripting/programming language (Python, JavaScript, PowerShell, etc.)
* Strong production troubleshooting skills with a structured, methodical approach
* Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to engage effectively with both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* Demonstrated ability to produce clear, high\-quality technical documentation
* General knowledge of AI technologies \& conversational AI concept
* Advanced Level of English

a1a12d01.title: Amazon Connect - Senior Consultant, Managed Services
a1a12d01.description:
**Summary**
**Position Summary**
**Customer**
 The Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experiences and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology\-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence.
   

  

**Position Summary**
**Level:** 
 Senior Consultant Technical Transformation or equivalent
   

  

 As an experienced Senior Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need\-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements .
   

  

**Work you’ll do** 
 :
   

  

* Owns complex deliverables independently, ensuring quality and timelines and Exhibits interest in working across tracks/outside of core skills
* Consistently demonstrates SME skills within their area of expertise and proactively identifies potential risks and come up with mitigation plans \- Performs solution reviews and/or process/code reviews effectively \& independently


**The Team** 
 :
   

  

 Our Sales \& Service team focuses on delivering marketing and growth objectives aligned with our clients’ brand values for measurable business growth. We help clients turn business values into measurable growth through creatively driven, personalized content, communications, and experiences that engage and inspire people to act. We implement and operate the technology platforms that enable personalized content, commerce and marketing user\-centric experiences. In doing so, we transform our clients’ marketing and engagement operations into modern, data\-driven, creatively focused organizations. Our team brings deep experience in creative and digital marketing capabilities by a combination of key focus areas i.e., Brand, Advertising, Experiences, Content, Marketing, Commerce, Products, Data and measurement/analysis.
   

  

**Qualifications**
**Must Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications**
* 6\-9 years of technology consulting experience, with a focus on cloud operations.
* Minimum of 3\-4 years of hands\-on experience with Amazon Connect and related AWS services.
* Proficiency in designing and implementing Amazon Connect contact flows integrated with Python, Lambda, and JSON.
* Strong working knowledge of AWS services, including but not limited to: AWS Connect, Lex, Polly, Lambda, CloudWatch, Kinesis, Glue, S3, Redshift, SNS, and SQS.
* Solid scripting skills in Python, with the ability to write SQL queries and perform string analysis.
* Familiarity with modern DevOps tools and techniques, including GitHub, CI/CD, and Docker.
* Experience with agile/iterative methodologies for implementing cloud projects.
* Demonstrated ability to translate business and technical requirements into effective technical designs.
* Good understanding of end\-to\-end project delivery methodologies for cloud projects.
* General knowledge of cloud computing technologies and current trends.
* Experience working on CI/CD/DevOps pipelines is a plus.


**Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:**
* Experience working on CI/CD/DevOps pipelines is a plus.


**Education:**
* BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university


**Location:**
* Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai


**\#FY27ReferralCampaign**
 \#S\&S2027
   

  

**Our purpose**
 Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
   

  

**Our people and culture**
 Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
   

  

**Professional development**
 At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India .
   

  

**Benefits To Help You Thrive**
 At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
   

  

**Recruiting tips**
 From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.
   

  

 Requisition code: 358200

We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology\-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence.
   

  

**Position Summary**
**Level:** 
 Consultant, Technical Transformation or equivalent
   

  

 As an experienced Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need\-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements.
   

  

**Work you’ll do:**
 Configure and enhance Five9 ACD capabilities: skills, queues, IVR/IVA, call flows, routing strategies, agent profiles, and campaigns.
   

  

* Build and maintain integrations between Five9 and external systems (e.g., CRM such as Salesforce/Dynamics, ticketing, identity/SSO, data/warehouse).
* Develop using Five9 APIs (REST) and platform features (CTI/CRM adapters where applicable), including event handling, screen pops, click\-to\-dial, and dispositioning.
* Implement automation and data workflows: call logging, activity creation, customer lookup, case creation, callbacks, and post\-call processing.
* Support reporting/analytics needs: business dashboards, operational KPIs, data extracts, and reconciliation between Five9 and source systems.
* Troubleshoot production issues (routing, audio, agent login, integration failures), perform root\-cause analysis, and implement fixes with proper change control.
* Ensure solutions meet security, privacy, and compliance requirements (PII handling, access control, retention).
* Create technical documentation: configuration specs, runbooks, test plans, deployment steps, and operational handover.
* Participate in Agile delivery: estimation, sprint execution, code reviews, CI/CD practices where applicable.


**The team:**
 Step into our
 **Sales \& Service** 
 team, where technology powers business impact and innovation drives everything we do. As a global, dynamic group, we deliver seamless, end\-to\-end solutions—advising on strategy, implementing advanced CRM or back\-office platforms, and enabling continuous business improvement. Here, you’ll collaborate with passionate, creative minds to transform sales models, elevate service excellence, and optimize customer operations. If you’re ready to grow your expertise, make bold ideas real, and help redefine the customer experience for leading organizations, this is your next big move. Join us and shape the future of sales and service!
   

  

**Qualifications**
**Must Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:**
* 3 \- 6 years of hands\-on experience in contact center engineering/development with at least 1–2 years hands\-on with Five9\.
* Strong experience with Five9 Studio/IVR and routing/ACD configuration (skills, queues, priority, agent states, campaigns).
* Hands\-on experience building API\-based integrations (REST, OAuth/token auth patterns), plus solid JSON/data mapping.
* Proficiency in at least one general\-purpose language commonly used for integrations (e.g., JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, Java, C\#) and writing maintainable, testable code.
* Experience with CRM integrations (Salesforce/Dynamics or similar) and common contact center patterns (screen pop, call logging, CTI).
* Working knowledge of telephony fundamentals (SIP, PSTN basics, call flows, DTMF, codecs concepts) sufficient to troubleshoot with telecom partners.
* Strong debugging skills across logs, API traces, and platform configuration; ability to translate business requirements into technical designs.


**Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:**
* Five9 certifications (if available/active) or comparable CCaaS certs.
* Experience with WFO/WFM/QM integrations, speech analytics, or AI/IVA platforms.
* Data/BI skills: SQL, Power BI/Tableau, building KPI layers for contact center reporting.
* Experience with SSO/SAML, SCIM provisioning, and enterprise identity patterns.
* Prior work in regulated environments (HIPAA, PCI, SOX, CJIS) and secure SDLC.


**Education:**
* BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university


**Location:**
* Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai


 \#FY27ReferralCampaign
   

  

**Our purpose**
 Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
   

  

**Our people and culture**
 Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
   

  

**Professional development**
 At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India .
   

  

**Benefits To Help You Thrive**
 At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
   

  

**Recruiting tips**
 From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

 :

* Consistently demonstrates SME skills within their area of expertise and proactively identifies potential risks and come up with mitigation plans \- Performs solution reviews and/or process/code reviews effectively \& independently

 :

* Experience with agile/iterative methodologies for implementing cloud projects.

1705373e.title: Prin IT Enterprise Architect
1705373e.description:
The future is what you make it. When you join Honeywell, you become a member of our global team of thinkers, innovators, dreamers, and doers who make the things that make the future. That means changing the way we fly, fueling jets in an eco\-friendly way, keeping buildings smart and safe, and even making it possible to breathe on Mars. Working at Honeywell isn’t just about developing cool things. That’s why all our employees enjoy access to dynamic career opportunities across different fields and industries. Are you ready to help us make the future?


As a Principal Enterprise Architect, you will be responsible for understanding requirements/problem statements from business functions like PLM, product engineering, project engineering, and DevSecOps processes and building enterprise architectures that meet those requirements. This role is responsible for managing enterprise\-wide PLM platforms, NPI platforms, and project engineering platforms for Honeywell internal users and external customers. This role leads cross\-functional teams to design end\-to\-end solutions for projects and execute PLM, NPI, project engineering, and DevSecOps at the enterprise level which will be leveraged by any/all Honeywell businesses. Responsible for providing solution and integration architectures between technologies such as Teamcenter, Cora, Accolade, Jira, and other related systems. Responsibility also includes working closely with offshore/outsourced resources for application development, support, and optimization. You will own and lead the technical capability evaluation of SaaS applications in the market that could potentially meet business requirements, create QFD to rate, recommend preferred business applications and develop architecture to onboard it, and integrate it with other Honeywell on\-premises/ cloud\-hosted/ SaaS applications as applicable.


  
YOU MUST HAVE


* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or similar discipline
* 8\+ years of experience in solutions or Enterprise architecture/deployment within PLM, product engineering, project engineering, and DevSecOps processes
* 6\+ years of experience with Teamcenter or Windchill specializing in the architect role
* 3\+ years of experience in NPI and project engineering related systems

WE VALUE


* Experience implementing PLM, DevSecOps and PPM platforms
* Certification in Teamcenter is a plus
* Experience in Jira, GitHub and other DevSecOps tools
* Acting with a sense of urgency; a bias for action and speed
* Proficiency in Enterprise Architecture framework, principles, and tools
* Critical to have proven people skills, working successfully in a team context with co\-workers, clients, and managers across multiple functions and geographies
* Ability to build credibility and trust with peers, stakeholders and leaders to get buy\-in for best architecture decisions for Honeywell
* Exceptional consultative, project management, problem\-solving, and multi\-tasking abilities
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills, and ability to communicate across borders
* Ability to communicate and collaborate with internal technical teams and external business and service teams
* Knowledge of research advances in information technology
* Experience or certification in SAFe (Scaled Agile Framework) or similar methodologies
* Ability to set priorities and remain flexible in a changing environment
* Ability to build relationships with and gain the trust of customers by always meeting commitments
* Ability to make the complex simple and speak/write clearly and succinctly
* Ability to use judgment and logic to understand a problem or situation and assess carefully before acting

  
Key Responsibilities:


**Platform / Solution Delivery**

* Delivery of global PLM solutions for the Honeywell enterprise. Work with the functions and Strategic Business Groups (SBGs) to determine lead management optimization and partner with engineering teams in investment priorities.
* Design of end\-to\-end NPI solutions for appropriate tracking and reporting of NPI programs, associated SKUs, product data, and opportunity pipeline data.
* Support architecture and design activities related to enhancements to project engineering solutions for improvements and support programs like Project Engineering for end\-to\-end automation of project design and execution activities.
* Ensure IT systems and applications meet the requirements of the businesses and their processes.
* Partner with project delivery teams to ensure adherence to common processes and the definition of new processes.
* This technical position focuses on integrating PLM platforms with other related systems. This includes working across internal stakeholder groups to ensure the systems and processes meet the needs of the engineering, GPMO, and offering management organization to plan, execute, and measure initiatives.

Work with the functions and Strategic Business Groups (SDGs) to determine GDM process standards, KPIs, and data elements.


**Architecture Strategy and Roadmap**

* Creation, business alignment, and delivery of global PLM, NPI Tool, and project engineering technology roadmaps for the enterprise.
* Works with Business Partners to provide inputs to Strategic Plan (STRAP) and Annual Operating Plan (AOP) in support of strategies and objectives.
* Integrate SBG\-specific business processes related to Global Design Model including Teamcenter, Windchill, Jira, and other related systems.
* Partner closely with the GDM and Enterprise Services teams to establish and align standards and technology roadmaps for emerging digital customer experience solution capabilities across Honeywell.
* Document architectures for platform and development teams in conjunction with Solution Architects.
* Research and recommend innovative and contemporary technology solutions by leading R\&D, POC, and selection efforts for PLM, project engineering, and DevSecOps solutions.
* Ensure alignment and support of all critical systems relative to security and data privacy policies and standards inclusive of accessibility, vulnerability, and website inventory management.
* Partner with IT functional, business, and infrastructure leaders to establish lifecycle governance of technology in conjunction with application roadmaps.

**Solution \& Service Optimization**

* Drive commonality in PLM, NPI, and project engineering application platforms across Honeywell enterprise.
* Partner with the C\&CE and EIP Service and Operations Leader to manage ongoing operational support for engineering and project management using both internal and co\-source resources.
* Serve as a liaison to the solution operations team(s) to document and facilitate the successful implementation of the solution.
* Advise and create methods to improve technical solution processes.

  
Honeywell helps organizations solve the world's most complex challenges in automation, the future of aviation and energy transition. As a trusted partner, we provide actionable solutions and innovation through our Aerospace Technologies, Building Automation, Energy and Sustainability Solutions, and Industrial Automation business segments – powered by our Honeywell Forge software – that help make the world smarter, safer and more sustainable.

64ca3689.title: Client Delivery Manager
64ca3689.description:
**Product Delivery Manager – SaaS Implementation \& Client Delivery**




**Role Overview** 




 We are seeking an experienced
 **Product Delivery Manager** 
 to lead the successful delivery of
 **SaaS products and client implementations within the scholarly publishing sector** 
 . This role requires a strong combination of
 **project management, business analysis, product delivery, and client engagement skills** 
 to ensure successful implementation and adoption of technology solutions.
 



 The Product Delivery Manager will act as the key link between
 **clients, Product teams, Engineering, QA, Customer Success, and internal stakeholders** 
 , ensuring that business requirements are accurately captured, translated into actionable product specifications, and delivered through structured implementation projects.
 



 The ideal candidate should have experience managing
 **end\-to\-end SaaS implementations, working with global clients (especially Europe and North America), and collaborating with cross\-functional technology teams** 
 . Experience in an outsourcing environment and scholarly publishing/technology sectors will be highly preferred.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**Client Delivery \& SaaS Implementation** 



* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of multiple SaaS implementation projects for new and existing clients.
* Own the complete implementation lifecycle from discovery, requirements gathering, planning, development coordination, testing, go\-live, and post\-launch support.
* Act as the primary point of contact for clients throughout the delivery journey.
* Build strong relationships with global clients, including stakeholders across Europe and North America.
* Develop and manage detailed project plans, timelines, milestones, dependencies, risks, and resource requirements.
* Coordinate cross\-functional teams including Product, Engineering, QA, Customer Success, and external stakeholders.
* Ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, budget, and according to agreed quality standards.
* Conduct project meetings, sprint planning sessions, client workshops, and regular delivery reviews.



  





**Requirements Gathering \& Product Documentation** 



* Work closely with clients to understand business processes, workflows, challenges, and functional requirements.
* Lead discovery workshops and requirement\-gathering discussions with business and technical stakeholders.
* Translate client requirements into detailed product specifications and technical documentation.
* Create and maintain:
* Product Specification Documents (PSDs)
* Functional Requirement Documents (FRDs)
* User Stories
* Acceptance Criteria
* Workflow Diagrams
* Process Documentation
* Ensure clear communication of requirements between clients, Product Managers, Engineering, and QA teams.
* Maintain requirement traceability throughout the project lifecycle.
* Manage scope changes and change requests by evaluating impact on timelines, resources, and delivery commitments.



  





**Product \& Engineering Collaboration** 



* Partner with Product Managers to align client requirements with product capabilities and roadmap priorities.
* Collaborate closely with Engineering teams to clarify requirements and resolve implementation challenges.
* Support backlog refinement, sprint planning, and Agile delivery activities.
* Coordinate User Acceptance Testing (UAT) and ensure solutions meet defined acceptance criteria.
* Support release planning, deployment activities, and post\-release validation.
* Work closely with technical teams on integrations, APIs, and system workflows.



  





**Stakeholder \& Client Management** 



* Establish and maintain trusted relationships with clients and internal stakeholders.
* Provide regular project updates, reports, risk assessments, and delivery dashboards.
* Manage client expectations and proactively communicate project risks, dependencies, and mitigation plans.
* Act as a bridge between technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* Support client onboarding, training, adoption, and change management activities.
* Handle escalations effectively and ensure timely resolution.



  





**Delivery Excellence \& Process Improvement** 



* Improve SaaS implementation methodologies, project governance frameworks, and delivery processes.
* Create reusable templates and documentation standards for:
* Implementation plans
* Product specifications
* Project reporting
* Client communication
* Identify opportunities to improve delivery efficiency and enhance customer experience.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives across Product Delivery.



  





**Required Skills \& Experience** 




**Essential Requirements** 



* 6–8\+ years of experience in
 **Product Delivery, SaaS Implementation, Technical Project Management, Product Operations, or Business Analysis roles** 
 .
* Proven experience managing
 **software/SaaS implementation projects from discovery to go\-live** 
 .
* Experience working directly with
 **international clients, particularly Europe and North America\-based customers** 
 .
* Experience managing client\-facing delivery engagements (not limited to internal coordination).
* Strong project management and organizational skills.
* Experience coordinating cross\-functional teams including Product, Engineering, QA, and Customer Success.
* Strong understanding of Agile delivery methodologies (Scrum/Kanban).
* Experience creating detailed product documentation, functional specifications, user stories, and acceptance criteria.
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills.
* Ability to manage multiple concurrent projects and priorities.
* Excellent written, verbal, and presentation skills.



  





**Preferred / Desirable Experience** 



* Experience working in an
 **outsourcing/service delivery environment** 
 .
* Experience delivering products in:
* Scholarly publishing
* Academic technology
* SaaS platforms
* Enterprise software solutions
* Digital transformation projects
* Experience managing integrations, APIs, and technical workflows.
* Understanding of software development lifecycle (SDLC).
* Familiarity with tools such as:
* Jira
* Azure DevOps
* Monday.com
* Confluence
* Product management tools
* Scrum Master, PMP, PRINCE2, AgilePM, or equivalent certification.



  





**Key Competencies** 



* Strong client\-facing and consultative approach.
* Ability to build relationships with senior stakeholders globally.
* Excellent communication and presentation abilities.
* Strong analytical thinking and problem\-solving skills.
* Ability to translate business needs into technical requirements.
* Highly organised with strong planning and prioritisation capabilities.
* Comfortable managing ambiguity, changing requirements, and competing priorities.
* Collaborative approach with the ability to influence Product and Engineering teams.
* Commercial mindset with focus on customer value and successful delivery outcomes.



  





**Preferred Candidate Profile:** 




 A delivery\-focused professional with experience managing
 **global SaaS implementations** 
 , strong client engagement capabilities, excellent documentation skills, and the ability to bridge the gap between business requirements and technology execution. Experience in
 **scholarly publishing, academic technology, or enterprise SaaS platforms** 
 will be an added advantage.

9945b02d.title: Offshore Delivery Lead
9945b02d.description:
Responsibilities
 



  





 We are looking for Delivery Lead
 



  





**Location: Chennai /Noida** 




  





  





**Offshore Delivery Leadership** 



* Lead AD/AMS delivery programs from offshore, managing geographically distributed teams across multiple delivery model
* **Key responsibility includes end\-to\-end delivery of Application Management Services (AMS)** 
 for the assigned account, ensuring service stability, operational performance, SLA/KPI attainment and customer satisfaction
* **Primary operational interface for the customer** 
 from offshore, leading governance, managing escalations, aligning priorities, and driving continuous improvement across the service.
* **Drive service transformation initiatives** 
 that improve customer experience, operational efficiency, and long\-term delivery sustainability
* **Influence account strategy** 
 by identifying service risks, improvement opportunities, and investment priorities that strengthen the AMS operating model
* **Ensure successful execution of mid\-to\-large scale programs** 
 with coordination across offshore and onsite teams.

 .

 and support coaching and mentoring

 t, mentoring, and servant leadership practices.

 \- Revenue, margin, utilization etc., for assigned programs/accounts
* Manage offshore delivery operations and coordinate with internal stakeholders and onsite teams for reporting.



  





  





**Qualifications** 




**Required** 



* 18\+ years of experience in IT delivery roles, with a focus on offshore program management.

* Experience managing offshore delivery units of €5M–€20M with100–200 team members.
* Practical experience in resolving offshore delivery impediments
* Experience managing support transformation programs on enterprise applications \- SAP/S4HANA

6b3bffe5.title: Service Delivery Manager
6b3bffe5.description:
**About Us**
 Proofpoint is a global leader in human\- and agent\-centric cybersecurity. We protect how people, data, and AI agents connect across email, cloud, and collaboration tools. Over 80 of the Fortune 100, 10,000 large enterprises, and millions of smaller organizations trust Proofpoint to stop threats, prevent data loss, and build resilience across their people and AI workflows. Our mission is simple safeguard the digital world and empower people to work securely and confidently. Join us in our pursuit to defend data and protect people.
   

  

**How We Work**
 At Proofpoint you’ll be part of a global team that breaks barriers to redefine cybersecurity guided by our BRAVE core values
   

  

**Bold** 
 in how we dream and innovate
   

  

**Responsive** 
 to feedback, challenges and opportunities
   

  

**Accountable** 
 for results and best in class outcomes
   

  

**Visionary** 
 in future focused problem\-solving
   

  

**Exceptional** 
 in execution and impact
   

  

 Corporate Overview
   

  

 Proofpoint is a leading cybersecurity company protecting organizations’ greatest assets and biggest risks vulnerabilities in people. With an integrated suite of cloud\-based solutions, Proofpoint helps companies around the world stop targeted threats, safeguard their data, and make their users more resilient against cyber\-attacks. Leading organizations of all sizes, including more than half of the Fortune 1000, rely on Proofpoint for people\-centric security and compliance solutions mitigating their most critical risks across email, the cloud, social media, and the web.
   

  

 We are singularly devoted to helping our customers protect their greatest assets and biggest security risk their people. That’s why we’re a leader in next\-generation cybersecurity.
   

  

 Protection Starts with People. Proofpoint.
   

  

 Your Responsibilities
   

  

* Own and manage Professional Services delivery execution for an assigned sales regions, ensuring alignment with customer requirements and internal commitments
* Ability to work across multiple geographies APJ/EMEA
* Serve as the Service Delivery Manager for Professional Services engagements, ensuring quality, consistency, and successful outcomes
* Act as the primary point of coordination across delivery teams, partners, and internal stakeholders in a matrixed organization
* Drive resolution of complex delivery challenges by bringing structure, clarity, and cross functional alignment
* Coordinate project delivery using a shared resource model, partnering with peer delivery leaders and functional managers to support utilization and staffing needs
* Monitor workloads, delivery coverage, and skill alignment across active engagements, escalating risks and constraints as appropriate
* Track, analyze, and report on key performance indicators related to delivery effectiveness, quality, and customer satisfaction
* Identify delivery risks, inefficiencies, and improvement opportunities, and partner with leadership to address them
* Apply and reinforce established delivery frameworks, best practices, and technical standards to ensure predictable outcomes
* Participate in continuous improvement activities, including delivery reviews, lessons learned, and corrective actions
* Partner with Sales and Account Management to support pre sales activities, deployment planning, and customer onboarding
* Engage with customer stakeholders to support satisfaction, retention, and successful adoption of Proofpoint solutions
* Collaborate with subject matter experts to support evolving technical and digital delivery capabilities
* Support cross functional initiatives that improve delivery effectiveness and end to end customer outcomes
* Promote a culture of accountability, collaboration, and knowledge sharing across the Professional Services organization


 What You Bring to the Team
   

  

* 5\+ years of experience delivering technical or Professional Services engagements with increasing responsibility
* Strong experience working within a matrixed, shared resource environment, coordinating across teams without direct authority
* Hands on experience in Professional Services, Service Delivery, or Customer Success environments
* Demonstrated execution discipline and ability to manage multiple concurrent engagements and priorities
* Proven ability to resolve delivery challenges through influence, collaboration, and structured problem solving
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills, with comfort interacting directly with customers and internal teams
* Interest in operational rigor, service quality, and continuous improvement
* Bachelor’s degree in science, technology, engineering, math, business, or equivalent practical experience desired
* Ability to succeed in a customer focused, fast moving, and growth oriented organization


 Why Proofpoint
   

  

 Protecting people is at the heart of our award\-winning lineup of cybersecurity solutions, and the people who work here are the key to our success. We’re a customer\-focused and a driven\-to\-win organization with leading\-edge products. We are an inclusive, diverse, multinational company that believes in culture fit, but more importantly ‘culture\-add’, and we strongly encourage people from all walks of life to apply.
   

  

 We believe in hiring the best and the brightest to help cultivate our culture of collaboration and appreciation. Apply today and explore your future at Proofpoint!
   

  

**Why Proofpoint?**
 At Proofpoint, we believe that an exceptional career experience includes a comprehensive compensation and benefits package. Here are just a few reasons you’ll love working with us
   

  

* Competitive compensation
* Comprehensive benefits
* Career success on your terms
* Flexible work environment
* Annual wellness and community outreach days
* Always on recognition for your contributions
* Global collaboration and networking opportunities


**Our Culture**
 Our culture is rooted in values that inspire belonging, empower purpose and drive success\-every day, for everyone.
   

  

 We encourage applications from individuals of all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. If you need accommodation during the application or interview process, please reach out to accessibility@proofpoint.com.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 Interested? Submit your application along with any supporting information\- we can’t wait to hear from you!

2a0f1cb0.title: Data Delivery Lead
2a0f1cb0.description:
In this vital role you are accountable for the management and oversight of data collected within a study/program, you will lead end\-to\-end data management and ensure high\-quality, timely, and decision\-ready data that enables successful clinical trial delivery.
   

  

* Serve as the single accountable leader for study\-level data management, driving quality, delivery, and cross\-functional alignment, locally and globally
* Lead development and execution of the Data Management Plan and Integrated Data Review Plan (IDRP) aligned to protocol and program strategy
* Drive database build, UAT, and go\-live readiness in partnership with Database Design and Acquisition teams
* Oversee study conduct activities including data cleaning, query management, reconciliation, and database lock preparation, ensuring we are ‘delivery ready’ at all times
* Monitor study data metrics (e.g., eCRF entry, Non\-CRF data collection, query aging, reconciliation backlog, KRIs) and proactively resolve issues to ensure on\-time delivery
* Lead data deliverables, proactive in follow up, ensuring issue resolution and high\-quality outputs


**Basic Qualifications:**
* Doctorate Degree OR
* Master’s Degree and 2 years of life science, computer sciences, business administration experience OR
* Bachelor’s degree and 4 years of life science, computer science, business administration experience OR
* Associate’s degree and 8 years of life science, computer science, business administration experience OR
* High school diploma / GED and 10 years of life science, computer science, business administration experience


**Preferred Qualifications:**
* 5 years’ work experience in life sciences or medically related field, including 3 years of biopharmaceutical clinical research experience obtained working on clinical trials in a biotech, pharmaceutical or CRO company
* Experience engaging and working across clinical trial teams in multiple geographies to deliver global clinical trials
* Experience in management and oversight of external vendors (e.g., CROs, central labs, imaging vendors, etc.)

d627a305.title: Engagement Manager
d627a305.description:
While technology is the heart of our business, a global and diverse culture is the heart of our success. We love our people and we take pride in catering them to a culture built on transparency, diversity, integrity, learning and growth.
   

  

 If working in an environment that encourages you to innovate and excel, not just in professional but personal life, interests you\- you would enjoy your career with Quantiphi!
   

  

****JOB ROLE: Associate Engagement Manager/ Engagement Manager****
****Experience: 6 \- 12 Years****
****Location : Mumbai/ Bangalore****
 As an Engagement Manager at Quantiphi, you will be a critical bridge between our clients and our delivery teams. You will be responsible for understanding client needs, shaping solutions, and ensuring the successful delivery of professional services engagements. This role requires a blend of technical acumen, client\-facing communication, and operational management to drive successful outcomes and foster strong client relationships.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
****Client Engagement \& Requirements Gathering:****
* Act as the primary point of contact for key stakeholders throughout the engagement lifecycle.
* Lead discovery sessions to thoroughly understand client business challenges, technical requirements, and desired outcomes.
* Translate complex client needs into clear, actionable requirements and user stories.
* Proactively identify opportunities to add value and expand services based on client needs.


**Solutioning \& Strategy**
* Collaborate with technical architects and subject matter experts to develop initial solution approaches and proposals.
* Provide basic solutioning guidance, outlining technical feasibility and potential approaches for Machine Learning, Software Development, and Data Analytics projects.
* Challenge and inspire customers and peers to solve difficult problems with ambitious and novel solutions.


**Engagement Management \& Delivery Oversight**
* Plan, execute, and oversee professional services engagements from initiation to closure.
* Define project scope, objectives, deliverables, and success criteria in collaboration with clients and internal teams.
* Manage project budgets, and resources effectively, ensuring projects are delivered on time and within scope.
* Proactively identify and mitigate risks, escalating issues as necessary to ensure smooth project progression.


**Resource Fulfillment \& Operations**
* Work closely with talent acquisition and resource management teams to identify, vet, and onboard suitable candidates (BAs, Senior BAs, Developers, Architects etc.) for project roles across Geographies
* Ensure the right technical skills and experience are matched to client requirements.
* Oversee the operational aspects of resource deployment and team management.


**Reporting \& Communication**
* Establish and maintain robust reporting mechanisms to track project progress, performance metrics, and client satisfaction.
* Provide regular, transparent updates to clients and internal stakeholders on engagement status, risks, and achievements.
* Prepare comprehensive status reports, and post\-mortem analyses.


**Must Have Skills**
* Technical Acumen: Good understanding of Machine Learning, Software Development, and Data Analytics concepts, knowledge of AWS services. Ability to grasp technical details and discuss solutions with both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* Requirements Gathering \& Solutioning: Proven ability to lead requirement gathering sessions, define problem statements, and contribute to basic solution design.
* Engagement Management: Experience in managing professional services engagements, including scope, timeline, budget, and resource management.
* Communication \& Client Management: Exceptional verbal and written communication skills. Ability to articulate complex ideas clearly, manage client expectations, and build strong, trusting relationships.
* Reporting \& Documentation: Proficient in creating detailed project plans, status reports, business requirement documents, and other project artifacts.
* Problem\-Solving: Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills, with the ability to develop creative and practical solutions.
* Agile Methodologies: Good understanding and application experience of Agile and Scrum\-based development methodologies.


**Good To Have Skills**
* Experience in other domains (Healthcare / Retail / FSI/ Others).
* Experience in a service\-based industry.
* Go\-getter attitude with a proactive approach to identifying and resolving challenges.


*If you like wild growth and working with happy, enthusiastic over\-achievers, you'll enjoy your career with us* 
*!*

6d04893b.title: Associate Director - Business Initiatives & Engagement Manager
6d04893b.description:
We are seeking a talented individual to be part of the Chief of Staff (CoS) organization for Marsh Risk
   

  

 This role will be based in Mumbai. This is a hybrid role that has a requirement of working at least three days a week in the office.
   

  

**Associate Director \- Business Management \- Grade F**
**No of Positions: 1**
**What can you expect?**
 The
 **Business Initiatives \& Engagement Manager** 
 will be part of the Chief of Staff (CoS) organization for Marsh Risk and will lead side wide workplace initiatives including CSR/Impact agenda across India GCC West locations, while also driving colleague engagement initiatives in support of the President, Marsh Risk Office.
   

  

 This role will be responsible for defining CSR themes and annual plans; identifying, onboarding, and managing NGO partnerships; coordinating end\-to\-end program delivery; and influencing internal and external stakeholders to enable sustained participation and measurable outcomes. The incumbent will manage CSR budgets and governance and develop high\-quality leadership and Board\-ready updates, including impact reporting and presentations. In parallel, the role will design and deliver colleague engagement programs in partnership with the People Partner, strengthening culture, connection, and alignment to the President, Marsh Risk Office priorities.
   

  

 The role will also own and drive site\-wide colleague experience and workplace initiatives, partnering closely with RES, GSP, and Security to ensure effective day\-to\-day site operations and a strong return\-to\-office (RTO) experience. This includes coordination on seat allocation, RTO hygiene and compliance, site communications, and operational reporting. The incumbent will play a key role in the transition from Supreme Business Park to the new Mumbai L\&T office, ensuring a seamless move and a smooth colleague experience throughout the change.
   

  

**We will count on you for**
**Social Impact Strategy \& Program Management**
* Co\-create and drive the CSR strategy for Marsh Risk aligned to enterprise priorities, local regulations, and community needs.
* Identify, evaluate, and recommend CSR themes and signature programs based on impact potential, colleague participation, reputational considerations, and feasibility.
* Translate strategy into an annual CSR plan with clear objectives, timelines, participation targets, and measurable outcomes.
* Driving meaningful volunteering and team‑building activities.
* Develop operating rhythm for CSR governance (calendars, reviews, approvals, reporting) and ensure compliance with internal controls and external requirements, as applicable.
* Identify, assess, onboard, and manage NGO partners; lead due diligence and partnership documentation in collaboration with HR/Legal/Compliance/Finance/GSP as required.
* Build strong relationships with NGO leadership and program teams to ensure program effectiveness, transparency, and delivery quality.
* Coordinate on\-ground engagement models (volunteering, awareness campaigns) and ensure a consistent colleague experience.


**Budget, Governance, Measurement \& Reporting**
* Own CSR budgeting including annual planning, forecasting, vendor/NGO payments coordination, and spend tracking with appropriate governance.
* Define impact measurement approach (outputs/outcomes), collect partner data, and develop dashboards and reports for leadership.
* Prepare leadership updates, Board\-ready presentations, and end\-of\-year impact reports with strong storytelling and data integrity.


**Colleague Engagement (President Marsh Risk Office Support)**
* Run colleague engagement programs that support President Marsh Office priorities (townhalls, listening forums, engagement campaigns, recognition events, culture\-building interventions). This will be in partnership with People Partner for Marsh Risk.
* Coordinate cross\-functional execution for events and engagement initiatives (logistics, comms, leadership inputs, feedback loops).
* Partner with HR and Communications to ensure alignment with broader engagement strategy and colleague experience.
* Site experience \& workplace operations — Own site‑wide colleague experience and workplace initiatives, partnering closely with Real Estate Services (RES), GSP, and Security to ensure smooth day‑to‑day operations and an effective return‑to‑office (RTO) experience. The manager will play a key role in the transition from Supreme Business Park to the new Mumbai L\&T office, covering seat allocation, RTO hygiene and compliance, site communications, and operational reporting.


**What You Need To Have**
* 10–12 years of experience in Business management, CSR/ESG/impact programs, colleague engagement, or related program management roles.
* Demonstrated experience managing NGO partnerships, program execution, and governance/budgets.
* Strong stakeholder management skills, including influencing senior leaders without direct authority.
* Proven ability to create executive\-level content (leadership decks, Board presentations, narratives, impact reports).
* Experience running colleague\-facing programs/events with strong attention to detail and delivery excellence.
* Strong project management and operational rigor; ability to manage multiple workstreams under tight timelines.
* Strategic thinking with hands\-on execution capability (“plan\-to\-deliver” mindset).
* Relationship\-building and partnership management.
* Financial acumen for budgeting, tracking, and governance.
* Comfort operating in ambiguity, prioritizing, and driving outcomes.
* High integrity, discretion, and professionalism (President Marsh Risk /Cos office environment)


**What makes you stand out?**
* Adaptable communicator, facilitator, influencer and problem solver
* High attention to detail
* Good relationship skills, Proven ability to work on own initiative as well as in a team
* Ability to multi\-task and prioritize time effectively


**Why join our team?**
* We help you be your best through professional development opportunities, interesting work and supportive leaders.
* We foster a vibrant and inclusive culture where you can work with talented colleagues to create new solutions and have impact for colleagues, clients and communities.
* Our scale enables us to provide a range of career opportunities, as well as benefits and rewards to enhance your well\-being.


 Marsh Risk is a business of Marsh (NYSE: MRSH), a global leader in risk, reinsurance and capital, people and investments, and management consulting, advising clients in 130 countries. With annual revenue of over $27 billion and more than 95,000 colleagues, Marsh helps build the confidence to thrive through the power of perspective. For more information about Marsh Risk, visit marsh.com, or follow us on LinkedIn and X.
   

  

 Marsh is committed to embracing a diverse, inclusive and flexible work environment. We aim to attract and retain the best people and embrace diversity of age, background, caste, disability, ethnic origin, family duties, gender orientation or expression, gender reassignment, marital status, nationality, parental status, personal or social status, political affiliation, race, religion and beliefs, sex/gender, sexual orientation or expression, skin color, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.
   

  

 Marsh is committed to hybrid work, which includes the flexibility of working remotely and the collaboration, connections and professional development benefits of working together in the office. All Marsh colleagues are expected to be in their local office or working onsite with clients at least three days per week. Office\-based teams will identify at least one “anchor day” per week on which their full team will be together in person.
   

  

**R\_356373**

cffe6c0a.title: Engagement Manager
cffe6c0a.description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.
 



  





**Total Experience: 12\-14 Years Only** 




**Location: Bangalore** 




  





**Your Role** 



* **Client Relationship Management**
* Act as the primary client\-facing leader, managing stakeholder relationships, resolving escalations, and building trusted advisor partnerships at CXO level.
* **SAP Delivery \& Engagement Management**
* Lead end\-to\-end SAP Application Development (AD) and Application Maintenance (AM) engagements, ensuring successful delivery of SAP Financials and related solutions.

* Identify opportunities for upselling, cross\-selling, and expanding SAP service offerings within existing client accounts.

**Your Profile**

**What you'll love about working here**
