* At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.

0a9c684c.title: Senior Manager Digital Solutions Consulting
0a9c684c.description:
**Overview**
**About Business Unit:**
 As part of the Digital Integration Services team, you’ll be at the forefront of modernizing marketing and delivering ground\-breaking solutions. From crafting data\-driven, personalized experiences that customers truly value to turning marketing visions into reality \- we empower brands to achieve their goals.
   

  

 Our team of 1,200 experts in strategy, analytics, creative, and digital experience uses innovative technology and data\-driven insights to craft relevant, customer\-centric strategies for the world’s leading brands.
   

  

**About The Opportunity**
 Epsilon is seeking a Senior Manager \- Digital Solutions Consultant, who is a specialist and provides expertise in selecting, implementing, and optimizing the digital marketing technology stack for businesses. You will work closely with clients to assess their marketing needs, evaluate existing tools and systems, and recommend the most suitable technologies to enhance their digital marketing efforts. Your role will involve identifying gaps, integrating platforms, and driving the adoption of a cohesive and efficient tech stack that supports the client's marketing objectives.
   

  

 Click here to view how Epsilon transforms marketing with 1 View, 1 Vision and 1 Voice.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Client Consultation: Collaborate with clients to understand their marketing goals, target audience, current tech stack, and problems. Conduct thorough assessments of their existing digital marketing technology infrastructure, including tools for analytics, CRM, content management, email marketing, social media, advertising, and automation.
* Tech Stack Evaluation: Evaluate the client's current tech stack and identify gaps, redundancies, and opportunities for improvement. Research and analyze potential digital marketing tools, platforms, and integrations to address the client's specific needs and goals. Consider factors such as scalability, compatibility, ease of use, and cost\-effectiveness.
* Recommendations and Roadmap: Develop comprehensive recommendations and a roadmap for optimizing the digital marketing tech stack. Present findings to clients, clearly explaining the benefits, costs, and implementation requirements of each recommended tool or integration. Prioritize recommendations based on their potential impact and alignment with the client's marketing strategy.
* Implementation and Integration: Collaborate with internal teams or external vendors in early stages to implement and integrate the selected tools into the client's tech stack. Oversee the deployment process, ensuring proper configuration, data migration, and user training.
* Data and Analytics: Work closely with clients to establish robust data collection and analytics processes within the tech stack. Define key performance indicators and metrics aligned with marketing goals. Configure analytics tools and dashboards to provide accurate and actionable insights for campaign optimization and decision\-making.
* Training and Support: Provide training and documentation to the client's marketing team on how to effectively use the new tools and features within the tech stack. Offer ongoing support and troubleshooting assistance to ensure the smooth operation of the implemented solutions. Stay updated on the latest features, updates, and standards related to the recommended technologies.
* Performance Monitoring and Optimization: Continuously monitor the performance of the digital marketing tech stack and assess its effectiveness in achieving marketing goals. Analyze data, identify bottlenecks or areas for improvement, and propose adjustments or enhancements to optimize performance. Stay informed about emerging technologies and trends to recommend future enhancements to the tech stack.
* Strategy Development: Develop and implement comprehensive digital marketing strategies aligned with clients' goals. Identify key performance indicators and establish measurable targets to track campaign effectiveness. Provide strategic guidance on the selection and utilization of digital marketing channels, technologies, and tools to enhance online visibility, brand recognition, lead generation, and conversion rates.
* Industry Research: Stay abreast of the latest trends, innovations, and standards in digital marketing. Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify emerging opportunities, industry benchmarks, and potential areas of differentiation for clients. Share industry insights and thought leadership to guide clients' decision\-making and keep them at the forefront of digital marketing trends.
* Client Relationship Management: Foster strong, trusted relationships with clients by delivering exceptional customer service and value. Proactively engage with clients, providing regular updates on campaign performance, industry developments, and new marketing opportunities. Anticipate clients' evolving needs and propose new strategies or initiatives to drive continuous improvement.


**Qualifications**
* Master’s degree or equivalent experience in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field. Advanced degrees or certifications in digital marketing, Enterprise Technology are a plus.
* Proven experience in digital marketing, preferably in a consulting or agency environment.
* Deep understanding of various digital marketing channels, including SEO, SEM, social media, content marketing, email marketing, and analytics.
* Knowledge on digital marketing tools and platforms, such as Google Analytics, Google Ads, social media management tools, email marketing software, and content management systems.
* Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret data, generate insights, and make data\-driven recommendations.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills to effectively convey complex ideas to clients and team members.
* Ability to work independently, manage multiple projects simultaneously, and meet deadlines.
* Demonstrated problem\-solving skills and a proactive attitude towards identifying and resolving marketing challenges.


**Required Skills**
* 7\-10 years in Leading and driving client conversations
* Experience identifying client's business challenges and technologies to understand their business needs.
* Independently plan and implement client workshop with multi\-disciplinary and cross\-functional teams.
* Articulate and presented Solutions, Strategy Roadmap, Technology RoadMap
* Plan and Conducted Discovery sessions
* High enthusiasm, energy, Get\-Go Attitude, independently handle sessions and client expectations
* Self\-starter who can plan and structure conversation and conduct discovery sessions independently
* Excellent analytical ability and consult client on industry standards


**Additional Information**
 Epsilon is a global data, technology and services company that powers the marketing and advertising ecosystem. For decades, we’ve provided marketers from the world’s leading brands the data, technology and services they need to engage consumers with 1 View, 1 Vision and 1 Voice. 1 View of their universe of potential buyers. 1 Vision for engaging each individual. And 1 Voice to harmonize engagement across paid, owned and earned channels.
   

  

 Epsilon’s comprehensive portfolio of capabilities across our suite of digital media, messaging and loyalty solutions bridge the divide between marketing and advertising technology. We process 400\+ billion consumer actions each day using advanced AI and hold many patents of proprietary technology, including real\-time modeling languages and consumer privacy advancements. Thanks to the work of every employee, Epsilon has been consistently recognized as industry\-leading by Forrester, Adweek and the MRC. Epsilon is a global company with more than 9,000 employees around the world.
   

  

 Our pillars aren't just words. They're how we show up every day.
   

  

* People centricity: We focus on employee well\-being in an environment where colleagues truly care about each other.
* Collaboration: We work together, support one another, and collectively achieve goals.
* Growth: There are endless opportunities for growth through learning, development and career advancement.
* Innovation: We drive progress through cutting\-edge solutions and forward\-thinking approaches.
* Flexibility: We’ve created a balance between work and personal life, and we encourage adaptability to solve problems creatively.


 Our values guide us to create value for our clients, our people and consumers.
   

  

* Act with integrity
* Work together to win together
* Innovate with purpose
* Respect all voices
* Empower with accountability


 These pillars and values are our foundation—shaping our culture, guiding our decisions, and uniting us in common purpose.
   

  

**Epsilon is an Equal Opportunity Employer.**
 Epsilon is committed to promoting diversity, inclusion, and equal employment opportunities by using reasonable efforts to attract, recruit, engage and retain qualified individuals of all ethnicities and backgrounds, including, but not limited to, women, people of color, LGBTQ individuals, people with disabilities and any other underrepresented groups, traits or characteristics.

255f4c92.title: Program Manager II,IN Relay Ops, APEX IN Relay Operations
255f4c92.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Looking for a career at a company that seeks to be Earth’s most customer\-centric company? If so, meet Amazon.  

  

Over the past 20\+ years, Amazon has reinvented on behalf of customers and has become the largest internet retailer and marketplace in the world. Through our entrepreneurial culture, Amazon has developed new technologies and products (like Echo) and, enterprise services (like Amazon Web Services). APEX NOC (Network Operation Center) is the central command and control center for ‘Transportation Execution’ across the Amazon's transportation network. It ensures hassle free, timely pick\-up and delivery of freight from vendors to Amazon fulfillment centers (FC) and from Amazon FCs to carrier hubs. In case of any exceptions, NOC steps in to resolve the issue and keeps all the stakeholders informed on the proceedings. Along with this tactical problem solving, NOC is also charged with understanding trends in network exceptions and then automating processes or proposing process changes to streamline operations. This second aspect involves network monitoring and significant analysis of network data.  

Overall, Relay Ops plays a critical role in ensuring the smooth functioning of Amazon transportation and thereby has a direct impact on Amazon’s ability to serve its customers on time.  

  

Responsibilities of Manager I under Relay Ops/NOC  

We are looking for an experienced Manager to coordinate and lead efforts across operations, multiple technology and program teams. We're looking for a hands\-on and motivated self\-starter who's passionate about using data to help us measure every area of the business, drive efficiencies, optimizations and influence decision\-making.  

  

A Manager I is expected to have deep functional knowledge, ability to design new program frameworks/processes and running defect reduction programs. He should be proficient, in identifying the input and output metric to gauge the success of a program. In this role, he will work with business and operations team to analyze historic results, challenge status quo and make business recommendations to senior management based on those analyses – all in an environment of rapid growth and increasing complexity. The Manager will drive improvements to the reporting tools, methods, and processes utilized by the team to increase the availability and granularity of actionable data to internal and external partners.  

  

The successful candidate must have very strong analytical skills and expert in excel. Knowledge of SQL and tools like R/Python would be an added advantage. He/she will be experienced at working with large data sets and the technical tools needed to work with them. He/she will have superb communication and customer\-relationship skills, good analytic insight, and be a passionate advocate of operations team to other stakeholders. He/she will drive towards simple, scalable solutions to difficult problems, have excellent project\-management skills, and be able to communicate complex analytical results, both written and verbally, in a clear and easy\-to\-understand way.  

  

What are we really looking for?  

* You should be very analytical and be able to justify your decisions and approaches with data
* You should be able to deal with a high degree of ambiguity
* You should be able to take a complex problem and break it down to smaller digestible chunks
* You should be able to define a logical and step by step approach to achieving assigned goals
* You should be comfortable with processes and process design/analysis
* You should have the ability to influence without authority and do so by using data and facts
* You should be able to deal with varied stakeholders and earn their trust
* You are mature and able to function independently with limited guidance
* You should be willing to work in rotational shifts
* Languages proficiency (mandatory) – English.

  

the Manager I is required to :  

A. Cost Reduction Strategy:  

(i) Develop and implement strategies to reduce costs in the transportation business  

(ii) Analyze and optimize adhoc share, number of trips, and truck utilization  

(iii) Participate in and contribute to WBR meetings with the core group  

  

B. Network Optimization:  

(a) Work on improving network design  

(b) Optimize NOC Governance Mechanism  

(c) Improve RLB adoption and truck utilization  

  

C. Forecasting and Scheduling:  

(a) Enhance and expand Forecast Based Scheduling (FBS) feature  

(b) Analyze and act on Frequent Adhoc \& Frequent Cancellation (FAFC) trends  

(c) Optimize schedule capacity and reduce adhoc share  

  

D. Cost per Trip Reduction:  

(a) Address issues leading to increased cost per trip collaborate with all the miles to reduce unloading delays  

(b) Improve RLB conversion rates and manage manual adhoc rates  

  

E. Truck Utilization Improvement:  

(a) Continue efforts to increase average totes per trip  

(b) Identify and implement opportunities to improve fill rates  

F.Process Standardization and Improvement:  

(a) Standardize stacking height for palletized loading  

(b) Develop and implement SOPs for improved asset handling and transfer  

  

G. Cross\-functional Collaboration:  

(a) Work closely with FC, SC, EWH, and other teams to implement improvements  

(b) Coordinate with tech teams for necessary system enhancements  

(c) Manage stakeholder relationships and secure buy\-in for new initiatives  

  

I. Data Analysis and Reporting:  

(a) Conduct cost\-benefit analyses for proposed initiatives  

(b) Create and maintain performance dashboards  

(c) Provide regular updates on KPIs and project progress  

  

J. Continuous Improvement:  

(a) Identify new opportunities for cost reduction and efficiency improvement  

(b) Plan and execute pilot projects to test new ideas  

(c) Scale successful initiatives across the network  

  

This role requires a combination of strategic thinking, analytical skills, project management expertise, and strong cross\-functional leadership to drive significant improvements in the linehaul network's efficiency and cost\-effectiveness.
  

  

Key job responsibilities  

Key job responsibilities  

The incumbent will own the following \-  

1\) They will be responsible for working with supply chain execution, transportation, QC FC, carriers and other Amazon teams to identify pain points and scope out large high impact projects  

2\) They will be responsible for driving cost benefit analysis and go/no\-go decisions on various initiatives  

3\) Once a go decision is made, the program manager will work to evolve a plan and timeline for execution.  

4\) The program manager will develop a roadmap and metrics to measure progress of the initiative they own. They will also own writing reports that detail the progress to leadership on a frequent basis  

5\) They will liaise across functions to drive their project and help clear issues and bottlenecks.  

6\) They will work with technology teams to scope out and drive any tech changes that are needed
  

  

A day in the life  

Daily activities include leading team towards betterment of the QC Transportation Supply Chain operations  

  

About the team  

NOC (Network Operation Center) is the central command and control center for ‘Transportation Execution’ across the Amazon Supply Chain network supporting multiple geographies like NA, India and EU. It ensures hassle free, timely pick\-up and delivery of freight from vendors to Amazon fulfillment centers (FC) and from Amazon FCs to carrier hubs. In case of any exceptions, NOC steps in to resolve the issue and keeps all the stakeholders informed on the proceedings. Along with this tactical problem\-solving NOC is also charged with understanding trends in network exceptions and then automating processes or proposing process changes to streamline operations. This second aspect involves network monitoring and significant analysis of network data. Overall, NOC plays a critical role in ensuring the smooth functioning of Amazon transportation and thereby has a direct impact on Amazon’s ability to serve its customers on time.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 3\+ years of program or project management experience
* 3\+ years of working cross functionally with tech and non\-tech teams experience
* 3\+ years of defining and implementing process improvement initiatives using data and metrics experience
* Bachelor's degree
* Knowledge of Excel (Pivot Tables, VLookUps) at an advanced level and SQL
* Experience defining program requirements and using data and metrics to determine improvements

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* 3\+ years of driving end to end delivery, and communicating results to senior leadership experience
* 3\+ years of driving process improvements experience
* Experience in stakeholder management, dealing with multiple stakeholders at varied levels of the organization
* Experience building processes, project management, and schedules

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

a690200b.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
a690200b.description:
**Who we are** 




  





 Mindtickle is the leading AI\-powered revenue enablement platform that combines on\-the\-job learning and deal execution to drive behavior change and get more revenue per rep. Mindtickle is recognized as a market leader by top industry analysts and is ranked by G2 as the \#1 sales onboarding and training product.
 



  





 Our commitment to innovation has also earned us the "AI\-based Sales Solution of the Year" award in the 8th annual AI Breakthrough Awards program (PR Newswire), and a Gold Stevie Award for Sales and Customer Service (Mindtickle)\- recognition of our dedication to both product excellence and outstanding customer support.
 



  





**Job snapshot** 




 Mindtickle is looking for an experienced, self\-driven, detail\-oriented Senior Technical Program Manager (TPM) for our Enterprise SaaS platform \- someone who thrives on solving complex engineering challenges, champions quality, and brings a collaborative style to cross\-functional teams, and and embraces modern execution practices in an AI\-enabled world that demands strategic alignment, systems thinking, sound judgment, trust building, and measurable business outcomes.
 



 You will lead complex, cross\-functional initiatives with high ambiguity and high stakes, delivering outcomes for enterprise and strategic customers. Constraints are real. Visibility is high. Customer commitments matter. Success will be shared widely; setbacks will be owned, learned from, and used to improve. If you thrive where the path is unclear and the outcome matters, this role is for you.
 



 In an AI\-enabled world, we need a TPM who combines technical acumen, systems thinking, and strong execution. You will eliminate roadblocks, proactively mitigate risks, align stakeholders, and drive delivery excellence while balancing speed with rigor, quality, scalability, reliability and operational excellence. You will also help establish repeatable mechanisms, operating rhythms, and execution frameworks that enable teams to deliver predictably at scale.
 



 Most importantly, you will play a critical role in delivering a world\-class customer experience. Customer outcomes should remain at the center of every roadmap decision, dependency, trade\-off, and delivery milestone. We are looking for someone who can advocate for the customer when priorities compete and consistently translate execution excellence into meaningful customer and business impact.
 



  





 If you are looking for certainty, this role will frustrate you. If you are looking for challenge, ownership, and the opportunity to influence meaningful outcomes at scale, we would love to talk.
 



**Role Expectations:** 



* This role is not about tracking work. It is about creating clarity, driving alignment, and making outcomes inevitable.
* Drive the delivery and execution of engineering roadmap (multiple medium to large\-scale, complex projects) by imbibing a strategic outlook from the outset and by partnering with engineering, product, design, quality engineering, DevOps and other cross\-functional teams.
* Leverage customer feedback, operational insights, and platform data to identify friction points and ensure engineering investments address the highest\-impact customer and business needs.
* Drive AI\-enabled execution by leveraging modern AI tools to accelerate planning, decision\-making, documentation, risk and dependency identification/mitigation, and program delivery while maintaining accountability for outcomes.
* Drive AI\-first program thinking by grounding decisions in metrics, facts, and structured narratives to ensure strategic alignment.
* Establish appropriate governance and review mechanisms for AI\-assisted development, ensuring quality, reliability, security, and compliance are not compromised in pursuit of speed.
* Drive alignment, influence decisions, and create momentum across teams and leaders without relying on formal authority.
* Influence executives, product and engineering leaders, and cross\-functional stakeholders through data, structured thinking, and clear narratives.
* Foster transparent communication around shared outcomes and customer expectations.
* Adapt program execution practices to AI development lifecycles where requirements, capabilities, and technical approaches can evolve rapidly as models, tools, and learnings mature.
* Ensure smooth execution of complex programs or programs with cross\-stream dependencies
* Facilitate technical discussions around architectural trade\-offs, scaling challenges, and system performance with the goal of unblocking teams.
* Build and institutionalize reusable frameworks and tools to enable predictable, repeatable execution in a fast\-paced, dynamic environment.
* Periodically drive the health of the systems, operational readiness, and Incident Response Management.
* Work closely with engineering leaders to define, implement, standardize and continuously evolve the practices.
* Foster a culture of agility, adaptability, resilience, speed, and continuous improvement ensuring good practices and light\-touch processes that accelerate from planning, execution to launch and successful landing.



**Requirements:** 



* Minimum
 **relevant** 
 experience in TPM role:
 **8\-10 years** 
 of experience preferably in an enterprise SaaS/Cloud architecture.
* Prior experience in engaging with enterprise customers is a plus.
* Experience building execution mechanisms that enable continuous learning, informed experimentation, and predictable delivery in AI\-enabled engineering organizations.
* Ability to navigate ambiguity, make informed decisions with incomplete information, and maintain execution momentum in rapidly evolving AI environments.
* Sound judgment, strong prioritization skills, and a bias for action.
* Past experience in establishing, driving operational excellence, productivity metrics and transformation.
* Beyond the strong foundational TPM skills, possesses technical awareness in:
* System Design and Architecture
* Distributed systems and microservices architecture
* API design principles (REST, GraphQL, gRPC)
* Performance, Scalability and Security
* Knowledge of Authentication vs Authorization, and Enterprise Integrations
* SSO protocols (SAML, OAuth 2\.0, OpenID Connect)
* Identity \& Access Management (IAM) frameworks
* Multi\-Factor Authentication (MFA) \& Role\-Based Access Control (RBAC)
* Just\-in\-time (JIT) provisioning and SCIM (System for Cross\-domain Identity Management)
* Observability and Monitoring:
* Exposure to APM tools like Datadog.
* Good to have:
* Background in startups or 0\-1 programs.



**Key Skills** 



* Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, structured thinking, including the ability to create decision\-ready narratives for technical and executive audiences.
* Structured problem solver who breaks down complex challenges into logical, actionable components.
* Strong product, customer, and business mindset with a clear understanding of the "why" behind initiatives.
* Exceptional stakeholder management and influence skills, with the ability to drive alignment without formal authority.
* Sound judgment, prioritization, and decision\-making skills in ambiguous and fast\-changing environments.
* Systems thinker who can connect strategy, execution, operational excellence, and customer outcomes.
* Proficient in leveraging AI tools (claude/cursor etc) and LLM based solutions to enhance program efficiency, surface actionable insights, automation, and team productivity.



**What success looks like** 



* Programs ship predictably with quality, delivering measurable customer and business outcomes.
* Operational excellence improves through stronger execution mechanisms, predictable delivery, and continuous improvement.
* Teams stay focused; stakeholders stay informed; decisions stay documented.
* Surprises are rare because risks and dependencies are identified and addressed early.
* Execution becomes more predictable, scalable, and repeatable.
* In moments of uncertainty, you are the calm center in the storm.



**The reality** 



* High ambiguity and evolving priorities.
* Customers experience the outcome, not internal complexity.
* Customer outcomes and commitments remain the north star, even when priorities compete.
* Balancing customer needs, business objectives, and engineering realities requires sound judgment and thoughtful trade\-offs.
* Complex cross\-functional dependencies and accountability without always having authority.



**Why this team** 



* Executive support, strong product and senior engineering partners.
* Culture that values candor, ownership, and outcomes over theatrics.



  





**Our culture \& accolades** 




  





 As an organization, it’s our priority to create a highly engaging and rewarding workplace. We offer tons of awesome perks and many opportunities for growth.
 



  





 Our culture reflects our employee's globally diverse backgrounds along with our commitment to our customers, and each other, and a passion for excellence. We live up to our values, DAB, Delight your customers, Act as a Founder, and Better Together.
 



  





 Mindtickle is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer.
 



  





 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, colour, religion, sex, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.
 



  





 Your Right to Work \- In compliance with applicable laws, all persons hired will be required to verify identity and eligibility to work in the respective work locations and to complete the required employment eligibility verification document form upon hire.

b20fb166.title: Technical Program Manager
b20fb166.description:
About the Role
 



 We are looking for a high\-impact Technical Program Manager to drive enterprise project execution and strategic account growth for our flagship relationship with Adani Enterprises. This is a senior, highly visible role that sits at the intersection of delivery excellence and enterprise sales — requiring both sharp operational rigour and a commercial mindset.
 



 You will be the single point of contact for one of our most strategic enterprise accounts, owning end\-to\-end project delivery, stakeholder relationships, and revenue growth targets.
 



 Key Responsibilities
 



**A. Project Execution \& Delivery (70%)** 



* Serve as the primary external Point of Contact for all project updates, escalations, and communications with Adani Enterprises stakeholders across business units.
* Own end\-to\-end project execution for all ongoing deployments — from SOW sign\-off through go\-live — ensuring timelines, milestones, and quality standards are consistently met.
* Drive internal coordination across Product, Engineering, Pre\-Sales, and QA teams to align on deliverables, resolve dependencies, and eliminate blockers.
* Review, negotiate, and execute Statement of Work (SOW) agreements in collaboration with legal, finance, and sales teams — both internally and externally.
* Proactively identify and escalate commercial and technical risks that could impact delivery timelines or customer outcomes; maintain a live risk register with mitigation plans.
* Manage structured governance cadences — weekly project updates, monthly business reviews, and quarterly CSAT reviews — to track progress, surface gaps, and drive accountability.
* Anchor quarterly business reviews (QBRs) with the customer to assess satisfaction, close delivery gaps, and align on the roadmap ahead.
* Escalate red flags, delivery risks, or account health concerns to the Head of Enterprise Sales in a timely and structured manner.
* Maintain accurate project documentation, dashboards, and status reports accessible to both internal and external stakeholders.



**B. Revenue Growth \& Commercial Accountability (30%)** 



* Own and drive upsell and cross\-sell revenue of ₹5 Cr annually within Adani Enterprises, focused exclusively on Enterprise Business — identifying expansion opportunities across new business units, use cases, and product lines.
* Establish and nurture OEM partnerships that contribute to top\-line revenue growth and improve EBITDA margins — identifying the right partners, structuring commercial arrangements, and driving joint GTM motions.
* Collaborate with the Enterprise Sales head to build account plans that map Adani's strategic priorities to our product capabilities and identify whitespace for growth.
* Track account\-level revenue performance, forecast accuracy, and pipeline health — providing regular updates to sales leadership.
* Participate in commercial negotiations and contract renewals, ensuring pricing, scope, and terms reflect the value delivered.
* Build executive\-level relationships within Adani Enterprises to position the company as a long\-term strategic technology partner, not just a vendor.



 What We're Looking For
 


* 6–10 years of experience in Technical Program Management, Delivery Management, or a hybrid delivery \+ sales role — preferably in SaaS, AI, or enterprise technology.
* Proven track record managing large, complex enterprise accounts with multiple internal and external stakeholders.
* Strong commercial acumen — ability to identify upsell opportunities, own revenue targets, and participate meaningfully in commercial conversations.
* Exceptional stakeholder management skills — comfortable engaging CXOs, business heads, and technical teams with equal confidence.
* Experience managing SOWs, project contracts, and delivery governance frameworks.
* Familiarity with enterprise software deployment lifecycles — including product rollout, integration, QA, and hypercare phases.
* Strong analytical and communication skills — ability to distil complex project status into crisp executive updates.
* Experience working with or establishing OEM/technology partnerships is a strong plus.
* PMP, PRINCE2, or equivalent certification preferred but not mandatory.
* Prior experience with large Indian conglomerates or enterprise accounts (Adani, Reliance, Tata, L\&T etc.) is a significant advantage.

238246db.title: Technical Program Manager, Program Lead
238246db.description:
**The impact you’ll make**
 As a Technical Program Manager at Lam, you are not just overseeing projects – you’re orchestrating breakthroughs in support of Owning the Outcome. You’ll lead cross\-functional teams through successful project execution blending your technical excellence with strategic planning to deliver new or upgraded products. Your role is vital, owning technical projects from initiation through delivery using your expertise in planning, directing, and monitoring schedules and budget.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Perform technical program management duties involving cross\-functional teams focused on delivery of company’s products and services.
* Develop and present program plans to senior management, gain buy in and deliver results.
* Organizes cross\-functional activities, ensuring completion of the program i.e. product/ solution release on schedule and within budget constraints.
* Monitors the program from initiation through delivery including planning and directing schedules and monitoring budget/spending.
* Manage CFTs with a diverse array of talents and responsibilities to drive to solutions and alignment (with program objective, product release and material cut\-in strategies, Excess \& Obsolete (E\&O) and effectivities)
* Assist in the definition and institutionalizing of new processes to improve effectiveness, leverage synergies and enable maturity of the organization.
* Be the change agent, driving process excellence, ownership of PDR process, responsiveness to dynamic business environment and leading by example.


**Minimum Qualifications**
**Who we’re looking for**
* Bachelor’s degree with 12\+ years of experience; or Master’s degree with 10\+ years’ experience;
* 8\+ years of technical program management.
* Experience guiding cross\-functional teams and demonstrating leadership and influence skills to deliver results.
* Excellent communication and executive presentation skills with the ability to present to audiences at all levels in the Company.


**Mandatory Skills**
* Knowledge of Program Management methods and experience in Product Development \& Release (PDR) procedures.
* Strong influencing, negotiating and conflict resolution skills.
* Experience in or knowledge of Semiconductor fabrication, Semiconductor Equipment Operations, or related industries is a plus.
* Experience in HW development, Agile and/or Waterfall project methodologies is a plus
* Expertise with project management software and tools including MS Project, QuickBase, Office Timeline, or equivalent.
* Structured Thinking: Logical approach, appropriate framing problems, and conclusions. Focuses on building capabilities across span of control.
* Communication: Clear, concise, and conclusive that shapes senior\-leader understanding and draws out specific recommendations and conclusions.
* People Management: Leads CFTs that continually improves self, business, and function. Sets direction for group and provides compelling vision for the work; establishes a high\-performance environment.
* Solid organizational skills including attention to detail and multi\-tasking skills.
* Other experience that would prove highly valuable: Procurement, Supply Chain Management, Operations and Logistics.


**Our commitment**
 We believe it is important for every person to feel valued, included, and empowered to achieve their full potential. By bringing unique individuals and viewpoints together, we achieve extraordinary results.
   

  

 Lam Research ("Lam" or the "Company") is an equal opportunity employer. Lam is committed to and reaffirms support of equal opportunity in employment and non\-discrimination in employment policies, practices and procedures on the basis of race, religious creed, color, national origin, ancestry, physical disability, mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth and related medical conditions), gender, gender identity, gender expression, age, sexual orientation, or military and veteran status or any other category protected by applicable federal, state, or local laws. It is the Company's intention to comply with all applicable laws and regulations. Company policy prohibits unlawful discrimination against applicants or employees.
   

  

*Lam offers a variety of work location models based on the needs of each role. Our hybrid roles combine the benefits of on\-site collaboration with colleagues and the flexibility to work remotely and fall into two categories – On\-site Flex and Virtual Flex. ‘On\-site Flex’ you’ll work 3\+ days per week on\-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, with the opportunity to work remotely for the balance of the week. ‘Virtual Flex’ you’ll work 1\-2 days per week on\-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, and remotely the rest of the time.*

e8797e4b.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
e8797e4b.description:
**Responsibilities**
* Own end\-to\-end program management for mission\-critical initiatives, starting with our automation and quality programme.
* Build visibility across systems, dashboards, monitoring, alerting, health metrics, and escalation workflows.
* Drive rapid root\-cause analysis and coordinate incident resolution across engineering, ML, data, clinical, and CS teams.
* Build process frameworks, runbooks, and scalable operational models that allow teams to execute predictably.
* Establish proactive risk management, quality gates, and cross\-team checkpoints before major releases.
* Lead complex multi\-team launches and rollouts (currently 6\-8 weeks) and streamline them for predictability and speed.
* Run program reviews, track dependencies, and maintain clear ownership across stakeholders.
* Champion operational excellence, continuous improvement, tighter SLAs, better tooling, and consistent execution.


**Requirements**
* Skills: Quality assurance, SQL, Looker, program management, project management, Tableau, machine learning, and NLP.
* 5\+ years of technical programme management experience, ideally in ML/AI, healthcare tech, or other quality\-critical domains.
* Proven track record managing multi\-team programmes involving engineering and non\-engineering stakeholders.
* Experience building operational systems such as monitoring, alerting, quality frameworks, and incident response.
* Strong ability to drive results without formal authority and work effectively in high\-ambiguity environments.
* Background working with regulated or quality\-sensitive workloads is strongly preferred.


**Technical And Analytical**
* Ability to understand system architecture and map which components are impacted by changes.
* Strong analytical skills: SQL proficiency, comfort with dashboards, and trend analysis.
* Experience with BI tools such as Looker, Tableau, Metabase, etc.
* Comfortable having technical conversations with engineers and understanding trade\-offs.
* Familiarity with modern data/ML stacks: we use GCP and BigQuery.


**Leadership And Communication**
* Exceptional communicator who brings clarity, structure, and urgency.
* Low\-ego, high\-empathy leader who can influence without authority.
* Comfortable running war rooms, driving decision\-making, and managing incidents end\-to\-end.
* Builds processes that scale without creating unnecessary overhead.


**Nice To Have**
* Experience in healthcare AI, medical coding, RCM workflows, or quality engineering.
* Experience scaling programmes at a fast\-growing startup.
* Exposure to pod\-based org structures.
* Prior background in operational excellence or reliability engineering.

9d5bf167.title: Technical Program Manager - HealthCare
9d5bf167.description:
**Role:  Technical Program Manager (TPM)** 




**Experience: 8\+ Years** 




**Work Location: Mumbai** 




**Candidate must be based in Mumbai** 




**3 years contract and opportunity to transition to a permanent position based on performance and business requirements.** 




  





**Senior Program Manager \- Desired Profile:** 




  A professional with 8\+ years of overall experience, of which at least 3 years are preferably in a managerial role in technology, data management, and digital transformation, preferably in Healthcare IT, MedTech, Hospital, or Digital Health consulting and related segments.
 



  A bachelor's degree in health informatics, computer science, or a related field is required.
 



  Should be
 **intrinsically motivated and resilient to work in development sector** 
 with a not for\-profit organisation.
 



  Experience with
 **diabetes care technologies** 
 or similar chronic disease management solutions is preferred.
 



  





**Skills and Attributes:** 




  Openness to adapt to work in a dynamic environment and willingness to drive clarity in projects which start with ambiguity.
 



  Proven ability to foster trust\-based relationships with senior leaders in public or private hospitals, including clinicians and administrators.
 



  Demonstrated experience in project management or related roles, preferably in healthcare, Digital Health tools and technologies, or healthcare\-focused nonprofit organizations.
 



  Experience in technologies relevant to digital health, including mobile health (mHealth), cloud computing, AI/ML, IoT (Internet of Things) for medical devices, and open\-source systems.
 



  Knowledge of healthcare standards (e.g., HL7, FHIR) and principles of data management, privacy, security, and interoperability in the context of chronic disease management.
 



  Experience in crafting detailed reports, presentations and stakeholder communication.
 



  Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage effectively with diverse stakeholders.
 



  Knowledge of one or more of programming languages such as Java, Nodejs, Python, etc.
 



  Preferred \- Working knowledge of interfacing with medical devices and developing protocols such as Open API, RESTful APIs, USB, Bluetooth, Wi\-Fi, etc.
 



  Preferred \- Familiarity with AWS IoT Core, Azure IoT, Google Cloud IoT, or similar platforms.

bda88887.title: Program Manager - Component & Sub-systems
bda88887.description:
Fluence (Nasdaq: FLNC) is a global market leader delivering intelligent energy storage and optimization software for renewables and storage. Our solutions and operational services are helping to create a more resilient grid and unlock the full potential of renewable portfolios. With gigawatts of successful implementations across nearly 50 markets, we are transforming the way we power our world for a more sustainable future. For more information, please visit fluenceenergy.com.
   

  

**Job Description**
 The Program Manager for Components \& Sub\-Systems is responsible for the full execution and delivery of a defined portion of a Fluence product or program — such as a hardware component, subsystem, software module, or technical workstream. This role ensures that assigned scope meets all requirements for timing, quality, cost, and readiness before integration into the broader program.
   

  

 This position requires strong leadership, cross\-functional coordination, and disciplined execution. Successful candidates will demonstrate the ability to independently drive outcomes within their scope while collaborating closely with Engineering, Supply Chain, Operations, Product, and the Senior Program Manager. This role carries full accountability for execution of the assigned subsystem, including timing, quality, and readiness for integration into the full program. This role may include ownership of a software\-focused workstream, requiring close coordination with software engineering teams to ensure integration readiness, testing coverage, and software release alignment.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Own end\-to\-end execution for an assigned component, subsystem, or workstream, from requirements alignment through production launch readiness.
* Develop and manage the detailed program plan for owned scope, including schedules, milestones, risks, dependencies, and mitigation actions.
* Ensure Engineering\-owned technical deliverables for the component/subsystem are completed on time and meet program requirements, while supporting clarity, tracking, and issue resolution. The PM ensures delivery but does not own technical content or engineering decision\-making.
* Coordinate interface definition and alignment with dependent or upstream/downstream subsystems to ensure seamless integration.
* Maintain rigorous tracking of progress, risks, issues, and dependencies; drive timely cross\-functional actions to stay on schedule.
* Translate customer, market, and platform requirements into clear objectives and workstream deliverables.
* Partner with Supply Chain to support procurement readiness, supplier engagement, long\-lead component planning, and launch\-critical material availability.
* Work with Operations and Manufacturing Engineering to ensure build readiness, coordinate validation activities, and support integration into production processes.
* Provide structured, data\-driven status updates for owned scope during Program Reviews, Stage\-Gates, and leadership syncs.
* Maintain accurate program documentation, dashboards, and communication tools to ensure visibility and alignment.
* Escalate risks quickly with recommended options for resolution; support decision\-making with well\-structured data.
* Model strong leadership, accountability, and proactive problem\-solving consistent with Fluence program management expectations.
* Proactively challenge assumptions and drive clarity in ambiguous or conflicting situations.
* Collaborate closely with global and regional Engineering, Supply Chain, and Operations teams.


**Qualifications**
* 3–7 years of experience in Program or Project Management, Engineering, Supply Chain, Operations, or similar roles managing technical deliverables or workstreams.
* Demonstrated ability to lead cross\-functional teams and drive execution across hardware and/or software development environments.
* Experience with component\-level or subsystem\-level planning, procurement, supplier coordination, and production readiness preferred.
* Strong schedule management, risk management, and communication skills.
* Ability to operate with ownership and independence while maintaining alignment with the broader program organization.
* Comfortable working in a fast\-paced environment with evolving priorities and complex dependencies.
* Ability to work closely with global teams across time zones, ensuring seamless communication and alignment.
* Experience working within global engineering organizations and/or multinational product development environments.
* Proven ability to lead without direct authority and drive cross\-functional outcomes.
* Understanding of embedded systems, APIs, and cross\-component software interactions preferred.
* Experience managing software or firmware development workstreams, including familiarity with SDLC, backlog management, software integration, and validation processes.
* Ability to coordinate with software engineering teams across Agile frameworks and ensure alignment between software deliverables and overall program milestones.
* Certifications (PMP, Agile, Lean) a plus but not required.


**Required Education**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Business, Supply Chain, or a related technical field required.
* Advanced degree a plus but not required.


**Candidates who have applied within the past three months need not apply.**
 Qualified candidates are requested to submit a resume and cover letter at careers@fluenceenergy.com for consideration.
   

  

**Our Culture**
 At Fluence, our culture is the foundation that drives our ambitious growth strategy and fuels our mission to transform the future of energy. Our core cultural pillars empower us to innovate, collaborate, and lead with purpose, ensuring we continue to deliver unparalleled value to our customers and the world.
   

  

**Unleash Voices**
 We believe every voice matters. We encourage openness, active listening, and decisive action to create a culture where everyone has the opportunity to contribute to our success. We foster an environment where diverse perspectives are heard and valued, driving innovation and progress.
   

  

**Customer Fluent**
 Our customers are at the heart of everything we do. We’re committed to delivering exceptional value that exceeds expectations by understanding our customers' needs and adapting swiftly to meet them. Our deep focus on customer satisfaction drives us to continuously improve and innovate.
   

  

**Infinite Impact**
 We are committed to creating the impossible. We push boundaries to deliver sustainable, game\-changing solutions that shape a brighter, more energy\-efficient future for all. Our team is passionate about making a lasting impact that will resonate for generations to come.
   

  

**All In**
 We are all in for growth. Our teams are relentlessly focused on identifying and seizing opportunities that propel us forward. We embrace an ownership mindset, pushing ourselves and each other to accelerate progress and create lasting success.

25105fce.title: Technical Program Manager
25105fce.description:
**Responsibilities**
* Own end\-to\-end program management for mission\-critical initiatives, starting with our automation and quality programme.
* Build visibility across systems, dashboards, monitoring, alerting, health metrics, and escalation workflows.
* Drive rapid root\-cause analysis and coordinate incident resolution across engineering, ML, data, clinical, and CS teams.
* Build process frameworks, runbooks, and scalable operational models that allow teams to execute predictably.
* Establish proactive risk management, quality gates, and cross\-team checkpoints before major releases.
* Lead complex multi\-team launches and rollouts (currently 6\-8 weeks) and streamline them for predictability and speed.
* Run program reviews, track dependencies, and maintain clear ownership across stakeholders.
* Champion operational excellence, continuous improvement, tighter SLAs, better tooling, and consistent execution.


**Requirements**
* 7\+ years of technical programme management experience, ideally in ML/AI, healthcare tech, or other quality\-critical domains.
* Proven track record managing multi\-team programmes involving engineering and non\-engineering stakeholders.
* Experience building operational systems such as monitoring, alerting, quality frameworks, and incident response.
* Strong ability to drive results without formal authority and work effectively in high\-ambiguity environments.
* Background working with regulated or quality\-sensitive workloads is strongly preferred.
* Ability to understand system architecture and map which components are impacted by changes.
* Strong analytical skills: SQL proficiency, comfort with dashboards, and trend analysis.
* Experience with BI tools such as Looker, Tableau, Metabase, etc.
* Comfortable having technical conversations with engineers and understanding trade\-offs.
* Familiarity with modern data/ML stacks; we use GCP and BigQuery.
* Exceptional communicator who brings clarity, structure, and urgency.
* Low\-ego, high\-empathy leader who can influence without authority.
* Comfortable running war rooms, driving decision\-making, and managing incidents end\-to\-end.
* Builds processes that scale without creating unnecessary overhead.
* Experience in healthcare AI, medical coding, RCM workflows, or quality engineering.
* Experience scaling programmes at a fast\-growing startup.
* Exposure to pod\-based org structures.
* Prior background in operational excellence or reliability engineering.

5c5d136b.title: Technical Program Manager 3
5c5d136b.description:
**The group you’ll be a part of**
 The Customer Support Business Group focuses on enabling our customers with premier customer support throughout their lifecycle with Lam. We drive performance, productivity, safety, and quality of customers installed base performance and deliver service and lifecycle solutions for their most critical equipment and processes.
   

  

**The impact you’ll make**
 As a Technical Program Manager at Lam, you are not just overseeing projects – you’re orchestrating breakthroughs in support of \[insert strategic initiative]. You’ll lead cross\-functional teams through successful project execution blending your technical excellence with strategic planning to deliver new or upgraded products. Your role is vital, owning technical projects from initiation through delivery using your expertise in planning, directing, and monitoring schedules and budget.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Hands\-on experience managing the Obsolescence lifecycle from risk identification through solution release.
* Drive resource planning, mitigation plan, implementation, and program execution.
* Lead LTB strategy, excess inventory management, and runout risk mitigation within tight demand and supply windows
* Strong analytical skills to build decision frameworks using demand, forecast, cost, and risk inputs
* Own program plans, milestones, schedules, risks, and performance metrics to ensure delivery on time and within business targets.
* Identify workflow gaps, reduce manual tracking burden, and help standardize execution across product groups.
* Partner with stakeholders to understand process and system requirements and drive scalable improvements in business process.
* Lead cross\-functional programs with strong governance, escalation, and stakeholder management discipline
* Operate in a global, high\-interaction environment with frequent reviews, milestone tracking, and executive escalations
* Solid understanding of Product Life Cycle (PLC) and its impact on obsolescence, supply continuity, and cost
* Ability to multi\-task across multiple, competing priorities in a dynamic environment


**Minimum Qualifications**
**Who we’re looking for**
* 
* Bachelor’s degree with 5\+ years of experience. 3\+ years of technical program management.
* 3\+ years of continuous improvement or technical program management.
* Experience guiding cross\-functional teams and demonstrating influence skills to deliver results.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills with the ability to present to audiences at all levels in the Company.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in Semiconductor, Electrical, or Electronic OEM industries, related industries is a plus.
* Proven ability to influence without authority, drive alignment, and deliver sustainable change
* Knowledge of Program Management methods and experience in Product Development \&Release (PDR) procedures
* Familiarity with project management software and tools including MS Project, QuickBase, Office Timeline, or equivalent.
* Knowledge of Change Management methodologies is a plus.


**Our commitment**
 We believe it is important for every person to feel valued, included, and empowered to achieve their full potential. By bringing unique individuals and viewpoints together, we achieve extraordinary results.
   

  

 Lam Research ("Lam" or the "Company") is an equal opportunity employer. Lam is committed to and reaffirms support of equal opportunity in employment and non\-discrimination in employment policies, practices and procedures on the basis of race, religious creed, color, national origin, ancestry, physical disability, mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth and related medical conditions), gender, gender identity, gender expression, age, sexual orientation, or military and veteran status or any other category protected by applicable federal, state, or local laws. It is the Company's intention to comply with all applicable laws and regulations. Company policy prohibits unlawful discrimination against applicants or employees.
   

  

*Lam offers a variety of work location models based on the needs of each role. Our hybrid roles combine the benefits of on\-site collaboration with colleagues and the flexibility to work remotely and fall into two categories – On\-site Flex and Virtual Flex. ‘On\-site Flex’ you’ll work 3\+ days per week on\-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, with the opportunity to work remotely for the balance of the week. ‘Virtual Flex’ you’ll work 1\-2 days per week on\-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, and remotely the rest of the time.*

6654eead.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
6654eead.description:
We’re in an unbelievably exciting area of tech and are fundamentally reshaping the data storage industry. Here, you lead with innovative thinking, grow along with us, and join the smartest team in the industry.
   

  

 This type of work—work that changes the world—is what the tech industry was founded on. So, if you're ready to seize the endless opportunities and leave your mark, come join us.
   

  

**THE ROLE**
 The Product and Engineering team in the Cloud Native Business Unit is looking to bring on a Senior Technical Program Manager to join a team of TPMs focused on driving complex and cross\-cutting initiatives and programs to meet our top objectives and key results to delight our customers.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* You will take charge using your technical leadership and program management skills to drive execution with high quality for these key initiatives.
* You will be responsible for establishing best practices, collaborating across multiple business units and managing dependencies and deliverables for multiple programs.
* You will be working with a global team of software engineers who develop new features and capabilities with a rapid rate of change.
* You will be responsible for driving multiple parallel product releases in a fast pace environment.
* We are primarily an in\-office environment and therefore, you will be expected to work from the Bangalore office in compliance with Everpure's policies, unless you are on PTO, or work travel, or other approved leave.


**What You Bring**
* Minimum 8\+ years of experience as a Technical Program Manager (TPM) leading product delivery teams for enterprise commercial software organizations
* MS in computer science, MBA or engineering management equivalent preferred.
* Minimum 6\+ years hands\-on experience delivering enterprise commercial software releases in a dynamic environment
* Proven ability for this release TPM to develop and use Agentic AI in their day\-to\-day job.
* Outstanding verbal and written communication skills with the ability to interact with technical and non\-technical, cross\-functional groups.
* Advanced understanding and extensive use of Jira Cloud in software development program management and release management
* Demonstrated strong analytical and problem solving skills.
* Big picture thinker providing clarity on what we are trying to accomplish, understanding of the business objectives and driving the outcome for the program
* Capabilities to identify and recommend process changes that would enable faster time to market while driving organization consistency and efficiency.
* Solid knowledge of end\-to\-end SDLC best practices
* Experience in managing projects throughout the entire SDLC, including investigation, design, planning, execution and delivering products to market on schedule, and addressing customer feedback in development. Solid knowledge of end\-to\-end SDLC best practices
* Drive content, schedule and overall delivery of the program and set it up for success in the field and customer base for overall Go\-To\-Market readiness and New Product Introduction
* Recognize when trade\-offs and timely decisions are needed; drive the necessary discussions to conclusion and drive accountability for delivery and ensure that the objectives of the program are met
* Use your solid project and technical skills and judgment to build credibility with technical leaders and demonstrate the ability to influence multiple functions across the organization
* Strong team and customer focus.
* Take ownership of the product experience, product quality and associated health metrics
* Set goals for the program, track and periodically communicate to stakeholders as well as executive leadership
* Ensure corrective actions and risk mitigations are in place as needed to keep programs and releases on track
* Be the single point person for delivery decisions, exec and cross team communication and working with various functional groups to deliver the program
* Optimize team processes to improve quality, productivity, and responsiveness to feedback and changing priorities along with setting up the program for success in the field
* Highly collaborative; overcome obstacles by resolving issues, regardless of team boundaries, and identify and resolve teamwork issues.


**INCLUDE FOR POSTING LOCATION IDENTIFICATION**
 ,
   

  

**What You Can Expect From Us**
* Innovation: We celebrate those who think critically, like a challenge, and aspire to be trailblazers.
* Growth: We give you the space and support to grow along with us and to contribute to something meaningful. We have been named Fortune's Best Workplaces in Technology™, Fortune's Best Workplaces in the Bay Area™, and certified as a Great Place to Work®!
* Team: We build each other up and set aside ego for the greater good.


 And because we understand the value of bringing your full and best self to work, we offer a variety of perks to manage a healthy balance, including flexible time off, wellness resources, and company\-sponsored team events. Check out purebenefits.com for more information.
   

  

**Accommodations And Accessibility**
 Candidates with disabilities may request accommodations for all aspects of our hiring process. For more on this, contact us at TA\-Ops@purestorage.com if you’re invited to an interview.
   

  

**Our Commitment To a Strong And Inclusive Team**
 We’re forging a future where everyone finds their rightful place and where every voice matters. Where uniqueness isn’t just accepted but embraced. That’s why we are committed to fostering the growth and development of every person, cultivating a sense of community through our Employee Resource Groups and advocating for inclusive leadership.
   

  

 Everpure is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, gender expression, transgender status, sexual stereotypes, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or any other characteristic legally protected by the laws of the jurisdiction in which you are being considered for hire.
   

  

**Join us and bring your best.**
**Bring your bold.**
**Pure and simple.**

**About the Role**

Indsys Tech Services India Pvt. Ltd. is looking for a dynamic Software Business Development Executive to promote our enterprise software solutions, identify new business opportunities, conduct product demonstrations, and build strong customer relationships. * Asset and Project Management Solutions

* Cloud\-Based Business Applications

MBA (Marketing, Sales, Business Administration, or related specialization)

d873bd1d.title: Presales Consultant (Mechanical/ Electrical)
d873bd1d.description:
**Pre\-sales Consultant (Mechanical/ Electrical / Electronic)**

**About Skill\-Lync** 

Skill\-Lync is a Y Combinator\-backed EdTech company offering industry\-aligned engineering and technology programs across Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Electronics, and Computer Science domains. We help aspiring engineers bridge the gap between academics and industry through practical, job\-oriented learning. As one of the fastest\-growing YC\-backed startups, we're building a high\-performing sales team to connect learners with impactful upskilling opportunities.

**Role Overview**

As a Demo Engineer, you'll play a key role in showcasing Skill\-Lync's learning programs through engaging live technical demos. You'll help prospective learners understand the value of our programs by explaining technical concepts, demonstrating real\-world applications, and addressing their queries.

Location: Chennai – Work from Office

Experience: 0–1 Years (Freshers with strong technical fundamentals are welcome to apply)

Employment: Type: Full\-time Hours: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM \| 6\-day work week

Joining: Immediate

**Key Responsibilities**

* Conduct engaging live technical demos (online/offline) to showcase Skill\-Lync's engineering programs, projects, and curriculum.
* Explain core engineering concepts in a simple and structured manner while addressing learner queries related to Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Electronics, or other relevant engineering domains.
* Demonstrate real\-world industry applications, simulations, case studies, and project\-based learning to help learners understand the practical value of the programs.
* Work closely with Sales, Counsellors, and Academic teams to enhance the demo experience and improve learner conversions. Stay updated with curriculum enhancements, industry trends, and emerging technologies to deliver engaging and high\-quality technical demonstrations.

**Who We're Looking For?**

* Bachelor's degree in Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Electronics, or related Engineering disciplines.
* Strong fundamentals in core engineering concepts relevant to your specialization.
* Ability to explain technical concepts clearly and confidently to students and working professionals.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills.
* Confident in conducting live technical demonstrations and engaging with learners.
* Passion for teaching, mentoring, and helping learners understand industry\-relevant concepts.
* Strong problem\-solving and analytical skills.
* Fresh graduates to 1 year's of experience.
* Prior experience in technical training, workshops, demos, or mentoring is an added advantage.
* Self\-motivated individuals who enjoy combining technical expertise with learner interaction in a fast\-paced EdTech environment.

**Why Join Skill Lync?**

* Work with one of India's leading EdTech companies.
* Exposure to cutting\-edge technology and industry\-focused curriculum.
* Structured career growth into Senior Demo Engineer, Technical Trainer, Academic Mentor, or Pre\-Sales Engineer.
* Competitive salary with performance\-based incentives.
* Collaborative work culture with continuous learning opportunities.

Additional Details

Work Mode: Work from Office

Location: Chennai

Working Days: 6 Days a Week Working Hours: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM

How to Apply

Interested candidates can DM me directly or send their resume to prarthana.vakkiel@criodo.com with the subject line: "Pre\-sales Consultant Application – Your Name"

Pay: ₹360,000\.00 \- ₹450,000\.00 per year

Work Location: In person
