16ffca29.title: Bid Manager -  US Facing
16ffca29.company: iPrime Services Pvt Ltd , NCR India
16ffca29.description:
**Job Title: Bid Manager and Specialist – US Bids** 




**Location:** 
 Noida / Sector 63 (or as specified)
 



**Reports To:** 
 Bid Team Lead and US Manager
 



  





**About iPrime Services Pvt. Ltd.** 




 iPrime Services is the authorized Veoci partner for India and South Asia, delivering enterprise software solutions across aviation, business continuity management, and other critical operations sectors. Among our core activities, we provide bid preparation and management services for our US principals . This is a vital and very critical function and you will be a valued and critical member of the bid team.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




  





 We are seeking a detail\-oriented Bid Specialist to manage the end\-to\-end bid and proposal process for our US\-based opportunities. This role involves identifying relevant tenders and RFPs, coordinating cross\-functional inputs, and producing high\-quality, compliant, and persuasive bid submissions that position iPrime and Veoci competitively in the US market.
 



  





 We are registered with many bid aggregators and received information form them on ongoing bids meeting our platform features and skill set. The submission requires inputs from multiple sources including finance , security , development , implementation etc and the whole bid has to be then put together and submitted online.
 



  





 AI usage is increasing and we routinely us AI to match RFPs and our features set and further fetch details from a data bank to populate the requirements of the RFP.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Assist the Search Team to identify relevant RFPs, RFIs, and tenders from procurement portals and on the websites of a list of identified prospects and customers.
* Analyze bid requirements, eligibility criteria, and compliance checklists to assess fit and win probability
* Coordinate with sales, technical, and delivery teams to gather inputs for proposal content
* Draft, structure, and edit compelling proposal narratives, executive summaries, and technical responses
* Use AI tools to accelerate research, drafting, and content reuse across bids while ensuring accuracy and compliance
* Ensure all submissions meet formatting, documentation, and compliance requirements specific to US procurement standards
* Manage bid timelines, tracking key milestones and submission deadlines
* Maintain a repository of reusable content, past submissions, and win/loss documentation
* Collaborate with pricing/commercial teams to finalize cost proposals and terms
* Support pre\-bid meeting with content and guidance as well as submit post\-submission clarifications or client queries
* Continuously improve bid quality based on feedback
* Track and analyse Wins and Losses.


- 


**Required Qualifications** 



* Bachelor's degree in Business, Communications, English, or a related field
* **Excellent academic track record; must have scored above 85% in Class 12 Boards (CBSE)**
* Must be based in / from a metro city
* 2–5 years of experience in bid/proposal management, preferably with exposure to US government or enterprise procurement processes
* Excellent written English with strong editing and proofreading skills
* Familiarity with US RFP/RFI formats, compliance matrices, and procurement portals (e.g., SAM.gov, state/local portals)
* Strong project management skills with the ability to manage multiple deadlines simultaneously
* Proficiency in MS Office/Google Workspace; experience with proposal software is a plus
* Experience using AI\-powered proposal or research tools in a bid/sales environment Working knowledge of AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot) for drafting, research, and content optimization



  





  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience in enterprise software, SaaS, or technology services bids
* Familiarity with sectors such as aviation, business continuity, public safety, or government services
* Prior experience working with or for US\-based clients or principals



  





**﻿Key Attributes** 



* Meticulous attention to detail and deadline discipline and to tools to colaborate with stakeholders to deliver award winning bids on time .
* Strong persuasive writing ability
* Comfortable working across time zones with US teams/clients
* Curious and adaptive mindset toward new tools and technologies, including AI

c0557685.title: Manager- Presales and BD- Multicloud connect and Networking
c0557685.description:
**About The Company**
 Tata Communications Redefines Connectivity with Innovation and IntelligenceDriving the next level of intelligence powered by Cloud, Mobility, Internet of Things, Collaboration, Security, Media services and Network services, we at Tata Communications are envisaging a New World of Communications
   

  

**Broad outline of the Role**
 Multi cloud connectivity is a Simple, flexible, scalable and secure multi\-cloud connectivity experience, delivered as\-a\-service. Multi cloud networking enhances cloud networking functionality by abstraction and delivers seamless AI workload experience, resiliency and compliances across multiple clouds. We are looking for a results\-driven Multi Cloud Networking professionals to work in a B2B segment in the enterprise segment. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a high\-growth environment, understands the nuances of cloud networking across hyper scalers, and offer innovative multi cloud connectivity solutions. The candidate will play a key role in working closely with sales and solution teams and act as an evangelist , bringing agility into sales process and clarity in solutioning.
   

  

**Minimum Qualifications \& Experience**
* \- 5–10 years of experience in cloud, networking, or managed services domain
* \- Experience in pre\-sales, technical consulting, or solutioning roles for hyperscaler environments
* \- Exposure to multi\-cloud or hybrid cloud deployments
* \- Proven experience in customer engagement and solution positioning
* \- Strong problem\-solving and analytical thinking ability
* \- Excellent communication and presentation skills
* \- Ability to learn quickly and adapt to new technologies/trends
* \- Strong collaboration and stakeholder management skills
* \- Commercial mindset with ability to articulate value and ROI
* Certifications like AWS Solutions Architect Associate (SAA\-C03\) , Microsoft Azure Security Engineer (AZ\-500\) or equivalent,
* Google Cloud Professional Cloud Network Engineer.
* Networking certifications (CCNA/CCNP equivalent) are a plus


**Other Knowledge \& Skills**
* Strong understanding of cloud networking concepts and architectures
* Hands\-on or working knowledge of at least one hyperscaler (AWS / Azure / GCP)
* Knowledge of VPC/VNET design, DNS, NAT gateways, routing, and security controls
* Understanding of egress costs and cloud pricing constructs
* Experience with hybrid connectivity (Site\-to\-Site VPN, Direct Connect, ExpressRoute)
* Exposure to SD\-WAN and multi\-cloud networking architectures
* Understanding of networking fundamentals including MPLS and BGP (preferred)


 Minimum Bachelor of Engineering; MBA is optional.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Drive business development and solution positioning for multi\-cloud connectivity and networking offerings
* Engage with enterprise clients to understand cloud connectivity, networking, and hybrid infrastructure requirements
* Work closely with sales and technical teams to design and present cloud networking solutions
* Support pre\-sales activities including solution design, architecture discussions, and technical presentations
* Perform cost\-benefit analysis and commercial modeling for multi\-cloud deployments
* Develop and propose solutions involving VPC/VNET design, hybrid cloud architectures, SD\-WAN, MPLS, VPN, and dedicated connectivity solutions
* Collaborate with hyper scalers and partners to build joint go\-to\-market strategies
* Stay updated with emerging trends in cloud networking and multi\-cloud ecosystems
* Contribute to RFP/RFI responses, proposals, and solution documentation
* Support post\-sales teams to ensure solution alignment and customer satisfaction


**Key Success Indicators**
* \- Ability to drive pipeline and influence deal closure through technical expertise
* \- Effectiveness in translating complex cloud networking solutions into business outcomes
* Quality of solution design, cost optimization, and customer engagement

b96abeb7.title: Manager - Sales Planning (Presales)
b96abeb7.description:
**Manager Sales Planning (Presales)** 




  





 Product Marketing \| Sales Planning \| Sales Enablement \| Media Strategy
 



  





 Every successful client engagement begins long before the first meeting \- it starts with a compelling story. The Sales Planning team sits at the center of InMobi's Brand Business, translating product capabilities, market insights, customer needs, and data into narratives that help our sales teams win.
 



 As the Manager \- Sales Planning, you will lead the strategic presales and GTM function for the Brand Business. This is a highly strategic, B2B\-focused role that combines Product Marketing, sales planning, client solutioning, and sales enablement. You will own the development of differentiated GTM narratives, proactive market\-facing collateral, and scalable frameworks that strengthen seller effectiveness and accelerate revenue growth.
 



 You will partner closely with Product Marketing, Product, Sales Leadership, BI, Trading, Supply, Deal Desk, and centralized Marketing teams across North America, APAC, and EMEA. You will also remain close to execution \- setting the quality bar for RFPs, client proposals, narrative decks, and strategic customer opportunities while building repeatable processes for the broader team.
 



**What You'll Be Doing** 




**GTM Strategy and Product Marketing** 



* Own the end\-to\-end GTM narrative and sales planning strategy for the Brand Business across North America, APAC, and EMEA.
* Develop differentiated positioning, messaging, value propositions, audience narratives, and customer\-centric solution frameworks.
* Partner closely with Product Marketing and Product teams to translate platform capabilities and launches into clear market\-facing stories and sales readiness programs.
* Gather and synthesize customer feedback, competitive intelligence, market trends, and advertiser needs to identify market gaps and evolving opportunities.
* Create and maintain messaging frameworks, persona\-based narratives, use\-case playbooks, and proof points that support the full sales cycle.
* Champion the Brand Business narrative internally and externally, ensuring consistency across regions, channels, and customer touchpoints.



**Sales Planning and Strategic Solutioning** 



* Lead the development of complex RFP responses, proposals, media strategies, and executive presentations for strategic opportunities.
* Translate advertiser objectives and campaign briefs into differentiated media recommendations and sophisticated client solutioning frameworks.
* Develop proactive GTM materials including vertical narratives, industry playbooks, tentpole collateral, one\-pagers, case studies, competitive battlecards, and solution briefs.
* Connect insights from BI, Trading, Supply, Product, and Deal Desk into a unified and persuasive customer story.
* Design visually compelling, story\-driven presentations for customers, agencies, Sales teams, and leadership audiences.
* Establish best practices and quality standards for all customer\-facing deliverables across the Sales Planning team.



**Sales Enablement** 



* Build scalable sales enablement programs that improve seller productivity, solution confidence, and win rates.
* Equip Sales teams with best\-in\-class market insights, competitive intelligence, messaging frameworks, customer stories, and objection\-handling tools.
* Partner with regional Sales leaders to identify enablement gaps and proactively develop solutions aligned to revenue priorities.
* Work with centralized Marketing execution teams to bring GTM strategies to life through vertical narratives, tentpole collateral, case studies, demand and supply collateral, and industry events.



**AI Transformation** 



* Lead the adoption of AI across the Sales Planning function and define an AI\-first operating model for the team.
* Build scalable AI workflows that automate research, proposal generation, content development, presentation creation, and knowledge reuse.
* Develop prompt libraries, AI playbooks, and reusable frameworks that improve quality, consistency, and productivity.
* Evaluate and deploy tools such as Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT, Gamma, Canva AI, and other emerging platforms.
* Coach the broader Sales Planning and Sales organization on prompt engineering, responsible AI use, and high\-impact business applications.



**Cross\-Functional Leadership and Team Development** 



* Act as the central hub connecting Sales, Product Marketing, Product, BI, Trading, Supply, Deal Desk, and centralized Marketing teams.
* Influence product positioning, roadmap conversations, and GTM priorities by bringing customer feedback and market intelligence into cross\-functional discussions.
* Lead strategic initiatives from concept through execution, ensuring high\-quality and timely delivery with measurable business outcomes.
* Mentor and coach Sales Planning professionals in storytelling, PMM fundamentals, client solutioning, AI adoption, and executive communication.
* Establish scalable processes, templates, operating rhythms, and measurement frameworks across the function.
* Balance long\-term strategic planning with hands\-on involvement in high\-priority customer opportunities.



**What We're Looking For** 




**Experience** 



* 8\+ years of experience in Product Marketing, Strategic Presales, Sales Enablement, GTM, Partner Marketing, or Agency Strategy roles within AdTech, MarTech, Digital Advertising, or related industries.
* Strong Product Marketing skill set with demonstrated ownership of messaging, positioning, GTM strategy, product launches, market intelligence, and sales enablement.
* Deep understanding of digital advertising, brand marketing, media planning, advertiser and agency needs, and the broader AdTech ecosystem.
* Experience working with global Sales organizations and cross\-functional teams across multiple regions.



**Product Marketing, Storytelling, and Content** 



* Exceptional storytelling ability, with a strong command of narrative development, messaging frameworks, and customer\-centric positioning.
* Proven ability to create GTM strategies, product launch narratives, vertical stories, use\-case frameworks, and sales enablement programs.
* Outstanding written communication skills across executive decks, reports, whitepapers, customer success stories, thought leadership, blogs, and external content.
* Advanced presentation design skills, with a strong focus on visual storytelling, structure, clarity, and executive impact.
* Excellent presentation and delivery skills, with the confidence to engage and influence senior internal and external audiences.



**AI and Innovation** 



* Extensive hands\-on experience with Generative AI platforms such as Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT, Gamma, Canva AI, and similar technologies.
* Proven experience building AI workflows, prompt libraries, automation frameworks, or AI\-powered business processes.
* Excellent prompt\-building and prompt\-engineering skills, with the ability to generate consistently high\-quality business outputs.
* A track record of introducing new tools and ways of working that improve team productivity and output quality.



**Strategic Leadership and Collaboration** 



* Strong commercial and strategic acumen, with the ability to translate market signals and advertising data into actionable GTM strategies.
* Proven ability to influence decision\-making without direct authority and collaborate effectively across matrixed global teams.
* Strong stakeholder management and executive presence, with the ability to align Product, Sales, Marketing, and leadership teams.
* Demonstrated mentoring and coaching capability, with a commitment to raising the quality bar across the organization.



**Execution and Personal Attributes** 



* Strong analytical, conceptual, and problem\-solving skills, with the ability to turn complexity into clear and actionable recommendations.
* Excellent project management and organizational skills, with the ability to manage multiple priorities and proactively address risks or delays.
* Customer\-first, solution\-oriented mindset with high ownership, accountability, and attention to detail.
* Comfort working across diverse cultures, global teams, and time zones.
* Curious, innovative, and committed to continuous improvement.

4f887371.title: Architect I - Security Presales
4f887371.description:
**Requisition Number: 105048**
**Architect I \- Presales Security
   

  

 Location: Delhi NCR, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Pune, Trivandrum. This is a hybrid opportunity**
  

  

**Insight at a Glance**
* 14,000\+ engaged teammates globally with operations in 25 countries across the globe.
* Received 35\+ industry and partner awards in the past year
* $9\.2 billion in revenue
* \#20 on Fortune’s World's Best Workplaces™ list
* \#14 on Forbes World's Best Employers in IT – 2023
* \#23 on Forbes Best Employers for Women in IT\- 2023
* $1\.4M\+ total charitable contributions in 2023 by Insight globally


  

  

 Now is the time to bring your expertise to Insight. We are not just a tech company; we are a people\-first company. We believe that by unlocking the power of people and technology, we can accelerate transformation and achieve extraordinary results. As a Fortune 500 Solutions Integrator with deep expertise in cloud, data, AI, cybersecurity, and intelligent edge, we guide organisations through complex digital decisions.
   

  

  

  

**About The Role**
 The Presales Security Architect is responsible for designing, positioning, and articulating cybersecurity solutions that address customer business risks and technical requirements. This role works closely with sales, delivery, and partner teams to support the full presales lifecycle, including discovery, solution design, proposal development, and customer presentations.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Partner with sales teams to understand customer security requirements and business objectives.
* Lead security discovery sessions, workshops, and technical assessments.
* Design end\-to\-end security architectures aligned with Zero Trust and industry best practices.
* Develop solution documentation including architectures, SOWs, BOMs, and RFP/RFI responses.
* Present security solutions to technical and executive stakeholders including CIOs and CISOs.
* Collaborate with delivery teams to ensure alignment between presales commitments and implementation.
* Support development of standardized security offerings and reference architectures.


**Security Domains**
* Cloud Security (Azure, AWS, Hybrid)
* Identity \& Access Management (Entra ID / Azure AD)
* Endpoint \& Workload Security (Microsoft Defender suite)
* Network \& Perimeter Security
* Security Operations (SIEM/SOAR – Microsoft Sentinel)
* Compliance \& Governance (ISO 27001, NIST, CIS, GDPR, PCI\-DSS)


**Required Experience**
* 6–10\+ years of experience in cybersecurity, architecture, or consulting roles.
* 4–6\+ years in customer\-facing or presales roles.
* Experience supporting enterprise and regulated customers.


**Technical Skills**
* Strong understanding of cloud and hybrid security architectures.
* Hands\-on or design\-level experience with Microsoft security solutions.
* Knowledge of Zero Trust, identity\-first security, and threat management.


**Certifications (Preferred)**
* Microsoft SC\-100, AZ\-500, SC\-200
* CISSP, CCSP, or CISM
* Cloud Security certifications (Azure / AWS)


**Soft Skills**
* Strong communication and presentation skills.
* Ability to explain complex security concepts to non\-technical audiences.
* Commercial awareness and proposal\-writing capability.


**Success Metrics**
* Contribution to deal win\-rate for security opportunities.
* Quality and reusability of architectures and SOWs.
* Customer satisfaction and delivery alignment.


**What you can expect**
**Benefits**
 We’re legendary to take care of you, your family and to help you engage with your local community. We want you to enjoy a full, meaningful life and own your career at Insight. Some of our benefits include:
   

  

* Freedom to work from another location.
* Medical Insurance
* Health Benefits
* Professional Development: Learning Platform and Certificate Reimbursement
* Shift Allowance


  

  

 But what really sets us apart are our core values of Hunger, Heart, and Harmony, which guide everything we do, from building relationships with teammates, partners, and clients to making a positive impact in our communities.
   

  

  

  

**Join us today, your ambitious journey starts here** 
 .
   

  

  

  

 When you apply, please tell us the pronouns you use and any reasonable adjustments you may need during the interview process.
   

  

 At Insight, we celebrate diversity of skills and experience so even if you don’t feel like your skills are a perfect match \- we still want to hear from you! Today's talent leads tomorrow's success. Learn more about Insight:
   

  

 https://www.linkedin.com/company/insight/
   

  

  

  

  

  

  

  

 Insight is an equal opportunity employer, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, disability status, protected veteran status, sexual orientation or any other characteristic protected by law.

418cf851.description:
Architect \- Enterprise Application \- Oracle S**Ready to turn bold ideas into real\-world impact?**  

 At Genpact, we don’t just adapt to change, we lead it. AI and digital innovation are transforming the way businesses work, and we’re at the forefront of it. Genpact’s AI Gigafactory, our industry\-first accelerator, exemplifies how we scale advanced technology solutions to help global enterprises work smarter, grow faster, and transform at scale. Whether tackling complex challenges through large\-scale models or agentic AI, our breakthrough solutions tackle companies’ most complex challenges.  

  

If you thrive in a fast\-moving, innovation\-driven environment, love building and deploying cutting\-edge AI solutions, and want to push the boundaries of what’s possible, this is your moment.  

  

Genpact (NYSE: G) is an agentic and advanced technology solutions company. We leverage process intelligence and artificial intelligence to deliver measurable outcomes. With a strong partner ecosystem and decades of client trust, we provide innovative solutions that transform how businesses run. Powered by a team with an active learning mindset and client centricity at its core, we deliver lasting value for the world’s leading enterprises.  

 Get to know us at genpact.com and on LinkedIn, YouTube, X, and Facebook.

**Job Description**

**Oracle Project Manager – Roles and Responsibilities**
-------------------------------------------------------


An **Oracle Project Manager** is responsible for planning, executing, monitoring, and delivering Oracle implementation, upgrade, migration, and support projects while ensuring they are completed on time, within budget, and meet business objectives.

### **Key Roles and Responsibilities**


1\. Project Planning and Management* Define project scope, objectives, deliverables, and success criteria.
* Develop detailed project plans, schedules, milestones, and resource allocation.
* Estimate project timelines, budgets, and effort.
* Manage project lifecycle from initiation through closure.
* Ensure adherence to project management methodologies (Agile, Waterfall, Hybrid).


2\. Stakeholder Management* Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand requirements and expectations.
* Conduct regular project status meetings and steering committee reviews.
* Communicate project progress, risks, and issues to leadership.
* Manage stakeholder expectations throughout the project.


3\. Team Leadership* Lead cross\-functional teams comprising Oracle functional consultants, technical consultants, developers, architects, QA, and infrastructure teams.
* Assign responsibilities and monitor team performance.
* Foster collaboration across business and IT teams.
* Resolve conflicts and remove project roadblocks.


4\. Oracle ERP Implementation Oversight* Manage Oracle implementation projects such as: Oracle Cloud ERP Oracle E\-Business Suite (EBS) Oracle Fusion Applications Oracle SCM Oracle HCM Oracle Financials Oracle Procurement
* Ensure Oracle best practices are followed during implementation.


5\. Budget and Resource Management* Track project budgets and expenditures.
* Optimize resource utilization.
* Manage vendor and contractor engagements.
* Forecast resource requirements throughout the project lifecycle.


6\. Risk and Issue Management* Identify project risks and dependencies.
* Develop mitigation and contingency plans.
* Track issues and ensure timely resolution.
* Escalate critical risks to senior management when required.


7\. Change Management* Manage scope changes through formal change control processes.
* Assess business impact of changes.
* Coordinate approvals and implementation of approved changes.


8\. Quality Assurance* Ensure project deliverables meet quality standards.
* Review functional and technical documentation.
* Monitor testing phases including: Unit Testing System Integration Testing (SIT) User Acceptance Testing (UAT) Performance Testing
* Ensure successful production deployment.


9\. Vendor and Client Coordination* Coordinate with Oracle, implementation partners, and third\-party vendors.
* Manage contracts, Statements of Work (SOWs), and vendor deliverables.
* Ensure contractual obligations are met.


10\. Deployment and Go\-Live Management* Develop cutover and deployment plans.
* Coordinate production readiness activities.
* Monitor go\-live execution.
* Ensure hypercare support after deployment.


11\. Governance and Compliance* Ensure adherence to organizational governance standards.
* Maintain project documentation and audit readiness.
* Track KPIs and project metrics.
* Ensure compliance with security and regulatory requirements.


12\. Reporting* Prepare: Weekly project status reports Executive dashboards RAID (Risks, Assumptions, Issues, Dependencies) logs Resource utilization reports Budget reports Milestone tracking reports

**Qualifications**


Bachelors \- Computer Engineering, Bachelors \- Computer Science, Bachelors \- Information Technology, Masters \- Software Engineering**Certifications**


Oracle Fusion Middleware (FMW) 11g Forms Developer \- OracleOracle**Required Skills**


Agile Methodology, Automated Testing, Change Management, Client Relations, Collaboration Tools, Design Thinking, Executive Presence, Inclusion, Modernizing Operations, Oracle, Oracle Application Express (APEX), Oracle Apps Financials, Oracle SCM, Oracle Transactional Business Intelligence (OTBI), People Leadership, PeopleSoft Administration, Personal Effectiveness, R12 \-Manufacturing, Risk Management, Siebel CRM Systems, Storytelling**Language**


English (Required)**Language Proficiency \-**

Advanced \- C1**Additional Job Location \-**

**Job Type**


Regular**Master Skill List \-**

Enterprise Application Oracle S**Remote Type \-**

Hybrid**Work Shift \-**

Day Job (India)**Why join Genpact?**  

* **Lead AI\-powered transformation** – Drive innovation and solve real\-world business challenges that matter
* **Make an impact** – Help global enterprises solve business challenges that matter
* **Accelerate your career** – Gain hands\-on experience, mentorship, and world\-class learning opportunities to stay ahead
* **Work with the best** – Join 140,000\+ bold thinkers and problem\-solvers who push boundaries every day
* **Thrive in a values\-driven culture** – Our courage, curiosity, and incisiveness \- built on a foundation of integrity and inclusion \- allow your ideas to fuel progress


  

Come join the 140,000\+ coders, tech shapers, and growth makers at Genpact and take your career in the only direction that matters: Up.  

Let’s build tomorrow together.  

  

Genpact is an Equal Opportunity Employer and considers applicants for all positions without regard to race, color, religion or belief, sex, age, national origin, citizenship status, marital status, military/veteran status, genetic information, sexual orientation, gender identity, physical or mental disability or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws. Genpact is committed to creating a dynamic work environment that values respect and integrity, customer focus, and innovation.  

Furthermore, please do note that Genpact does not charge fees to process job applications and applicants are not required to pay to participate in our hiring process in any other way. Examples of such scams include purchasing a 'starter kit,' paying to apply, or purchasing equipment or training.

fef3d642.title: Senior Java Full Stack Tech Lead/Architect
fef3d642.description:
Company Profile:  

  

Founded in 1976, CGI is among the largest independent IT and business consulting services firms in the world. With 94,000 consultants and professionals across the globe, CGI delivers an end\-to\-end portfolio of capabilities, from strategic IT and business consulting to systems integration, managed IT and business process services and intellectual property solutions. CGI works with clients through a local relationship model complemented by a global delivery network that helps clients digitally transform their organizations and accelerate results. CGI Fiscal 2024 reported revenue is CA$14\.68 billion and CGI shares are listed on the TSX (GIB.A) and the NYSE (GIB). Learn more at cgi.com.  

  

Job Title: Senior Java Full Stack Lead/Architect  

Experience: 10\+ Years  

Category: Software Development/ Engineering  

Shift: 11AM to 8PM  

Job location: Hyderabad  

Position ID: J0626\-2435  

Employment Type: Full Time  

Notice Period: Immediate to 10 days joiners  

Work Mode: Hybrid(3\-4 days work from office)  

Education Qualification: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field or higher with minimum 5 years of relevant experience.  

  

Member will be responsible for designing, developing, and overseeing the execution of highly complex software applications using a variety of modern technologies. You will be the driving force behind architecture and design decisions, collaborating with cross\-functional teams to deliver scalable, efficient, and secure solutions. This role also involves mentoring junior developers and ensuring the quality and integrity of the codebase.

**Your future duties and responsibilities**

* Lead the design and development of enterprise\-level software solutions with expertise in Java/JEE, Angular, Hibernate, and Spring frameworks.
* Develop RESTful services, SOAP web services, and integrate APIs using tools like APIM, ensuring scalability, performance, and maintainability.
* Drive the usage of modern development tools like Maven, Git, GitHub, and IDEs such as IntelliJ, Eclipse, or STS.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams in an Agile/SCRUM environment, delivering on\-time software releases.
* Implement unit tests with JUnit and integration tests using frameworks like Robot Framework to ensure a high\-quality codebase.
* Monitor and maintain the CI/CD pipeline using Sonar, Azure, and Kibana for monitoring logs and metrics.
* Utilize JIRA for issue tracking and service ticket management, ensuring timely resolution of technical issues and project tasks.
* Troubleshoot complex production issues and lead debugging efforts to ensure uptime and performance.
* Foster a collaborative environment by mentoring junior developers, offering guidance on best practices and technical problem\-solving.
* Participate in code reviews, ensuring coding standards and security practices are met.
* Provide technical leadership in architecture and design discussions, recommending technology choices that align with business needs.

**Required qualifications to be successful in this role**

* Minimum 10 years of hands\-on experience in software development, with at least 3\+years in a Architect role.
* Define and own the end\-to\-end application architecture for enterprise solutions using Java (Spring Boot / Microservices) and Angular.
* Design scalable, secure, and high\-performance backend systems and responsive frontend architectures.
* Establish coding standards, architectural guidelines, and best practices for both Java and Angular teams.
* Lead the microservices architecture, including API design, inter\-service communication, and fault tolerance.
* Proficient in Java/JEE and Spring frameworks for building backend systems.
* Strong experience with Angular and JavaScript for front\-end development.
* Extensive experience with Hibernate for ORM and database management.
* Experience in designing and implementing SOAP and RESTful web services.
* Expertise in using Maven for build automation and dependency management.
* Familiarity with Azure cloud services, deployment, and monitoring tools.
* Deep understanding of version control using Git and GitHub.
* Experience with Sonar for code quality management and Kibana for log management.

3e926513.title: Solutions Architect
3e926513.description:
**Job Description**
**Change the world. Love your job.**
 Texas Instruments (TI) is seeking a Storage Infrastructure Architect to define and lead our global storage strategy.
   

  

 Storage Infrastructure Architects are seasoned technology leaders who design, govern, and modernize enterprise\-scale storage solutions. They establish architectural standards, drive innovation, and ensure multi\-petabyte storage environments align with business\-critical objectives.
   

  

 In this role, you will architect scalable storage solutions, mentor technical teams, and deliver infrastructure that meets TI's strategic goals with uncompromising performance, reliability, and security
   

  

**In This Role You Will**
**Architecture \& Strategy**
* Define and own the enterprise storage architecture strategy, roadmap, and standards across SAN, NAS, Object Storage, and Software\-Defined Storage platforms
* Lead the evaluation, selection, and adoption of emerging storage technologies
* Architect multi\-site, globally distributed storage solutions with disaster recovery, business continuity, and high availability requirements
* Establish storage capacity planning models, performance benchmarking, and TCO analysis methodologies
* Drive storage infrastructure modernization initiatives and technology refresh cycles


**Technical Leadership**
* Design complex storage solutions for enterprise\-scale deployments supporting diverse workloads including databases, virtualization, containerization, HPC, AI/ML, and big data analytics
* Lead architecture reviews, provide technical guidance, and make design decisions for critical storage projects
* Establish best practices, design patterns, and reference architectures for storage infrastructure
* Define SLAs, performance metrics, and operational KPIs for storage services
* Evaluate and architect storage automation, orchestration, and self\-service capabilities using Infrastructure\-as\-Code principles


**Technology Expertise**
* Architect solutions leveraging:
* Enterprise SAN/NAS platforms (Hitachi, NetApp, Dell EMC, Pure Storage)
* Object Storage systems (S3\-compatible platforms including HCP, ECS, NetApp GRID)
* Software\-Defined Storage and hyper\-converged infrastructure
* Storage networking (FC, iSCSI, NVMe\-oF, RDMA)
* Data protection technologies (snapshots, replication, backup/recovery)
* Storage virtualization and tiering strategies
* Architect data lifecycle management, retention policies, and compliance frameworks


**Collaboration \& Governance**
* Partner with application teams, database administrators, virtualization team and infrastructure teams to understand requirements and design optimal solutions
* Collaborate with security and compliance teams to ensure storage solutions meet regulatory and data governance requirements
* Work with vendors on technology roadmaps, proof\-of\-concepts, and strategic partnerships
* Present architecture proposals and business cases to senior leadership and steering committees
* Mentor storage administrators and SREs, providing technical training and knowledge transfer


**Innovation \& Continuous Improvement**
* Research emerging technologies including NVMe and AI\-driven storage management
* Drive automation initiatives to reduce operational overhead and improve service delivery
* Establish performance optimization strategies and cost optimization frameworks
* Lead proof\-of\-concept initiatives and pilot programs for new storage technologies


**Qualifications**
**Minimum Requirements:**
**Education:** 
 Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or related degree
   

  

**Experience** 
 : 5\+ years of experience in storage infrastructure with at least 3 years in architecture/design roles
   

  

**Proven track record** 
 of designing and implementing enterprise\-scale storage solutions in large, complex environments
   

  

**Preferred Qualifications**
* Deep expertise across multiple storage platforms and technologies
* Experience designing storage solutions supporting petabytes in production environments
* Proven success leading large\-scale storage transformation and modernization programs
* Background in high\-performance computing (HPC) storage or AI/ML data platform architectures
* Proficient in data protection strategies and storage management/monitoring tools
* Designs scalable, high\-availability storage solutions including multi\-site DR architectures with optimized RPO/RTO
* Experienced in capacity planning, storage tiering, and Infrastructure\-as\-Code (Terraform, Ansible)
* Solid understanding of virtualization, containerization (VMware, Kubernetes, OpenShift), and container storage (CSI drivers)
* Working knowledge of database storage needs, Linux/Windows OS, and scripting/automation (Bash, APIs, CI/CD)
* Communicates complex technical concepts clearly to executive audiences and cross\-functional stakeholders
* Skilled at translating business needs into technical architecture and mentoring technical teams
* Strategic, innovative thinker with strong business acumen and a data\-driven approach to problem\-solving
* Certifications
* Storage vendors(Hitachi Vantara, NetApp NCIE, Dell EMC, Pure Storage)
* Cloud certifications (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud)


**About Us**
**Why TI?**
* Engineer your future. We empower our employees to truly own their career and development. Come collaborate with some of the smartest people in the world to shape the future of electronics.
* We're different by design. Diverse backgrounds and perspectives are what push innovation forward and what make TI stronger. We value each and every voice, and look forward to hearing yours. Meet the people of TI
* Benefits that benefit you. We offer competitive pay and benefits designed to help you and your family live your best life. Your well\-being is important to us. Please find our country\-specific benefits here


**About Texas Instruments**
 Texas Instruments Incorporated (Nasdaq: TXN) is a global semiconductor company that designs, manufactures and sells analog and embedded processing chips for markets such as industrial, automotive, data center, personal electronics and communications equipment. At our core, we have a passion to create a better world by making electronics more affordable through semiconductors. This passion is alive today as each generation of innovation builds upon the last to make our technology more reliable, more affordable and lower power, making it possible for semiconductors to go into electronics everywhere. Learn more at TI.com .
   

  

 Texas Instruments is an equal opportunity employer and supports a diverse, inclusive work environment.
   

  

 If you are interested in this position, please apply to this requisition.
   

  

**About The Team**
 TI does not make recruiting or hiring decisions based on citizenship, immigration status or national origin. However, if TI determines that information access or export control restrictions based upon applicable laws and regulations would prohibit you from working in this position without first obtaining an export license, TI expressly reserves the right not to seek such a license for you and either offer you a different position that does not require an export license or decline to move forward with your employment.

**Noventiq Hiring!**
 Noventiq (Noventiq Holdings PLC) is a leading global solutions and services provider in digital transformation and cybersecurity, headquartered in London. The company enables, facilitates, and accelerates digital transformation for its customers’ businesses, connecting 80,000\+ organizations across all sectors with a vast selection of best\-in\-class IT vendors, alongside its own services and solutions.
   

  

 Noventiq delivered record gross revenue of $1\.6 billion for the 12 months to March 31, 2023, an increase of 52% in constant currency. The company’s growth is underpinned by its three\-dimensional strategy to expand its markets, portfolio, and sales channels. The strategy is supported by an active approach to M\&As which enables Noventiq to take advantage of the ongoing consolidation in the industry. Noventiq's 6,400 employees work in approximately 60 countries throughout Asia, Latin America, Europe, Middle East, and Africa—markets with significant growth potential.
   

  

* One of the largest SI’s in India with revenue close to 700M$ and growing to 900M$.
* 3500\+ Employees in India for India.
* Total 28 Offices in India across North, South, West \& East.
* 1000\+ Resident Engineers across India.
* 2500\+ technical resources in India for India.
* Technology partnerships with Top 3 Cloud Solution Providers, Top 3 Infrastructure companies, Top 10 Cybersecurity companies.
* Enviable customer base: 4 of Top 5 Banks, 3 of Top 5 IT companies, 3 of Top 5 BPO’s, 3 of Top 5 Pharma


 companies.
   

  

* Largest partner to Microsoft with combined infeed of US$600M about 25% of Microsoft India revenues.


**Qualifications And Experience Required**
* Minimum of 5\+ years of overall technical experience in IT Infrastructure, with 5\+ years in a Pre\-sales Technical Consultant capacity, primarily in network and cybersecurity solutions.
* Must have experience building technical solutions, working with OEMs \& Distributors, resolving customer IT problems, and the ability to work well in a team setting. A comprehensive understanding of IT Security is required, with strong emphasis on network security architecture and design.
* Hands\-on presales exposure across the following security technology stack is required:
* Network Security (Must have):\*\* NGFW – Fortinet, Check Point, Palo Alto \| Proxy/SWG – ZScaler, Netskope \| NAC – Forescout, Fortinet
* Identity \& Data Security (Must have):\*\* PAM – CyberArk, ARCON \| DLP – Forcepoint, ZScaler \| PKI/Key Encryption – Thales, Entrust
* Endpoint \& Email Security:\*\* EDR – CrowdStrike, Trellix \| Email Security – Barracuda, Proofpoint, Mimecast \| Endpoint Management – ManageEngine
* Experience in building solutions that includes Opportunity Information gathering, building a business case, high \& Low\-level architecture definition, services, etc.
* Should be an accomplished presenter of sales and technical material to both small and large groups, with proven design, consultation, and implementation experience across the OEM landscape above.
* Excellent communication skills, both written and oral, are required. Possess the ability to effectively present ideas, properly describe problems, and propose solutions.
* The role, responsibilities, and geographical focus will change and develop over time along with the company's rapid growth.


**Key Responsibilities**
* Deliver product demonstrations to customers and prospects and conduct demos of the solutions individually.
* Provide technical guidance and solution design assistance to regional Sales Account Managers. This includes design and/or consultative review of existing client architectures while driving architectural convergence, encouraging architectural excellence and consistency, and collaborating on new architectures within the team, product spaces, and business unit.
* Security solution architecture design on the basis of RFP/RFI/Workshops.
* Work closely with the sales team and Partners by participating in and supporting all sales strategies and business goals.
* Provides proactive technical and business consultative presales services.
* Assist the sales division to help define opportunities and close large opportunities with the right Solutions and map key Value propositions to customers’ business.
* Perform technical presentations, Coordinate proof of Concepts, solutions, and product demonstration.
* Work closely with technical customers on POCs in customers' environments to show.


 Location: Mumbai \- NQIND, Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

19e2e489.title: AI Customer Engineer, Public Sector, Google Cloud
19e2e489.description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree in a technical field or equivalent practical experience.
* 10 years of experience with cloud native architecture in a customer\-facing or support role.
* Experience with architecting solutions that integrate AI models using agents with enterprise data sources using patterns such as RAG, Text\-to\-SQL, or semantic search.
* Experience with coding in Python, JavaScript or TypeScript, Go, or Java, to demo, prototype, or workshop integration patterns with customers.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Experience in developing agents using frameworks such as LangGraph, Semantic Kernel, or the Google AI Agent Development Kit (ADK).
* Experience with cloud technologies including SaaS applications, iPaaS, business automation solutions, Cloud infrastructure, Agentic AI, and cloud networking.
* Experience engaging with, or presenting to, technical stakeholders or executive leaders.
* Knowledge of integration patterns using OpenAPI and Model Context Protocol (MCP) to connect AI agents with business systems and Application Programming Interface (API) Gateways.
* Knowledge of observability constructs including distributed tracing, logging, and audit logging for AI applications.


**About The Job**
 When leading companies choose Google Cloud, it's a huge win for spreading the power of cloud computing globally. Once educational institutions, government agencies, and other businesses sign on to use Google Cloud products, you come in to facilitate making their work more productive, mobile, and collaborative. You listen and deliver what is most helpful for the customer. You assist fellow sales Googlers by problem\-solving key technical issues for our customers. You liaise with the product marketing management and engineering teams to stay on top of industry trends and devise enhancements to Google Cloud products.
   

  

 As a Practice Customer Engineer (CE) with a specialty in AI, you will partner with technical sales teams to differentiate Google Cloud to customers. You will serve as a technical expert responsible for accelerating technical wins and adoption of complex, specialized workloads. You will leverage your deep expertise in strategic product areas in partnership with Platform CEs, writing code, developing prototypes, proofs\-of\-concept, and demos to promote new specialized solutions to customers. You will solve AI\-centered customer issues and provide a critical feedback loop to influence product development.
   

  

 It's an exciting time to join Google Cloud’s Go\-To\-Market team, leading the AI revolution for businesses worldwide. You’ll excel by leveraging Google's brand credibility—a legacy built on inventing foundational technologies and proven at scale. We’ll provide you with the world's most advanced AI portfolio, including frontier Gemini models, and the complete Vertex AI platform, helping you to solve business problems. We’re a collaborative culture providing direct access to DeepMind's engineering and research minds, empowering you to solve customer challenges. Join us to be the catalyst for our mission, drive customer success, and define the new cloud era—the market is yours.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Drive the technical solution for complex workloads within AI product areas to ensure rapid and successful adoption, primarily supporting the business cycle from technical evaluation through customer ramp.
* Combine sales strategies and direct development and prototyping to provide functional, customer\-tailored solutions that secure buy\-in from customer domain experts.
* Provide deep technical consultation to customers, acting as a technical advisor and building lasting customer relationships. Leverage learnings from customer engagements to contribute to reusable solutions and assets with the Go\-To\-Market team.
* Work within product and engineering management systems to document, prioritize and drive resolution of customer feature requests and issues.
* Travel to customer sites, conferences, and other related events as required, acting as a public advocate for Google Cloud.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

065ca8c2.title: SAP Architect (Functional & Technical) with 15+ years experience
065ca8c2.description:
SAP Architect (Functional \& Technical)  

We are looking an experienced SAP Architect with strong functional and technical expertise to assess and provide recommendations on SAP landscape strategy, around business process expertise, security, upgrades, hosting, and third party support environments.  

Key Responsibilities:  

  

. Evaluate the current SAP landscape architecture, including ERP, Solution Manager, and integrated applications, and provide strategic architecture recommendations.  

. Assess the existing SAP security, including user access management, role design, segregation of duties (SoD), vulnerability management, patching strategy, and compliance controls.  

. Identify security risks and mitigation measures associated with operating SAP under third party support models, ensuring adherence to industry best practices and regulatory requirements.  

. Define and recommend an SAP upgrade and modernization strategy, considering business priorities, technical dependencies, support timelines, custom developments, and integration impacts.  

. Analyze constraints impacting upgrades, including legacy customizations, third party interfaces, database compatibility, infrastructure limitations, and business continuity requirements.  

. Review the current hosting and infrastructure setup and evaluate its impact on performance, scalability, security, disaster recovery, and total cost of ownership.  

. Assess SAP environment readiness for future transformation initiatives and platform modernization.  

. Collaborate with functional and technical stakeholders to align architecture decisions with business processes, operational requirements, and enterprise IT strategy.  

. Provide architecture governance, risk assessments, and actionable recommendations covering security improvements, upgrade roadmaps, hosting optimization, and support model considerations.  

. Lead workshops and executive level discussions to document current state architecture, identify gaps, and develop a target state roadmap with prioritized recommendations.  

  

Preferred Experience:  

  

. 15\+ years of SAP experience with a mix of functional and technical architecture roles.

**Your future duties and responsibilities**

**Required qualifications to be successful in this role**

**Experience:** 
 6–9 Years
   

  

**Location:** 
 Hyderabad / Pune (Remote/Hybrid)
   

  

**Shift:** 
 Europe Time Zone (Mandatory)
   

  

**Notice Period:** 
 Immediate to 30 Days Preferred
   

  

**About The Role**
 P99Soft is looking for an experienced
 **Solution Architect** 
 to design and deliver scalable enterprise solutions across
 **Cloud, AI, Data, Salesforce, and SaaS** 
 technologies. The role involves working closely with customers, engineering, and delivery teams to drive AI\-first and cloud\-native transformation initiatives.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design end\-to\-end enterprise solution architectures.
* Translate business requirements into scalable technical solutions.
* Lead technical discovery workshops and customer discussions.
* Define integration, security, scalability, and deployment strategies.
* Guide engineering teams and review technical designs.
* Prepare solution proposals, architecture documents, and effort estimates.
* Drive innovation in Cloud, AI, and SaaS technologies.

* AWS: EC2, Lambda, ECS/EKS, API Gateway, RDS, DynamoDB, S3, IAM, VPC, CloudFormation/Terraform

b71ac05c.title: Senior Solution Architect
b71ac05c.description:
What Cognite is: Relentless to achieve
   

  

 Cognite operates at the forefront of
 **industrial digitalization, building AI** 
 , and data solutions that solve the world’s hardest, highest\-impact problems. With unmatched industrial heritage and a comprehensive suite of AI capabilities, including low\-code AI agents, Cognite accelerates the digital transformation to drive operational improvements.
   

  

 We thrive in challenges. We challenge assumptions. We execute with speed and ownership. If you view obstacles as signals to step forward \- not backwards \- you’ll feel right at home here.
   

  

 Our Moonshot is bold: Unlock $100B in customer value by 2035, and redefine how global industry works. Join us in this venture where AI and data meet ingenuity, and together, we will forge the path to a smarter, more connected industrial future.
   

  

**How You’ll Demonstrate Ownership**
 As a Senior Solution Architect at Cognite, you will play a pivotal role in the Technology department within our Value Delivery organisation. In this customer\-facing position, you will work directly with key customers, field sales, delivery teams, and product development. You will use your seniority and technical competencies to help to lead Norwegian and international industrial customers to increase productivity, profitability, reduce environmental impact and reduce costs. Our customers are large international process and energy industries, with challenges in asset performance and maintenance, production efficiency, and sustainability. Together with the team, you will define solutions and support each integration through to a successful finish.
   

  

* End\-to\-end architecture and solution design leadership.
* Providing strategic and technical expertise to support customers and the customer\-facing project teams.
* Defining enterprise and solution architecture, including integration and data models and data ingestion pipelines, as well as user\-facing solutions
* Expressing complex technical solutions through architecture modeling tools
* Ensure operational responsibility and support agreements for the delivered solutions
* Building strong relationships with key stakeholders, C\-level executives, and IT and Business Data Managers to drive long\-term adoption of Cognite’s products and services
* Training internal teams and partners in your area of specialization
* Collaborating with Sales, Engineering, and Product Management teams to translate customer needs into product offerings
* Independently work with managing integration, data modeling, and related activities using Cognite data connectors and extractors, SQL, Python/Java, Rest APIs and Cloud platform providers like Azure, AWS \& Google
* Collaborate with our Sales, Engineering and Product Management teams to turn customer needs into a prioritised pipeline of product offerings
* Develop and maintain technical and business expertise for Cognite’s products


**The Impact you bring to Cognite**
* We expect all our solutions architects to be hands\-on in python as well as a good hands\-on expertise with software development best practices.
* Open to travel.
* You must be highly organised, thorough, and communicate well with all stakeholders.
* Take ownership and drive tasks independently
* You will be required to collaborate, lead, and coach, as well as work independently.


**Required Qualifications**
* 12\+ years of experience working as a Software Engineer/Data Engineer/Machine Learning Engineer
* Technical background, willing and able to dive in and contribute code for advanced topics when needed


**Preferred Experience**
* Experience from domains like Manufacturing, Energy, O\&G, Pharma, Life sciences is preferred


**Learn More About Us**
* Impact 2025
* Cognite's Industrial AI: Moonshot
* We’re globally recognized domain experts with an international presence that spans Phoenix, Houston, Oslo Tokyo, Bengaluru, and Abu Dhabi.


***Equal Opportunity***
*Cognite is committed to creating a diverse and inclusive environment at work and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive the same level of consideration for employment.*

9a27462f.title: Enterprise Solution Architect
9a27462f.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Enterprise Solution Architect
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Lead the development of complex solutions across multi\-tower and/or multi\- service transformational opportunities. Architect end\-to\-end integrated solutions leveraging the best mix of offerings, assets, and capabilities to maximize value for the client and Accenture. Ensure alignment of solution to client’s organization goals.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Dassault Systemes ENOVIA V5
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 12 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 In the role of Enterprise Solution Architect, a typical day involves leading the design and development of sophisticated solutions that span multiple domains and services. This position requires orchestrating integrated approaches that combine various resources and capabilities to deliver maximum value. The role demands continuous alignment of these solutions with the strategic objectives of the client s organization, ensuring that all components work harmoniously to support transformational initiatives. Collaboration with diverse teams and stakeholders is a key aspect, as is maintaining a broad perspective on how different elements contribute to the overall success of the project.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to be an SME, collaborate and manage the team to perform.
* Responsible for team decisions.
* Engage with multiple teams and contribute on key decisions.
* Expected to provide solutions to problems that apply across multiple teams.
* Drive innovation by identifying opportunities to enhance solution design and delivery.
* Mentor and support junior team members to foster professional growth and knowledge sharing.
* Coordinate cross\-functional efforts to ensure seamless integration of solutions across various platforms.
* Monitor project progress and adjust strategies to meet evolving client needs and organizational goals.


 Professional \& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in Dassault Systemes ENOVIA V5\.
* Strong expertise in solution architecture principles and best practices.
* Experience in designing end\-to\-end integrated solutions across multiple service areas.
* Ability to analyze complex business requirements and translate them into technical solutions.
* Excellent communication skills to effectively engage with clients and internal teams.
* Familiarity with software development lifecycle and project management methodologies.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 12 years of experience in Dassault Systemes ENOVIA V5\.
* This position is based at our Pune office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.


 , 15 years full time education

aaa92e40.title: Solution Architect
aaa92e40.description:
**About The Role**
**Grade Level (for internal use):**
 12
   

  

 Organisation Overview
   

  

 The Enterprise Solutions business within S\&P Global Market intelligence provides buy\-side, sell\-side, and corporate clients with industry\-leading software, data and services. The business portfolio offers a broad range of product offerings covering enterprise data management, investment management, loans platforms, regulatory and compliance solutions, and private markets solutions.
   

  

 The Enterprise Solutions Technology function is accountable for delivering technology solutions for the Enterprise Solutions products, in partnership with the product, commercial and wider divisional functions. The Enterprise Solutions Technology function comprises of the Business Segment / Product aligned delivery functions, Architecture \& Design, Technology \& Infrastructure Services, Engineering Enablement Services \& Industrialization, Data Science \& Data Engineering and Project Management Office.
   

  

 Position Summary
   

  

 We are seeking a strategic and experienced Software Development Architect experience is robust, scalable, and secure enterprise software applications for the capital markets domain, with a strong emphasis on SaaS\-based solutions and microservice architectures. This leadership role combines deep expertise in software application architect with capabilities in AI/ML to deliver innovative, high\-impact solutions that drive automation, intelligence, and compliance in critical financial workflows.
   

  

 What’s in it for you
   

  

 Professional Growth: You’ll have the opportunity to join a high\-performing team, growing your technical skills, and contribute to strategic decisions.
   

  

 Global Exposure: Collaborate with cross\-functional teams across different geographies, gaining exposure to diverse perspectives and markets.
   

  

 Innovation: Shape the future of data integration by working on cutting\-edge technologies and solving complex challenges.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

 Architect and deploy scalable, secure, and high\-performance applications on AWS, utilizing services such as EC2, ECS, Lambda, RDS, API Gateway, and CloudFormation.
   

  

 Define the technical roadmap for SaaS\-based enterprise software applications.
   

  

 Collaborative R\&D and rapid prototyping within the semantic space, working closely with Knowledge Engineering.
   

  

 Architecting shared capabilities, in a shift\-left environment enabling federated consumption across divisions and business units of S\&P Global.
   

  

 Ensuring systems are secure, compliant, auditable, and observable in\-alignment with Enterprise standards.
   

  

 Drive the adoption of microservice\-based architectures to ensure modularity, scalability, and maintainability of SaaS applications.
   

  

 Collaborate with Product, Data Engineering, and Client teams to align technical solutions with business and client needs.
   

  

 Ensure applications and AI systems are secure, compliant, and traceable, adhering to regulatory standards in the capital markets domain.
   

  

**Required Qualifications**
 Education
   

  

 Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
   

  

**Experience**
 15\+ years in software Architect, with minimum 5 years in leadership roles focused on application Architect.
   

  

 Experienced in solution architecture and have designed software solutions of significant size.
   

  

 Extensive experience in SaaS application development, focusing on scalability, multi\-tenancy, and performance.
   

  

 Experience with ontology development, semantic web technologies (RDF, RDFS, OWL, SPARQL), and open\-source or commercial semantic tools (e.g., VocBench, TopQuadrant, PoolParty, RDFLib, triple stores).
   

  

 Candidates with domain experience in private markets or public markets will be preferred.
   

  

 Technical Skills
   

  

 Expertise in C\#, React, Angular, SQL, and the broader Microsoft technology stack for building robust, scalable back\-end systems and developing dynamic, responsive front\-end interfaces.
   

  

 Deep knowledge of microservice\-based architectures, including design, implementation, and orchestration (e.g., using proprietary container orchestration platforms or ECS).
   

  

 In\-depth expertise in AWS\-native application development, leveraging services like EC2, ECS, Lambda, RDS, API Gateway, and CloudFormation.
   

  

 Familiarity with DevOps practices, including CI/CD pipelines, Docker, Terraform, and AWS CDK for infrastructure\-as\-code.
   

  

 Strong understanding of Python and API development. Familiarity with FastAPI, FastMCP, Flask, and AI/ML integration
   

  

 Good Understanding of ML algorithms, feature engineering, deep learning, and modern NLP techniques.
   

  

 Hands\-on experience with LLMs, RAG systems, and frameworks like LangChain, Llama Index, and vector databases (e.g., FAISS, Pinecone, OpenSearch).
   

  

 Familiarity with AWS AI/ML services like SageMaker and Bedrock for model training and deployment.
   

  

 Leadership \& Communication
   

  

 Exceptional communication skills to present technical and AI/ML concepts to non\-technical stakeholders, including compliance, product, and client\-facing teams.
   

  

 Operate with strong opinions, loosely held—arguing passionately for your view but willingly dropping it for a better solution.
   

  

 Passion for building secure, scalable, and compliant systems with a focus on performance, traceability, and fairness.
   

  

 Agile mindset with experience thriving in fast\-paced, regulated environments.
   

  

**About S\&P Global Market Intelligence**
 At S\&P Global Market Intelligence, a division of S\&P Global we understand the importance of accurate, deep and insightful information. Our team of experts delivers unrivaled insights and leading data and technology solutions, partnering with customers to expand their perspective, operate with confidence, and make decisions with conviction.
   

  

 For more information, visit www.spglobal.com/marketintelligence.
   

  

**What’s In It For** 
**You?**
**Our Mission**
 Advancing Essential Intelligence.
   

  

**Our People**
 We're more than 35,000 strong worldwide—so we're able to understand nuances while having a broad perspective. Our team is driven by curiosity and a shared belief that Essential Intelligence can help build a more prosperous future for us all.From finding new ways to measure sustainability to analyzing energy transition across the supply chain to building workflow solutions that make it easy to tap into insight and apply it. We are changing the way people see things and empowering them to make an impact on the world we live in. We’re committed to a more equitable future and to helping our customers find new, sustainable ways of doing business. Join us and help create the critical insights that truly make a difference.
   

  

**Our Values**
**Integrity, Discovery, Partnership**
 Throughout our history, the world's leading organizations have relied on us for the Essential Intelligence they need to make confident decisions about the road ahead. We start with a foundation of integrity in all we do, bring a spirit of discovery to our work, and collaborate in close partnership with each other and our customers to achieve shared goals.
   

  

**Benefits**
 We take care of you, so you can take care of business. We care about our people. That’s why we provide everything you—and your career—need to thrive at S\&P Global.
   

  

**Our Benefits Include**
* Health \& Wellness: Health care coverage designed for the mind and body.
* Flexible Downtime: Generous time off helps keep you energized for your time on.
* Continuous Learning: Access a wealth of resources to grow your career and learn valuable new skills.
* Invest in Your Future: Secure your financial future through competitive pay, retirement planning, a continuing education program with a company\-matched student loan contribution, and financial wellness programs.
* Family Friendly Perks: It’s not just about you. S\&P Global has perks for your partners and little ones, too, with some best\-in class benefits for families.
* Beyond the Basics: From retail discounts to referral incentive awards—small perks can make a big difference.


 For more information on benefits by country visit: https://spgbenefits.com/benefit\-summaries
   

  

**Global Hiring And Opportunity At S\&P Global**
 At S\&P Global, we are committed to fostering a connected and engaged workplace where all individuals have access to opportunities based on their skills, experience, and contributions. Our hiring practices emphasize fairness, transparency, and merit, ensuring that we attract and retain top talent. By valuing different perspectives and promoting a culture of respect and collaboration, we drive innovation and power global markets.
   

  

**Recruitment Fraud Alert**
 If you receive an email from a spglobalind.com domain or any other regionally based domains, it is a scam and should be reported to reportfraud@spglobal.com. S\&P Global never requires any candidate to pay money for job applications, interviews, offer letters, “pre\-employment training” or for equipment/delivery of equipment. Stay informed and protect yourself from recruitment fraud by reviewing our guidelines, fraudulent domains, and how to report suspicious activity here.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 S\&P Global is an equal opportunity employer and all qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment without regard to race/ethnicity, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, marital status, military veteran status, unemployment status, or any other status protected by law. Only electronic job submissions will be considered for employment.
   

  

 If you need an accommodation during the application process due to a disability, please send an email to: EEO.Compliance@spglobal.com and your request will be forwarded to the appropriate person.
   

  

**US Candidates Only:** 
 Know Your Rights: Workplace discrimination is illegal

3919123c.title: Principal Solution Architect
3919123c.description:
****About SKF****

 SKF is the world leading supplier of products and solutions in the bearing business including technical support, maintenance services, condition monitoring and training.
   

  





 The inherent skills and competence of our around 40,000 employees help us to fulfill our objective of creating more intelligent, sustainable and innovative customer solutions. SKF is a truly global company with presence in more than 130 countries, serving an extensive range of industries and customers worldwide. SKF started its operations in India in 1923\.
   

  





 SKF has hands\-on experience in over 40 industries with knowledge and a vast product portfolio across the SKF technology platforms: bearings and units, seals, lubrication systems, condition monitoring equipment, and services.
   

  





 We operate in regions – China \& North East Asia (CNEA), Europe \& Africa, India, South East Asia \& Middle East (ISEAM) , The Americas – to serve customers with speed and responsiveness.
   

  





 SKF has been in India since more than 100 years and has a pan India footprint consisting of 6 manufacturing facilities, 12 offices, a supplier network of over 300 distributors and an employee base of more than 2600 dedicated professionals.
   

  





 To know more, please visit: www.skf.com/in
   

  





**Innovation is the key:**




 We make some of the world’s most innovative products and solutions to reduce friction. But we sell something bigger. Less friction means more energy saved. And it means that society can move forward to a more energy\-efficient future where we can all do more with less.
   

  





**Sustainability:**




 At SKF, we have a long history of working with industrial sustainability. It is an integral part of what we do every day. And we strive to create engagement throughout the business, not only by implementing sustainability on a strategic level, but also by encouraging the ideas and grass root projects initiated by our people around the world.
   

  





****About Technology Development****




 As a team, we're responsible for global research, technology development, product development and technology strategy. Our group strategy is that 25 percent of our growth should come from new products. Filling that funnel with new and bold innovation is one of the things that we do. We bring customer value by combining our unique knowledge and technology in products and solutions with sustainability to develop ‘Intelligent \& Clean’ solutions." \- Annika Ölme, CTO and Senior Vice President, Technology Development
   

  





**Digital Engineering \& Innovation**




 Digital Engineering \& Innovation team is an international team based in multiple countries across the globe. We serve customers and distributors directly through services like Bearing Assist mobile application and AI enabled search on skf.com and provide immediate support for product selection and troubleshooting. Additionally, we support customers indirectly by offering solutions such as Engineering Tools, Product Lifecycle Management, Configurators, and Design Solutions. Many of these are AI\-enabled, secure, and compliant with industry standards. We collaborate with various SKF teams to create a digital ecosystem, develop innovative solutions, and enhance our entire value chain to add value to our customers
   

  





**SKF Purpose Statement**




 Together, we re\-imagine rotation for a better tomorrow.
   

  





 By creating intelligent and clean solutions for people and the planet
   

  





****JOB DESCRIPTION****




**Job Title:** 
 Principal Solution Architect
   

  





**Reports To** 
 : Director \& Global Head, Digital Engineering \& Innovation (DE\&I)
   

  





**Location** 
 : Bangalore
   

  





**Role Purpose :**




 The Lead Solution Architect drives the development and maintenance of Digital Engineering \& Innovation (DE\&I) Architecture to create visualizations comparing current and future states of Digital Engineering \& Innovation products and services. The role entails aligning SKF IT infrastructure with DE\&I and Technology Development Business requirements, ensuring IT systems and technologies are optimized to effectively support business objectives.
   

  





**Key Responsibilities:** 
  

  





* 
+ Lead the architecture and design for a future platform of sales, products and services by assessing existing systems and emerging business models and needs.
+ Continuously research, evaluate, and implement new technologies within DE\&I and TD.
+ Analyze existing systems and processes to identify opportunities for cost reduction and efficiency gains.
+ Maintain clear communication with DE\&I Management and Global IT to confirm alignment between systems and business needs.
+ Evaluate market technology options for suitability, including software and hardware solutions.


**Candidate Profile :** 
  

  





* 
+ Qualification \- Master’s or bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, Electronics or related fields
+ Overall Experience – 15\+ Years (5\-10\+ years of software development experience and 5\+ years of leading architectural decisions or teams)
+ Knowledge of cloud computing, enterprise data management \& IT infrastructure
+ Proficiency in programming languages \& database management
+ Familiarity with EA frameworks like TOGAF, ZACHMAN or GARTNER
+ Understanding of RESTful APIs, GraphQL, and event\-driven systems
+ Working knowledge of development operations and automation like Kubernetes etc.
+ Knowledge of identity and access management (IAM), encryption, and compliance frameworks (GDPR, HIPAA, ISO).
+ Soft skills: Strategic Thinking, communication, leadership, ability to explain technical concepts to non\-technical audience






****About SKF****




 SKF has been around for more than a century and today we are one of the world’s largest global suppliers of bearings and supporting solutions for rotating equipment. With more than 40,000 employees in around 130 countries, we are truly global. Our products are found everywhere in society. In fact, wherever there is movement, SKF’s solutions might be at work. This means that we are an important part of the everyday lives of people and companies around the world. See more, at www.skf.com.
