350889e6.title: EOP Global Solution Architect
350889e6.description:
**Job Description**
**Are You Ready to Make It Happen at Mondelēz International?**
**Join our Mission to Lead the Future of Snacking. Make It Matter.**
 You will be a key technical leader within the Mondelēz International Digital \& Technology organization, responsible for designing, securing, and integrating the o9 Enterprise Operations Planning (EOP) platform across our global supply chain. You will drive architectural excellence and ensure seamless integration between o9, SAP, and non\-SAP applications to enable world\-class planning capabilities across NALA, MEU, and AMEA regions.
   

  

**How You Will Contribute**
 You will serve as the Solution Architect for the o9 EOP platform, owning the end\-to\-end technical architecture, security framework, and integration landscape. You will work closely with business stakeholders, platform vendors, and internal technology teams to ensure that the o9 platform delivers scalable, secure, and high\-performing planning solutions. Specifically, you will:
   

  

* Design and govern the overall o9 EOP solution architecture, ensuring alignment with Mondelēz enterprise architecture standards and global technology strategy.
* Lead the architecture and implementation of integrations between o9 and SAP (S/4HANA, ECC), as well as non\-SAP applications including Trade Promotion Management (TPM) and SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC).
* Define and enforce security architecture standards for the o9 platform, including data governance, access controls, role\-based security, and compliance with MDLZ information security policies.
* Evaluate and recommend o9 hosting environment options (self\-hosted vs. o9\-managed cloud) for NALA, MEU, and AMEA regions, assessing trade\-offs in performance, cost, security, and scalability.
* Collaborate with the o9 product team and internal DevOps teams to optimize platform performance, minimize application downtime, and improve batch/FTB job scheduling strategies.
* Provide technical leadership during solution design reviews, architecture governance, and key project milestones including Go\-Live readiness.
* Develop and maintain architecture blueprints, integration specifications, and technical documentation to support ongoing operations and future wave rollouts.
* Partner with cross\-functional teams — including Demand Planning, Supply Planning, Finance, and IT — to translate business requirements into robust technical solutions.
* Identify and mitigate technical risks across the integration landscape and drive resolution of complex platform issues.
* Stay current with o9 platform innovations, including Agentic AI capabilities, and assess applicability to MDLZ planning processes.


**What You Will Bring**
 A desire to drive your future and accelerate your career. You will bring experience and knowledge in:
   

  

* Solution architecture design for enterprise planning platforms, preferably o9 Solutions, SAP IBP, or equivalent supply chain planning tools.
* Deep expertise in SAP integration architecture — including SAP S/4HANA, ECC, BW/4HANA — and non\-SAP application integration such as TPM and SAC.
* Designing and implementing API\-based, event\-driven, and middleware integrations (e.g., MuleSoft, Dell Boomi, Azure Integration Services, or similar).
* Security architecture principles including identity and access management (IAM), data encryption, network security, and cloud security frameworks.
* Cloud infrastructure platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and experience evaluating hosting models for enterprise SaaS platforms.
* Supply chain planning domains including Demand Planning, Supply Planning, S\&OP, and financial integration.
* Communicating complex technical concepts effectively to both technical teams and senior business stakeholders.
* Working in large\-scale, global, matrixed organizations with multiple regional teams and vendors.
* Agile and DevSecOps ways of working within enterprise program delivery.


**More About This Role**
 What you need to know about this position:
   

  

* This role supports the o9 Wave 1 – Demand program and subsequent wave rollouts across NALA, MEU, and AMEA regions.
* The Solution Architect will be accountable for the technical integrity of the o9 EOP platform, including all integration touchpoints with SAP and non\-SAP systems.
* Close collaboration with the o9 vendor team, SAP CoE, and MDLZ enterprise architecture teams is essential.
* The role sits within the Digital \& Technology function and reports into the o9 Program Leadership.


 What extra ingredients you will bring:
   

  

* Hands\-on experience with o9 Solutions platform configuration, data models, and APIs is a strong advantage.
* Knowledge of Agentic AI, machine learning, or advanced analytics capabilities within enterprise planning platforms.
* Experience with Trade Promotion Management (TPM) systems and their integration into planning workflows.
* Familiarity with MDLZ or FMCG/CPG supply chain processes is highly desirable.


**Education / Certifications:**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a related technical engineering discipline. Engineering background strongly preferred.
* Professional certifications in Solution Architecture (e.g., TOGAF, AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Azure Solutions Architect Expert) are highly desirable.
* SAP certifications (e.g., SAP Certified Technology Associate – SAP Integration Suite) are a plus.
* o9 platform certifications or formal training, where available, are an advantage.


**Job specific requirements:**
* Minimum 8–10 years of experience in IT/technology roles, with at least 5 years in a solution architecture capacity.
* Proven track record delivering enterprise platform implementations with complex integration landscapes.
* Experience working in global CPG, FMCG, or manufacturing organizations preferred.


**Travel requirements:**
* Occasional travel may be required to support regional deployments across NALA, MEU, and AMEA.


**Work schedule:**
* Full\-time. Flexible working arrangements available in line with MDLZ policy. Must be able to accommodate cross\-regional time zones as needed


 No Relocation support available
   

  

**Business Unit Summary**
 Headquartered in Singapore, Mondelēz International’s Asia, Middle East and Africa (AMEA) region is comprised of six business units, has more than 21,000 employees and operates in more than 27 countries including Australia, China, Indonesia, Ghana, India, Japan, Malaysia, New Zealand, Nigeria, Philippines, Saudi Arabia, South Africa, Thailand, United Arab Emirates and Vietnam. Seventy\-six nationalities work across a network of more than 35 manufacturing plants, three global research and development technical centers and in offices stretching from Auckland, New Zealand to Casablanca, Morocco. Mondelēz International in the AMEA region is the proud maker of global and local iconic brands such as
 *Oreo* 
 and
 *belVita* 
 biscuits,
 *Kinh Do* 
 mooncakes,
 *Cadbury, Cadbury Dairy Milk* 
 and
 *Milka* 
 chocolate,
 *Halls* 
 candy,
 *Stride* 
 gum,
 *Tang* 
 powdered beverage and
 *Philadelphia* 
 cheese. We are also proud to be named a Top Employer in many of our markets.
   

  

 Mondelēz International is an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation or preference, gender identity, national origin, disability status, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.
   

  

**Job Type**
 Regular
   

  

 Software \& Applications
   

  

 Technology \& Digital

cf306100.title: Principal Architect
cf306100.description:
**Job Summary**
 We are seeking an experienced Principal Architect with hands\-on experience in backend\-heavy development, specializing in Python. The ideal candidate will have a deep understanding of backend technologies, databases, cloud infrastructure, and DevOps practices, along with a proven ability to create, implement, and document technical solutions. A strong foundation in architectural best practices, AWS cloud certification, and the ability to lead complex technical projects is essential.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Architect and design scalable, reliable, and efficient backend systems using Python.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to understand technical requirements and develop solution architectures that meet business needs.
* Ensure proper documentation of all solutions, including design decisions, architectural frameworks, and implementation guidelines.
* Drive AWS Cloud implementation strategies, ensuring alignment with cloud best practices and standards.
* Optimize database architectures and query performance across relational and non\-relational databases.
* Oversee DevOps integration within the development lifecycle, implementing CI/CD pipelines, automated deployments, and infrastructure management.
* Act as a technical expert, providing mentorship to development teams and ensuring that architectural best practices are followed.
* Work closely with cross\-functional teams to ensure successful delivery of technical projects.
* Conduct architectural reviews and provide recommendations for performance optimization, scalability, and security.
* Ensure compliance with coding standards, architectural patterns, and other best practices.
* Participate in the complete software development lifecycle, including solution design, development, and implementation.


**Required Skills And Qualifications**
* 5\-7 years of hands\-on experience in backend development using Python.
* Strong expertise in architecting and designing solutions for complex projects.
* Deep understanding of databases (both SQL and NoSQL) and experience with database management and optimization.
* Proficiency with AWS Cloud services, with an AWS certification is added advantage.
* Experience in DevOps practices including CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and infrastructure management.
* Proven ability to document complex technical architectures, solutions, and processes.
* Experience in solution implementation and project execution, delivering enterprise\-grade software solutions.
* Strong problem\-solving skills and the ability to provide creative solutions to technical challenges.
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to collaborate with both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* Strong understanding of microservices architecture and containerization (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes).

af57c69e.title: Cloud Infrastructure
af57c69e.description:
Company Profile:  

Founded in 1976, CGI is among the largest independent IT and business consulting services firms in the world. With 94,000 consultants and professionals across the globe, CGI delivers an end\-to\-end portfolio of capabilities, from strategic IT and business consulting to systems integration, managed IT and business process services and intellectual property solutions. CGI works with clients through a local relationship model complemented by a global delivery network that helps clients digitally transform their organizations and accelerate results. CGI Fiscal 2024 reported revenue is CA$14\.68 billion and CGI shares are listed on the TSX (GIB.A) and the NYSE (GIB). Learn more at cgi.com.  

  

Job Title: Cloud Infrastructure  

  

Position: SSE  

  

Experience:5\+ yrs  

  

Category: IT Infrastructure  

  

Main location: Bangalore
  

  

Position ID: J0326\-1431  

  

Employment Type: Full Time  

  

Qualification: Bachelor’s degree in computer science or related field or higher with minimum 3 years of relevant experience.  

  

Job Description:  

Role Overview  

  

Key Responsibilities  

AI Engineering \& Agentic Security (Primary Responsibility)  

  

. Design, build, and deploy AI driven security solutions using Azure AI Foundry / Azure AI Factory  

. Develop agentic AI workflows to autonomously or semi autonomously:  

. Integrate Copilot for Security and Copilot based experiences into SOC and cloud security workflows  

. Build and manage AI pipelines, prompts, orchestration logic, and governance for security use cases  

. Collaborate with AI platform teams to ensure secure, scalable, and compliant AI deployments  

  

Cloud Security \& Threat Detection  

  

. Apply AI capabilities to security tooling including: Microsoft Sentinel Microsoft Defender for Cloud (MDC / MDS) Defender for Endpoint / Server  

. Enhance detection, correlation, and response using AI augmented analytics and automation  

. Support multi cloud tenant security through intelligent monitoring and inventory discovery  

  

Security Posture \& Vulnerability Remediation  

  

. Use AI assisted techniques to: Identify security posture gaps Prioritize vulnerabilities based on risk and context Drive or automate remediation actions  

. Partner with platform and application teams to operationalize remediation at scale  

  

DevSecOps \& Automation  

  

. Embed AI driven security checks into Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines  

. Automate policy enforcement, security validation, and compliance reporting  

. Promote secure by design and AI by design engineering practices  

  

Collaboration \& Enablement  

  

. Work closely with Cloud Security, SOC, AI Platform, and Engineering teams  

. Provide thought leadership on AI powered security and agentic architectures  

. Support incident response, security reviews, and AI governance initiatives  

  

Mandatory Skills \& Experience  

Primary (Must Have)  

  

. Strong hands on experience with Azure AI Foundry and/or Azure AI Factory  

. Proven experience building AI driven or agentic solutions in Azure  

. Experience applying AI to security, observability, or risk domains  

. Understanding of LLMs, orchestration patterns, prompt engineering, and AI governance  

  

Secondary (Security \& Cloud)  

Experience with Microsoft security tooling:  

  

. Microsoft Sentinel  

. Microsoft Defender for Cloud (MDC / MDS)  

. Defender for Endpoint / Server Experience supporting multi cloud tenants and hybrid environments Vulnerability management and remediation experience CI/CD automation using Azure DevOps  

. Good knowledge in AI Security/Security for AI  

  

Technical Foundations  

  

. Proficiency in KQL, scripting (Python, PowerShell), and automation  

. Strong understanding of: Cloud IAM, networking, and RBAC Zero Trust principles Logging, monitoring, and incident response  

  

Preferred (Nice to Have)  

  

. Advanced Sentinel SOAR and Logic Apps automation  

. Microsoft certifications: AI 900, AI 102 SC 200, SC 100, AZ 500  

. Experience securing AI workloads and models in production environments  

  

Soft Skills  

  

. Strong AI problem solving mindset  

. Ability to translate security challenges into AI driven solutions  

. Clear communication with AI, security, and engineering stakeholders  

  

Passion for agentic systems, automation, and next generation security  

Behavioural Competencies :  

Proven experience of delivering process efficiencies and improvements  

Clear and fluent English (both verbal and written)  

Ability to build and maintain efficient working relationships with remote teams  

Demonstrate ability to take ownership of and accountability for relevant products and services  

Ability to plan, prioritize and complete your own work, whilst remaining a team player  

Willingness to engage with and work in other technologies  

  

CGI is an equal opportunity employer. In addition, CGI is committed to providing accommodations for people with disabilities in accordance with provincial legislation. Please let us know if you require a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during any aspect of the recruitment process and we will work with you to address your needs.  

Life at CGI:
  

It is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…  

You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction  

Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise  

You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well\-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons  

Come join our team, one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world  

\#LI\-AA13

**Your future duties and responsibilities**

**Required qualifications to be successful in this role**

**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**  

  

Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…  

  

You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.  

  

Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.  

  

You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well\-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
  

  

That same commitment to fairness extends to how we use technology. To support our recruitment team, AI tools may be used to help assess applications though they never replace human judgement. All hiring decisions remain entirely in the hands of our recruitment professionals.  

  

Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

2d4752d7.title: Cloud Operations Administrator
2d4752d7.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Cloud Operations Administrator
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Work with the Service Delivery Manager to perform capacity management, billing/show back operations, and cost optimization activities across multiple cloud environments.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 SUSE Linux Administration
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 3 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Cloud Operations Administrator, a typical day involves collaborating closely with the Service Delivery Manager to oversee capacity management, ensuring that cloud resources are efficiently allocated and utilized. The role includes managing billing and show back operations to maintain transparency and accuracy in cloud expenditure. Additionally, the position requires continuous efforts in cost optimization across various cloud platforms, balancing performance and budget considerations. This role demands proactive monitoring and coordination to support seamless cloud operations and contribute to the overall effectiveness of cloud services within the organization.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to perform independently and become an SME.
* Required active participation/contribution in team discussions.
* Contribute in providing solutions to work related problems.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure smooth cloud operations and address any service issues promptly.
* Monitor cloud resource usage and recommend improvements to enhance efficiency and reduce costs.
* Assist in documenting processes and best practices to support knowledge sharing within the team.
* Support junior team members by providing guidance and sharing expertise to foster professional growth.


 Professional \& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in SUSE Linux Administration.
* Experience with Linux system monitoring and performance tuning.
* Strong understanding of cloud infrastructure and virtualization concepts.
* Familiarity with scripting languages to automate routine tasks and improve operational efficiency.
* Knowledge of security best practices in Linux environments.
* Ability to troubleshoot and resolve complex system issues in a timely manner.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 3 years of experience in SUSE Linux Administration.
* This position is based at our Coimbatore office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.


 , 15 years full time education

8a82996c.title: Cloud Platform Migration Engineer
8a82996c.description:
**Job Title:** 
 Cloud Platform Migration Engineer
 



**Experience:** 
 5Years
 



**Job Location:** 
 India
 



**Job Summary:** 




 We are seeking a hands\-on Cloud Platform Migration Engineer to support migrations from Platform9/OpenStack\-managed infrastructure to Spectro Cloud Palette\-managed Kubernetes environments. The ideal candidate should have experience in OpenStack administration, Kubernetes operations, Linux systems, and infrastructure migration activities.
 



**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Perform Platform9/OpenStack administration and migration activities.
* Execute OpenStack CLI operations for compute, storage, and infrastructure management.
* Provision and validate Kubernetes clusters using Spectro Cloud Palette or similar platforms.
* Support VM, storage, and infrastructure migration workflows.
* Perform cluster health checks and post\-migration validations.
* Coordinate network\-related migration tasks including VLAN, DHCP, DNS, and PXE validation.
* Monitor environments using Splunk Cloud, SignalFX, or similar tools.
* Follow change management processes, runbooks, and maintain migration documentation.



**Required Skills:** 



* Platform9 and/or OpenStack Administration
* OpenStack CLI
* Kubernetes
* Spectro Cloud Palette
* Linux Administration \& Shell Scripting
* VM \& Storage Migration
* Cinder, Heat, Nova, Ironic / Bare Metal
* Networking (VLAN, DHCP, DNS, PXE)
* Git/GitHub/GitLab
* Splunk Cloud and SignalFX
* Troubleshooting \& Change Management



**Preferred Certifications:** 



* CKA / CKAD / CKS
* RHCSA
* OpenStack Certification



**Qualification:** 



* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.

019af59f.title: CMS-Manager-Cloud Engineer
019af59f.description:
At EY, you’ll have the chance to build a career as unique as you are, with the global scale, support, inclusive culture and technology to become the best version of you. And we’re counting on your unique voice and perspective to help EY become even better, too. Join us and build an exceptional experience for yourself, and a better working world for all.
   

  

**CMS\- Cloud Security \_Manager**
**Responsibilities:**
* Perform end\-to\-end investigations for Defender for Cloud alerts: scoping affected resources, identifying likely attack vectors, and recommending containment steps.
* Correlate workload detections with posture context to identify systemic misconfigurations driving risk.
* Troubleshoot AWS connector data gaps (permissions, connector health, plan prerequisites) and document resolution steps.
* Understand the AWS connector auth model (federated trust and short\-lived credentials) to support secure onboarding and triage.
* Drive remediation execution with client teams: validate fixes, confirm risk reduction, manage exceptions (time\-bound), and tune operational noise.
* Identify recurring issues and propose new detections/playbooks, improved routing, and better enrichment.


**Required:**
**Strong Azure and AWS operational fluency:**
* Azure: RBAC, networking, key services (VMs, AKS, storage, databases)
* AWS: IAM, EC2/EKS basics, security logging concepts, CloudFormation familiarity (for onboarding patterns)
* Ability to explain and operate posture management: secure score, recommendations, compliance posture, and remediation workflow.
* Incident handling discipline: containment/eradication guidance, stakeholder communications, and post\-incident documentation.
* Hands\-on experience with CSPM tools (Defender/Wiz/AWS Security Hub etc).


**Preferred Requirements:**
* Minimum 8\+ years of Cloud technology, specifically in Security engineering, or Security Architecture roles
* Experience designing/tuning SOC playbooks for cloud detection and posture workflows.
* Familiarity with automation (Logic Apps/SOAR patterns) and integrating CNAPP events into SIEM/SOAR pipelines.
* SC\-200 \+ AZ\-500 (preferred), AWS Security Specialty, GIAC Cloud (GCLD) or similar.


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY exists to build a better working world, helping to create long\-term value for clients, people and society and build trust in the capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data and technology, diverse EY teams in over 150 countries provide trust through assurance and help clients grow, transform and operate.
   

  

 Working across assurance, consulting, law, strategy, tax and transactions, EY teams ask better questions to find new answers for the complex issues facing our world today.

5725a488.title: Amazon Connect - Consultant, Managed Services - DFO&I - Customer
5725a488.description:
**Summary**
**Position Summary**
**Customer**
 The Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experiences and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology\-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence.
   

  

**Position Summary**
**Level:** 
 Consultant, Technical Transformation or equivalent
   

  

 As an experienced Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need\-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements .
   

  

**Work you’ll do** 
 :
   

  

* Owns complex deliverables independently, ensuring quality and timelines and Exhibits interest in working across tracks/outside of core skills
* Consistently demonstrates SME skills within their area of expertise and proactively identifies potential risks and come up with mitigation plans \- Performs solution reviews and/or process/code reviews effectively \& independently


**The Team** 
 :
   

  

 Our Sales \& Service team focuses on delivering marketing and growth objectives aligned with our clients’ brand values for measurable business growth. We help clients turn business values into measurable growth through creatively driven, personalized content, communications, and experiences that engage and inspire people to act. We implement and operate the technology platforms that enable personalized content, commerce and marketing user\-centric experiences. In doing so, we transform our clients’ marketing and engagement operations into modern, data\-driven, creatively focused organizations. Our team brings deep experience in creative and digital marketing capabilities by a combination of key focus areas i.e., Brand, Advertising, Experiences, Content, Marketing, Commerce, Products, Data and measurement/analysis.
   

  

**Must Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications**
* 3\-6 years of technology consulting experience, with a focus on cloud operations.
* Minimum of 3\-4 years of hands\-on experience with Amazon Connect and related AWS services.
* Proficiency in designing and implementing Amazon Connect contact flows integrated with Python, Lambda, and JSON.
* Strong working knowledge of AWS services, including but not limited to: AWS Connect, Lex, Polly, Lambda, CloudWatch, Kinesis, Glue, S3, Redshift, SNS, and SQS.
* Solid scripting skills in Python, with the ability to write SQL queries and perform string analysis.
* Familiarity with modern DevOps tools and techniques, including GitHub, CI/CD, and Docker.
* Experience with agile/iterative methodologies for implementing cloud projects.
* Demonstrated ability to translate business and technical requirements into effective technical designs.
* Good understanding of end\-to\-end project delivery methodologies for cloud projects.
* General knowledge of cloud computing technologies and current trends.
* Experience working on CI/CD/DevOps pipelines is a plus.


**Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:**
* Experience working on CI/CD/DevOps pipelines is a plus.


**Education:**
* BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university


**Location:**
 Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai
   

  

**\#FY27ReferralCampaign**
 \#S\&S2027
   

  

**Our purpose**
 Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
   

  

**Our people and culture**
 Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
   

  

**Professional development**
 At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India .
   

  

**Benefits To Help You Thrive**
 At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
   

  

**Recruiting tips**
 From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.
   

  

 Requisition code: 358199

1b47455d.title: Cloud Operations DBA
1b47455d.description:
If you are looking for a meaningful career where people work and act with passion, rethink the existing and always strive to find the best solution \- you have come to the right place. We develop future technologies to relentlessly make supply chains better.
   

  

 We are a leader in supply chain software solutions, helping organizations streamline operations, reduce costs, and improve efficiency.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 At
 **Infios** 
 , every solution we create is designed to be
 **Smarter, Stronger, Faster, Better** 
 than any other technology in the marketplace. These same attributes apply to our dedicated team members, whose expertise and dedication have made
 **Infios** 
 an industry leader in supply chain logistics systems.
   

  

 As a
 **Cloud Database Administrator,** 
 you will work closely with other database administrators and systems administrators across the organization to tackle critical problems to prevent or minimize customer outages. You will work on projects, large and small, to propel our team and services by innovating and standardizing to provide quality as well as consistency and sustainability. Qualified candidates will have exposure to a variety of databases on a variety of platforms that support a wide array of products and customers.
   

  

**What a Day In Life Looks Like**
* Work with Oracle, MSSQL, PostgreSQL, MySQL on VMs, in AWS RDS/Aurora as well as OCI managed databases
* Work with multiple cloud vendors: AWS, OCI, Azure
* Work with AI tools to help improve your understanding, allow experimentation and develop solutions to all sorts of problems and situations
* Work with some of the industry leading technologies that monitor, update and alert on our large and diverse infrastructure
* Develop and Manage Database processes
* Maintain solid database backups
* Provide database support for company projects
* Support development teams as well as peer groups
* Provide performance tuning investigation, expertise and advice
* Create and maintain SOP and other documentation
* Determine direction for future database architectures
* Work with Very Large databases with more than 15\+ TB
* Review and Manage user sessions, storage, processes, schemas, etc.
* Create and use dashboards for alerts, storage trends, query execution times, etc.
* Provide data loading and unloading as necessary
* Patch database systems manually, with scripts and with enterprise tooling


**What You Bring To The Team**
* Bachelor’s degree or an equivalent combination of education and related work experience
* 5\+ years of experience as a DBA on different versions of Microsoft SQL and/or Oracle databases
* Flexibility to accommodate after\-hours and weekend client and team member needs.
* Participation in a 24x7 on\-call rotation
* Excellent analytical skills
* Strong communication skills both verbal and written
* Excellent customer service skills
* Excellent time management
* Able to work well within a team


**Nice To Have**
* AWS RDS/Aurora, EC2 and API experience
* OCI VM, buckets and API experience
* Oracle Dataguard
* Oracle Goldengate
* MSSQL HA
* Tanium
* Dynatrace
* OEM administration


**Why join us?**
 At Infios, we're not just looking for employees; we're looking for partners in innovation, growth, and purpose. Meeting you where you are to create the future you need is at the core of who we are and what we do. Whether you're at the beginning of your career or a seasoned expert, we meet you on your journey, equipping you with the tools and opportunities to build the future you envision. Together, we will relentlessly work toward one common goal \- making supply chains better.
   

  

**We believe the future is better when supply chains work better.**
 We are an equal\-opportunity employer and committed to inclusion in the workplace.
   

  

 At Infios, we believe that inclusion is a fundamental cornerstone of our success. We are committed to creating a safe and welcoming environment where every individual’s unique experiences and perspectives are valued—whether they look, think, move, believe, or love differently.
   

  

 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, ethnicity, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status, pregnancy, religion, age, disability, veteran status, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected by law.
   

  

 Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions of this role. If you require assistance or accommodation due to a disability during the recruiting process, please let us know at jobs@infios.com
   

  

 Disclaimer: This job advertisement is not designed to cover a comprehensive listing of all duties or responsibilities that are required for this job. Please note that any salary information is a general guideline only. Individual compensation will be determined by various factors such as the scope and responsibilities of the position, experience, education, skills, location, and market and business considerations. Applications must be submitted via our career site.

52c5c27a.title: IT Infrastructure Cloud Architect
52c5c27a.description:
**About Us**
 As a leading provider of high\-quality food and beverage ingredients, we work with farming communities across the globe to grow, source and produce ingredients that are good for consumers, farmers, and the world around us. We supply household food brands and manufacturers worldwide with cocoa, coffee, dairy, nuts and spices ingredients which are often grown on our own farms and estates and sourced from hundreds of thousands of farmers across :50 countries. Along with our diverse manufacturing and innovation capabilities, this means we can provide ingredients for a range of products, from a plant\-based latte mix to an almond based snack bar or a dairy\-free ice cream.  Making a positive impact on people and planet is a core component of our Purpose, to be the change for good food and a healthy future. With a deep\-rooted presence in the countries where our ingredients are grown, we are closer to farmers, enabling better quality, and more reliable, traceable, and transparent supply. And whoever we’re with, whatever we’re doing, we always make it real.
   

  

**About the Role: IT Infrastructure Cloud Architect**
**Job Summary:**
 The IT Infrastructure Cloud Architect is responsible for leading the strategic planning, design, implementation, and lifecycle management of AWS/Azure Cloud,Linux servers, storages, backup infrastructure across the organization. This role ensures high availability, performance, scalability, and security of compute environments, both cloud\-hosted and on\-premises data systems while aligning with business and compliance requirements.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing the AWS/Azure Cloud environments and various projects planning and execution in a similar domain. Selected candidate will take an active role in the ongoing migration of our on\-premises/Azure infrastructure to the AWS cloud platform. This role requires a deep understanding of cloud computing, Azure/AWS services, and cloud migration strategies.
   

  

 The ideal candidate should also possess strong communication, IT Technical, planning, process improvement, and strategic decision\-making skills. A proven ability to work creatively and analytically in a problem\-solving environment will be required for success in this position.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Cloud Operations
   

  

* Lead the design, deployment, and optimization of cloud environments (AWS, Azure).
* Ensure operational excellence in cloud services including compute, storage, networking, and security.
* Drive automation to improve Cloud operation Maturity
* Manage cloud cost optimization and vendor relationships.


 Storage \& Backup
   

  

* Collaborate with global teams to standardize server builds, backup strategies, and disaster recovery plans.
* Manage Storage solutions and Backup infrastructure
* Monitor system performance and proactively resolve issues to ensure optimal uptime and resource utilization of storages and backup infrastructure


 Security \& Compliance
   

  

* Ensure cloud platforms meet regulatory and internal security standards.
* Work with InfoSec to implement encryption, access controls, and audit mechanisms.


 Team Leadership
   

  

* Lead a team of cloud engineers, DBAs, and operations specialists.
* Foster a culture of innovation, accountability, and continuous improvement.


 Monitoring \& Reporting
   

  

* Implement robust monitoring and alerting systems.
* Provide regular performance and capacity reports to leadership.


 Vendor Management
   

  

* Collaborate with vendors to ensure effective service delivery and cost optimization.
* Monitor SLA performance and drive continuous service delivery improvement.
* Negotiate contracts and maintain strong relationships with technology partners.


 Financial Management
   

  

* Develop operating expense and capital global budgets annually and monitor actuals to plan and reforecast monthly.
* Lead an ongoing cost reduction program to eliminate, consolidate, or renegotiate IT hardware, software, and services while improving IT services to our global business.


 Collaboration
   

  

* Work closely with other IT teams including Cyber Security, Applications Development, and the Project Management Office to deliver seamless services.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional stakeholders to ensure alignment with business needs.


**Required Skills \& Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, or related field.
* 5\+ years of experience in IT Infrastructure Cloud operation and should have experience in Infrastructure as a Code (IAC) and Cloud Automation
* Experience in cloud cost management
* Experience with enterprise/cloud storage and backup solutions (e.g.Veritas NetBackup, Veeam)
* Expertise in cloud platforms (AWS, Azure) and Linux OS
* Certifications such as AWS/Azure Architect, or similar are a plus.


**Preferred Skills**
* Strong understanding of ITIL, Agile, and SRE principles.
* Experience with hybrid and multi\-cloud environments.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.


**ofi** 
 is an equal opportunity employer and values diversity. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to racial or ethnic origin, color, age, religion or belief, sex, nationality, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.
   

  

 Applicants are requested to complete all required steps in the application process including providing a resume/CV in order to be considered for open roles.

28548cce.title: Amazon Connect - Consultant, Managed Services - DFO&I - Customer
28548cce.description:
**Summary**
**Position Summary**
**Customer**
 The Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experiences and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology\-enabled managed insights that guide ongoing transformation and operational excellence.
   

  

**Position Summary**
**Level:** 
 Consultant, Technical Transformation or equivalent
   

  

 As an experienced Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need\-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements .
   

  

**Work you’ll do** 
 :
   

  

* Owns complex deliverables independently, ensuring quality and timelines and Exhibits interest in working across tracks/outside of core skills
* Consistently demonstrates SME skills within their area of expertise and proactively identifies potential risks and come up with mitigation plans \- Performs solution reviews and/or process/code reviews effectively \& independently


**The Team** 
 :
   

  

 Our Sales \& Service team focuses on delivering marketing and growth objectives aligned with our clients’ brand values for measurable business growth. We help clients turn business values into measurable growth through creatively driven, personalized content, communications, and experiences that engage and inspire people to act. We implement and operate the technology platforms that enable personalized content, commerce and marketing user\-centric experiences. In doing so, we transform our clients’ marketing and engagement operations into modern, data\-driven, creatively focused organizations. Our team brings deep experience in creative and digital marketing capabilities by a combination of key focus areas i.e., Brand, Advertising, Experiences, Content, Marketing, Commerce, Products, Data and measurement/analysis.
   

  

**Must Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications**
* 3\-6 years of technology consulting experience, with a focus on cloud operations.
* Minimum of 3\-4 years of hands\-on experience with Amazon Connect and related AWS services.
* Proficiency in designing and implementing Amazon Connect contact flows integrated with Python, Lambda, and JSON.
* Strong working knowledge of AWS services, including but not limited to: AWS Connect, Lex, Polly, Lambda, CloudWatch, Kinesis, Glue, S3, Redshift, SNS, and SQS.
* Solid scripting skills in Python, with the ability to write SQL queries and perform string analysis.
* Familiarity with modern DevOps tools and techniques, including GitHub, CI/CD, and Docker.
* Experience with agile/iterative methodologies for implementing cloud projects.
* Demonstrated ability to translate business and technical requirements into effective technical designs.
* Good understanding of end\-to\-end project delivery methodologies for cloud projects.
* General knowledge of cloud computing technologies and current trends.
* Experience working on CI/CD/DevOps pipelines is a plus.


**Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:**
* Experience working on CI/CD/DevOps pipelines is a plus.


**Education:**
* BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university


**Location:**
 Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai
   

  

**\#FY27ReferralCampaign**
 \#S\&S2027
   

  

**Our purpose**
 Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
   

  

**Our people and culture**
 Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
   

  

**Professional development**
 At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India .
   

  

**Benefits To Help You Thrive**
 At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
   

  

**Recruiting tips**
 From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

f7998339.title: Enterprise Architect — Managed IT Services
f7998339.description:
Position Description
   

  

 Company Profile:
   

  

 At CGI, we’re a team of builders. We call our employees members because all who join CGI are building their own company \- one that has grown to 72,000 professionals located in 40 countries. Founded in 1976, CGI is a leading IT and business process services firm committed to helping clients succeed. We have the global resources, expertise, stability and dedicated professionals needed to achieve. At CGI, we’re a team of builders. We call our employees members because all who join CGI are building their own company \- one that has grown to 72,000 professionals located in 40 countries. Founded in 1976, CGI is a leading IT and business process services firm committed to helping clients succeed. We have the global resources, expertise, stability and dedicated professionals needed to achieve results for our clients \- and for our members. Come grow with us. Learn more at www.cgi.com.
   

  

 This is a great opportunity to join a winning team. CGI offers a competitive compensation package with opportunities for growth and professional development. Benefits for full\-time, permanent members start on the first day of employment and include a paid time\-off program and profit participation and stock purchase plans. We wish to thank all applicants for their interest and effort in applying for this position, however, only candidates selected for interviews will be contacted. No unsolicited agency referrals please.
   

  

 Job Title: Enterprise Architect — Managed IT Services
   

  

 Position: Manager Consulting Expert
   

  

 Experience: 14\+ yrs
   

  

 Category: Support
   

  

 Main location: Bangalore
   

  

 Position ID: J0626\-2506
   

  

 Employment Type: Full Time
   

  

 Qualification: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field or higher with minimum 3 years of relevant experience.
   

  

 Job Description:
   

  

 The Enterprise Architect (Managed Services) is a strategic, client facing role responsible for bridging the gap between IT delivery and business outcomes. Operating as the single architectural authority across a portfolio of managed service accounts — with a primary focus on a Commercial Real Estate (CRE) client — you will translate complex business goals into a coherent technology strategy spanning cloud infrastructure, workplace services, service desk, networking, and database environments.
   

  

 This role exists to inject architectural rigour and business aligned thinking into an account where infrastructure runs well operationally, but where the client lacks visibility of the transformation value being delivered. You will be the person who changes that narrative.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Strategic Architecture \& Business Value
* Develop and maintain an Enterprise Architecture roadmap aligned to the client's CRE business strategy — covering portfolio management, tenant experience, property operations, and digital transformation.
* Translate business ambitions (e.g., smart buildings, data driven asset management, hybrid workforce enablement) into actionable technology recommendations.
* Produce executive ready artefacts: Architecture Blueprints, Technology Roadmaps, Value Realisation Reports, and Business Case documents.
* Identify opportunities for innovation, cost optimisation, and risk reduction across the account; present them as structured business cases.
* Lead quarterly Architecture Review Boards (ARBs) with client stakeholders up to C suite level.
* Cloud Infrastructure Architecture
* Define and govern the cloud strategy (Azure / AWS / GCP) covering IaaS, PaaS, and hybrid cloud models used in the client environment.
* Ensure cloud architectures meet the client's security, compliance, availability, and cost objectives.
* Drive infrastructure modernisation initiatives — server rationalisation, containerisation, automation, and cloud native adoption.
* Oversee design standards for compute, storage, backup, DR, and resilience across all managed infrastructure.
* Workplace Services \& End User Computing
* Architect the end user computing (EUC) strategy: device management (Intune/JAMF), Microsoft 365 / Teams, VDI/AVD, and collaboration tooling.
* Align workplace technology design with CRE workforce patterns — mobile workers, on site building staff, and corporate office users.
* Drive adoption of Modern Workplace standards and improve the measured employee digital experience (DEX).
* Network Architecture
* Provide architectural oversight of WAN, LAN, SD WAN, and building network infrastructure across the client's property portfolio.
* Design and review connectivity solutions for multi site CRE environments including retail, commercial, and mixed use assets.
* Ensure network architecture supports OT/IoT requirements such as building management systems (BMS), access control, and smart metering.
* Service Desk \& ITSM Architecture
* Define the service architecture underpinning the service desk — tooling (ServiceNow / similar), automation, self service, and AI assisted support.
* Identify and drive service improvement initiatives that reduce incident volume, improve MTTR, and enhance end user satisfaction scores.
* Align ITSM processes with ITIL best practices and the client's internal governance requirements.
* Database \& Data Architecture
* Provide architectural direction for database platforms (SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL, cloud native) used across client applications.
* Define standards for data management, data governance, and data integration patterns relevant to CRE business data (lease management, asset data, financial systems).
* Identify opportunities to leverage data assets for analytics, reporting, and AI driven insights within the property business.
* Client Engagement \& Governance
* Act as the primary architectural point of contact for the client — building trusted advisor relationships with CIO, CDO, and operational stakeholders.
* Chair and participate in governance forums: Architecture Review Boards, Change Advisory Boards, and Steering Committees.
* Produce regular account level architecture health reviews and present transformation progress against agreed KPIs.
* Ensure all new solutions follow the agreed architecture principles and pass design authority review before deployment.
* Team Leadership \& Internal Collaboration
* Provide architectural guidance and mentoring to internal delivery teams, technical leads, and service towers.
* Work closely with Service Delivery Managers, Project Managers, and Practice Leads to ensure architecture is embedded into delivery.
* Contribute to pre sales and bid activity, shaping technical solutions for contract renewals or expansions.


 Technical Skills:
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.
* Enterprise Architecture certification: TOGAF 9/10, Zachman, or equivalent (essential).
* Cloud certifications: Azure Solutions Architect Expert, AWS Solutions Architect Professional, or GCP Professional Cloud Architect (at least one required).
* ITIL v4 Foundation or above (desirable).


 Enterprise Architecture Experience
   

  

* Minimum 10 years in IT, with at least 5 years in an Enterprise or Solution Architect role within a managed services or outsourcing environment.
* Demonstrated experience producing enterprise architecture strategies, roadmaps, and business cases at an executive level.
* Strong command of architecture frameworks (TOGAF, ArchiMate) and modelling tools (LeanIX, Sparx EA, or similar).
* Experience operating within a multi tower managed service context (infrastructure, workplace, service desk, network, database).


 Domain Knowledge — Commercial Real Estate
   

  

* Experience working with or for a Commercial Real Estate organisation is highly advantageous.
* Familiarity with CRE business processes: property and asset management, lease administration, facilities management, tenant services, and building operations.
* Understanding of PropTech trends: smart building technologies, IoT in real estate, digital twin concepts, and sustainability reporting platforms.


 Technical Depth
   

  

* Microsoft Azure (primary), AWS, or GCP — design, governance, and cost optimisation: Cloud Platforms
* Microsoft 365, Teams, Intune, Autopilot, AVD / Citrix, collaboration platforms: Workplace \& EUC
* SD WAN, Cisco/Meraki/Palo Alto, MPLS, Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA), building network infrastructure: Networking
* ServiceNow or equivalent ITSM, ITIL process design, AI driven service automation: Service Management
* SQL Server, Oracle, Azure SQL / Synapse, data integration, governance, and analytics platforms: Database \& Data
* Zero Trust architecture, Microsoft Sentinel, identity (Entra ID / AD), compliance frameworks (ISO 27001, SOC 2\): Security


 Preferred Qualifications :
   

  

 Leadership \& Strategic Thinking
   

  

 Technical \& Delivery Excellence
   

  

* Trusted advisor to C suite stakeholders
* Ability to articulate business value of technology
* Commercial acumen and stakeholder management
* Influencing without direct authority
* Ability to simplify complexity for non technical audiences
* Cross domain architectural thinking
* Design authority and governance
* Risk identification and mitigation
* Solution innovation and continuous improvement mindset
* Delivery focus — pragmatic, outcome driven architecture


 CGI is an equal opportunity employer. In addition, CGI is committed to providing accommodations for people with disabilities in accordance with provincial legislation. Please let us know if you require a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during any aspect of the recruitment process and we will work with you to address your needs.
   

  

 Your future duties and responsibilities
   

  

**Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role**
**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**
 Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…
   

  

 You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.
   

  

 Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.
   

  

 You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well\-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
   

  

 That same commitment to fairness extends to how we use technology. To support our recruitment team, AI tools may be used to help assess applications though they never replace human judgement. All hiring decisions remain entirely in the hands of our recruitment professionals.
   

  

 Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

c4905747.title: Customer Service Delivery Manager
c4905747.description:
**Organization Overview**
**Company Description**
**QAD** 
 is building a world\-class SaaS company, and we are growing. We are looking for talented individuals who want to join us on our mission to help solve relevant real\-world problems in manufacturing and the supply chain.
   

  

**Job Description**
 The
 **Customer Service Delivery Manager (CSDM)** 
 is responsible for ensuring optimized and uninterrupted service delivery for QAD’s moderate, large, and enterprise cloud customers.
   

  

 Acting as a trusted advisor, the CSDM builds strong client relationships, anticipates customer needs, and orchestrates seamless collaboration across Cloud PMO, Global Support, Cloud Operations, and Services.
   

  

 This role plays a critical part in driving customer satisfaction, compliance, and successful project outcomes, while contributing to QAD’s continuous improvement culture.
   

  

**Please Note**
 This position would require to supporting the
 **EMEA customer time zone** 
 from
 **Mumbai** 
 ,
 **India** 
 .
 **(Between 11 AM \- 11 PM)**
**Key Responsibilities**
* Customer Relationship Management
* Serve as a strategic partner and trusted advisor for assigned QAD Cloud customers.
* Strengthen client relationships by proactively anticipating needs and delivering consistent, high\-value interactions.
* Conduct regular service reviews with customers and ensure documentation is maintained on the Cloud Portal.
* Engage key QAD stakeholders with customer to resolve customer concerns \& issues
* Provide guidance on compliance requirements and standard operating processes.
* Oversee Cloud project implementations, supporting project management activities to ensure successful Go\-Lives.
* Onboarding of customer on QAD Cloud \& Standard Operating Procedures
* Engage \& drive the customer to be on latest version of QAD to deliver the value
* Customer Delivery \& Escalation Management
* Ensure smooth service delivery through proactive monitoring of customer escalations and risk management to the permanent resolution to accomplish utmost customer satisfaction
* Collaborate cross functionally to deliver the resolutions to the customer
* Continuous Improvement \& Organizational Contribution
* Drive permanent remedial action implementation to address root causes to ensure customer business operations run round the clock on QAD Cloud without any interruptions.
* Actively contribute to customer experience enhancement and continuous improvement initiatives across the Customer Success organization.
* Identify and mitigate risks or barriers that could impact customer outcomes or business objectives.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s or Master's degree with 5\+ years of related experience
* Preferred Qualification: PMP (Project Management Professional), ITIL Certification, Cloud Foundation Certifications (AWS, Google, EXIN)


**Must Have**
* Strong understanding of ERP lifecycle phases, including go\-live support.
* Proficient with Google Workspace and Smartsheet (or equivalent project management tools).
* Solid knowledge of cloud computing, compliance frameworks, and operational concepts.
* Proven expertise in project implementation planning, project management, and operations management methodologies.


**Additional Information**
* We offer an amazing culture and comprehensive suite of health and wellness benefits so that employees can focus on helping customers reach our vision for them: the Effective Enterprise.
* Opportunity to join a growing business, launching into its next phase of expansion and transformation
* The collaborative culture of smart and hard\-working people who support one another to get the job done
* Our employees tell us they love working for a global organization focused on collaboration, teamwork and customer outcomes.
* Your health and well being are important to us at QAD. We provide programs that help you strike a healthy work\-life balance.
* Opportunity to join a growing business, launching into its next phase of expansion and transformation.
* Collaborative culture of smart and hard\-working people who support one another to get the job done.
* An atmosphere of growth and opportunity, where idea\-sharing is always prioritized over level or hierarchy.
* Compensation packages based on experience and desired skill set


**About QAD**
 QAD \| Redzone is redefining manufacturing and supply chains through its intelligent, adaptive platform that connects people, processes, and data into a single System of Action. With three core pillars — Redzone (frontline empowerment), Adaptive Applications (the intelligent backbone), and Champion AI (Agentic AI for manufacturing) — QAD \| Redzone helps manufacturers operate with Champion Pace, achieving measurable productivity, resilience, and growth in just 90 days.
   

  

 QAD is committed to ensuring that every employee feels they work in an environment that values their contributions, respects their unique perspectives and provides opportunities for growth regardless of background. QAD’s DEI program is driving higher levels of diversity, equity and inclusion so that employees can bring their whole self to work.
   

  

 We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, national origin, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any other federal, state or local protected class.

ff951b13.description:
It's fun to work in a company where people truly BELIEVE in what they are doing!
   

  

*We're committed to bringing passion and customer focus to the business.*

 Fractal Analytics is Leading Fortune 500 companies leverage Big Data, analytics and technology to drive smarter, faster and more accurate decisions in every aspect of their business.
   

  

 Fortune 500 companies recognize analytics is a competitive advantage to understand s and make better decisions. We deliver insight, innovation and impact to them through predictive analytics and visual storytelling.

 As an

 , you will lead the

 , drive client growth, and shape strategic programs. Your

 —understanding client needs, crafting strategic solutions, and articulating value clearly. You’ll bring

 , and a

 to engage in meaningful discussions. You will also be responsible for

**Business Consulting \& Client Relationship Management**
* Lead strategic AI and data science engagements across industries such as Airlines, Automotive, and Retail.
* Build and nurture senior\-level client relationships, driving account expansion and long\-term value.
* Collaborate with sales and consulting teams to shape solutions for RFPs and new opportunities.

* Develop and deliver impactful presentations that clearly articulate business value and technical strategy.
* Develop and communicate AI roadmaps, aligning with client vision and business objectives.

**Delivery Management**
* Translate complex business challenges into AI/ML\-driven solutions, ensuring relevance and impact.

**The Person: Qualification \& Experience**

 If you like wild growth and working with happy, enthusiastic over\-achievers, you'll enjoy your career with us!
   

  

 Not the right fit? Let us know you're interested in a future opportunity by clicking
 *Introduce Yourself* 
 in the top\-right corner of the page or create an account to set up email alerts as new job postings become available that meet your interest!

5083a5c9.title: Senior Engagement Manager (Deployment Success Manager) - Workday Advisory Services
5083a5c9.description:
**Your work days are brighter here.**
 We’re obsessed with making hard work pay off, for our people, our customers, and the world around us. As a Fortune 500 company and a leading AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, we’re shaping the future of work so teams can reach their potential and focus on what matters most. The minute you join, you’ll feel it. Not just in the products we build, but in how we show up for each other. Our culture is rooted in integrity, empathy, and shared enthusiasm. We’re in this together, tackling big challenges with bold ideas and genuine care. We look for curious minds and courageous collaborators who bring sun\-drenched optimism and drive. Whether you're building smarter solutions, supporting customers, or creating a space where everyone belongs, you’ll do meaningful work with Workmates who’ve got your back. In return, we’ll give you the trust to take risks, the tools to grow, the skills to develop and the support of a company invested in you for the long haul. So, if you want to inspire a brighter work day for everyone, including yourself, you’ve found a match in Workday, and we hope to be a match for you too.
   

  

**About The Team**
 The Workday Success Plans Team are all about our customers and their entire journey with Workday \- we create programs to help them drive business value from their Workday applications. The team is responsible for delivering a variety of programs and services to our customers ranging from feature demonstrations to guidance during their deployments.
   

  

 At Workday, we help the world’s largest organizations adapt to what’s next by bringing finance, HR, and planning into a single enterprise cloud. We work hard, and we’re serious about what we do. But we like to have fun, too! We put people first, celebrate diversity, drive innovation, and do good in the communities where we live and work.
   

  

**About The Role**
 The
 **Subscription Services Engagement Manager** 
 (
 **Deployment Success Manager)** 
 will simultaneously handle several projects, coordinating the delivery of packaged services to customers of all sizes and industries around the world. Engagement Managers drive the execution of projects, ensuring success, efficiency and quality via project management practices (e.g., develop project staffing plan, coordinate system access, conducting meetings, etc.) and by handling the customer relationship. Within these projects, Engagement Managers serve as an advocate for Workday, our employees and our customers in equal measure, to complete projects under budget and on time per the definition of each service.
   

  

**Responsibilities include:**
* Leading projects to deliver Workday Success Plans programs and services.
* Clearly and successfully communicating project objectives and delivery strategies.
* Becoming a specialist in Workday Success Plans offering and educating customers throughout the project.
* Balancing the needs of a large number of concurrent projects.
* Providing guidance and mentoring to consultants working on your projects.
* Ensuring projects are accurately planned and staffed.
* Working with the client project manager to identify and resolve issues that could impact project scope or timeframe.
* Leading customer meetings and Workday internal operational meetings.
* Ensuring customers can serve as a reference upon completion of their project.
* Completing project administration tasks such as updating project forecasts, assisting with team scheduling, and other internal project initiation and closure tasks.


**About You**
**Basic Qualifications:**
**Senior Engagement Manager**
**Basic Qualifications:**
* 8\+ years of project management experience with HCM, Payroll, Financial or Student implementations within medium enterprise, large enterprise, higher education and/or state and local governments.
* 5\+ years of experience implementing Workday, Oracle, SAP, PeopleSoft or similar applications.


**Other Qualifications:**
* Passion for customer service
* Excellent organization, time management, verbal and written communication skills
* Solid understanding of at least one of the following business areas: Human Resources, Benefits, Payroll, General Ledger, Accounts Payable/Receivable, Services Procurement
* Capable of influencing, interacting and collaborating with senior executives, internally and externally
* Ability to work on multiple engagements simultaneously
* Ability to travel up to 10%


**Our Approach to Flexible Work**
 With Flex Work, we’re combining the best of both worlds: in\-person time and remote. Our approach enables our teams to deepen connections, maintain a strong community, and do their best work. We know that flexibility can take shape in many ways, so rather than a number of required days in\-office each week, we simply
 **spend at least half (50%) of our time each quarter in the office or in the field** 
 with our customers, prospects, and partners (depending on role). This means you'll have the freedom to create a flexible schedule that caters to your business, team, and personal needs, while being intentional to make the most of time spent together. Those in our remote "home office" roles also have the opportunity to come together in our offices for important moments that matter.

 With Flex Work, we’re combining the best of both worlds: in\-person time and remote. Our approach enables our teams to deepen connections, maintain a strong community, and do their best work. We know that flexibility can take shape in many ways, so rather than a number of required days in\-office each week, we simply

This means you'll have the freedom to create a flexible schedule that caters to your business, team, and personal needs, while being intentional to make the most of time spent together. Those in our remote "home office" roles also have the opportunity to come together in our offices for important moments that matter.
   

  

 At Workday, we are committed to providing an accessible and inclusive hiring experience where all candidates can fully demonstrate their skills. If you require assistance or an accommodation at any point, please email accommodations@workday.com.
   

  

**Are you being referred to one of our roles? If so, ask your connection at Workday about our Employee Referral process!**
 At Workday, we value our candidates’ privacy and data security. Workday will never ask candidates to apply to jobs through websites that are not Workday Careers.
   

  

 Please be aware of sites that may ask for you to input your data in connection with a job posting that appears to be from Workday but is not.
   

  

 In addition, Workday will never ask candidates to pay a recruiting fee, or pay for consulting or coaching services, in order to apply for a job at Workday.
