b1b3549f.title: Global Solutions Partner Development Manager
b1b3549f.description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 10 years of experience in business development, partnerships, management consulting, or investment banking.
* Experience working with C\-level executives and cross\-functionally across all levels of management.
* Experience in supporting partners in creation of GTM offerings (e.g., application and infrastructure).
* Experience in designing application and infrastructure solutions.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Experience in delivering cloud agreements.
* Experience in taking new products and solutions to market, developing GTM offerings with partners based on industry and regional requirements.
* Experience in conducting partner executive briefings along with understanding of industry offerings and excellent communication skills.


**About The Job**
 Google's line of products and services to our clients never stops growing. The Partnerships Development team is responsible for seeking and exploring new opportunities with Google's partners. Equipped with your business acumen and extensive product knowledge, you are right on the front line of interacting with our partners, and helping them find ways to grow using Google's newest product offerings. Your knowledge of relevant verticals and relationships with key industry players will help shape our great applications and content for products such as YouTube, Google TV and Commerce.
   

  

 In this role, you will work with partners to develop pipelines, land joint wins and accelerate customer and partner value including accelerating consumption for the joint solution offerings. You will also work with partners to drive the GTM initiative by leading the Go\-to\-Market (GTM) efforts for application and infrastructure. You will help define the business plays and act as a trusted advisor to the partner in the entire journey of identifying new opportunities, developing capabilities, solutions and service offerings, pursuing Go\-to\-Market business plays, landing wins and delivering customer success. You will drive execution of the campaigns in orchestration with partners technical, sales and marketing teams. You will be leveraging the experience in solution building, partner management, strategy and sales, demonstrating the aptitude and passion for working with partners to transform large organizations with Google Cloud technologies.
   

  

 Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise\-grade solutions that leverage Google’s technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Help partners grow their business on Google Cloud by driving application and infrastructure solutions with the aim of serving as their trusted advisor for both pre\-sales and post sales customer engagements.
* Serve as the technical consultant for the strategic partners application and infrastructure practices. Conduct L200/L300\-level technical sessions on Google Cloud's application and infrastructure.
* Review and validate partner\-developed solution architectures to ensure technical excellence, security, cost\-effectiveness, and adherence to Google Cloud best practices. Provide direct technical guidance to partners on their solutions for performance and consumption.
* Lead the life\-cycle of GTM offering creation from business case, solutioning, planning and governance, business value, solution differentiation.
* Support partners to jointly develop GTM offering, landing with the field.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

75b033ae.title: Cloud Security Architect
75b033ae.description:
**Why Ryan?**
* Global Award\-Winning Culture
* Flexible Work Environment
* Generous Paid Time Off
* World\-Class Benefits and Compensation
* Rapid Growth Opportunities
* Company Sponsored Two\-Way Transportation
* Exponential Career Growth


 The Cloud Security Engineer is responsible for owning cloud security operations, posture management, and policy enforcement across the firm's multi\-cloud environment. This role works closely with IT, platform engineering teams, and senior security leadership to identify risk early, enforce security controls, and drive measurable improvements to the firm's cloud security posture. A hands\-on, self\-directed approach and demonstrated experience operating in complex cloud environments is required. The Cloud Security Engineer partners with development and operations teams to integrate security requirements into the build process and serves as the cloud security subject matter expert within the Cyber Threat Operations team.
   

  

**People**
**Duties and Responsibilities aligned with Key Results:**
* Own cloud security operations and posture management across the firm's multi\-cloud environment.
* Engage directly with cloud platform and development teams as a security partner.
* Operate with a high degree of independence while maintaining clear communication with security leadership.
* May lead security team in management of daily security operation center functions.
* Consult on security requirements and identify system integrations by evaluating and understanding business strategies and requirements.
* Create a positive team member experience.


**Client**
* Serve as a cloud security subject matter expert for engineering and platform teams across the firm.
* Integrate security requirements early in the build process — architecture reviews, IaC pipeline checks, and pre\-deployment guardrails
* Translate risk into actionable guidance that enables delivery.
* Collaborate with our practice areas, as well as external resources, to ensure all information security\-related matters are designed and maintained appropriately.
* Serve as the security expert in application design, cloud, network, mobility, and platform (operating systems) efforts.


**Value**
* Own the cloud security posture management platform: configure findings, drive remediation, and maintain accurate exposure reporting.
* Enforce cloud security policies and guardrails across identity, network security, data access, and resource configuration.
* Conduct threat hunting, own detection coverage, and treat every incident as an input to something that gets hardened
* Stay current on cloud\-specific adversary techniques and apply them to detection logic and hardening priorities.
* Plan and champion new security technologies, architectures, and products that will support the information security requirements for the firm.


**Education/Experience**
* 8\+ years of progressive information security experience, with 4–6 years of direct, hands\-on cloud security exposure.
* Production experience operating a cloud security posture management or cloud\-native application protection platform.
* Hands\-on experience across at least two major cloud platforms.
* Cloud platform and security knowledge sufficient to interpret and prioritize CSPM findings without guidance
* Experience with cloud security policy enforcement: guardrails, baseline controls, or policy\-as\-code in a live environment
* Security operations background: alert triage, event investigation, and incident response
* Experience working alongside engineering or development teams as a security partner
* Clear written communication across technical and non\-technical audiences
* Highly self\-motivated and directed.


**Preferred Experience**
* Experience with Azure, AWS, GCP.
* Kubernetes and container security experience.
* Shift\-left experience: IaC pipeline security, pre\-deployment misconfiguration checks, or CI/CD\-integrated security controls.
* Knowledge of common IT regulatory compliance requirements associated with any of the following HIPAA, HITECH, ISO 27001/2, SOC 1/2, SOX, PCI and security best practices and procedures.


**Certificates And Licenses**
* Microsoft AZ\-500, AWS Security Specialty, or CCSP preferred.
* CISSP is a plus but not required.


**Compliance With Laws**
 Job duties are to be conducted in a manner that adheres to privacy laws, as well as follows internal governance related to protecting confidential information and trade secrets, and to securing data and company records.
   

  

**Supervisory Responsibilities**
 This role may manage a team of direct reports.
   

  

**Work Environment**
* Standard indoor working environment.
* Position requires regular interaction with employees at all levels of the Firm; interface with external vendors, and clients also necessary.
* Occasional long periods of sitting while working at computer.
* Travel requirement: less than 10%.


*Equal Opportunity Employer: disability/veteran*

c94527e5.title: Salesforce Solution Architect
c94527e5.description:
**li{ font\-size:** 14px;} p{ font\-size: 14px;}
  
Company Overview
  
  

Milestone Technologies is a global IT managed services firm that partners with organizations to scale their technology, infrastructure and services to drive specific business outcomes such as digital transformation, innovation, and operational agility. Milestone is focused on building an employee\-first, performance\-based culture and for over 25 years, we have a demonstrated history of supporting category\-defining enterprise clients that are growing ahead of the market. The company specializes in providing solutions across Application Services and Consulting, Digital Product Engineering, Digital Workplace Services, Private Cloud Services, AI/Automation, and ServiceNow. Milestone culture is built to provide a collaborative, inclusive environment that supports employees and empowers them to reach their full potential.
  
  

Our seasoned professionals deliver services based on Milestone’s best practices and service delivery framework. By leveraging our vast knowledge base to execute initiatives, we deliver both short\-term and long\-term value to our clients and apply continuous service improvement to deliver transformational benefits to IT. With Intelligent Automation, Milestone helps businesses further accelerate their IT transformation. The result is a sharper focus on business objectives and a dramatic improvement in employee productivity. Through our key technology partnerships and our people\-first approach, Milestone continues to deliver industry\-leading innovation to our clients. With more than 3,000 employees serving over 200 companies worldwide, we are following our mission of revolutionizing the way IT is deployed.
  
  

Job Overview
  
  

Role Overview
  
  

We are seeking a highly accomplished Salesforce Solution Architect with deep technical expertise, strong business acumen, and proven experience in pre\-sales and proposal solutioning. This role is critical in translating complex business requirements into scalable, secure, and high\-performing Salesforce solutions while shaping technical direction and influencing stakeholders at all levels.
  
  

The ideal candidate brings 10\+ years of Salesforce experience, including 5\+ years in an architect role, exceptional communication skills, and the ability to lead solution design from concept through delivery.
  
  

Key Responsibilities
  
  

Solution Architecture \& Design
  
  

Own end\-to\-end Salesforce solution architecture across Sales, Service, Experience, Marketing, and Platform capabilities
  
Design secure, scalable, and resilient multi\-cloud Salesforce solutions aligned to enterprise architecture standards
  
Define integration patterns using REST/SOAP APIs, middleware, event\-driven architectures, and data migration strategies
  
Ensure adherence to Salesforce best practices, performance optimization, and governance models
  
  

Proposal \& Pre\-Sales Leadership
  
  

Lead technical solutioning for RFPs, RFIs, and proposals, collaborating closely with sales and delivery leadership
  
Create high\-impact solution narratives, architecture diagrams, effort estimates, and risk mitigation strategies
  
Participate in client presentations, technical workshops, and solution walkthroughs as a trusted advisor
  
Evaluate feasibility, complexity, and cost while balancing innovation with delivery practicality
  
  

Stakeholder \& Communication Excellence
  
  

Engage senior client stakeholders to understand strategic business needs and translate them into technical solutions
  
Communicate complex technical concepts clearly to both technical and non\-technical audiences
  
Act as the primary technical escalation point during solution design and delivery phases
  
  

Technical \& Delivery Leadership
  
  

Guide development teams through architecture decisions, design reviews, and implementation best practices
  
Perform solution governance, code quality reviews, and architectural validations
  
Mentor architects, developers, and technical leads across projects
  
Support continuous improvement through reusable frameworks, accelerators, and reference architectures
  
Required Experience \& Skills
  
  

Salesforce Expertise
  
  

10\+ years of hands\-on Salesforce experience, with 5\+ years as a Solution/Technical Architect
  
**Strong expertise across Salesforce clouds:** Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Experience Cloud Platform (Apex, LWC, Flows, DevOps)
  
Deep understanding of Salesforce security, data model design, sharing, and compliance
  
  

Architecture \& Integration
  
  

Proven experience designing enterprise\-scale Salesforce architectures
  
Strong integration experience using APIs, middleware (MuleSoft preferred), and external systems
  
Expertise in data migration, large data volumes, and performance tuning
  
  

Pre\-Sales \& Proposal Experience
  
  

Demonstrated success in proposal solutioning and technical pre\-sales activities
  
Ability to create compelling solution artifacts and influence win strategies
  
Strong estimation, scoping, and risk assessment skills
  
  

Communication \& Leadership
  
  

Exceptional written and verbal communication skills
  
Executive presence with the ability to influence technical and business decision\-makers
  
Strong leadership, mentoring, and cross\-team collaboration abilities
  
Certifications (Preferred)
  
Salesforce Certified Technical Architect (CTA) or progress toward CTA
  
Salesforce Certified Application Architect / System Architect
  
Salesforce Cloud Consultant certifications
  
What We Offer
  
Opportunity to architect high\-impact, enterprise\-scale Salesforce solutions
  
Strategic involvement in proposal winning and client transformation journeys
  
Collaborative, growth\-oriented environment with leadership visibility
  
Competitive compensation and benefits aligned to senior expertise
  
  

Compensation
  
  

**Estimated Pay Range:**  

Exact compensation and offers of employment are dependent on circumstances of each case and will be determined based on job\-related knowledge, skills, experience, licenses or certifications, and location.
  
  

Our Commitment to Diversity \& Inclusion
  
  

At Milestone we strive to create a workplace that reflects the communities we serve and work with, where we all feel empowered to bring our full, authentic selves to work. We know creating a diverse and inclusive culture that champions equity and belonging is not only the right thing to do for our employees but is also critical to our continued success.
  
  

Milestone Technologies provides equal employment opportunity for all applicants and employees. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment and will not be discriminated against on the basis of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity, marital status, age, disability, veteran status, sexual orientation, national origin, or any other category protected by applicable federal and state law, or local ordinance. Milestone also makes reasonable accommodations for disabled applicants and employees.
  
  

We welcome the unique background, culture, experiences, knowledge, innovation, self\-expression and perspectives you can bring to our global community. Our recruitment team is looking forward to meeting you.

225976ba.title: Managed Services Senior Solution Architect - Bengaluru,India
225976ba.description:
**About Diversified**
 Diversified is a global leader in audio visual and media innovation, recognized for designing and building the world’s most experiential environments. Our award\-winning team specializes in delivering solutions for the most complex, large\-scale and immersive installations. Serving a global clientele that includes major media organizations and retailers, sports and live performance venues, corporate enterprises, and government agencies, Diversified partners with clients to create spaces that bring people together and keep them coming back.
   

  

**What To Expect**
 At Diversified, we're on a mission to create a world without boundaries, where technology enables all people to connect and experience the moments that matter, wherever they choose to be. With clients spanning the globe and an exciting pipeline of projects across industries, Diversified offers more than just a job. We offer a career path with the flexibility to grow personally and professionally, wherever your ambitions take you.
   

  

 As a Diversified associate, you'll dive headfirst into big, complex, and rewarding projects that push the boundaries of what's possible. Plus, you'll enjoy a flexible work environment, competitive compensation and benefits, and a culture that celebrates diversity and inclusion.
   

  

**IF YOU CAN DREAM IT, YOU CAN DO IT AT DIVERSIFIED.**
**Job Summary**
 Diversified is seeking a commercially driven and technically credible Managed Services Senior Solution Architect to lead the design and continuous improvement of service solutions. This is a senior, presales\-focused service architecture role responsible for supporting complex, multi\-element, service\-led opportunities from early discovery through solution design, commercial modelling, contractual definition, and executive presentation.
   

  

 The role sits at the intersection of Sales, Services, and Operations, with accountability for ensuring that solutions are:
   

  

* Technically robust
* Commercially sound
* Contractually clear
* Operationally deliverable


 In parallel, the role contributes to the development of scalable, repeatable service offerings, supporting long\-term service \& revenue growth, and portfolio evolution.
   

  

**Roles And Responsibilities**
* Solution Architecture \& Design
* Lead structured discovery engagements to understand business objectives, operational requirements, and service outcomes
* Define end\-to\-end service solutions including scope, SLAs, governance models, and transition frameworks
* Architect complex, multi\-element managed services, support agreements, and staffing models
* Drive the use of standardized, repeatable service components to ensure scalability, consistency, and margin efficiency
* Ensure all solutions align with established service offerings, delivery models, operational capabilities, and support frameworks
* Define clear acceptance criteria to support seamless transition into service delivery
* Produce high\-quality, executive\-level proposals and detailed solution documentation
* Commercial \& Contractual Responsibility
* Develop and validate service cost models in alignment with defined pricing frameworks and margin expectations
* Responsible for financial accuracy of solutions, ensuring compliance with margin thresholds and commercial governance standards, adjusting pricing based on risk, delivery complexity, contractual exposure, and operational considerations
* Clearly define and document all assumptions, exclusions, dependencies, and constraints to protect delivery integrity
* Own and assure the quality of Statements of Work (SOW), ensuring contractual clarity across scope, SLAs, deliverables, and obligations
* Support contract review and redlining activities, ensuring alignment between solution design, commercial position, and contractual commitments
* Complex Deal \& RFPs
* Lead the service strategy for complex, service\-led opportunities in partnership with Account Executives
* Provide subject matter expertise for service workstreams within RFI/RFP responses
* Coordinate cross\-functional inputs from Sales, Operations, Delivery, and Pre\-Sales teams
* Participate in client workshops, presentations, and executive\-level solution discussions
* Support commercial negotiations relating to service scope, SLAs, and delivery commitments
* Participate in formal deal governance processes, ensuring solution quality, compliance, and risk mitigation prior to client commitment
* Delivery Readiness \& Assurance
* Ensure all solutions meet internal delivery standards, frameworks, and operational acceptance criteria
* Identify delivery risks, dependencies, and constraints, and define appropriate mitigation strategies
* Validate solution delivery capability across global and regional delivery models
* Support structured handover into delivery teams, ensuring clarity and continuity
* Use feedback from delivery teams and clients to continuously improve solution design, standards, and assumptions
* Service Development
* Identify gaps and opportunities within our services portfolio
* Partner with services offering team, sales and service leadership to develop scalable, repeatable service offerings aligned to market demand
* Collaborate with OEMs and technology partners to shape lifecycle, consulting, and XaaS\-based services
* Sales Enablement \& Growth
* Support and guide Account Executives in qualifying service\-led opportunities using clear qualification criteria
* Work with Service and Sales leadership to improve service attachment rates across project and technology sales
* Contribute to the development of service scoping tools, pricing frameworks, and proposal templates in collaboration with the services offering team
* Prioritise engagement on high\-value, complex, and strategic opportunities


**Required Skills/Qualifications**
* 5\+ years’ experience within AV, Unified Communications, or technology services environments
* Proven experience architecting managed services and lifecycle support solutions
* Demonstrated experience supporting enterprise Account Executives on complex presales engagements
* Experience designing SLA frameworks, governance models, and service transition approaches
* Strong experience in commercial modelling, pricing structures, and margin management
* Experience contributing to or leading service workstreams within complex RFP/RFI responses
* Proven experience with Unified Communications environments and enterprise collaboration ecosystems


**Technical \& Commercial Capability**
* Strong understanding of managed services operating models (onsite, remote, hybrid)
* Ability to solution scalable, repeatable service solutions aligned to commercial and operational objectives
* Sound commercial judgement with clear understanding of cost drivers, margin protection, and contractual risk
* Ability to structure multi\-element service solutions including support, staffing, consulting, and lifecycle services


**Preferred Skills/Qualifications**
* Experience developing new service catalogues or go\-to\-market service offerings
* Exposure to multi\-site or global enterprise service models
* Knowledge of ITIL or recognized service management best practices
* Experience working with subscription\-based or XaaS commercial structures
* Experience collaborating with OEMs and technology vendors to shape service propositions


**Core Competencies**
* Advanced discovery and consultative solution design capability
* Strong executive\-level communication and presentation skills
* Ability to influence senior stakeholders and drive decision\-making
* Structured and analytical approach to complex service challenges
* High attention to detail across documentation, pricing, and contractual scope
* Ability to balance client outcomes with operational scalability and risk
* Strong cross\-functional collaboration across Sales, Operations, and Delivery


**Immediate Joiners Preferred**
 To learn more about becoming part of the Diversified team, visit us at https://onediversified.com/careers/careers\-at\-diversified or email us at careers@onediversified.com.
   

  

 Diversified is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace. All aspects of employment will be based on job requirements, individual qualifications, merit, performance, and business need.
   

  

 We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity, or any other protected characteristic under applicable law.
   

  

 We believe in fair and equitable hiring practices and strive to create an environment where all individuals feel valued and empowered.

e00cbe8a.title: SAP IT Business Partner – Pre-Sales & Business Analysis
e00cbe8a.description:
**SAP IT Business Partner – Pre\-Sales \& Business Analysis** 




**Manufacturing Domain \| Senior / Principal Level** 




  





**Experience Required** 




 15\+ Years
 



**Work Hours** 




 11:30 AM – 7:30 PM
 



**Domain** 




 Manufacturing
 



**Role Type** 




 SAP Functional Consultant / IT Business Partner / Pre\-Sales / SAP BA
 



**Target Profile** 




 Seasoned candidates from Caterpillar, PwC, or similar tier\-1 organizations
 







**Role Overview** 




 We are seeking a highly accomplished SAP IT Business Partner with a strong Pre\-Sales and Business Analysis background to join our team. The ideal candidate is a seasoned SAP professional with deep expertise in manufacturing domain processes, a proven ability to engage and influence C\-suite stakeholders, and a track record of driving end\-to\-end SAP solution delivery across complex enterprise environments. This is a senior\-level position suited for professionals who have operated at the intersection of business strategy and SAP technology.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 




**Pre\-Sales \& Client Engagement** 



* Lead and support pre\-sales activities including RFP/RFI responses, solution demonstrations, and client presentations.
* Craft compelling value propositions and SAP solution narratives tailored to manufacturing clients.
* Collaborate with sales teams to identify opportunities, define scope, and develop winning proposals.
* Present SAP roadmaps and digital transformation strategies to senior client stakeholders.



**IT Business Partnership** 



* Serve as the strategic liaison between business units and IT, translating manufacturing operations requirements into SAP solutions.
* Build and maintain trusted relationships with key business stakeholders across supply chain, production, procurement, and finance.
* Drive IT investment decisions, demand prioritization, and governance in alignment with business goals.
* Champion change management and adoption strategies for SAP implementations and upgrades.



**Business Analysis \& Solution Design** 



* Conduct detailed As\-Is / To\-Be process workshops with business and technical teams.
* Author high\-quality Business Requirements Documents (BRDs), Functional Specifications, and Solution Design documents.
* Oversee UAT planning, test script development, and sign\-off processes.
* Support data migration strategy, cutover planning, and hypercare activities.



**Delivery Oversight** 



* Partner with project managers and SAP delivery leads to ensure on\-time, on\-budget execution.
* Provide functional oversight across core SAP modules (PP, MM, SD, QM, PM) within manufacturing contexts.
* Mentor junior consultants and business analysts within the team.



**Required Qualifications** 



* **15\+ years of SAP experience with significant exposure to manufacturing industry clients.**
* Proven Pre\-Sales experience — ability to lead demos, respond to RFPs, and close enterprise deals.
* Expertise in SAP modules relevant to manufacturing: PP, MM, SD, QM, WM/EWM, or PM.
* Strong background as an SAP Functional Consultant with hands\-on configuration experience.
* Demonstrated experience in the IT Business Partner (ITBP) role — bridging business and technology.
* Exceptional communication, presentation, and executive\-stakeholder engagement skills.
* Experience with S/4HANA transformation programs is highly preferred.
* Prior employer experience at Caterpillar, PwC, Deloitte, Accenture, IBM, or similar tier\-1 organizations is strongly preferred.



**Preferred Qualifications** 



* SAP Certified Application Associate or Professional certification in relevant modules.
* Exposure to SAP Activate methodology and Agile delivery frameworks.
* Experience with Lean Manufacturing, Six Sigma, or Industry 4\.0 digital transformation initiatives.
* MBA or advanced degree in Engineering, Information Systems, or related field.



**Competency Profile** 




**Core Competency** 




**Proficiency Expected** 




 SAP Functional Expertise
 



 Expert
 



 Pre\-Sales \& Solutioning
 



 Expert
 



 Manufacturing Domain Knowledge
 



 Expert
 



 Business Stakeholder Management
 



 Advanced
 



 Business Analysis \& Documentation
 



 Advanced
 



 Project Delivery \& Governance
 



 Advanced
 



 Team Leadership \& Mentoring
 



 Proficient
 







*Only seasoned professionals with 15\+ years of relevant SAP and manufacturing experience will be considered for this engagement.*

56141a6b.title: Service Delivery Manager
56141a6b.description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.
   

  

**Your Role**
* Application Support Leadership – Manage multiple application support engagements and ensure smooth day\-to\-day operations across portfolios.
* Incident \& Service Management – Lead Incident, Problem, Change, and Major Incident Management activities while ensuring SLA compliance.
* Client \& Stakeholder Management – Work closely with end clients, provide governance reporting, drive issue resolution, and maintain service quality.
* Operations \& Capacity Management – Handle project finance, resource capacity planning, demand management, and operational efficiency.
* Cross\-functional Coordination – Coordinate with development, infrastructure, and support teams to resolve production issues and drive continuous improvement.


**Your Profile**
* Overall Experience in 12\-14 Years Needed.
* Application Operations Experience – 8–10\+ years of hands\-on experience in application support and production operations.
* ITIL \& ITSM Expertise – Strong knowledge of ITIL processes, ITSM terminology, Incident/Problem/Change Management; ITIL certification preferred.
* Tools \& Governance – Experience with ITSM tools (ServiceNow, Remedy, etc.) and JIRA for tracking, reporting, and service management.
* Technical \& Analytical Skills – Strong techno\-functional background with proven experience in production support, issue analysis, and root\-cause resolution.
* Project \& Communication Skills – Experience in project finance, capacity planning, stakeholder management, client communication, and reporting. Knowledge of Java technologies (Struts, Hibernate, Spring) is an added advantage.


**What You'll Love About Working Here**
* You can shape your career with us. We offer a range of career paths and internal opportunities within Capgemini group. You will also get personalized career guidance from our leaders.
* You will get comprehensive wellness benefits including health checks, telemedicine, insurance with top\-ups, elder care, partner coverage or new parent support via flexible work.
* At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.


 Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55\-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end\-to\-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

d6424878.title: Financing Solutions, Prime Services - Senior Associate
d6424878.description:
**Who we are looking for:**

Looking for Investment Banking professionals who understand Agency/Agency/Principal lending business with working experience in Collateral Management, Mark to Market and Trade settlements process.


**Why is this role important to us:**

The team you will be joining is a part of MFO (Markets and Financing Operations) which provides Agency and principal lending services to the biggest asset managers in the world (governments, institutions and financial advisors). Our array of offerings includes Custodial, Security financing (Lending/Borrowing) and post settlement services. Join us if making your mark in the asset management industry from day one is a challenge you are up for.


**What you will be responsible for:**

As Financing Solutions, Prime Services \- Senior Associate you will


Performs several or all the following duties based on assigned desk (domestic, international) and/or product(s):


* Processes high volume of international loans, borrows, loan returns, borrow returns and mark to markets daily adhering to established procedures and controls; executes cash movements daily; monitors and resolves pending and failing transactions.
* Interacts with traders, client management, fund group(s) and counterparts regarding international trade settlements and cash movements
* Execute instructions to receive or deliver securities from counterparties.
* Confirms end\-of\-day re\-pricing and money movements with counterparts.
* Reviews contract compare records to validate positions with each counterparty.
* Assists business area with inquiries pertaining to transactional activity; coordinates response with traders, corporate actions staff and other internal teams.
* Ensure timely resolution of counterparty issues including pricing problems, quantities of loans and borrows, etc.while keeping management informed of any potential issues.
* Identifies and analyzes operations risks related to current and potential business and recommends procedural changes/improvements as needed
* Runs and logs critical reports to the balance sheet and provides relevant parties with appropriate report statistics.
* Completes special projects as assigned; provides assistance to operational process improvement efforts

**What we value** :


These skills will help you succeed in this role:


* Strong knowledge of Agency/Principal Security lending business
* Strong communication, interpersonal, organizational, and time management skills
* Deadline and detail oriented
* Demonstrated computer proficiency, including advanced knowledge of MS Excel, as well as problem solving and analytical skills

**Should be flexible to work in US Shift (6:30 PM \- 3:30 AM IST)**

**Work Location:**

**Hyderabad**

**Education \& Preferred Qualifications:**

* University degree in Business majoring in Accounting, Finance, or other Financial\-related programs
* Overall experience of 4\+ years in Trade Settlements, Mark to Market and Collateral Management (NA/EMEA markets) process.
* Investment Banking, Agency/Principal Lending, Custodial Services, Financial Markets knowledge is must.
* Certifications: certifications like NSE Certification in Financial Markets (NCFM), NSE Certified Capital Market Professional (NCCMP) etc. will be an added advantage but not mandatory.

**Secondary Skills (Good to Have)**

* Exposure to Equilend, Prium, MCH, DTC and Crest applications

**About State Street**

**What we do.** State Street is one of the largest custodian banks, asset managers and asset intelligence companies in the world. From technology to product innovation we’re making our mark on the financial services industry. For more than two centuries, we’ve been helping our clients safeguard and steward the investments of millions of people. We provide investment servicing, data \& analytics, investment research \& trading and investment management to institutional clients.


**Work, Live and Grow.** We make all efforts to create a great work environment. Our benefits packages are competitive and comprehensive. Details vary in locations, but you may expect generous medical care, insurance and savings plans among other perks. You’ll have access to flexible Work Program to help you match your needs. And our wealth of development programs and educational support will help you reach your full potential.


**Inclusion, Diversity and Social Responsibi** lity. We truly believe our employees’ diverse backgrounds, experiences and perspective are a powerful contributor to creating an inclusive environment where everyone can thrive and reach their maximum potential while adding value to both our organization and our clients. We warmly welcome the candidates of diverse origin, background, ability, age, sexual orientation, gender identity and personality. Another fundamental value at State Street is active engagement with our communities around the world, both as a partner and a leader. You will have tools to help balance your professional and personal life, paid volunteer days, matching gift program and access to employee networks that help you stay connected to what matters to you. State Street is an equal opportunity and affirmative action employer. Discover more at StateStreet.com/careers


**About State Street**
======================

Across the globe, institutional investors rely on us to help them manage risk, respond to challenges, and drive performance and profitability. We keep our clients at the heart of everything we do, and smart, engaged employees are essential to our continued success.


We are committed to fostering an environment where every employee feels valued and empowered to reach their full potential. As an essential partner in our shared success, you’ll benefit from inclusive development opportunities, flexible work\-life support, paid volunteer days, and vibrant employee networks that keep you connected to what matters most. Join us in shaping the future.


As an Equal Opportunity Employer, we consider all qualified applicants for all positions without regard to race, creed, color, religion, national origin, ancestry, ethnicity, age, disability, genetic information, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, citizenship, marital status, domestic partnership or civil union status, familial status, military and veteran status, and other characteristics protected by applicable law.


Discover more information on jobs at StateStreet.com/careers


Read our CEO Statement

64d392ed.title: PROGRAM MANAGER CUM FACULTY COORDINATOR – PUNJAB EXAMS
64d392ed.description:
**Job Description**

**Group Company:** \#\*PhysicsWallah\*\#
**Designation:** \#\*Senior Associate\*\#
**Office Location:** \#\*Office Location\*\#
**Position description:** \#\*PROGRAM MANAGER CUM FACULTY COORDINATOR – PUNJAB EXAMS\*\#
**\#\*Role Objective\*\#**


The Program Manager cum Faculty Coordinator will be responsible for managing the end\-to\-end academic and operational execution of the Punjab Exams category while simultaneously owning faculty acquisition, onboarding, scheduling, performance management, and coordination. This is a dual\-responsibility role that bridges program strategy with faculty operations, ensuring seamless delivery of high\-quality academic programs to students.

**A. Program Management Responsibilities**

* Own the overall execution, planning, and growth of the Punjab Exams category.
* Plan and launch academic programs, batches, courses, test series, and exam\-oriented initiatives aligned with the Punjab exam calendar.
* Define program structure, batch timelines, subject\-wise schedules, and content delivery roadmap.
* Monitor batch performance, student engagement, completion rates, and learning outcomes.
* Coordinate with marketing, content, social media, YouTube, product, and sales teams to drive student acquisition and retention.
* Develop and execute strategies to improve student enrolment, engagement, satisfaction, and course completion.
* Track business and academic KPIs and prepare regular performance dashboards for leadership.
* Analyse market trends, competitor activities, and student requirements to identify new growth opportunities.
* Ensure timely execution of launches, campaigns, classes, content drops, and academic initiatives.
* Take ownership of cross\-functional execution and ensure timely delivery of all key milestones.

**B. Faculty Coordination Responsibilities**

* Identify, source, evaluate, and onboard faculty members across all subjects for the Punjab Exams category.
* Plan and manage faculty schedules, class timetables, and session allocations across batches.
* Act as the single point of contact between faculty members and internal teams (content, video, product, marketing).
* Monitor faculty performance through student feedback, class ratings, attendance data, and content quality reviews.
* Conduct regular faculty reviews, feedback sessions, and development discussions.
* Ensure faculty readiness for live classes, recorded sessions, doubt\-solving slots, and special sessions.
* Manage faculty communication, escalations, and day\-to\-day operational requirements.
* Coordinate content creation activities with faculty — including notes, quizzes, PYQs, study material, and video lectures.
* Ensure faculty alignment with the latest exam patterns, syllabus updates, and academic standards.

* Build and maintain a healthy faculty pipeline and backup pool for business continuity.

**Preferred Qualifications \& Skills**

* Bachelor's or Master's degree in any discipline
* 3–7 years of experience in Program Management, Academic Operations, Faculty Management, or Category Management.
* Prior experience in EdTech, coaching institutes, or the competitive exam preparation industry is strongly preferred.
* Proven track record of managing academic programs and coordinating with teaching faculty.
* Strong project management, planning, and stakeholder management skills.
* Excellent analytical, strategic thinking, and execution capabilities.
* Outstanding communication, interpersonal, and leadership skills.
* Ability to work in a fast\-paced, cross\-functional environment and manage multiple priorities.
* Understanding of Punjab Government Exams, their syllabus, and the competitive exam ecosystem will be an added advantage.

* Proficiency in tools such as Google Workspace, MS Office, project management platforms, and data dashboards.

22\-07\-2026

5013f963.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
5013f963.description:
**Job Description**
 Key Responsibilities:
   

  

* Lead and deliver large, complex, cross\-functional programs from concept through execution and


 operationalization.
   

  

* Define program strategy, scope, milestones, success metrics, and governance frameworks.
* Drive alignment across engineering, product management, architecture, security, operations, and


 executive leadership teams.
   

  

* Manage interdependencies across multiple workstreams, ensuring timely execution and delivery.
* Partner with engineering and architecture teams to drive cloud transformation initiatives and


 modernization programs.
   

  

* Facilitate technical decision\-making and architecture reviews to ensure scalable, resilient, and cost\-


 effective solutions.
   

  

* Identify opportunities to leverage AI, machine learning, automation, and generative AI technologies to


 improve operational efficiency and productivity.
   

  

* Build strong relationships across all levels of the organization, including executives, technical leaders,


 business stakeholders, and external partners.
   

  

* Influence decision\-making across engineering, product, operations, and executive leadership teams


 without direct reporting authority.
   

  

* Anticipate bottlenecks, dependencies, resource constraints, and organizational challenges before they


 impact program outcomes.
   

  

* Lead resolution of complex technical and organizational issues.
* Establish and monitor program metrics, KPIs, and operational dashboards to measure progress,


 identify trends, and drive informed decision\-making.
   

  

* Utilize quantitative and qualitative data to assess risks, optimize resource allocation, prioritize


 initiatives, and improve program outcomes.
   

  

* Drive a culture of accountability and continuous improvement through measurement, reporting, and


 actionable insights.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Required Qualifications:**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, or related technical field.
* 8\+ years of technical program management experience leading large\-scale enterprise programs.
* Proven experience delivering complex cross\-functional initiatives involving multiple engineering organizations. Confidential \- Oracle Restricted Confidential \- Oracle Restricted
* Strong understanding of cloud architecture principles, distributed systems, infrastructure, networking, security, and cloud operations.
* Demonstrated experience driving cloud transformation, migration, modernization, or platform initiatives.
* Experience leveraging AI, automation, and generative AI technologies to improve operational efficiency and business outcomes.
* Exceptional written, verbal, and executive communication skills.
* Strong stakeholder management skills with the ability to influence across all organizational levels.
* Demonstrated ability to use a data\-driven approach to program management, leveraging metrics, KPIs, operational insights, and analytics to drive decision\-making.
* Proven ability to influence without direct authority across highly matrixed organizations.
* Demonstrated ability to anticipate risks, identify bottlenecks, and proactively drive mitigation strategies.
* Strong analytical, technical problem\-solving, and decision\-making capabilities.
* Experience presenting to executive leadership and driving strategic alignment. Preferred Qualifications:
* Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business Administration, or related field.
* Experience with OCI, AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.
* Certifications in cloud architecture, program management, agile methodologies, or AI technologies.
* Experience leading enterprise\-scale digital transformation programs.
* Knowledge of AI/ML platforms, generative AI applications, and automation frameworks.
* Experience working in highly matrixed global organizations. Core Competencies:
* Strategic Thinking
* Technical Leadership
* Cloud Architecture Expertise
* AI \& Automation Enablement
* Executive Presence
* Program Execution Excellence
* Cross\-Functional Leadership
* Stakeholder Influence
* Influencing Without Authority
* Data\-Driven Decision Making
* Metrics and KPI Management
* Analytical Thinking
* Risk Management
* Technical Problem Solving
* Change Management
* Continuous Improvement Success Metrics
* Successful delivery of strategic cross\-functional programs on schedule and within scope. Confidential \- Oracle Restricted Confidential \- Oracle Restricted
* Measurable improvements in operational efficiency through AI and automation initiatives.
* Reduced program risk through proactive identification and mitigation of bottlenecks.
* Increased stakeholder satisfaction and organizational alignment.
* Improved cloud platform adoption, reliability, scalability, and business outcomes.

**Qualifications**
 Career Level \- IC3
   

  

**About Us**
 Only Oracle brings together the data, infrastructure, applications, and expertise to power everything from industry innovations to life\-saving care. And with AI embedded across our products and services, we help customers turn that promise into a better future for all. Discover your potential at a company leading the way in AI and cloud solutions that impact billions of lives.

We also encourage employees to give back to their communities through our volunteer programs.
   

  

 We’re committed to including people with disabilities at all stages of the employment process. d25dd42b.title: Technical Program Manager
d25dd42b.description:
**About Turing**
 Based in San Francisco, California, Turing is the world’s leading research accelerator for frontier AI labs and a trusted partner for global enterprises looking to deploy advanced AI systems. Turing accelerates frontier research with high\-quality data, specialized talent, and training pipelines that advance thinking, reasoning, coding, multimodality, and STEM. For enterprises, Turing builds proprietary intelligence systems that integrate AI into mission\-critical workflows, unlock transformative outcomes, and drive lasting competitive advantage.
   

  

 Recognized by Forbes, The Information, and Fast Company among the world’s top innovators, Turing’s leadership team includes AI technologists from Meta, Google, Microsoft, Apple, Amazon, McKinsey, Bain, Stanford, Caltech, and MIT. Learn more at www.turing.com
   

  

**Job Description: Technical Program Manager – AI/LLM Training Programs**
**Role Overview**
 We are seeking an experienced
 **Technical Program Manager (TPM)** 
 to oversee end\-to\-end program management for AI/LLM training initiatives, large\-scale dataset creation efforts, and cross\-functional operations with our global data partners. This role requires a strong technical foundation, exceptional stakeholder management skills, and an ability to drive complex, multi\-team programs to success.
   

  

 You will work closely with data scientists, ML engineers, annotation teams, QA specialists, and external partners to ensure projects are delivered with consistent quality, on time, and within scope.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Program Planning \& Execution**
* Lead strategic planning, execution, and delivery of AI/LLM training programs and dataset creation projects.
* Define program scope, milestones, KPIs, and timelines; manage risks, resource needs, and dependencies.
* Build and maintain program dashboards, progress reports, and documentation for internal and external partners.


**Cross\-Functional Coordination**
* Collaborate with data labs, engineering, research, annotation, QA, and vendor teams to align goals and drive execution.
* Manage communication across technical and non\-technical stakeholders, ensuring clarity and accountability.
* Facilitate sprint planning, standups, and operational reviews for multi\-stream program teams.


**Quality \& Process Management**
* Implement scalable processes for data quality oversight, annotation workflows, and model training pipelines.
* Monitor dataset quality metrics and coordinate issue resolution with labeling and QA teams.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives across tools, workflows, compliance, and documentation.


**Technical Leadership**
* Understand data schemas, ML model training needs, labeling guidelines, and evaluation frameworks.
* Work with technical teams to surface requirements, solve bottlenecks, and optimize program workflows.
* Support integration of internal tools, automation, and AI\-assisted labeling systems.


**Vendor \& Client Engagement**
* Act as the primary program point of contact for global data lab clients.
* Manage vendor relationships, SLAs, compliance, and delivery expectations.
* Prepare and lead client reviews, performance assessments, and strategic planning discussions.


**Qualifications**
**Required**
* 5\+ years of program or project management experience, preferably in AI, ML, data operations, or large\-scale tech programs.
* Strong understanding of AI/ML concepts (LLMs, dataset creation, labeling pipelines, data quality, model evaluation).
* Proven experience delivering multi\-phase technical programs with cross\-functional global teams.
* Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and problem\-solving skills.
* Experience with project management tools (e.g., Jira, Asana, Notion) and data/documentation systems.
* Ability to manage ambiguity, operate independently, and drive outcomes in fast\-paced environments.


**Preferred**
* Experience working with data annotation vendors, research labs, or ML ops teams.
* Familiarity with prompt engineering, RLHF, supervised fine\-tuning (SFT), or evaluation dataset creation.


**Values**
* We are client first: We put our clients at the center of everything we do, because their success is the ultimate measure of our value.
* We work at Start\-Up Speed: We move fast, stay agile and favor action because momentum is the foundation of perfection
* We are AI forward: We help our clients build the future of Al and implement it in our own roles and workflow to amplify productivity.


**Advantages of joining Turing**
* Amazing work culture (Super collaborative \& supportive work environment; 5 days a week)
* Awesome colleagues (Surround yourself with top talent from Meta, Google, LinkedIn etc. as well as people with deep startup experience)
* Competitive compensation
* Flexible working hours


**Don’t meet every single requirement?** 
 Studies have shown that women and people of color are less likely to apply to jobs unless they meet every single qualification. Turing is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, marital status, disability, protected veteran status, or any other legally protected characteristics. At Turing we are dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive and authentic workplace and celebrate authenticity, so if you’re excited about this role but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyways. You may be just the right candidate for this or other roles.
   

  

 For applicants from the European Union, please review Turing's GDPR notice here.

c497f86d.title: Technical Program Manager
c497f86d.description:
****Job Title: Technical Program Manager****
****Location: Pune, India – In\-office Role****
****Reports to: Director of Engineering****
 Role Overview
   

  

 We are seeking a Technical Program Manager to play a critical role in the delivery of our new, innovative AI platform \- RISE. As the Technical Scrum Master / Program Manager, you are the primary custodian of team productivity and delivery health. You are not just a meeting facilitator, but a "flow master" responsible for optimizing the end\-to\-end value stream—from product discovery to production release. You will bridge the gap between strategic product vision and technical execution, ensuring high\-energy squads remain focused, unblocked, and aligned with mission\-critical goals.
   

  

 What You’ll Do
   

  

****Flow Optimization \& Mastery:****
 Act as the "bulldozer" for the team, identifying and aggressively removing technical and organizational impediments that hinder velocity.
   

  

 Agile Facilitation: Lead high\-energy Scrum ceremonies (Daily Stand\-ups, Sprint Planning, Retrospectives) and refine Kanban/Scrum processes to maintain a constant, sustainable work pace.
   

  

****Technical Delivery Oversight:****
 Use your technical background to engage in architecture discussions and issue triage, addressing first\-level blockers before they reach engineering management.
   

  

 Stakeholder \& Product Alignment: Partner with Product Owners to manage and groom backlogs, ensuring technical debt and architectural initiatives are balanced with feature delivery.
   

  

****Metric\-Driven Improvement:****
 Track and analyze flow metrics (Cycle Time, Lead Time, Velocity, and Throughput) to identify bottlenecks and drive continuous improvement.
   

  

****Shielding \& Focus:****
 Protect the team from external disruptions and "scope creep" by acting as the primary point of contact for stakeholders during active sprints.
   

  

 Communicate program status, risks, and decisions clearly to leadership
   

  

 Create and maintain program reports, dashboards, and executive\-ready views of delivery health
   

  

**Required Skills**
****Agile Expert:****
 Mastery of Scrum, Kanban, and Lean principles, with experience applying them in "high\-intensity" product environments.
   

  

****Program Management:****
 Proven ability to manage dependencies across multiple cross\-functional teams and maintain a high\-level roadmap while managing tactical sprint tasks.
   

  

****Technical Acumen:****
 Ability to "speak the same language" as developers—understanding CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and modern web architectures (e.g., ROR/React).
   

  

****Tools Mastery:****
 Power user of Jira and Confluence, capable of building advanced dashboards and automation workflows to visualize team health.
   

  

 What This Role Solves
   

  

* Missed or unpredictable delivery timelines
* Poor or inconsistent cross\-team coordination
* Unclear ownership and accountability
* Misalignment between Engineering, Product, and Business stakeholders


 Seniority \& Experience
   

  

* 6\+ years of experience in Technical Program Management or a related role
* Proven success driving cross\-team software delivery
* Experience operating in ambiguous, fast\-moving environments
* Platform, infrastructure, or large\-scale product experience is a plus


 Leadership Traits \& Soft Skills
   

  

* Strong self\-starter with a bias toward action and delivery
* Comfortable engaging in healthy conflict and holding teams accountable
* Direct, clear, and confident communicator
* Resilient under pressure and comfortable with difficult conversations


**Benefits**
* Medical insurance for employees and family, including parents/in\-laws
* Accident coverage for employees
* EAP powered by Living App
* Catered lunch
* Indoor games and team engagement
* Office snacks and refreshments
* Public holidays 10 days
* 20 PTOs and 6 CL/SL, full maternity and 4 weeks paternity

f36eae4e.title: Program & Delivery manager
f36eae4e.description:
**About Finkraft**
 Finkraft.ai is an AI\-first financial\-automation company. We turn the messiest layer of enterprise travel and tax — invoices, entity identities and indirect\-tax recovery — into clean, compliant, recoverable data for large corporates and their travel ecosystems. Our Bangalore team builds and runs the engine; we are now standing up the product, AI, data and go\-to\-market tracks that power our UAE and GCC expansion.
   

  

**Why this role exists**
*Several tracks are shipping at once, against a hard regulatory window. Right now, on\-time delivery lives in the founder’s head — it shouldn’t.*
 We need one person who owns the answer to “does it ship on time” across product, AI, data and GTM — turning founder velocity into sequenced, tracked, blocker\-free execution. This is the keystone hire for the build pod: nothing else lands predictably without it.
   

  

**The shape of the role**
**Where you’ll be.** 
 Based in Bangalore with the build pod, owning delivery for the UAE/GCC product and go\-to\-market sprint. It’s a hands\-on operating role in a fast, founder\-led environment — not a process\-administration seat.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**What you’ll own — roles \& responsibilities**
* One plan, one tracker. Build and maintain the master sprint plan and a single tracker of truth across all tracks — product, AI, data and GTM — with clear RACI where ownership is contested.
* Daily execution. Run standups that aren’t theatre, surface blockers fast, and drive blocker mean\-time\-to\-resolution down — you unblock, you don’t just escalate.
* Risk \& dependencies. Keep a live risk register and track external dependencies — ASP/e\-invoicing rails, PMS/ERP, banks, vendors — so nothing slips silently.
* Leadership visibility. Produce a weekly dashboard a founder reads in sixty seconds: what shipped, what’s at risk, what needs a decision.
* Hiring cadence. Run the pod’s hiring and onboarding tracker so staffing keeps pace with the build plan.


**Requirements**
**The track record we’re looking for**
 We’re Looking For Someone Who Has Done This Before — Who Has Held a Multi\-track Program Together When It Mattered. Concretely
   

  

* Multi\-workstream delivery. 8–14 years in delivery or program management in SaaS, fintech or technology services, running parallel workstreams with real external dependencies.
* A bias to unblock. You can point to a stuck, cross\-team dependency you personally drove to resolution — not one you merely flagged upward.
* Relentless follow\-through. You measure, you chase, you close loops — and you can show the metrics you ran a program by.
* Comfort in ambiguity. You’ve operated inside founder\-led chaos and brought order to it without slowing it down.


**Who You Are**
****What we’re looking for****
****What great looks like****
**Multi\-workstream delivery**
 You’ve sequenced and shipped programs spanning several teams and external partners, on cadence.
   

  

**Dependency \& risk management**
 You track and de\-risk external dependencies (vendors, banks, integrations) before they bite.
   

  

**Blocker removal**
 You drive blockers to closure with low MTTR — ownership, not just escalation.
   

  

**Tracker \& tooling discipline**
 One source of truth, set up day one; status a CEO can read in a minute.
   

  

**Operating without authority**
 You move teams without needing formal reporting lines over them.
   

  

**What Gives You An Edge**
* PMP, PRINCE2, CSM or SAFe certification.
* Exposure to travel, tax, e\-invoicing or integration/ASP programs.
* Fluency with Jira, Linear, ClickUp or Notion as delivery systems, not just trackers.
* Experience delivering against a compliance or regulatory deadline.

0b6f84f8.title: Bid Manager
0b6f84f8.description:
**Job Description**
 We are looking for an experienced
 **Bid Manager / Proposal Manager** 
 to support end\-to\-end bid management, proposal development, response management, and pricing activities for Digital Customer Experience (DCX) opportunities. In this role, you will work closely with Sales, Solution, Delivery, and Account teams to develop winning proposals, customer presentations, and sales pitches for global clients.
   

  

**Your Role:**
* Manage end\-to\-end bid and proposal processes, including RFPs, RFIs, RFQs, and proactive pursuits.
* Drive bid planning, bid/no\-bid decisions, response integration, and submission management.
* Collaborate with Sales, Solution Architects, Delivery Teams, SMEs, and Account Teams to develop high\-quality proposals.
* Support commercial and pricing discussions by coordinating with deal analysts and stakeholders.
* Create compelling customer presentations, sales pitches, and proposal collateral.
* Maintain proposal repositories, standard templates, boilerplate content, and rate cards.
* Track pursuit progress, provide status updates, and ensure timely completion of deliverables.
* Support the development of case studies, capability presentations, and market intelligence research.


**Required Skills \& Experience:**
* Experience in Bid Management, Proposal Management, or Presales within a Tier\-1 or Tier\-2 IT Services organization.
* Strong understanding of proposal development, bid governance, and solution selling.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
* Ability to coordinate with technical SMEs and cross\-functional stakeholders globally.
* Exposure to Digital Experience, CRM, Commerce, Mobile, or Enterprise Technology solutions is preferred.


**Preferred Technical Exposure:** 
 Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics CRM, Adobe Experience Manager (AEM), Sitecore, Pega, B2B/B2C Commerce, Mobile Applications, Java, and Microsoft technologies.

 to support end\-to\-end bid management, proposal development, response management, and pricing activities for Digital Customer Experience (DCX) opportunities. In this role, you will work closely with Sales, Solution, Delivery, and Account teams to develop winning proposals, customer presentations, and sales pitches for global clients.

* Drive bid planning, bid/no\-bid decisions, response integration, and submission management.
* Collaborate with Sales, Solution Architects, Delivery Teams, SMEs, and Account Teams to develop high\-quality proposals.
* Support commercial and pricing discussions by coordinating with deal analysts and stakeholders.
* Create compelling customer presentations, sales pitches, and proposal collateral.
* Maintain proposal repositories, standard templates, boilerplate content, and rate cards.
* Track pursuit progress, provide status updates, and ensure timely completion of deliverables.
* Support the development of case studies, capability presentations, and market intelligence research.


**Required Skills \& Experience:**
* Experience in Bid Management, Proposal Management, or Presales within a Tier\-1 or Tier\-2 IT Services organization.
* Strong understanding of proposal development, bid governance, and solution selling.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
* Ability to coordinate with technical SMEs and cross\-functional stakeholders globally.
* Exposure to Digital Experience, CRM, Commerce, Mobile, or Enterprise Technology solutions is preferred.


**Preferred Technical Exposure:** 
 Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics CRM, Adobe Experience Manager (AEM), Sitecore, Pega, B2B/B2C Commerce, Mobile Applications, Java, and Microsoft technologies.

 products and services. They enjoy designing transformational solutions and working directly with
   

  

 customers to meet their business needs. An individual filling this role will work closely with the sales
   

  

 counterparts to influence and accelerate large sales opportunities, globally. Provides thought leadership
   

  

 and consultation throughout the life cycle of this transformation. This individual will act as a liaison
   

  

 between the internal and external stakeholders to align the right delivery strategy, estimates, and timelines to
   

  

 service client requirements.
   

  

**Job Description**

 multiple customer opportunities in parallel and

 cycle.

* Continuously improve the Solution Architecture team’s knowledge, methodologies,


 and customer\-facing collateral

 criteria

**About Adobe**
 Adobe empowers everyone to create through innovative platforms and tools that unleash creativity, productivity and personalized customer experiences. Adobe’s industry\-leading offerings including Adobe Acrobat Studio, Adobe Express, Adobe Firefly, Creative Cloud, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Manager, and GenStudio enable people and businesses to turn ideas into impact, powered by AI and driven by human ingenuity.
   

  

 Our 30,000\+ employees worldwide are creating the future and raising the bar as we drive the next decade of growth. We’re on a mission to hire the very best and believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. At Adobe, we believe that great ideas can come from anywhere in the organization. The next big idea could be yours.
   

  

**Let’s Adobe together**
 At Adobe, we believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. Learn more about Adobe life, including our values and culture, focus on people, purpose and community, Adobe for All, comprehensive benefits programs, the stories we tell, the customers we serve, and how you can help us advance our mission of empowering everyone to create.
   

  

 Adobe is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on gender, race or color, ethnicity or national origin, age, disability, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. Learn more.
   

  

 Adobe aims to make our Careers website and recruiting process accessible to any and all users. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation to navigate our website or complete the application process, email accommodations@adobe.com or call \+1 408\-536\-3015\.
   

  

**AI Use Guidelines for Interviews:**
 Our interviews are designed to reflect your own skills and thinking. The use of AI or recording tools during live interviews is not permitted unless explicitly invited by the interviewer or approved in advance as part of a reasonable accommodation. If these tools are used inappropriately or in a way that misrepresents your work, your application may not move forward in the process.
   

  

 At Adobe, we empower employees to innovate with AI — and we look for candidates eager to do the same. As part of the hiring experience, we provide clear guidance on where AI is encouraged during the process and where it’s restricted during live interviews. See how we think about AI in the hiring experience.

4d3c9087.description:
* Candidate should have 15\+ years of relevant SAP \& domain experience in SAP FICO with Graduation/Post graduate/ICWA/CA
* Domain, process, functional / technical
* Strong hands\-on and in\-depth knowledge of S/4 HANA FICO module
* Strong understanding of the Financial Accounting processes coupled with exposure to various P2P,O2C \& M2D process scenarios, good understanding of taxation procedures, the relevant accounting treatment and the statutory compliance as per applicable Accounting Principles.
* Thorough understanding of Agile and Activate methodologies.
* Good understanding of business processes in the life sciences / pharmaceutical domain.
* Should have done at least two end to end implementation projects in S/4HANA as a Lead Functional Solution Architect.
* Deep Knowledge and expertise in Finance BPML with an ability to guide clients to Industry Best practices.
* Experience in leading and driving Business process workshops and Fit / GAP analysis
* As a Solution Architect, lead the engagement efforts at different stages from problem definition to diagnosis to solution design, development \& deployment in large S/4 HANA transformation programs.

* Excellent team management skill
* High analytical skills
* A high degree of initiative and flexibility
* High customer orientation
* High quality awareness
* Should be aware of release governance processes and have experience in working on any incident management tool.
* Good understanding of GXP and SOX requirements. Should have working experience in a highly regulated environment. We currently have open positions in a number of locations across India \- Bangalore, Pune, Hyderabad, Chennai, Chandigarh, Trivandrum, Indore, Nagpur, Mangalore, Noida, Bhubaneswar, Kolkata, Coimbatore, Jaipur, Mysore, Hubli, Vizag. While we work in accordance with business requirements, we shall strive to offer you the location of your choice, where possible.

a0eea883.title: Solutions Architect
a0eea883.description:
FireMon has learned an unknown and unauthorized third party is impersonating FireMon HR as part of a phishing attempt. Communications from FireMon will always originate from the FireMon.com domain. FireMon will never ask for any banking information as part of an interview process. If you are concerned whether a communication from FireMon is legitimate, please contact us at \[email protected]
   

  

 The Solutions Architect plays a critical role within the FireMon Customer Experience team, helping to assess business opportunities and shape strategies to address technical challenges. This role collaborates closely with security architects, infrastructure specialists, and engineering teams within customer organizations to design impactful, results\-driven solutions. You will support both Pre\-Sale (Buyer’s Journey) and Post\-Sale (Customer Journey) phases. Your technical expertise, strategic insights, and in\-depth product knowledge will empower customers to make informed decisions and achieve success in their projects.
   

  

 Applicants for this role should understand that US timezone coverage will be needed.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Contribute to the process improvement and implementation methodology focused on prescriptively and proactively getting a customer to value as quickly as possible.
* Provide thought leadership related to API integration as the right approach for the management and delivery of Automation and Workflow for our customers.
* Account for the decisions you propose and be an expert in the implementation of proposed solutions.
* Conduct business process analyses, needs assessments, and preliminary cost/benefits analyses to align technology solutions with business initiatives.
* Partner with users to define and analyze problems and align the most appropriate technical, application or configuration solutions.
* Help develop, document, and manage the requirements gathering process and provide detailed design and business processes to support the requirements throughout the project life cycle up to and through change control.
* Review system test plans and system test applications to ensure successful test cycles.
* Partner with the end\-user to select or create appropriate scenarios to test implemented solutions to determine whether the solution meets shared requirements.
* Serve as a functional and technical resource for the project team and establish Level of Effort (LOE) and duration estimates for projects.
* Build architecture best practices.


**Required Skills And Experience**
* Bachelor's degree in the field of Science, Technology, Engineering, Math, or equivalent practical experience.
* Five or more years of business analysis and consulting experience – to or within large corporations, relating to enterprise software implementation and change management.
* Five or more years of experience designing and implementing client\-facing solutions.
* Strong problem solving and critical thinking skills
* Strong verbal and written communication skills


**Preferred Skills And Experience**
* Experience with the technologies relevant to the ServiceNow integration solutions, including SSO, SAML, SSL, Web Services, LDAP, JDBC, ODBC, REST, SCP, and FTPS
* Familiarity with multiple languages, including C\+\+, Java, Python Perl, or another programming language
* Experience implementing solutions using API Management Platforms
* Experience in technology architecture and implementation on the ServiceNow platform
* Communicate solution recommendations and influence decision\-makers
* Startup mentality with responsibilities for partner management
* Demonstrate experience across all phases of the SDLC and Agile software development practices
* Write design specifications and use appropriate charts and diagrams to illustrate your ideas
* Experience with incident management, service request, problem management, change management, discovery, and configuration management databases (CMDB)
* Experience designing application deployments on public (AWS, Azure) and hybrid cloud setup
* Ability to collaborate and communicate effectively with people from different disciplines and varying degrees of technical experience, at all levels within the organization and with external customers


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

**Role description**  

JOB ROLE: A OneSource Tax Consultant specializes in implementing, configuring, and managing They act as the bridge between corporate tax departments and IT, ensuring seamless integration with ERP systems (like SAP or Oracle) to automate global tax calculations, statutory reporting, and compliance. Key Responsibilities\+ \* \*System Implementation:\* Configuring tax engines, mapping tax codes, and defining customer exemption certificates within the ONESOURCE and Global Next platforms. \* \*Global NEXT Platform:\* Setting up transaction editors and required configuration to enable the SAP data flows to ONESOURCE to determine the Tax \* \*SAP and other satellite system Integration:\* Integrating tax software with major enterprise platforms to automate real\-time tax determination for indirect taxes like GST, VAT, and Sales Tax like SAP, VIM, Concur integration etc \* \*Support \& Troubleshooting:\* Resolving tax mismatch errors, analysing posting discrepancies, and maintaining platform uptime. \* \*Compliance \& Reporting:\* Building templates and financial reports within the platform to manage complex statutory reporting and audits. \+Work Experience\+\* \* 5 to 7 years of end to end implementation experience \*ONESOURCE Tax engine\* including \*GLOBLE NEXT Platform\* \* 5 to 7 years of experience in ONESOURCE implementation in \*SAP platform\* \* Strong understanding on Indirect Tax determination and validation \* Experience in FICO and SD is value addition \* Proficiency in SAP processes like end to OTC process, procurement process and Finance processes. \* Experience in working with Agile, Scrum and waterfall delivery models \* Good problem solving \& communication skills \* Good in stakeholder management \* Should be a good team player

 **Skills**  

SAP, ERP, ONESOURCE Tax Engine, SAP FICO, Financial Management, Order to Cash, Taxation, Statutory Reporting, Scrum, Agile, Procurement

UST is a global digital transformation solutions provider. For more than 20 years, UST has worked side by side with the world’s best companies to make a real impact through transformation.
