dac874e5.title: Data Architect
dac874e5.description:
**Job Description:**
--------------------

  

* We are seeking a highly experienced Data Architect to lead the design and implementation of enterprise scale data solutions for industrial manufacturing and Consumer Packaged Goods CPG environments
* This role requires strong expertise in data modeling particularly Kimball Dimensional Modeling data warehousing and modern cloud based data platforms

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
-------------------------

  

* Design and implement scalable enterprise data architectures to support business intelligence analytics and operational reporting
* Lead the development of Kimball dimensional models including star schemas fact tables dimension tables and Slowly Changing Dimensions SCDs
* Create and maintain conceptual logical and physical data models using industry standard data modeling tools
* Collaborate with Data Analysts Data Engineers Data Governance teams and business stakeholders to translate business requirements into robust data solutions
* Architect and optimize data pipelines for efficient data ingestion integration transformation and storage
* Ensure data models align with enterprise data governance quality security and compliance standards
* Support real time and historical analytics by designing scalable and high performance data warehouse solutions
* Drive best practices in data architecture metadata management master data management MDM and data lifecycle management
* Integrate data from multiple enterprise and operational systems including manufacturing engineering ERP and external platforms
* Enable advanced analytics AI ML initiatives and GenAI use cases through well structured and governed data foundations

  

**Technical Requirements:**
---------------------------

  

* Strong expertise in Kimball Dimensional Modeling Dimensional Data Modeling Star Snowflake Schemas Fact Dimension Tables SCD Data Warehouse Design Data Vault Modeling and Enterprise Data Modeling
* Experience creating Conceptual Logical and Physical Data Models using industry standard methodologies
* Hands on experience with ER Studio Erwin Data Modeler PowerDesigner or similar data modeling tools
* Strong knowledge of Azure Data Factory ADF Azure Databricks Azure Data Lake Storage ADLS and Data Lakehouse Architectures
* Experience designing and optimizing ETL ELT pipelines data integration solutions and data orchestration workflows
* Proficiency in SQL and Python for data transformation automation and analytics
* Experience integrating data using REST APIs and implementing scalable data ingestion frameworks

  

**Preferred Skills:**
---------------------


Technology\-\>Data Management\-\>Data Architecture\-\>Data Architecture \- Data Modeling,Technology\-\>Data Engineering\-\>Databricks,Technology\-\>Data Services Testing\-\>Data Warehouse Testing\-\>ETL tool,Technology\-\>OpenSystem\-\>Python \- OpenSystem\-\>Python

fc12fe75.title: Senior Solutions Engineer
fc12fe75.description:
**About GoKwik**
 GoKwik is a growth operating system for D2C and eCommerce brands, powering merchants across checkout optimisation, RTO reduction, payments, retention, and post\-purchase engagement. Today, GoKwik enables 15,000\+ merchants globally, processes \~$2 billion in GMV, and is rapidly scaling across India and international markets.
   

  

 Backed by RTP Global, Z47, Peak XV, and Think Investments, GoKwik has raised $68 million in funding, including a $13 million growth round in June 2025, to accelerate its AI\-powered commerce platform and global expansion.
   

  

 Why This Role Matters
   

  

 As a Senior Solutions Engineer, you'll bridge the gap between technology, product, and sales. You'll work closely with prospective and existing merchants to understand their technical requirements, demonstrate GoKwik's platform capabilities, drive seamless integrations, and ensure successful product implementations. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys solving technical challenges while working directly with customers and cross\-functional teams.
   

  

 What You'll Own
   

  

* Partner with the Sales team during the pre\-sales process to support merchant acquisition.
* Conduct product demonstrations and explain technical capabilities to prospective customers.
* Handle technical objections and provide solution\-oriented recommendations.
* Gather business and technical requirements and prepare Business Requirement Documents (BRDs).
* Work closely with merchants and internal teams to ensure successful implementation and go\-live.
* Support API and platform integrations across merchant ecosystems.
* Collaborate with Product, Engineering, and Customer Success teams to resolve technical challenges during implementation.
* Manage multiple implementation projects while ensuring timely delivery and a smooth onboarding experience.


 Who You Are
   

  

* 4\-6 years of experience in a customer\-facing technical role such as Solutions Engineer, Implementation Engineer, Integration Engineer, or Technical Support.
* Hands\-on experience implementing solutions for eCommerce platforms such as Shopify, WooCommerce, or Magento.
* 2\+ years of experience working with APIs, SDK integrations, or web\-based implementations.
* Working knowledge of JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.
* Familiarity with Google Ads, Meta (Facebook) Pixel, and related tracking technologies.
* Experience working with clients throughout the implementation lifecycle.
* Exposure to iOS or Android application support is an added advantage.
* Strong problem\-solving, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and effectively prioritize work based on business needs.


**Why GoKwik**
 At GoKwik, you'll work on products that power some of the fastest\-growing eCommerce brands globally. We move fast, solve meaningful problems, and give people the ownership to make an impact from day one. If you're excited about technology, customer success, and building the future of commerce, you'll thrive here.

4180ff8f.description:

 Product Solution Engineer
   

  

 PhonePe
   

  

 full\-time mid Bangalore More Technology jobs
   

  

 This position is sourced from PhonePe's career page . Apply through Job\-Scouts to track your application status.
   

  

 Sign Up to Apply
   

  

**Job Description**
 About PhonePe Limited:
   

  

 Headquartered in India, its flagship product, the PhonePe digital payments app, was launched in Aug 2016\. As of April 2025, PhonePe has over 60 Crore (600 Million) registered users and a digital payments acceptance network spread across over 4 Crore (40\+ million) merchants. PhonePe also processes over 33 Crore (330\+ Million) transactions daily with an Annualized Total Payment Value (TPV) of over INR 150 lakh crore.
   

  

 PhonePe’s portfolio of businesses includes the distribution of financial products (Insurance, Lending, and Wealth) as well as new consumer tech businesses (Pincode \- hyperlocal e\-commerce and Indus AppStore Localized App Store for the Android ecosystem) in India, which are aligned with the company’s vision to offer every Indian an equal opportunity to accelerate their progress by unlocking the flow of money and access to services.
   

  

**Culture**
 At PhonePe, we go the extra mile to make sure you can bring your best self to work, Everyday!. And that starts with creating the right environment for you. We empower people and trust them to do the right thing. Here, you own your work from start to finish, right from day one. PhonePe\-rs solve complex problems and execute quickly; often building frameworks from scratch. If you’re excited by the idea of building platforms that touch millions, ideating with some of the best minds in the country and executing on your dreams with purpose and speed, join us!
   

  

 Challenges
   

  

 Building for Scale, Rapid Iterative Development and Customer\-centric Product Thinking at each step defines every day for a developer at PhonePe. Though we engineer for a 50million\+ strong user base, we code with every individual user in mind. While we are quick to adopt the latest in Engineering, we care utmost for security, stability, and automation. Apply if you want to experience the best combination of passionate application development and product\-driven thinking.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities
   

  

* Managing accounts during integration
* Working with Products, Tech team and understand different product flow
* Attending meetings/con calls with Merchant's Tech/Business team
* Understanding Merchant's flow, requirements and suggesting the solution to them
* Researching, diagnosing, troubleshooting and identifying solutions to resolve the merchant integration Issue.
* Taking ownership of customer/merchant issues reported and seeing problems through to resolution
* Ask merchant the targeted questions to quickly understand the root of the problem
* Understanding Tech issues involved in integration \& Providing resolution
* Automate the process to solve the merchant integration issue and merchant requirements


**Skillset Required**
* Hands\-on experience with Windows/Linux/Mac OS environments.
* Python and SQL \- Required for this role
* Knowledge of any programming language (Ex: \- PHP, JAVA, ASP.Net), platforms (Android, iOS).
* Ability to diagnose and troubleshoot basic technical issues and to provide step\-by\-step technical help
* Familiarity with remote desktop applications
* Excellent problem\-solving, communication skills
* Good understanding of IT terminologies and concept


 Experience – 2 to 5 years
   

  

 PhonePe Full Time Employee Benefits (Not applicable for Intern or Contract Roles)
   

  

* Insurance Benefits \- Medical Insurance, Critical Illness Insurance, Accidental Insurance, Life Insurance
* Wellness Program \- Employee Assistance Program, Onsite Medical Center, Emergency Support System
* Parental Support \- Maternity Benefit, Paternity Benefit Program, Adoption Assistance Program, Day\-care Support Program
* Mobility Benefits \- Relocation benefits, Transfer Support Policy, Travel Policy
* Retirement Benefits \- Employee PF Contribution, Flexible PF Contribution, Gratuity, NPS, Leave Encashment
* Other Benefits \- Higher Education Assistance, Car Lease, Salary Advance Policy


 Our inclusive culture promotes individual expression, creativity, innovation, and achievement and in turn helps us better understand and serve our customers. We see ourselves as a place for intellectual curiosity, ideas and debates, where diverse perspectives lead to deeper understanding and better quality results. PhonePe is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to treating all its employees and job applicants equally; regardless of gender, sexual preference, religion, race, color or disability. If you have a disability or special need that requires assistance or reasonable accommodation, during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please fill out this form.

5849dee4.title: Managing Solution Architect
5849dee4.description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


Solution Architects assess a projects technical feasibility, as well as implementation risks. They are responsible for the design and implementation of the overall technical and solution architecture. They define the structure of a system, its interfaces, the solution principles guiding the organisation, the software design and the implementation. The scope of the Solution Architects role is defined by the business issue at hand. To fulfil the role, a Solution Architect utilises business and technology expertise and experience.
**Job Description \- Grade Specific**
-------------------------------------


Managing Solution/Delivery Architect \- Design, deliver and manage complete solutions. Demonstrate leadership of topics in the architect community and show a passion for technology and business acumen. Work as a stream lead at CIO/CTO level for an internal or external client. Lead Capgemini operations relating to market development and/or service delivery excellence. Are seen as a role model in their (local) community. Certification: preferably Capgemini Architects certification level 2 or above, relevant solution certifications, IAF and/or industry certifications such as TOGAF 9 or equivalent.

ed92b022.title: Solution Architect
ed92b022.description:
**Location:** IN \- Bangalore 24/7 \| **Job\-ID:** 219582 \| **Contract type:** Standard \| **Business Unit:** IT Consulting **Life on the Team**  



We are looking for a Solution Architect with strong Infrastructure and Azure expertise who can design secure, resilient and supportable solutions in a large, complex organisation.The essential focus of this role is infrastructure and cloud architecture. The successful candidate will be technically credible in Azure and infrastructure design, while also being able to think beyond a single technology silo and understand the wider impact of their decisions across security, identity, integration, operations and business outcomes. Our technology estate includes SAP, ServiceNow, Salesforce, Genesys and Azure\-based platforms. Direct experience across all of these platforms is not required, but the successful candidate should be comfortable working with architects and specialists across these domains. This role is ideal for someone who combines strong cloud and infrastructure knowledge with company\-wide solution thinking, sound judgement and curiosity about how different technology domains interact.  


**What you'll do**  


* Lead infrastructure and cloud architecture activities across a diverse technology landscape.
* Design secure, resilient and supportable solutions aligned to enterprise standards.
* Contribute to Azure strategy, cloud adoption and platform evolution.
* Work closely with architects across SAP, ServiceNow, Salesforce, Data and Integration domains.
* Support enterprise identity, authentication and access management strategies.
* Contribute to security architecture discussions and ensure security is embedded into solution designs.
* Support architecture governance, roadmap development and domain stewardship activities where relevant.
* Help define infrastructure standards, patterns and architectural guardrails.
* Support enterprise\-wide transformation initiatives and cloud migration programmes.
* Consider operational supportability, resilience, disaster recovery and lifecycle management in solution designs.

  


**What you'll need**  


* Strong Infrastructure Architecture experience.
* Strong Azure architecture experience.
* Experience designing solutions for large, complex organisations.
* Understanding of networking, connectivity and cloud platform design.
* Experience working with identity and access management concepts.
* Ability to engage effectively with technical and business stakeholders.
* Experience balancing technical, security, operational and business requirements.
* Strong communication and influencing skills.

  


**Highly Desirable**

The following areas are highly desirable rather than mandatory. We would not expect candidates to demonstrate deep expertise across all of them, but experience in some areas, combined with the curiosity and judgement to work effectively with specialists in the others, would be a strong advantage.
* Experience with Microsoft Entra ID.
* Understanding of Zero Trust principles.
* Experience with Conditional Access, Privileged Access and identity governance.
* Experience supporting enterprise platforms such as SAP, ServiceNow or Salesforce.
* Experience with security architecture and risk\-based design decisions.
* Understanding of integration and data architecture principles.
* Experience with cloud landing zones and enterprise governance models.
* Experience contributing to technology roadmaps and standards.

  


**About us**

Computacenter is a leading independent provider of IT infrastructure services, with about 21,000 employees worldwide. We work at the heart of digitisation, advising organisations on IT strategy, implementing the most appropriate technology and managing our customers’ infrastructures.  



We offer a friendly, open working environment without too much fuss about hierarchy. We are looking for professionals with diverse competencies, personalities and strengths who want to live our shared value of teamwork and performance.  



Interested in joining a company with a strong sense of community?  



We’re growing. We’re hiring. We encourage. We empower. We support.  

\#winningtogether \#peoplematter

38a20933.title: Enterprise Architect
38a20933.description:
We are looking for an experienced Enterprise Solution Architect to join our team. This is not a hands\-on development role. The focus is on working with business and technology stakeholders to design end\-to\-end solutions and provide architectural guidance for enterprise applications.
   

  

 Job Title: Enterprise Solution Architect
   

  

 Location: India (Gurgaon or Bengaluru preferred)
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

 Work closely with business and technology teams to understand and define requirements.
   

  

 Design end\-to\-end solution architecture.
   

  

 Review and assess the impact of changing business requirements.
   

  

 Present architecture solutions to Architecture/Design Review Boards.
   

  

 Define the overall solution before handing it over to Technical Leads for implementation.
   

  

 Ensure solutions follow enterprise architecture standards and best practices.
   

  

**Required Skills \& Experience**
 Strong experience in Enterprise Solution Architecture.
   

  

 Experience in Commercial Banking.
   

  

 Knowledge of Lending and/or Pricing platforms.
   

  

 Experience with AWS.
   

  

 Good understanding of integration architecture and integration patterns.
   

  

 Experience with data architecture, enterprise data models, and data lakes.
   

  

 Knowledge of Kafka, MQ, or other event\-driven technologies.
   

  

 Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills.
   

  

**Preferred**
 Experience working in a .NET environment is a plus, but hands\-on development is not required.

b61c4286.title: Senior Manager - Cloud Architect
b61c4286.description:
****Job Summary****
 At Sun Pharma, we commit to helping you “
 **Create your own sunshine** 
 ”— by fostering an environment where you grow at every step, take charge of your journey and thrive in a supportive community.
   

  

****Are You Ready to Create Your Own Sunshine?****
 As you enter the Sun Pharma world, you’ll find yourself becoming ‘Better every day’ through continuous progress. Exhibit self\-drive as you ‘Take charge’ and lead with confidence. Additionally, demonstrate a collaborative spirit, knowing that we ‘Thrive together’ and support each other’s journeys.”
   

  

**Job Summary:**
 We are looking for a highly skilled Cloud Architect to join our dynamic team. The Cloud Architect will play a critical role in designing, implementing, and optimizing our cloud\-based solutions. This position requires a strategic thinker with deep technical expertise and a strong understanding of cloud architecture principles, security, compliance, and performance optimization.
   

  

 As a Cloud Architect, you will be responsible for defining and documenting the overall solution architecture, developing and maintaining architectural standards and best practices, and leading the design and planning of cloud solutions. You will collaborate closely with internal and external technology teams to ensure seamless implementation, testing, and execution of these solutions.
   

  

 Key responsibilities include performing design, debugging, and performance analysis, ensuring data consistency and availability, and integrating various system components. You will also be tasked with assessing security risks, designing secure solutions, and ensuring compliance with industry standards and regulations. Additionally, you will focus on optimizing system performance and scalability, automating deployment and monitoring processes, and maintaining continuous delivery pipelines in collaboration with DevOps/DevSecOps teams.
   

  

**Areas Of Responsibility**
**Area of Responsibility**
****Responsibilities****
**Solution Architecture**
 Define and document the overall solution architecture.
   

  

 Develop and maintain architectural standards and best practices.
   

  

 Evaluate and select appropriate technologies and platforms for the solution.
   

  

 Design and deploy solutions in cloud environments.
   

  

 Implement infrastructure as code (IaC) practices.
   

  

**Technical Implementation**
 Lead the design and planning of the chosen solution
   

  

 Work closely with technology/IT teams internal and external to ensure effective implementation, testing, UAT and end to end execution
   

  

 Perform design, debugging, and performance analysis on solutions, document and share best practice knowledge for new solutions.
   

  

 Define data models, schemas, and storage solutions. Ensure data quality, consistency, and availability.
   

  

 Design and implement integration patterns between systems.
   

  

 Ensure seamless data flow across different components.
   

  

 Monitor the progress of development and keep stakeholders informed.
   

  

**Security and Compliance**
 Assess security risks and design secure solutions.
   

  

 Ensure compliance with industry standards and regulations (e.g., GDPR, HIPAA)
   

  

 Implement security controls and encryption mechanisms.
   

  

 Conduct security reviews and vulnerability assessments.
   

  

 Conduct technology assessments to identify potential risks in the system.
   

  

 Monitor and ensure the required practices are in place to fix the observation
   

  

**Scalability and Performance**
 Optimize system performance and scalability.
   

  

 Conduct load/performance testing and capacity planning.
   

  

 Address bottlenecks and optimize resource utilization.
   

  

**DevOps, DevSecOps and Automation**
 Automate deployment, monitoring, and scaling processes
   

  

 Collaborate with DevOps/DevSecOps teams for infrastructure automation and Security automation
   

  

 Implement CI/CD pipelines for continuous delivery.
   

  

**Innovation and Continuous Improvement**
 Stay updated on industry trends and emerging technologies.
   

  

 Continuously research emerging technologies that may benefit the pharma sector.
   

  

 Propose innovative solutions to drive digital transformation.
   

  

 Lead the evaluation and piloting of new tools and technologies.
   

  

 Evaluate, Pilot and prototype new solutions.
   

  

**Stakeholder Collaboration, Communication and Reporting**
 Interface with various departments to understand their technology needs.
   

  

 Work closely with external partners, vendors, and technology providers.
   

  

 Lead cross\-functional teams to deliver technology solutions.
   

  

 Ensure the architecture meets both technical and business needs.
   

  

 Clearly communicate technical concepts and architectures to non\-technical stakeholders.
   

  

 Provide regular updates and deliver comprehensive reports to management.
   

  

**Project Management and Delivery**
 Oversee the development and delivery of projects from an architectural standpoint.
   

  

 Ensure projects are completed within scope, time, and budget constraints.
   

  

 Manage resources and timelines for project execution.
   

  

**Job Scope**
**Internal Interactions (within the organization)**
 Function Heads, business vertical leads/end users , procurement , SUN Infrastructure Teams (Network, Server, Database, Security), vendor payment, commercial, SAP support \& other as necessary
   

  

**External Interactions (outside the organization)**
 OEM, SI’s others partners/vendors/service providers in the space as applicable
   

  

**Geographical Scope**
 Global
   

  

**Financial Accountability (cost/revenue with exclusive authority)**
* Cost Management:
* Develop and implement cost\-effective cloud solutions and architectures.
* Monitor and optimize cloud expenditure, ensuring efficient use of cloud resources.
* Provide regular cost analysis and reporting to identify opportunities for cost savings.
* Budgeting and Forecasting:
* Assist in preparing and managing the cloud services budget.
* Forecast cloud\-related costs for upcoming projects and initiatives.
* Ensure alignment of cloud spending with overall IT and business budgets.
* Vendor and Contract Management:
* Manage relationships with cloud service providers.
* Negotiate contracts and pricing to achieve the best value for the organization.


 Ensure compliance with financial terms and conditions of cloud service agreements.
   

  

****Job Requirements****
**Educational Qualification**
 BE, BTech, MTech.
   

  

**Specific Certification**
 Mandatory Certifications
 **(at least 01 in each group)**
* Cloud Certification (one or more of the following):


* 
+ AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional
+ Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert
+ Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect
+ Security Certification (one or more of the following):


  

  

* 
+ Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP)
+ Certified Cloud Security Professional (CCSP)
+ DevOps Certification (one or more of the following):


  

  

* 
+ AWS Certified DevOps Engineer – Professional
+ Microsoft Certified: DevOps Engineer Expert
+ Google Cloud Professional DevOps Engineer


 Optional Certifications (any one of more of below will be a value add))
 

* 
+ Project Management Professional (PMP)
+ Certified ScrumMaster (CSM)


****Experience****
 15\+ years of experience in cloud architecture, with a proven track record of designing and implementing cloud solutions across various platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud).
   

  

* Skill (Functional \& Behavioural):


 Functional Skills
   

  

* 
+ Cloud Architecture and Design: Expertise in designing and implementing scalable, secure, and robust cloud solutions using platforms such as AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.
+ Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Proficiency with tools like Terraform, AWS CloudFormation, and Azure Resource Manager to automate cloud infrastructure.
+ Cloud Security and Compliance: Strong knowledge of cloud security principles, controls, and compliance standards (e.g., GDPR, HIPAA).
+ Performance Optimization: Skills in optimizing cloud resources for performance and cost\-efficiency, including system monitoring and tuning.
+ DevSecOps and Automation: Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and tools (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab CI) to automate deployment, monitoring, and scaling processes.
+ Networking: Understanding of cloud networking concepts such as VPC, subnets, VPN, and load balancing.
+ Database and Storage: Knowledge of cloud\-based databases and storage solutions, including data migration and management.
+ Cost Management: Ability to manage and optimize cloud costs using cost management tools and best practices.
+ Behavioural Skills


  

  

- 

* Analytical Thinking: Strong problem\-solving skills with the ability to analyse complex technical issues and make data\-driven decisions.
* Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills to explain technical concepts to non\-technical stakeholders.
* Collaboration and Teamwork: Proven ability to work effectively in cross\-functional teams and collaborate with various stakeholders.
* Adaptability: Quick learner who can adapt to new technologies and methodologies, and adjust to changing project requirements.
* Leadership: Ability to lead and mentor technical teams, with strong project management skills to drive initiatives to completion.
* Attention to Detail: High level of accuracy and commitment to maintaining high standards in technical implementations.
* 
* Customer Focus: Understanding of business requirements and dedication to providing excellent support and service to internal and external customers.


**Your Success Matters to Us**
 At Sun Pharma, your success and well\-being are our top priorities! We provide robust benefits and opportunities to foster personal and professional growth. Join us at Sun Pharma, where every day is an opportunity to grow, collaborate, and make a lasting impact. Let’s create a brighter future together!
   

  

**Disclaimer:** 
 The preceding job description has been designed to indicate the general nature and level of work performed by employees within this classification. It is not designed to contain or be interpreted as a comprehensive inventory of all duties, responsibilities, and qualifications required of employees as assigned to this job. Nothing herein shall preclude the employer from changing these duties from time to time and assigning comparable duties or other duties commensurate with the experience and background of the incumbent(s).

e9f14f40.title: Cloud Platform Engineer
e9f14f40.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Cloud Platform Engineer
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Designs, builds, tests, and deploys cloud application solutions that integrate cloud and non\-cloud infrastructure. Can deploy infrastructure and platform environments, creates a proof of architecture to test architecture viability, security and performance.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Microsoft Azure Integration Services
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 3 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Cloud Platform Engineer, a typical day involves designing and constructing cloud\-based application solutions that seamlessly connect both cloud and traditional infrastructure. The role includes testing and deploying these solutions to ensure they meet performance and security standards. Additionally, the engineer develops infrastructure and platform environments and creates architectural proofs to validate the feasibility and robustness of the proposed designs. Collaboration with various teams to align cloud strategies and troubleshoot deployment challenges is also a key part of the daily routine.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to perform independently and become an SME.
* Required active participation/contribution in team discussions.
* Contribute in providing solutions to work related problems.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure smooth integration of cloud services with existing systems.
* Monitor and optimize cloud infrastructure to maintain high availability and performance.
* Document architectural designs and deployment processes to support knowledge sharing.
* Assist junior team members in understanding cloud platform concepts and best practices.


 Professional \& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in Microsoft Azure Integration Services.
* Experience with cloud infrastructure deployment and management.
* Strong understanding of cloud security principles and best practices.
* Ability to design and implement scalable and reliable cloud architectures.
* Familiarity with automation tools and scripting for cloud environment management.
* Knowledge of performance testing and monitoring tools for cloud applications.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 3 years of experience in Microsoft Azure Integration Services.
* This position is based at our Kolkata office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.


 , 15 years full time education

4aa569c0.title: Solutions Architect, ISV
4aa569c0.description:
**Description**
 AWS Global Sales (AGS) drives adoption of the AWS Cloud worldwide, enabling customers of all sizes to innovate and expand in the cloud.
   

  

 Our team empowers every customer to grow by providing tailored service, unmatched technology, and consistent support. We dive deep to understand each customer's unique challenges, then craft innovative solutions that accelerate their success. This customer\-first approach is how we built the world's most adopted cloud.
   

  

 AWS is where innovation, risks, and ideas are celebrated. We are builders; we try new things, imagine big dreams and reuse whenever we can. It is still Day 1 for us, and we are looking for curious people to be part of our diverse teams of thinkers, problem solvers, and doers. Come join us and work with AWS technologies that enable our Independent Software Vendor (ISV) customers and partners to adopt cloud\-based solutions.
   

  

 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS?
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee\-led and company\-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.
   

  

 Mentorship \& Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 This role is within the ISV team in Amazon Web Services India (AWS India) and can be based out of Bangalore, Delhi, Mumbai, Pune and Hyderabad locations.
   

  

 As a Solutions Architect, you’ll help your customers plan their successful cloud journey leveraging emerging technologies like GenAI to achieve business outcomes. You’ll solve complex, technical challenges so your customers can focus on their business. This includes using your knowledge to craft scalable, flexible, and resilient cloud architectures. You’ll drive or take part in technical solutions discussions, diving deep into the details with customer teams.
   

  

 Building relationships to understand our customers and partners is key. As a trusted technical advisor, you’ll use your interpersonal skills to influence a variety of stakeholders from technical teams to executives. You’ll help ensure their short\-term technology decisions are aligned with their long\-term goals. Speeding up the adoption of our services will be part of your day to day.
   

  

 You’ll also act as thought leader in the wider community. This includes taking part in educating, sharing best practices, presenting at events, writing white papers, blogs, and running workshops. You won’t just be part of an industry movement; you’ll be leading it.
   

  

 As a customer obsessed advisor, you’ll also have the chance to shape the direction of our products and services. This is through gathering feedback from customers whilst collaborating with our engineering and service teams.
   

  

 To be successful in this role you need to be passionate about ISV and cloud architectures. You are a builder with genuine curiosity about how technology can support your customers’ business models and objectives.
   

  

 Want to find out what it’s like to be a Solution Architect at AWS? Watch this video (https://bit.ly/3keYcC9\).
   

  

 A day in the life
   

  

 The Solutions Architect team at AWS is responsible for helping customers successfully implement cloud technologies. In a typical week you will meet multiple customers, and you will collaborate with them on designing and operating well\-architected solutions. You will earn their trust and show them the art of the possible, educating them around the capabilities of AWS. Partnering with internal teams and experts, leveraging a deep knowledge of our tools and products, you’ll craft highly scalable, flexible, and resilient cloud architectures that address our customers’ business problems. As part of our team, you’ll have the opportunity to continuously learn and innovate daily.
   

  

**About The Team**
 ISV Solutions Architects work hand in hand with AWS customers to help drive AWS services adoption. They are at the crossroads of business and technology and engage with customers of different stages. Supporting the overall technical relationship between customers and AWS, they work to understand the customer's business needs and give prescriptive guidance on how to create business value with technology. Solutions Architects also have broader impact at scale, taking a supporting role in creating and presenting technical content and best practices.
   

  

 You will be part of a team that is responsible for driving adoption of AWS technologies while bringing differentiated value to customers. This is a team dedicated to ISV customers, an important and growing subset of customers for AWS India. ISV customers follow unique technology adoption patterns and growth trajectories that distinguish them from traditional businesses, so you will be employing engagement strategies and programs tailored to their business needs and technical preferences.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree
* Experience in design, implementation, or consulting in applications and infrastructures
* Experience in a similar role such as technical account manager, consultant, solutions architect, platform engineer, systems engineer, cloud architect, or service delivery manager
* Experience in specific technology domain areas like software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data and analytics
* 4\+ years of design, implementation, or consulting in applications and infrastructures experience
* Experience designing or architecting (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems
* Experience communicating clearly and concisely with leadership, stakeholders, and cross\-functional teams
* Can create proof of concepts, demos, and/or scripts from scratch or leveraging reusable components.
* Able to create technical content that is easily adopted and reusable by others.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Knowledge of AWS services
* Experience architecting, migrating, transforming or modernizing customer requirements to the cloud
* Experience architecting/operating solutions built on AWS, or experience implementing a cloud\-based technology solution
* Experience implementing cloud services including migrations and modernization projects or similar
* AWS certification, such as, AWS Solutions Architect, or a similar cloud certification, or Cloud Technology Certification
* Able to present to technical and business audiences (training, workshops, publications)
* 4 years’ experience as a Solution Architect or related role.


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- AWS India \- Maharashtra
   

  

 Job ID: A10459606

238841e5.title: Solution Architect
238841e5.description:
dunnhumby is the global leader in Customer Data Science, partnering with the world’s most ambitious retailers and brands to put the customer at the heart of every decision. We combine deep insight, advanced technology, and close collaboration to help our clients grow, innovate, and deliver measurable value for their customers.
   

  

 dunnhumby employs nearly 2,500 experts in offices throughout Europe, Asia, Africa, and the Americas working for transformative, iconic brands such as Tesco, Coca\-Cola, Nestlé, Unilever and Metro.
   

  

**Weʼre looking for a Solution Architect who expects more from their career.** 
 Itʼs a chance to extend and improve dunnhumbyʼs Architecture team. Itʼs an opportunity to work with a market leading business to explore new opportunities for us and influence global retailers.
   

  

 Joining our team, youʼll work with world class and passionate people to build the platform that will support the next generation of our propositions. You will lead the overall architecture across assigned product and platform areas. We are looking for architects that have experience and can contribute across our platform layers:
   

  

* A user experience layer that allows new user experiences and propositions to be quickly built on our growing corpus of science and data.
* A product layer that stitches our science and data into services that allow flexible propositions to be built.
* A data layer that processes and governs bulk, operational and event stream data, supporting a broad set of use cases, from bulk insight to real\-time media activation.
* A science layer that brings to life and makes efficient 30\+ years of dunnhumbyʼs research into customer behaviour and loyalty, which also extends to modern AI techniques for understanding customer behaviour and driving key product use cases.
* A PaaS layer that empowers teams and provides agility, while protecting the extensive data assets we hold and manage on behalf of our clients.


 We want people who can specialise, while knowing how it all comes together to build the “big picture” covering our broad technology eco\-system. You will work closely with the Product and Engineering teams and leadership to define and deliver the roadmap and cloud transformation.
   

  

**What we expect from you**
* Experience of collaborative design and delivery of software products and platforms including depth of knowledge across at least two of software, infrastructure, big data, event processing and distributed computing architecture.
* Familiarity with at least one of the major cloud providerʼs technology stacks – Azure, GCP or AWS.
* Leadership and early adopter of modern software\-centric infrastructure management, including CI/CD, continuous deployment, Infrastructure as Code, Policy as Code, Configuration as Code/Data.
* Track record of implementing architectural changes in Agile development methodologies.
* Experience identifying key business technology issues and providing analytical skills to understand and communicate design specifications that facilitate technical development, including the creation of both high\-level and detailed design documentation and impact estimation.
* Problem solving and troubleshooting skills and the ability to exercise mature judgement


**What you can expect from us**
 We won’t just meet your expectations. We’ll defy them. So you’ll enjoy the comprehensive rewards package you’d expect from a leading technology company. But also, a degree of personal flexibility you might not expect. Plus, thoughtful perks, like flexible working hours and your birthday off.
   

  

 You’ll also benefit from an investment in cutting\-edge technology that reflects our global ambition. But with a nimble, small\-business feel that gives you the freedom to play, experiment and learn.
   

  

 And we don’t just talk about diversity and inclusion. We live it every day – with thriving networks including dh Gender Equality Network, dh Proud, dh Family, dh One, dh Enabled and dh Thrive as the living proof. We want everyone to have the opportunity to shine and perform at your best throughout our recruitment process. Please let us know how we can make this process work best for you.
   

  

**Our approach to Flexible Working**
 At dunnhumby, we value and respect difference and are committed to building an inclusive culture by creating an environment where you can balance a successful career with your commitments and interests outside of work.
   

  

 We believe that you will do your best at work if you have a work / life balance. Some roles lend themselves to flexible options more than others, so if this is important to you please raise this with your recruiter, as we are open to discussing agile working opportunities during the hiring process.
   

  

 For further information about how we collect and use your personal information please see our Privacy Notice which can be found
 **(here)**

68e99f1a.title: IS Department Manager for Managed Services Category
68e99f1a.description:
At
 **ABB** 
 , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world.
   

  

**This position reports to:**
 IS Manager
   

  

 \_\_
   

  

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
 In this role, you will have the opportunity to lead/manage/supervise a function/organization/department/team in the development, and/or implementation and/or execution in their own area of responsibility. Each day, you will be accountable for the delivery of solutions, and enhancements, creating technology roadmaps that align organizational plans with emerging technology solutions. You will also showcase your expertise by ensuring efficient service capabilities.
   

  

 The work model for the role is: hybrid.
   

  

 This role is contributing to the Information Systems Function globally.
   

  

 You will be mainly accountable for:
   

  

* Services in scope, ensuring they are clearly defined, prioritized, funded, and governed, while overseeing end\-to\-end service performance through effective coordination with Service Owners, Global IS teams, partners, and suppliers against agreed scope, cost, quality, SLAs, and KPIs.
* Simplification and improvement of the customer experience by clearly communicating services in business terms, managing stakeholder relationships, and acting as an escalation point to ensure service issues are addressed through the appropriate Service Owners and delivery teams.
* Overseeing risk, change, and continuous improvement across services and processes, ensuring sustainable operations and value creation in collaboration with Service Owners and delivery partners.
* Owning and leading demand management for Managed Services IS Category, proactively qualifying, prioritizing, and aligning demand with Global IS, Business Areas, Procurement, Sourcing, and V\&A stakeholders to ensure services in scope meet business needs.
* Defining, owning, implementing, and continuously improving Vendor Management governance frameworks, processes, policies, standards, KPIs, and controls, ensuring performance transparency, compliance, audit readiness, and continuous improvement.
* Defining, maintaining, and communicating Managed Services IS Category strategy and midterm outlook, ensuring alignment with IS strategy, business priorities, and stakeholder expectations.
* Budget planning, forecasting, and financial control for Managed Services IS Category, including transparency of actuals, accruals, and resource allocation.
* Leading, coaching, and influencing teams and senior stakeholders, fostering collaboration, trust, and alignment to ensure successful execution of IS strategy and objectives.


**Qualifications For The Role**
* You are highly skilled in IT category management, managed services governance, and vendor management frameworks, with deep knowledge of the enterprise IT managed services and outsourcing market.
* You have 8\+ years of experience in IS/IT service management, managed services category management, or vendor management, ideally working as an IS Category Manager or Vendor Manager within a global organization.
* Highly adept in vendor performance management tools, ITSM frameworks, and contract governance platforms such as ServiceNow, or equivalent enterprise tools used to manage supplier performance and service delivery.
* You are passionate about stakeholder engagement and driving cross\-functional collaboration across senior business and IS leaders, with a proven ability to simplify complex topics and communicate services clearly in business terms.
* Proven experience in budget management, financial forecasting, and end\-to\-end vendor/contract lifecycle management within a global IS or IT procurement function.
* Degree in Information Technology, Business Administration, Computer Science, or a related field; ITIL certification or an equivalent service management qualification is highly desirable.
* You are at ease communicating in English; additional language skills are an advantage.


 Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences.
   

  

 Ready to make an impact?
   

  

 Apply today or visit
 **https://www.abb.com** 
 to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

3f8ee080.title: Technology Delivery Lead
3f8ee080.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Technology Delivery Lead
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Manages the delivery of large, complex technology projects using appropriate frameworks and collaborating with sponsors to manage scope and risk. Drives profitability and continued success by managing service quality and cost and leading delivery. Proactively support sales through innovative solutions and delivery excellence.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Oracle Argus
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 7\.5 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Technology Delivery Lead, a typical day involves overseeing the progress of substantial and intricate technology initiatives, ensuring that project objectives are met within defined parameters. This role requires close collaboration with project sponsors to effectively manage project scope and mitigate risks. The day is also dedicated to steering the delivery team towards maintaining high service quality and controlling costs, while fostering innovation to support business growth. Continuous engagement with various stakeholders ensures alignment and drives the successful execution of technology solutions that contribute to organizational goals.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to be an SME, collaborate and manage the team to perform.
* Responsible for team decisions.
* Engage with multiple teams and contribute on key decisions.
* Provide solutions to problems for their immediate team and across multiple teams.
* Lead the planning and execution of technology delivery activities to ensure timely and quality outcomes.
* Facilitate communication and coordination among cross\-functional teams to optimize project delivery.
* Mentor and support junior team members to enhance their skills and performance.


 Professional \& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in Oracle Argus.
* Strong knowledge of project management methodologies and frameworks relevant to technology delivery.
* Experience in risk management and mitigation strategies within complex project environments.
* Ability to analyze and resolve technical and operational challenges effectively.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills to drive collaboration and consensus.
* Capability to lead teams and manage resources efficiently to meet project goals.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 7\.5 years of experience in Oracle Argus.
* This position is based at our Mumbai office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.

635af799.title: Delivery Manager
635af799.description:
Job Title: Delivery Manager\- Cloud Migration \& Managed Services
 



 Key Skills : Cloud Migration , VMware Migration , OpenShift Virtualization
 



 Experience : 15\+years
 



 Location: Greater Noida
 



  





 We at Coforge are looking for Delivery Managers with following skill set
 



  




* 15\+ years total, with 10\+ years in IT infrastructure and delivery management roles.
* Own end to end delivery of the CUSTOMER'S program migrating VMware workloads to OpenShift Virtualization (KubeVirt) and AWS Outposts.
* Hands on experience of migration of workloads from VMware to platforms like OpenShift, Kubernetes,
* Preferably experience on AWS landing zone, migrations to AWS or AWS Outposts, deployment, and operations.
* Proven ownership of large migration programs, discovery of cutover stabilization.
* Customer facing delivery governance for large enterprise or telecom accounts.
* Lead migration strategy, technical execution, customer governance, and steady state operations for a large hybrid estate.
* Manage a large multidisciplinary team across virtualization, cloud, storage, network, and SRE (50\+).
* Work closely with customer tower leads, service managers, architects, and senior stakeholders.
* Hands\-on knowledge of VMware vSphere, ESXi, vCenter and workload assessment.
* Knowledge of OpenShift and OpenShift Virtualization (KubeVirt), migration tooling (MTV).
* Understanding core AWS (EC2, VPC, IAM, EBS, S3, Networking, Direct Connect).

ad70bf7f.title: Delivery Lead Manager
ad70bf7f.description:
**Skill required:** 
 Supply Chain \- New Product Introduction (NPI)
   

  

**Designation:** 
 Delivery Lead Manager
   

  

**Qualifications:** 
 Master of Business Administration
   

  

**Years of Experience:** 
 13 to 18 years
   

  

**About Accenture**
 Accenture is a global professional services company with leading capabilities in digital, cloud and security.Combining unmatched experience and specialized skills across more than 40 industries, we offer Strategy and Consulting, Technology and Operations services, and Accenture Song— all powered by the world’s largest network of Advanced Technology and Intelligent Operations centers. Our 784,000 people deliver on the promise of technology and human ingenuity every day, serving clients in more than 120 countries. We embrace the power of change to create value and shared success for our clients, people, shareholders, partners and communities.Visit us at www.accenture.com
   

  

**What would you do?** 
 Lead end\-to\-end delivery of New Product Introduction (NPI) projects, managing large teams and ensuring successful deployment across global, regional, and local markets. This role involves strategic decision\-making, stakeholder engagement, and driving operational excellence.
   

  

**What are we looking for?** 
 To Collaborates extensively with internal teams, senior leadership, and external partners. Adapts to rotational shifts and manages multiple priorities in a fast\-paced, time\-sensitive setting while maintaining quality and compliance standards. Growth Opportunities Provides a platform for leadership in global supply chain transformation and NPI governance. Offers exposure to enterprise\-level initiatives, strategic delivery programs, and innovation projects. Ideal for professionals aspiring to senior leadership roles in operations, program management, and supply chain strategy. Additional Information
   

  

* This role may require rotational shifts to meet global project needs.
* Opportunities exist to interact with global teams and contribute to impactful supply chain initiatives. Analysis of Key Components Role Complexity Leads and oversees delivery operations for New Product Introduction (NPI) programs, ensuring flawless execution of material master data setup and compliance across multiple projects. Makes strategic decisions that influence timelines, cost efficiency, and overall program success. Acts as the escalation point for complex operational challenges and drives resolution with minimal supervision. Skill Set Possesses deep expertise in ERP systems, supply chain processes, and PMO methodologies. Strong proficiency in data visualization and analytics to monitor NPI performance metrics. Demonstrates exceptional leadership, stakeholder management, and cross\-functional collaboration skills. Strategic planning, process optimization, and risk management experience are critical for accelerating product readiness and ensuring operational excellence. Work Environment Operates in a global, high\-pressure supply chain environment with direct impact on critical product launches. Roles and Responsibilities:
* In this role you are required to identify and assess complex problems for area(s) of responsibility
* Interaction is with senior management levels at a client and/or within Accenture, involving negotiating or influencing on significant matters
* Individual manages large teams and/or work efforts (if in an individual contributor role) at a client or within Accenture
* Oversee planning and execution of NPI projects across multiple geographies.
* Engage with senior stakeholders to influence decisions on critical matters.
* Manage large cross\-functional teams and ensure timely delivery within cost and quality targets.
* Provide accurate project costing and financial oversight during quotation and justification phases.
* Conduct stage reviews and present progress to leadership.
* Implement lessons learned and continuous improvement initiatives. Core Skills
* PMP or PRINCE2 certification.
* Experience in supply chain or product lifecycle management.
* Proficiency in SAP or similar ERP systems. Soft Skills
* Strong leadership and stakeholder management skills.
* Expertise in project management methodologies and tools.
* Ability to manage large\-scale, complex projects.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills to work with cross\-functional teams.
* High attention to detail and a proactive problem\-solving mindset.
* Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast\-paced FMCG environment., Master of Business Administration

87725254.title: Service Delivery Manager
87725254.description:
**Company:** 
 Citius Tech
   

  

**Website:** 
 Visit Website
   

  

**LinkedIn:** 
 Visit LinkedIn
   

  

**Business Type:** 
 Enterprise
   

  

**Company Type:** 
 Product
   

  

**Business Model:** 
 B2B
   

  

**Funding Stage:** 
 Private Equity
   

  

**Industry:** 
 Healthcare
   

  

**Salary Range:** 
 ₹ 35\-40 Lacs PA
   

  

**Job Description**
**Job Title:** 
 Service Delivery Manager – EDI Platform
   

  

**Location:** 
 Preferred Pune / Hyderabad
   

  

**Reports To:** 
 Delivery Manager
   

  

**Role Overview**
 Lead and coordinate three critical streams:
   

  

* EDI Migration Project – Transition from legacy EDI platform (TrustedLink) to IBM Sterling B2B Integrator under a tight deadline.
* L2/L3 Support Team – Manage ongoing support for the legacy EDI platform during migration and stabilization.
* Azure Modernization Project – Collaborate with cloud engineering teams to plan cutover, handover, and transition of EDI workloads to Azure.


 Additionally, drive process maturity by improving SOPs, governance frameworks, KPIs, and reporting standards across all streams.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Program Governance \& Planning
+ Develop integrated program plans covering migration, support, and Azure modernization.
+ Define milestones, dependencies, and risk mitigation strategies across all streams.

* Cutover \& Transition Management
+ Plan and execute cutover from legacy to Sterling and later to Azure.
+ Ensure smooth handover of systems and documentation to cloud operations teams.

* Process Improvement
+ Review and enhance existing SOPs for migration, support, and cloud transition.
+ Establish governance frameworks for decision\-making and escalation.
+ Define and implement KPIs for delivery performance, SLA adherence, and quality.
+ Standardize reporting templates and dashboards for leadership and client visibility.

* Team Leadership
+ Manage composite teams (employees \+ vendor resources) across development, QA, support, and cloud engineering.
+ Align resources and resolve conflicts across parallel projects.

* Stakeholder Communication
+ Provide consolidated status updates to senior leadership and client.
+ Prepare executive dashboards and transition readiness reports.

* Budget Oversight
+ Track program financials and performance against SOW.
+ Negotiate scope changes and manage invoicing approvals.

* Risk \& Issue Management
+ Maintain risk register for migration and cloud transition.
+ Implement contingency plans for cutover failures or delays.

* Compliance \& Security
+ Ensure HIPAA and data security compliance during migration and cloud onboarding.
+ Validate encryption and audit controls in Azure environment.


**Required Skills \& Qualifications**
* Experience:
+ 10\+ years in IT program/project management with multi\-stream delivery experience.
+ Proven success in EDI migration projects, cloud transition programs, and process improvement initiatives.

* Technical Knowledge:
+ EDI standards (X12, EDIFACT), IBM Sterling B2B Integrator, legacy platforms (TrustedLink).
+ Familiarity with Azure cloud services (IaaS, PaaS, networking, security).

* Skills:
+ Strong vendor management and multi\-team coordination.
+ Expertise in cutover planning, transition governance, and managed services.
+ Ability to design and implement SOPs, governance models, KPIs, and reporting frameworks.
+ Proficiency in project management tools (MS Project, JIRA, ServiceNow).

* Certifications:
+ PMP or equivalent preferred.
+ ITIL Foundation for support governance.
+ Azure Fundamentals (preferred).


**Preferred Attributes**
* Experience in US Healthcare EDI (HIPAA compliance).
* Ability to manage tight deadlines and high\-pressure environments.
* Strong communication and negotiation skills.


**Performance Metrics**
* On\-time delivery of migration and Azure transition milestones.
* SLA adherence for legacy platform support.
* Successful cutover with zero critical incidents.
* Improved SOP compliance and governance maturity.
* KPI\-driven reporting accuracy and timeliness.
