6b552d6a.title: CMS-Senior-Cloud Engineer
6b552d6a.description:
At EY, you’ll have the chance to build a career as unique as you are, with the global scale, support, inclusive culture and technology to become the best version of you. And we’re counting on your unique voice and perspective to help EY become even better, too. Join us and build an exceptional experience for yourself, and a better working world for all.
   

  

**CMS\- Cloud Security Posture Management Senior**
**Responsibilities:**
* Monitor Defender for Cloud alert queues and posture dashboards for high\-severity signals across Azure and AWS\-connected environments.
* Perform initial validation (false positive screening), basic enrichment (resource identifiers, subscription/account, region, environment tags), and severity assignment.
* Triage high\-impact recommendations and secure\-score changes; create remediation tickets mapped to client ownership (platform/IAM/app teams).
* Escalate confirmed incidents to L2 with a complete evidence bundle (alert metadata, impacted resources, timeline, user/service principal context).
* Maintain documentation: ticket updates, SOP/runbook adherence, and shift handover notes.


**Required:**
 Hands\-on experience triaging alerts in Microsoft security tools (Defender portal/Azure portal) and working in ticketing systems (ServiceNow/Jira).
   

  

* Core cloud fundamentals:
* Azure subscriptions/resource groups, RBAC concepts
* AWS accounts/regions, basic IAM concepts
* Understanding of CNAPP concepts: posture misconfiguration vs workload threat detection


**Preferred Requirements:**

 WNS (Holdings) Limited (NYSE: WNS), is a leading Business Process Management (BPM) company. We combine our deep industry knowledge with technology and analytics expertise to co\-create innovative, digital\-led transformational solutions with clients across 10 industries. We enable businesses in Travel, Insurance, Banking and Financial Services, Manufacturing, Retail and Consumer Packaged Goods, Shipping and Logistics, Healthcare, and Utilities to re\-imagine their digital future and transform their outcomes with operational excellence.We deliver an entire spectrum of BPM services in finance and accounting, procurement, customer interaction services and human resources leveraging collaborative models that are tailored to address the unique business challenges of each client. We co\-create and execute the future vision of 400\+ clients with the help of our 44,000\+ employees.
   

  

****Job Description****
* 10\+ Yrs of overall experience
* 6\+ yrs of relevant experience in cloud.
* Should have a good verbal and written communication.
* Expertise on Virtualization Hypervisors, Google, AWS, Azure cloud.
* Expertise on premises to cloud management.
* Maintaining and updating infrastructure design/build document sets
* Should have worked under ITIL Framework.
* Experience on multiple cloud and on premises technology, good hands\-on experience on Windows, Active Directory, networking, security, and troubleshooting
* Should have good working knowledge of Virtualization Hypervisors. VMware, Hyper\-V would be preferred ones.

* Should have good grasping power and willingness to learn and acquire knowledge about the technologies they might have not worked upon, however it called for.
* Should have worked in AWS and azure services such as \- VPC, EC2, S3, ELB, Firewall etc,

* Escalate calls to the next level as \& when required to the respective Backend teams and SMEs and follow up to its closure with a complete resolution.

 Must – AWS, AZURE and google cloud management and security, migration, access management, manage high availability, DR strategy, cost saving. Advantage – cost management, Audit management, documentation, and automation.

 BE, BSC, MSC, Graduate
   

  

****Qualifications****
 Bachelor from any stream

78024a7d.title: Senior cloud operations engineer
78024a7d.description:
**Job Description**
 At Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI), we build the future of the cloud for Enterprises as a diverse team of fellow creators and inventors. We act with the speed and attitude of a start\-up, with the scale and customer\-focus of the leading enterprise software company in the world. Compute is one of the core organisations within OCI. We are responsible for providing Compute power i.e. VMs and BMs. Cloud pretty much cannot exists without our org. The Compute org comprises of a family of critical foundational infrastructure services that drive OCI's hardware lifecycle activities
   

  

 Work with product team on the shared full stack ownership of a collection of services and/or technology areas. Understand the end\-to\-end configuration, technical dependencies, and overall behavioural characteristics of production services. Responsible for the mitigating critical customer incidents, or deployments or testing required to improve security, performance, availability, and scalability of service. Authority for end\-to\-end performance and operability. Partner with development teams in meeting SLA to unblock customers. Articulate technical characteristics of services and technology areas and guide Development Teams to engineer and add premier capabilities to the Oracle Cloud service portfolio. Understand and communicate the scale, capacity, security, performance attributes, and requirements of the service and technology stack. Demonstrate clear understanding of automation and orchestration principles. Act as ultimate escalation point for complex or critical issues that have not yet been documented as Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs). Utilise a deep understanding of service topology and their dependencies required to troubleshoot issues and define mitigations. Understand and explain the effect of product architecture decisions on distributed systems. Professional curiosity and a desire to a develop deep understanding of services and technologies.
   

  

 Responsible for the operation of production environments, including systems and databases, supporting critical business operations. Will perform administration and analysis for multiple production environments and recommend new and novel solutions to improve availability, performance, and supportability. This is an opportunity to bring a combination of deep technical knowledge with administration/analysis knowledge of Oracle's Cloud Infrastructure to provide escalation support to a wide range of complex production environment problems related to immense growth, scaling, leveraging the cloud, extremely high performance, and high availability requirements.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Install, monitor, maintain, support, and optimize all production server hardware and software. Provide escalated technical support for complex technical issues which may include leading problem management cases and providing management status. Coordinate escalated support cases and lead appropriate internal technical resources and/or third party vendors to resolution and coordinate a storage infrastructure of Oracle system and database appliances. Responsible for Oracle production environments; assist with server operating system and application upgrades, bug fixes, and patching; and work on standardization projects for both hardware and software under the Oracle technology stack while providing consistent system uptime as expected in a Cloud environment. Provide on\-call support, on a rotating basis. Responsibilities include but not limited to
   

  

 Incident Management
   

  

 Support and troubleshooting of Staging/Production environments
   

  

 Response and Resolve incidents as per SLA's
   

  

 Organise, Anticipate, Plan and work as On\-Call in shifts for multiple services (Open to work in shifts \& shows flexibility)
   

  

 Maintain Service High Availability
   

  

 Release Management
   

  

 Test and Deploy solutions and automate to replace manual processes
   

  

 Build and maintain deployment tools/procedures
   

  

 Zero downtime deployments and a high availability mindset
   

  

 Define and build innovative solution methodologies and assets around infrastructure, cloud migration and deployment operations at scale.
   

  

 Work with service teams to resolve complex issues that require troubleshooting and knowledge of code.
   

  

 Keep documentation up to date and resolving similar tickets with lower turnaround time and within SLA
   

  

 Ensure production security posture
   

  

 Ensure monitoring is robust and effective
   

  

 Change Management
   

  

 Perform Root Cause Analysis
   

  

 Required Skills:
   

  

 5\+ years overall experience in IT industry
   

  

**Minimum 4 Years Of Experience As a Sys Admin/Support**
 Strong systems architecture skills
   

  

 Strong Linux administration (Understanding of different Hardware family)
   

  

 Virtualisation Technologies
   

  

 Scripting Language (Python/Bash/Shell etc, basic understanding of Java / Go will be good to have)
   

  

 Understanding of Networking, Cloud Computing, Load Balancers
   

  

 Hands on experience at Monitoring/Instrumentation tools (Prometheus/Grafana, new relic, elastic or equivalent).
   

  

 Experience with maintaining high scale deployments, managing high throughput and IO intensive services.
   

  

 Strong knowledge of system configuration tools such as Chef, Terraform, GIT, Jenkins/Hudson, Artifactory
   

  

 Continuous Integration development/deployment, e.g. Docker, Kubernetes
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Career Level \- IC3
   

  

**About Us**
 Only Oracle brings together the data, infrastructure, applications, and expertise to power everything from industry innovations to life\-saving care. And with AI embedded across our products and services, we help customers turn that promise into a better future for all. Discover your potential at a company leading the way in AI and cloud solutions that impact billions of lives.
   

  

 True innovation starts when everyone is empowered to contribute. That’s why we’re committed to growing a workforce that promotes opportunities for all with competitive benefits that support our people with flexible medical, life insurance, and retirement options. We also encourage employees to give back to their communities through our volunteer programs.
   

  

 We’re committed to including people with disabilities at all stages of the employment process. If you require accessibility assistance or accommodation for a disability at any point, let us know by emailing accommodation\-request\_mb@oracle.com or by calling 1\-888\-404\-2494 in the United States.
   

  

 Oracle is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability and protected veterans’ status, or any other characteristic protected by law. Oracle will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records pursuant to applicable law.

68f7cd7b.title: CMS-Manager-Cloud Engineer
68f7cd7b.description:
At EY, you’ll have the chance to build a career as unique as you are, with the global scale, support, inclusive culture and technology to become the best version of you. And we’re counting on your unique voice and perspective to help EY become even better, too. Join us and build an exceptional experience for yourself, and a better working world for all.
   

  

**CMS\- Cloud Security \_Manager**
**Responsibilities:**
* Perform end\-to\-end investigations for Defender for Cloud alerts: scoping affected resources, identifying likely attack vectors, and recommending containment steps.
* Correlate workload detections with posture context to identify systemic misconfigurations driving risk.
* Troubleshoot AWS connector data gaps (permissions, connector health, plan prerequisites) and document resolution steps.
* Understand the AWS connector auth model (federated trust and short\-lived credentials) to support secure onboarding and triage.
* Drive remediation execution with client teams: validate fixes, confirm risk reduction, manage exceptions (time\-bound), and tune operational noise.
* Identify recurring issues and propose new detections/playbooks, improved routing, and better enrichment.


**Required:**
**Strong Azure and AWS operational fluency:**
* Azure: RBAC, networking, key services (VMs, AKS, storage, databases)
* AWS: IAM, EC2/EKS basics, security logging concepts, CloudFormation familiarity (for onboarding patterns)
* Ability to explain and operate posture management: secure score, recommendations, compliance posture, and remediation workflow.
* Incident handling discipline: containment/eradication guidance, stakeholder communications, and post\-incident documentation.
* Hands\-on experience with CSPM tools (Defender/Wiz/AWS Security Hub etc).


**Preferred Requirements:**
* Minimum 8\+ years of Cloud technology, specifically in Security engineering, or Security Architecture roles
* Experience designing/tuning SOC playbooks for cloud detection and posture workflows.
* Familiarity with automation (Logic Apps/SOAR patterns) and integrating CNAPP events into SIEM/SOAR pipelines.
* SC\-200 \+ AZ\-500 (preferred), AWS Security Specialty, GIAC Cloud (GCLD) or similar.


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY exists to build a better working world, helping to create long\-term value for clients, people and society and build trust in the capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data and technology, diverse EY teams in over 150 countries provide trust through assurance and help clients grow, transform and operate.
   

  

 Working across assurance, consulting, law, strategy, tax and transactions, EY teams ask better questions to find new answers for the complex issues facing our world today.

4b7df986.title: Senior Manager- AI Strategy & Solutions
4b7df986.description:
**About Our Company**


Ameriprise India LLP has been providing client based financial solutions to help clients plan and achieve their financial objectives for 20 years. We are part of Ameriprise Financial Inc., a US financial planning company headquartered in Minneapolis with a global presence and diversified financial services leader with more than $1\.5 trillion in assets under management, administration and advisement as of year\-end 2024\. The firm’s focus areas include Asset Management and Advice, Retirement Planning and Insurance Protection.


Be part of an inclusive, collaborative culture that rewards you for your contributions, and work with other talented individuals who share your passion for doing great work. You’ll also have plenty of opportunities to make your mark at the office and a difference in your community. So, if you're talented, driven and want to work for a strong, ethical company that cares, take the next step and create a career at Ameriprise India LLP.

**Job Description**


Integral role in supporting AIM’s data analysis, system control, and database needs. Provide strategic ideas and thought leadership. Has/can apply solid financial industry data systems knowledge to support decision and strategy problems in key business areas. Demonstrates strong technical/problem solving skills. Manages multiple projects collaboratively. Works with HR in recruitment and performance appraisal process. Mentor the team members and layout their growth path.**Role Summary**


Leads the execution and operationalization of enterprise AI initiatives, ensuring AI strategy is translated into scalable, business\-impacting solutions. Partners across business and technology teams to drive delivery, adoption, and measurable outcomes, while maintaining strong alignment to enterprise priorities and governance. Acts as a senior program leader with end\-to\-end accountability for execution, value realization, and executive alignment across priority AI initiatives

**Key Responsibilities**

**1\) Enterprise AI Execution \& Operationalization:** Translate enterprise AI strategy into actionable roadmaps, delivery plans, and implementation milestones**.** Drive end\-to\-end execution of priority AI initiatives across multiple business areas. Ensure AI solutions move from concept to pilot to scaled deployment, and ultimately to sustained adoption. Own delivery outcomes across initiatives, including scope, timelines, and measurable business impact.

**2\) Program \& Portfolio Delivery:** Lead a portfolio of AI use cases and programs across the enterprise. Establish and manage delivery discipline (prioritization, dependencies, timelines, risk mitigation). Ensure outcomes are tied to clear business value (e.g., productivity, growth, cost, risk). Drive integrated program plans, track KPIs and milestones, and proactively manage risks, dependencies, and execution challenges, escalating as needed.

**3\) Cross\-Enterprise Partnership** Partner with Business leaders across functions, Technology, Data \& Analytics team, and Risk, Legal, and Governance teams.Align stakeholders around what gets delivered and how, while shaping execution priorities and ensuring alignment to enterprise AI strategy. Engage senior leaders, including ELT stakeholders, to drive alignment, inform decision\-making, and ensure transparency on progress, risks, and outcomes. Act as a clear point of accountability for progress and results.

**4\) Technical \& Solution Leadership:** Provide informed direction on AI/ML and GenAI solutions to ensure fit\-for\-purpose design.Bridge strategy and execution by helping teams define use cases, select appropriate approaches/models, and ensure scalability and integration. Stay current on emerging AI capabilities and translate into practical application.

**5\) Adoption, Change \& Value Realization:** Drive business adoption of AI solutions, not just delivery. Define metrics and success measures and track realization of expected outcomes. Partner with HR / change / comms teams to support workflow integration and behavior change. Ensure value realization is clearly defined, tracked, and communicated, with a focus on measurable outcomes.

**6\) Governance \& Responsible AI:** Ensure adherence to enterprise AI governance, risk, and compliance frameworks. Operationalize responsible AI practices (e.g., transparency, fairness, controls). Support approval processes and risk assessments for AI deployments. Ensure alignment to the enterprise AI operating model, embedding best practices across data, technology, risk, talent, and change management.

**7\) Matrix Team Leadership:** Lead through influence and build strong execution capability and accountability across a broad cross\-functional team. Create consistency in delivery methodologies and standards. Foster a high\-performance, results\-oriented environment; drive clarity, accountability, and continuous improvement across teams.

**Qualifications**

**Required**

* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent
* 8–10\+ years in AI, data/analytics, digital, or large\-scale transformation (preferably experience in strategy consulting)
* Demonstrated success in operating with an enterprise mindset and delivering complex, cross\-functional initiatives
* Strong understanding of: AI/ML and GenAI applications, data platforms and enterprise technology environments
* Strong communication skills, including the ability to communicate clearly and influence across technical and business stakeholders to drive alignment and decisions
* Ability to build strong relationships and lead effectively in a matrixed environment without direct authority. Experience aligning stakeholders on priorities, trade\-offs, and timelines
* Experience driving execution across multiple stakeholder groups
* Ability to translate strategy into clear, actionable plans and delivered outcomes
* Experience driving adoption and change, ensuring solutions are embedded and delivering business value
* Proven ability to exercise sound judgment, make timely decisions, and navigate ambiguity confidently
* Experience leading large\-scale programs or transformation initiatives with clear accountability for outcomes
* Strong problem\-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to use data to inform decisions and optimize execution

**Preferred**

* Advanced degree (e.g., MBA, Data Science or related field)
* Experience leading enterprise programs
* Financial services or regulated industry experience
* Background balancing technical depth with program leadership
* Familiarity with AI governance and responsible AI frameworks
* Experience in consulting, strategy, or similar roles supporting enterprise transformation initiatives

**In\-Office Collaboration**


We are a client\-centric, relationship\-based business. Working together, in\-person, is foundational to how we achieve results. By fostering a culture of face\-to\-face collaboration, idea sharing, productivity and personal connection, we deliver for our stakeholders — clients, advisors, employees and shareholders. Our employees work in the office at least three (3\) days per week, with flexibility to work from home two (2\) days per week. Some roles may require additional in\-office time or different in\-office expectations, and specific requirements will be discussed during the hiring process.

**Full\-Time/Part\-Time**


Full time**Timings**


(2:00p\-10:30p)**India Business Unit**


AWMPO AWMP\&S President's Office**Job Family Group**


Data*Ameriprise India LLP is an equal opportunity employer. We consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, genetic information, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, military status, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy, family status or any other basis prohibited by law.*

*We are committed to fostering an inclusive and accessible recruitment process for individuals with disabilities. If you require a reasonable accommodation to participate in the application or interview process, speak to your recruiter to discuss how we can support you.*

6813cc11.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Delivery Lead
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Lead end\-to\-end delivery, or a defined component of a contract to meet operational, contractual, and financial commitments. Ensure service quality and efficiency. Manage delivery outcomes and identify opportunities for follow\-on work through up\-selling or cross\-selling.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Program Project Management
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 15 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Delivery Lead, a typical day involves overseeing the complete delivery process or managing a specific segment of a contract to ensure all operational, contractual, and financial obligations are fulfilled. This role requires maintaining high standards of service quality and operational efficiency while monitoring delivery outcomes. The Delivery Lead actively seeks opportunities to expand business through up\-selling or cross\-selling, collaborating with various stakeholders to drive successful project completion and client satisfaction.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to be a SME with deep knowledge and experience.
* Should have Influencing and Advisory skills.
* Responsible for team decisions.
* Engage with multiple teams and contribute on key decisions.
* Expected to provide solutions to problems that apply across multiple teams.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance delivery processes and client satisfaction.
* Mentor and support team members to foster professional growth and effective collaboration.


 Professional \& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in Program Project Management.
* Strong skills in planning, organizing, and managing resources to bring about the successful completion of specific project goals and objectives.
* Ability to coordinate cross\-functional teams and manage stakeholder expectations effectively.
* Experience in risk management and mitigation strategies to ensure project continuity.
* Excellent communication and negotiation skills to facilitate collaboration and resolve conflicts.
* Capability to analyze project performance metrics and implement corrective actions as needed.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 15 years of experience in Program Project Management.
* This position is based at our Hyderabad office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.


 , 15 years full time education

 Lead end\-to\-end delivery of New Product Introduction (NPI) projects, managing large teams and ensuring successful deployment across global, regional, and local markets. This role involves strategic decision\-making, stakeholder engagement, and driving operational excellence.

 To Collaborates extensively with internal teams, senior leadership, and external partners. Work Environment Operates in a global, high\-pressure supply chain environment with direct impact on critical product launches. Roles and Responsibilities:

 Delivery Lead Manager

 Any Graduation

 13 to 18 years
   

  

**About Accenture**
 Accenture is a global professional services company with leading capabilities in digital, cloud and security.Combining unmatched experience and specialized skills across more than 40 industries, we offer Strategy and Consulting, Technology and Operations services, and Accenture Song— all powered by the world’s largest network of Advanced Technology and Intelligent Operations centers. We embrace the power of change to create value and shared success for our clients, people, shareholders, partners and communities.Visit us at www.accenture.com
   

  

**What would you do?** 
 Lead the end\-to\-end operational delivery of Marketing Operations services across CRM, Creative, Media Activation, and Media Operations teams. Manage multiple service streams to ensure delivery quality, operational excellence, stakeholder satisfaction, and adherence to agreed service levels. Act as the primary delivery owner for day\-to\-day operations, ensuring work is prioritized, resourced, and delivered within agreed timelines and quality standards. Drive collaboration across service lines to ensure seamless campaign execution and integrated marketing delivery. Lead team managers, team leads, and individual contributors across multiple functional areas while fostering a high\-performance, client\-centric culture. Support the Delivery Lead in achieving account objectives, operational targets, client satisfaction goals, and continuous improvement initiatives. Drive operational governance, workforce management, quality compliance, performance reporting, and risk mitigation across all service streams. Identify opportunities to enhance productivity, simplify processes, improve quality, and increase operational efficiency through automation and best practices
   

  

**What are we looking for?** 
 Bachelor s Degree plus Master’s Degree in Business Management. 12\- 15 years of experience in Marketing Operations, Campaign Operations, Agency Operations, Shared Services, or Delivery Management. Proven experience managing large cross\-functional teams and operational delivery environments. Experience working across multiple service streams such as CRM, Creative Production, Media Activation, and Media Operations. Strong stakeholder management and client\-facing experience. Experience managing operational KPIs, SLAs, governance reviews, and delivery reporting. Ability to manage multiple priorities while maintaining high standards of quality and operational performance. Demonstrated leadership experience in building, managing, and developing high\-performing teams. Willing to work primarily across Australia/APAC shift timings and flexible to work across different shifts if required. Must Have Skills: Delivery Management. Team Leadership and People Management. Stakeholder Management. Project and Program Management. Operational Governance and Service Delivery Management. Resource Planning and Capacity Management. Risk and Issue Management. Client Relationship Management. Performance Management and Reporting. Process Improvement and Operational Excellence. Strong understanding of Marketing Operations delivery including: \-CRM Operations \-Creative Services \-Media Activation \-Media Operations Strong communication, presentation, and leadership skills. Excellent analytical and problem\-solving capabilities. Ability to manage multiple teams, priorities, and deadlines in a fast\-paced environment. Good to Have Skills: Knowledge of CRM and Marketing Automation platforms such as SFMC, Braze, Adobe Experience Manager, Adobe Campaign, or similar tools. Understanding of campaign operations, customer journeys, audience management, and marketing workflows. Experience with project management and workflow tools such as JIRA, Workfront, or ServiceNow. PMP, Agile, Scrum, Prince2, Lean Six Sigma, or equivalent certifications. Exposure to marketing performance analytics and operational reporting frameworks. Experience managing distributed and global delivery teams Support business continuity planning, workforce management, and operational readiness activities. Drive a culture of operational excellence, accountability, innovation, and continuous improvement.
   

  

**Roles and Responsibilities:** 
 Delivery \& Operations Management: Own day\-to\-day delivery across CRM, Creative, Media Activation, and Media Operations service streams. Ensure deliverables are completed within agreed timelines, quality standards, and operational SLAs. Manage workload distribution, prioritization, capacity planning, and resource allocation across teams. Monitor delivery performance and proactively address risks, bottlenecks, dependencies, and escalations. Drive execution discipline and accountability across all teams. Team Leadership \& People Management: Lead team leads and functional specialists across service streams. Support hiring, onboarding, capability development, mentoring, coaching, and succession planning activities. Drive performance management processes and build a culture of continuous improvement and accountability. Foster collaboration and knowledge sharing across teams. Stakeholder \& Client Management: Act as the primary operational contact for delivery\-related discussions and escalations. Build strong relationships with client stakeholders and internal leadership teams. Provide regular updates on delivery performance, resource utilization, quality metrics, risks, and mitigation plans. Manage stakeholder expectations and ensure alignment on priorities and delivery commitments. Governance \& Quality Management: Establish and maintain governance processes, operational controls, and quality standards. Ensure adherence to SOPs, DTPs, compliance requirements, and client\-specific processes. Track and report operational KPIs, SLAs, quality scores, productivity measures, and delivery performance metrics. Conduct regular operational reviews and identify improvement opportunities. Transformation \& Continuous Improvement: Identify opportunities for automation, process optimization, and operational transformation. Support implementation of new tools, technologies, and delivery methodologies. Drive standardization of processes and best practices across service streams. Partner with the Delivery Lead on strategic initiatives and account growth opportunities. Work Orchestration \& Operational Excellence: Maintain visibility of delivery performance through dashboards, reporting frameworks, and governance forums. Ensure accurate tracking of campaign volumes, workloads, resource utilization, quality scores, and operational metrics. Monitor service delivery health and drive corrective actions where required. Maintain risk registers, issue logs, action trackers, and escalation mechanisms. Ensure compliance with governance standards, privacy requirements, and contractual obligations., Any Graduation

* Global Design Provide end to end process expertise input to the process team’s global design preparation Drive and compile leading practices, and process design considerations incorporating build to operate efficiency design principles Provide input into the technology enablement (Workday) and assist in identifying automation opportunities and address process administration gaps Provide input, where needed on service delivery components needed for policy harmonization Participate in global design authority discussions and provide input to any service delivery components Work with the PMEs to document process narratives and localization requirements needed for SOP creation Localization Compile localization practices to help with localization preparation Participate in the localization sessions and provide leading practice input in administering local processes Testing Provide input and compile end to end process scenarios Participate in testing end to end processes in order to get familiarization of various system and process scenarios for SOP creation Standard Operating Procedures Build Lead the SOP build for each process area Manage the Process Matter Experts in building out SOP Work with their client counterparts to review and validate completeness of SOP content Training and Service Rehearsals Lead the training and service rehearsal activities for their process areas Train BPO process SMEs Help the transition management teams to plan, coordinate and monitor successful execution of training and SRT Monitor training and service rehearsal results and progress and help the transition team resolve issues and gaps, Any Graduation

b70dab89.title: Delivery Lead Senior Manager
b70dab89.description:
**Skill required:** 
 Supply Chain \- New Product Introduction (NPI)
   

  

**Designation:** 
 Delivery Lead Senior Manager
   

  

**Qualifications:** 
 Any Graduation
   

  

**Years of Experience:** 
 16 to 25 years
   

  

**About Accenture**
 Accenture is a global professional services company with leading capabilities in digital, cloud and security.Combining unmatched experience and specialized skills across more than 40 industries, we offer Strategy and Consulting, Technology and Operations services, and Accenture Song— all powered by the world’s largest network of Advanced Technology and Intelligent Operations centers. Our 784,000 people deliver on the promise of technology and human ingenuity every day, serving clients in more than 120 countries. We embrace the power of change to create value and shared success for our clients, people, shareholders, partners and communities.Visit us at www.accenture.com
   

  

**What would you do?** 
 Enterprise Supply Chain Leader responsible for defining and executing the strategic roadmap for supply\-chain\-led New Product Introduction (NPI) delivery across a global portfolio of programs, markets, and business units. Accountable for portfolio governance, operational excellence, organizational capability building, and long\-term value realization while serving as a trusted advisor to executive leadership. Leads large\-scale cross\-functional teams to ensure supply readiness, deployment excellence, risk mitigation, and business continuity while driving transformational initiatives through digitalization, automation, advanced planning technologies, and data\-driven decision making. Shapes future operating models, strengthens enterprise\-wide governance frameworks, and delivers measurable business outcomes aligned to growth, customer service, cost, quality, compliance, and working capital objectives. Owns strategic client relationships and is accountable for expanding business impact through continuous innovation, operational efficiency, talent development, and sustainable value creation.
   

  

**What are we looking for?** 
 Experience Required
   

  

* 18–22\+ years of progressive Supply Chain, Operations, Program Management, and Transformation leadership experience with demonstrated expertise in leading global supply\-chain\-led NPI portfolios, enterprise\-scale transformations, complex multi\-market deployments and commercialization. Education
* Bachelor s Degree (B.Com/B.Sc/BBA/BE/B.Tech); MBA / master’s in supply chain, Operations, or Business Management preferred Tools \& Systems
* Power BI, Tableau, MS Project, Planisware, AI\-enabled planning platforms, Advanced Analytics solutions
* Travel Requirement As per business requirement Industry Experience FMCG, FMCD, Manufacturing, Life Sciences, Consumer Goods, Industrial, Regulatory, or other complex global supply chain environments Financial \& Business Value Management
* Drive operational and financial performance improvements through strategic initiatives focused on productivity, cost optimization, service excellence, and risk reduction.
* Accountable for achieving measurable business impact and demonstrating value realization aligned with client and organizational objectives. Talent \& Organization Leadership
* Lead, mentor, and develop a high\-performing leadership team of managers and delivery leaders while creating clear succession and capability development plans.
* Build future\-ready organizational capabilities aligned with evolving supply chain skill requirements, digital transformation agendas, and business growth objectives.
* Drive strategic workforce planning, talent acquisition, retention, diversity initiatives, and leadership development programs.
* Foster a culture of accountability, collaboration, continuous improvement, and employee engagement through the Lean\-Do\-Teach philosophy. Governance, Risk \& Compliance
* Ensure enterprise\-wide adherence to governance frameworks, operational controls, compliance requirements, quality standards, and master data integrity. Roles and Responsibilities:
* Strategic Leadership \& Portfolio Governance
* Own and lead the end\-to\-end Supply Chain NPI portfolio strategy across multiple regions, business units, and product categories, ensuring alignment with enterprise growth objectives and long\-term business priorities.
* Drive executive governance and decision\-making forums by providing strategic recommendations, scenario\-based insights, and risk mitigation plans to senior leadership and client executives.
* Establish portfolio prioritization frameworks and resource allocation strategies to maximize business value, execution effectiveness, and organizational agility.
* Act as the ultimate escalation point for complex supply chain, operational, and deployment risks, ensuring timely resolution and mitigation. Executive Stakeholder Management
* Build and maintain strong executive\-level relationships across Supply Chain, Manufacturing, Procurement, Commercial, Quality, Regulatory, Finance, and Technology organizations.
* Serve as a trusted advisor to senior client leadership by translating business objectives into actionable supply chain strategies and measurable outcomes.
* Influence and drive alignment across diverse stakeholder groups while managing competing priorities in a dynamic global environment. Operational Excellence \& Delivery Leadership
* Provide leadership oversight to multiple delivery managers and large operational teams, ensuring consistent execution excellence across the NPI portfolio.
* Ensure delivery of committed business outcomes against defined KPIs, SLAs, and financial targets, including OTIF, launch readiness, working capital, inventory optimization, cost\-to\-serve, quality, compliance, and service performance.
* Drive enterprise\-wide adoption of continuous improvement initiatives using Lean, Six Sigma, and operational excellence principles. Transformation, Innovation \& Digital Enablement
* Define and lead the strategic roadmap for supply chain transformation, leveraging advanced planning systems, AI/ML\-enabled analytics, automation, and digital capabilities.
* Identify and implement innovative solutions that improve planning accuracy, operational efficiency, visibility, and decision\-making effectiveness.
* Lead future\-state operating model design initiatives to enhance organizational resilience, scalability, and competitive advantage.
* Foster a culture of innovation and continuous learning by encouraging experimentation and adoption of emerging supply chain technologies., Any Graduation

543b31b2.title: Sr Manager, Business Solutions
543b31b2.description:
JLL supports the Whole You, personally and professionally.
  
  

Our people at JLL are shaping the future of real estate for a better world by combining world class services, advisory and technology to our clients. We are committed to hiring the best, most talented people in our industry; and we support them through professional growth, flexibility, and personalized benefits to manage life in and outside of work. Whether you’ve got deep experience in commercial real estate, skilled trades, and technology, or you’re looking to apply your relevant experience to a new industry, we empower you to shape a brighter way forward so you can thrive professionally and personally.
  
  

**Location:** Bengaluru, India  Function: Business Development \& Sales  Business: Property Management Services (All Real Estate Asset Classes)
  
Role Purpose
  
Lead business growth for Property Management services by acquiring new clients, expanding existing relationships, and driving revenue across Commercial, Residential, Retail, Industrial \& Logistics, Healthcare, Hospitality, and Mixed\-Use assets. The role will focus on strategic sales, client engagement, solution development, and market expansion.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
Drive new business acquisition and achieve annual revenue targets.
  
Develop and manage a robust pipeline of opportunities across target markets.
  
Build relationships with developers, occupiers, investors, REITs, corporates, and institutional owners.
  
Lead client presentations, commercial discussions, proposals, and contract negotiations.
  
Collaborate with operational teams to create compelling service solutions and value propositions.
  
Identify cross\-selling opportunities across integrated real estate service offerings.
  
Track market trends, competitor activities, and emerging business opportunities.
  
Maintain accurate sales forecasts and pipeline reporting.
  
Represent the organisation at industry events and client engagements.
  
Candidate Profile
  
10–15 years of experience in Business Development, Sales, or Account Management within Real Estate, Property Management, Facilities Management, Workplace Services, or B2B Services.
  
Strong network within the real estate ecosystem.
  
Proven track record of winning and managing large, complex service contracts.
  
Excellent stakeholder management, negotiation, and presentation skills.
  
Commercially astute with a consultative, solution\-selling approach.
  
Key Competencies
  
New Business Development
  
Strategic Sales \& Solution Selling
  
Client Relationship Management
  
Commercial Negotiation
  
Market Development
  
Account Growth \& Retention
  
Revenue Management
  
Executive Stakeholder Engagement
  
Success Measures
  
New business revenue and profitability achieved
  
Annual contract value (ACV) won
  
Pipeline growth and conversion rates
  
Strategic client acquisition and retention
  
Cross\-sell and upsell performance
  
Achievement of sales targets and market expansion goals
  
If this job description resonates with you, we encourage you to apply even if you don’t meet all of the requirements below. We’re interested in getting to know you and what you bring to the table!
  
  

Personalized benefits that support personal well\-being and growth:
  
  

JLL recognizes the impact that the workplace can have on your wellness, so we offer a supportive culture and comprehensive benefits package that prioritizes mental, physical and emotional health.
  
  

About JLL –
  
  

We’re JLL—a leading professional services and investment management firm specializing in real estate. We have operations in over 80 countries and a workforce of over 102,000 individuals around the world who help real estate owners, occupiers and investors achieve their business ambitions. As a global Fortune 500 company, we also have an inherent responsibility to drive sustainability and corporate social responsibility. That’s why we’re committed to our purpose to shape the future of real estate for a better world. We’re using the most advanced technology to create rewarding opportunities, amazing spaces and sustainable real estate solutions for our clients, our people, and our communities.
  
  

Our core values of teamwork, ethics and excellence are also fundamental to everything we do and we’re honored to be recognized with awards for our success by organizations both globally and locally.
  
  

Creating a diverse and inclusive culture where we all feel welcomed, valued and empowered to achieve our full potential is important to who we are today and where we’re headed in the future. And we know that unique backgrounds, experiences and perspectives help us think bigger, spark innovation and succeed together.

11d87353.title: Technical Program Manager
11d87353.description:
**Overview**
 Microsoft is a company where passionate innovators come to collaborate, envision what can be and take their careers further. This is a world of more possibilities, more innovation, more openness, and the sky is the limit thinking in a cloud\-enabled world.
   

  

 Microsoft’s Azure Data engineering team is leading the transformation of analytics in the world of data with products like databases, data integration, big data analytics, messaging \& real\-time analytics, and business intelligence. The products our portfolio include Microsoft Fabric, Azure SQL DB, Azure Cosmos DB, Azure PostgreSQL, Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse Analytics, Azure Service Bus, Azure Event Grid, and Power BI. Our mission is to build the data platform for the age of AI, powering a new class of data\-first applications and driving a data culture.
   

  

 Within Azure Data, the Azure Data Analytics team builds the core analytics experiences in Microsoft Fabric. We own the Data Warehouse, Data Engineering, Data Science, AI, and Power BI workloads, enabling customers to ingest, transform, analyze, and derive insights from structured, semi\-structured, and unstructured data at enterprise scale. Our team is at the center of Microsoft's strategy to deliver a seamless, end\-to\-end analytics experience in Fabric.
   

  

 We are Azure Data, a Microsoft team driving the future of data processing in the Microsoft Cloud. Our engineering and product teams build some of the most advanced, large\-scale data processing services in the world used daily by millions of developers and the world’s largest enterprises.
   

  

 Cosmos is Microsoft’s big data analytics SaaS service providing compute and storage capabilities to power mission critical workloads for businesses at Microsoft. It is the central repository where Microsoft teams ingest, store, process, query, and share structured and unstructured data at scale. Cosmos is only available to 1P customers and is run as a shared, multi\-tenant service optimized for big data analytics. Cosmos is not just a big data platform but a complete ecosystem of tools and solutions that have been developed by the customer community.
   

  

 Our team actively uses AI tools including Copilots, internal platforms, and data driven insights \- to accelerate product discovery, design, validation, and execution. We expect candidates to be comfortable using AI as a core part of how they work. As part of the product development cycle, you will collaborate with stakeholders, design new platform capabilities, validate them with customers iteratively, and help bring them to the world
   

  

 We do not just value differences or different perspectives. We seek them out and invite them in so we can tap into the collective power of everyone in the company. As a result, our customers are better served.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Own end‑to‑end delivery of platform features for the Cosmos service, from problem definition through design, implementation and rollout.
* Drive the product strategy and roadmap for key areas of the Cosmos platform you own by leveraging AI.
* Translate customer business needs into well‑scoped program plans and engineering requirements.
* Drive capacity planning and Supply chain management for the Cosmos platform.
* Lead cross‑team execution by coordinating dependencies across engineering, operations, security, and other platform teams.
* Partner with engineering and live‑site teams to support operational readiness, reliability goals, and service health improvements.
* Manage the Incident and change management process for the Cosmos environment along with the DRI activities and define and monitor success metrics (e.g., reliability, performance, adoption, cost efficiency) for owned features.
* Communicate clearly with stakeholders on status, risks, decisions, and trade‑offs and contribute to a strong PM culture through documentation, design reviews, and knowledge sharing.


 Embody our culture and values
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Required/Minimum Qualifications
   

  

* Good experience in the software industry, with a degree in computer science or a related technical field OR equivalent experience 2\+ years of technical experience in product management role.
* Hands\-on experience with LLM APIs (e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure OpenAI) and tool use.


 Job Requirements: Other \& Additional
   

  

 Ability to meet Microsoft, customer and/or government security screening requirements are required for this role. These requirements include, but are not limited to the following specialized security screenings: Microsoft Cloud Background Check:
   

  

* This position will be required to pass the Microsoft Cloud background check upon hire/transfer and every two years thereafter.
* Preferred/Additional Qualifications
* Proven experience to drive complex initiatives from concept to delivery.
* Strong communication skills, but also technical skills, including the ability to explain complex technical concepts clearly and to be able to discuss complex technical issues with engineering for resolutions.
* Good knowledge of Supply chain management and capacity planning.
* Good understanding of SQL, Kusto, Power BI.
* Experience with cloud technologies (Paas, Saas, Analytics \& AI, DevOps and Networking).


 Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations, and ordinances. If you
   

  

 need assistance and/or reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application or the recruiting process, please send a request via the Accommodation request form (Accessibility \| Microsoft Careers).
   

  

 Benefits/perks listed below may vary depending on the nature of your employment with Microsoft and the country where you work.
   

  

 \#azdat
   

  

 \#azuredata
   

  

 \#Cosmos , \#BigData \#Hyperscale
   

  

 This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.
   

  

 Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process, read more about
 **requesting accommodations.**

38e13613.title: Presales Engineer
38e13613.description:
**About our client:** 
 They offer an AgenticAI platform for autonomous penetration testing and red teaming across Web, API, and infrastructure. It discovers shadow assets and web applications, safely validates what is exploitable, and connects findings into multi\-stage attack paths with near\-zero false positives. Unlike traditional scanners, it discovers credential reuse, business\-logic flaws, privilege escalation, and app\-to\-app or app\-to\-network lateral movement. It can operate autonomously or with expert\-in\-the\-loop validation.
 



  





**Role:** 
 Pre\-Sales Solutions Engineer, Offensive Security
 



**Location:** 
 Mumbai/Bangalore
 



  





**Offensive Security G Solution Expertise** 



* Own technical discovery for enterprise opportunities across Web, API, infrastructure, ASM, CART, penetration testing, and red\-team validation use cases.
* Design and run controlled POCs with clear scope, success criteria, rules of engagement, exclusions, safety boundaries, test windows, credentials, and expected outcomes.
* Demonstrate capabilities across asset discovery, shadow asset identification, Web/API testing, exploit validation, evidence review, attack\-path analysis, reporting, and remediation workflows.
* Explain the difference between vulnerability detection, exploit validation, attack simulation, exposure management, BAS, DAST, PTaaS, manual pentesting, and autonomous penetration testing.
* Handle technical objections around false positives, false negatives, probabilistic coverage, production safety, scope limitations, repeatability, and evidencequality.
* Understand and explain Web and API security issues including authentication flaws, authorisation bypass, business\-logic vulnerabilities, credential reuse, privilege escalation, broken access control, insecure APIs, and app\-to\-infrastructure attack paths.
* Engage confidently on OWASP Top 10, OWASP API Top 10, MITRE ATT\&CK, PTES, red\-team methodology, vulnerability management, and enterprise security validation practices.
* Address enterprise requirements around deployment model, data residency, privacy, auditability, access control, integrations, reporting, and governance.
* Support integrations and workflow discussions involving Jira, ServiceNow, SIEM, EDR, vulnerability management platforms, ticketing systems, and security reporting processes.
* Explain how AI\-assisted offensive security can be controlled, bounded, audited, and safely used in enterprise environments.
* Prepare technical proposals, solution notes, POC plans, RFP/RFI responses, architecture inputs,executive summaries, and technical debriefs.
* Provide structured feedback to product and engineering based on customer objections, competitive gaps, POC outcomes, and recurring field requirements.



  





**Requirement:** 



* 5 to 10 years in pre\-sales, sales engineering, solutions consulting, offensive security consulting, AppSec, red teaming,or enterprise cybersecurity SaaS.
* Strong hands\-on understanding of Web application security, API security, infrastructure testing, penetration testing, attacksurface discovery, vulnerability validation, and offensive security workflows.
* Proven ability to run enterprise demos, POCs, technical discovery, RFP/RFI responses, and customer objection handling.
* Ability to engage both technical practitioners and senior security leaders. Workingknowledge of cloud security across AWS, Azure, or GCP.
* Familiarity with common security tools such as SIEM, EDR, vulnerability scanners, DAST tools, ASM platforms, ticketing systems, and security reporting workflows.
* Ability to write high\-quality technical and executive\-facing documents.
* A Bachelorʼs degree or formal qualification in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Security, or a related field is welcome, but not mandatory. Proven skill, hands\-on cybersecurity depth, and relevant enterprise pre\-sales experience matter more than academic credentials.



  





  





**Preferred Experience** 




  




* Prior experience with offensive security platforms, ASM/EASM, BAS, PTaaS, DAST, vulnerability management, AppSec, red\-team automation, or exposure management products.
* Experience with regulated industries such as BFSI, telecom, healthcare, government, or large technology enterprises.
* Certifications such as OSCP,OSWE, CEH, CISSP,CREST, AWS Security Specialty, or equivalent practical credentials.
* Basic scripting or automation experience in Python, Bash, PowerShell, or similar. Experience in a startup or high\-growth cybersecurity product company.



  





 Interested candidates may share their resume at manisha.sharma@salesprofit.in.

195ebaf6.title: Principal Solution Architect - AWS
195ebaf6.description:
At TTEC Digital, we coach clients to ensure their employees feel valued, and fully supported, because an amazing customer experience is an employee first process. Our vision is the same, a place where employees know they can thrive.
   

  

**Sandcastle Solution Architect \- AWS (Pre\-Sales)**
**Position Purpose**
 The AWS Solution Architect will serve as a technical subject matter expert for the SandcastleCX Practice, supporting pre\-sales and post\-sales customer engagements. The role focuses on designing, demonstrating, and validating Amazon Connect and AWS\-based customer experience (CX) solutions through Proof of Concepts (POCs), customer workshops, and solution architecture.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead pre\-sales and post\-sales customer engagements for SandcastleCX.
* Gather business and technical requirements and design end\-to\-end AWS Connect solutions.
* Build and demonstrate Proof of Concepts (POCs) and customer use cases.
* Design technical architecture and integration strategies.
* Conduct customer enablement sessions, workshops, and platform demonstrations.
* Identify cross\-sell and up\-sell opportunities.
* Resolve customer technical concerns and reduce implementation risks.
* Collaborate with Sales, Delivery, and Product teams.
* Stay current with AWS, AI, Contact Center, and Customer Experience technologies.


**Technical Expertise**
* Amazon Connect solution architecture
* AWS Cloud Services (Lambda, Lex, S3, DynamoDB, CloudFormation/CDK)
* AWS AI services (Bedrock, Transcribe, Comprehend)
* Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation, CDK)
* CRM integrations (Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics, ServiceNow)
* Contact Center platforms (Genesys, Cisco, Avaya, Five9\)
* Voice and Digital Channel technologies
* API integrations and cloud architecture
* Network infrastructure fundamentals
* Technical presentations and solution demonstrations


**Competency**
* Strong solution architecture and design skills
* Customer\-facing and consulting experience
* Executive\-level communication and presentation skills
* Pre\-sales and technical consulting expertise
* Problem\-solving and analytical thinking
* Team collaboration
* Stakeholder management
* Ability to translate technical solutions into business value
* Experience building enterprise demos and POCs


**Technology Stack**
* Amazon Connect
* AWS Lambda
* Amazon Lex
* Amazon S3
* DynamoDB
* CloudFormation
* AWS CDK
* Terraform
* Amazon Bedrock
* Amazon Transcribe
* Amazon Comprehend
* Salesforce
* Microsoft Dynamics CRM
* ServiceNow
* Genesys
* Cisco Contact Center
* Avaya
* Five9
* Lucidchart
* draw.io
* Microsoft PowerPoint


**Education, Experience \& Certifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent experience).
* 10\+ years of experience in technical pre\-sales, solution engineering, or contact center consulting.
* 5\+ years of hands\-on experience with Amazon Connect and AWS services.
* AWS Professional Certifications (Solutions Architect, Developer, or Specialty) preferred.
* Experience designing enterprise contact center solutions.
* Experience presenting to executive and technical stakeholders.
* Ability to travel up to 30% for customer and partner engagements.


 TTEC Digital and our 1,800\+ employees, pioneer engagement and growth solutions that fuel the exceptional customer experience (CX). Our sister company, TTEC Engage, is a 60,000\+ employee service company, with customer service representatives located around the world. TTEC Holdings Inc. is the parent company for both Digital and Engage. When clients have a holistic need, they can draw from these independently managed centers of excellence, TTEC Digital and TTEC Engage.
   

  

 We are also delighted to share that TTEC has been awarded the Great Place To Work 2024\-2025 certification based on outstanding employee experience across 14 countries.
   

  

 TTEC is a proud equal opportunity employer where all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability. TTEC has fully embraced and is committed to expanding our diverse and inclusive workforce. We strive to reflect the communities we serve while delivering amazing service and technology centered around humanity.
   

  

 Rarely do applicants meet all desired job qualifications, so if you feel you would succeed in the role above, please take a moment and share your qualifications.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

b0e6ad2d.title: Solutions Consultant
b0e6ad2d.description:
**This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Solutions Consultant based in India.**
 This role offers the opportunity to combine technical expertise, business consulting, and sales strategy to help customers achieve better outcomes through innovative solutions.
   

  

 You will lead discovery conversations, understand customer challenges, and design tailored recommendations aligned with business objectives.
   

  

 The position requires strong storytelling, presentation skills, and the ability to translate complex product capabilities into measurable value.
   

  

 You will collaborate closely with sales teams, product specialists, and customers to influence strategic decisions and accelerate business growth.
   

  

 The role provides exposure to enterprise solutions, customer transformation initiatives, and complex sales cycles in a global environment.
   

  

 You will play a key role in driving adoption, improving customer experiences, and enabling teams with scalable solution expertise.
   

  

**Accountabilities**
 The Solutions Consultant will be responsible for guiding customers through solution discovery, product positioning, and sales engagement while helping teams deliver impactful customer outcomes.
   

  

* Lead consultative discovery sessions to understand customer workflows, business challenges, objectives, and success criteria.
* Translate customer requirements into tailored solution recommendations aligned with business needs and industry contexts.
* Design and deliver engaging product demonstrations and presentations focused on customer use cases and measurable outcomes.
* Communicate solution value through compelling storytelling, highlighting productivity improvements, collaboration benefits, and workflow optimization.
* Partner with sales teams throughout the sales lifecycle to support opportunity progression and successful deal execution.
* Influence deal strategy by positioning solutions effectively, explaining use cases, demonstrating value, and highlighting competitive differentiation.

Tryzens is an international digital commerce agency and our mission is to accelerate client success and growth across all channels, leveraging our expertise, insights, and digital\-first principles, to deliver compelling experiences that delight and engage their customers.
