4329d40a.title: Senior Solution Consultant – Workday Adaptive Planning
4329d40a.description:
**Your work days are brighter here.**

We’re obsessed with making hard work pay off, for our people, our customers, and the world around us. As a Fortune 500 company and a leading AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, we’re shaping the future of work so teams can reach their potential and focus on what matters most. The minute you join, you’ll feel it. Not just in the products we build, but in how we show up for each other. Our culture is rooted in integrity, empathy, and shared enthusiasm. We’re in this together, tackling big challenges with bold ideas and genuine care. We look for curious minds and courageous collaborators who bring sun\-drenched optimism and drive. Whether you're building smarter solutions, supporting customers, or creating a space where everyone belongs, you’ll do meaningful work with Workmates who’ve got your back. In return, we’ll give you the trust to take risks, the tools to grow, the skills to develop and the support of a company invested in you for the long haul. So, if you want to inspire a brighter work day for everyone, including yourself, you’ve found a match in Workday, and we hope to be a match for you too.


**About the Team**

APAC Solution Consulting team is expanding into India! We are hiring GTM roles including Presales Solution Consultant (Planning) to grow our presence in the country.
  

More than 700 global corporations and several millions of end\-users are users of Workday products in India. We are building on this strong base and work closely with our partners to bring our solutions, to the local organisations! We believe there is an increased opportunity to expand our Financial and Workforce Planning business portfolio. Increasingly, organisations that want to transform the way they operate are replacing legacy systems with Workday’s SaaS Enterprise Management applications.
  

If you are a Presales Solution Consultant with domain expertise in Enterprise Planning \& Analytics and have industry experience, who is passionate about changing the way people work in this age of AI, we’d love to speak to you.
  

As a member of our diverse and skilled Presales team, you will sit at the intersection of Sales, Product Management, Consulting, and Marketing. Your mission is to bring the value of Workday solutions to life, showcasing how the office of the CFO and CHRO can be revolutionized through next\-generation SaaS planning and consolidation applications.
**About the Role**

Workday is looking for a senior\-level technical professional with deep expertise in Enterprise Planning and Analytics. You will leverage your product and industry knowledge to provide functional expertise throughout the sales process for our largest enterprise prospects.


You will lead discovery workshops with prospective customers to uncover business requirements and value. You will provide authoritative overview and deep\-dive product demonstrations and position the unique value of Workday Adaptive Planning. You will conduct executive\-level presentations and provide trusted advice and mentorship as a planning subject matter expert. We also assist in responding to RFPs, participate in Workday events such as webinars, customer forums, and industry conferences and tradeshows.


***Key Responsibilities:***

* Strategic Discovery: Lead workshops with prospective customers to uncover business requirements, current pain points, and potential value.
* High\-Impact Demonstrations/Presentations: Deliver authoritative deep\-dive product demonstrations and executive\-level presentations that position the unique value of Workday Adaptive Planning.
* Technical Excellence: Develop and champion Workday\-based solutions, which may include rapid prototyping, creating mini\-applications, or delivering complex Proofs of Concept (POC).
* Trusted Advisor: Build deep relationships with C\-level stakeholders—specifically the office of the CFO—offering mentorship and credible subject matter expertise.
* Sales Partnership: Collaborate with Account Executives to lead RFP/RFI responses and develop winning value propositions.

**About You**

**Basic Qualifications**

* 5\+ years of experience in Finance Planning, Budgeting, and Forecasting systems. Consolidation experience is a nice to have for this role.
* 3\+ years’ experience and proven track record in a Presales Solution Consulting role, ideally within a software/SaaS environment.
* 3\+ years extensive experience presenting to C\-level executives with the ability to communicate influentially.
* Strong understanding of the Financial Planning and Consolidation functional areas as well as Workforce Planning.

**Other Qualifications:**

* Exposure to Planning solutions from Anaplan, Onestream, IBM Planning Analytics/TM1, SAP and Oracle would be an advantage
* Knowledge of Generative and Agentic AI as applied to the Finance domain and experience in positioning embedded or built\-on\-AI solutions to business and technology stakeholders
* Experience engaging with medium and large enterprises across various industries such as FSI, Higher Education, Healthcare, Government, Professional Services and Retail.
* Experience in Workforce, Headcount, Sales and Operational Planning will be desirable.
* You are an exceptional, dynamic presenter with strong communication and influencing skills, specifically to a C\-level Finance leadership audience
* You possess credibility and passion for presentations and product demonstrations around FP\&A technology solutions
* You thrive under pressure and can manage multiple, simultaneous engagements with different prospects
* You are a "continuous learner" who is passionate about innovation and creative problem\-solving.
* Applicants must have willingness to travel up to 50% of the time to engage with customers and partners in the field.
* You are adaptable and excited to work in a high growth, evolving organization.
* Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field (or equivalent work experience).

  

  

**Our Approach to Flexible Work**  



With Flex Work, we’re combining the best of both worlds: in\-person time and remote. Our approach enables our teams to deepen connections, maintain a strong community, and do their best work. We know that flexibility can take shape in many ways, so rather than a number of required days in\-office each week, we simply **spend at least half (50%) of our time each quarter in the office or in the field** with our customers, prospects, and partners (depending on role). This means you'll have the freedom to create a flexible schedule that caters to your business, team, and personal needs, while being intentional to make the most of time spent together. Those in our remote "home office" roles also have the opportunity to come together in our offices for important moments that matter.  



  

At Workday, we are committed to providing an accessible and inclusive hiring experience where all candidates can fully demonstrate their skills. If you require assistance or an accommodation at any point, please email accommodations@workday.com .


**Are you being referred to one of our roles? If so, ask your connection at Workday about our Employee Referral process!**

At Workday, we value our candidates’ privacy and data security. Workday will never ask candidates to apply to jobs through websites that are not Workday Careers.  



Please be aware of sites that may ask for you to input your data in connection with a job posting that appears to be from Workday but is not.  



In addition, Workday will never ask candidates to pay a recruiting fee, or pay for consulting or coaching services, in order to apply for a job at Workday.

ad71602e.title: Pre-Sales Executive
ad71602e.description:
**About Shivaami** 




  





 Since 2004, Shivaami has been a leading force in cloud consulting, enabling digital transformation through Software\-as\-a\-service solutions for 20,000\+ customers across India \& USA. We deliver enterprise\-grade, proven solutions designed to enhance operational efficiency, with expertise in Professional email onboarding, Cloud Infrastructure, managing Identity and Access Management (IAM), securing endpoints with Mobile Device Management (MDM) and Cybersecurity solutions. Our core mission is to partner with businesses to solve complex challenges and deliver measurable results. Shivaami is your trusted expert for scaling with advanced infrastructure and achieving sustainable digital growth.
 



  





  





**Job Summary** 




  





 We are looking for a dynamic and technically skilled
 **Pre\-Sales candidate** 
 to support our sales
 



 team in identifying client needs, delivering compelling demos, and crafting solution proposals.
 



 The ideal candidate will act as a key link between customers, the sales team, and
 



 product/engineering teams to ensure a seamless and value\-driven sales process. Should be willing to go on site if required.
 



  





  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  




* **Client Engagement \& Requirements Analysis:** 
 Collaborate closely with the sales team to thoroughly understand client business challenges, goals, and technical requirements to tailor solution approaches effectively.



  




* **Technical Demonstrations \& Proof of Concepts:** 
 Plan and execute detailed product presentations, live demos, and Proof of Concepts (POCs) that clearly articulate the value and capabilities of Shivaami’s cloud solutions (Google Workspace, Google Cloud, Microsoft 365, etc.).



  




* **Solution Documentation \& Proposal Support:** 
 Develop customized proposals, detailed solution documents, and respond to RFIs/RFPs in partnership with product managers and engineering teams, ensuring alignment with client needs and technical feasibility.



  




* **Subject Matter Expertise \& Solutioning:** 
 Act as a trusted advisor and technical expert throughout the sales cycle, helping clients understand complex cloud technologies and how they can solve their business problems by using a solutioning approach.



  




* **Technical Query Resolution:** 
 Address client technical questions and concerns promptly and accurately, providing confident, well\-researched responses to ensure continued engagement and trust.



  




* **Market \& Competitor Awareness:** 
 Maintain up\-to\-date knowledge of cloud product features, industry trends, and competitor offerings to position Shivaami’s solutions effectively and suggest strategic adjustments.



  




* **Client Onboarding \& Handover:** 
 Support internal team with post\-sale activities by facilitating smooth onboarding and knowledge transfer to customer success and implementation teams, ensuring high client satisfaction.



  




* **Feedback \& Continuous Improvement:** 
 Gather and communicate client feedback to product development and marketing teams to influence product enhancements and go\-to\-market strategies.



  




* **Cross\-Functional Collaboration:** 
 Work with internal teams—sales and deployment—to ensure cohesive pre\-sales strategies that align with business goals and product capabilities.



  





  





  





**Qualifications \& Skills** 




  




* 3–5 years of experience in pre\-sales, solution consulting, or a technical sales support Role.
* Strong communication, interpersonal, and presentation skills.
* Ability to understand customer pain points and map them to product capabilities.
* Hands\-on experience with demo tools, CRM platforms (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot), and collaboration tools.
* Technical aptitude to quickly understand complex products and services.
* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Business, or a related field.
* Strong Convincing skills and should be target oriented.



  





  





**Preferred Qualifications:** 




  





**●** 
 Experience in SaaS / IT / Enterprise Software / B2B Solutions.
 



 ● Experience with writing technical proposals or RFP responses.
 



 ● Familiarity with cloud technologies, APIs, integrations, and enterprise architecture is a plus.
 



 ● Basic understanding of sales pipelines and customer journey stages.
 



  





**Benefits:** 




  




* 5 days working culture.
* Competitive salary and commission structure.
* Lunch and evening Snacks
* Medical insurance.
* Opportunities for career growth and professional development.
* Friendly and supportive work environment.
* Paid time off and other company benefits.
* Incentives will be based on your own lead generation

43de262e.title: SAP Pre-Sales Consultant
43de262e.description:
SAP FICO Pre\-Sales Consultant
 



**Location:** 
 Hyderabad, India (Hitech City, Kondapur)
 



**Work Hours:** 
 US time zones
 



  





 You will run demos on SAP's cloud demo environments, sit in discovery calls, write the proposals, and produce the content that makes us credible to a mid\-market CFO or COO who is evaluating SAP for the first time.
 



  





 What You Own
 



**Demos and solutioning** 



* Deliver SAP Cloud ERP demos to prospects — finance, procurement, order\-to\-cash, and reporting scenarios — tailored to what the prospect actually asked about
* Join discovery and qualification calls with the sales team; translate a prospect's current\-state processes into an SAP solution story
* Flag requirements that fall outside standard fixed scope before they become a commercial problem
* Executive\-level solution presentations



**Proposals and bid response** 



* RFP, RFI, and RFQ responses end to end
* Customer proposals, solution documents, and scope narratives



**Content creation** 



* High\-quality short\-form and long\-form SAP content: articles, white papers, blogs, case studies, and presentation decks written from a practitioner's point of view
* GTM collateral, sales enablement material, and solution playbooks
* Competency\-building materials, accelerators, and best\-practice documentation for the wider team



**Enablement** 



* Maintain and extend our demo library so scenarios stay current and reusable
* Keep the sales team fluent on what SAP Cloud ERP does and does not do



  





 What We're Looking For
 


* 3\+ years of hands\-on SAP functional experience in at least one core area — FICO, MM, or SD. You need enough depth to answer an unscripted question in a demo without deferring
* Experience supporting SAP implementation or transformation programs, so you know what a project actually involves
* Demonstrated pre\-sales exposure: demos, solution presentations, or bid support
* Strong written English. A significant part of this role is producing published, customer\-facing writing — this is a hard requirement, not a nice\-to\-have
* Confident in front of business and executive audiences
* Comfortable working US hours from Hyderabad



  





 Experience with SAP Cloud ERP, Public Edition (S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition) is a plus, not a requirement. If your background is on\-premise or private cloud, we will enable you on the public cloud stack.

3a6a8c53.title: Solutions Architect (CCaaS)
3a6a8c53.description:
**Job Description**
**Job Description**
 As a Solutions Architect, your main responsibility will be to act as the key technical expert during the pre\-sales process. You will work closely with the Contact Center Platform Architecture team and potential customers to design and scope customized solutions that meet their unique business needs, ultimately securing new professional services engagements.
   

  

**Please note that to succeed in this role you must have previous experience working with CCaS architecture and AWS (Connect or Services) environments.**
**Responsibilities**
* Lead Pre\-Sales Technical Scoping. Provide expert technical support to the sales team by analyzing customer requirements and recommending the most effective use of Zendesk products and services.
* Create detailed professional services estimates and proposals for the development and implementation of new customer solutions.
* Articulate complex technical concepts clearly to diverse audiences, from technical teams to executive\-level decision\-makers, to build confidence in our proposed solution.
* Maintain deep technical expertise across Zendesk for Contact Center product suite, leading technical discussions and providing expert recommendations.
* Partner closely with the Professional Services team to ensure a seamless transition from the sales cycle to project delivery, setting the implementation team up for success.


**Qualifications**
* Strong experience and certification in AWS connect and/or AWS services working in a CCaS environment.
* Previous experience working as a solutions architect or similar role in a CCaS environment supporting AWS environments.
* Hands\-on experience building, migrating and deploying complex cloud\-based solutions.
* Strong technical background in cloud technologies, specifically Amazon Connect, SaaS applications, and enterprise\-level solution architecture.
* Experiencing implementing and supporting AWS environments.
* Proven ability to translate customer business objectives into a comprehensive technical solution and detailed project estimate.
* Exceptional communication and presentation skills, with a focus on articulating value and building trust with prospective customers.


 Please note that Zendesk can only hire candidates who are physically located and plan to work from Karnataka or Maharashtra. Please refer to the location posted on the requisition for where this role is based.
   

  

 Hybrid: In this role, our hybrid experience is designed at the team level to give you a rich onsite experience packed with connection, collaboration, learning, and celebration \- while also giving you flexibility to work remotely for part of the week. This role must attend our local office for part of the week. The specific in\-office schedule is to be determined by the hiring manager.
   

  

**The Intelligent Heart Of Customer Experience**
 Zendesk software was built to bring a sense of calm to the chaotic world of customer service. Today we power billions of conversations with brands you know and love.
   

  

 Zendesk believes in offering our people a fulfilling and inclusive experience. Our hybrid way of working, enables us to purposefully come together in person, at one of our many Zendesk offices around the world, to connect, collaborate and learn whilst also giving our people the flexibility to work remotely for part of the week.
   

  

 As part of our commitment to fairness and transparency, we inform all applicants that artificial intelligence (AI) or automated decision systems may be used to screen or evaluate applications for this position, in accordance with Company guidelines and applicable law.
   

  

 Zendesk is an equal opportunity employer, and we’re proud of our ongoing efforts to foster global diversity, equity, \& inclusion in the workplace. Individuals seeking employment and employees at Zendesk are considered without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, age, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, marital status, medical condition, ancestry, disability, military or veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. We are an AA/EEO/Veterans/Disabled employer. If you are based in the United States and would like more information about your EEO rights under the law, please click here.
   

  

 Zendesk endeavors to make reasonable accommodations for applicants with disabilities and disabled veterans pursuant to applicable federal and state law. If you are an individual with a disability and require a reasonable accommodation to submit this application, complete any pre\-employment testing, or otherwise participate in the employee selection process, please send an e\-mail to peopleandplaces@zendesk.com with your specific accommodation request.

2cc18a39.title: Lead Solutions Consultant (Presales - IAM)
2cc18a39.description:
**Opentext \- The Information Company**
 OpenText is a global leader in information management, where innovation, creativity, and collaboration are the key components of our corporate culture. As a member of our team, you will have the opportunity to partner with the most highly regarded companies in the world, tackle complex issues, and contribute to projects that shape the future of digital transformation.
   

  

**AI\-First. Future\-Driven. Human\-Centered.**
 At OpenText, AI is at the heart of everything we do—powering innovation, transforming work, and empowering digital knowledge workers. We're hiring talent that AI can't replace to help us shape the future of information management. Join us.
   

  

**Your Impact**
 Provide technology consulting and trusted advisory to enterprise customers, helping them design modern Identity and Access Management (IAM) solutions using OpenText NetIQ and complementary technologies. Lead customer engagements from discovery through solution architecture, demonstrations, proposals, and technical strategy while aligning IAM initiatives with Zero Trust and digital transformation objectives.
   

  

**What The Role Offers**
* Act as a trusted advisor for IAM, Identity Governance (IGA), Access Management (AM), Privileged Access Management (PAM), and Zero Trust initiatives.
* Lead discovery workshops and define business\-driven IAM architectures.
* Design hybrid identity solutions spanning on\-premises and cloud.
* Deliver executive presentations, demos, workshops, and Proof of Concepts.
* Prepare RFP responses, solution proposals, architecture documents, and competitive positioning.
* Collaborate with Sales, Professional Services, Product Management, and Partners.
* Mentor other consultants and contribute reusable assets and best practices.


**What You Need To Succeed**
* Strong technical knowledge for broader Cyber Security solutions.
* Strong expertise in Identity and Access management, Identity Governance, Access Manager, Advanced Authentication, Privileged Account Manager, eDirectory, Identity Applications, SSPR, and Reporting.
* Identity Lifecycle Management (Joiner\-Mover\-Leaver), RBAC, ABAC, Segregation of Duties, Access Certification and Role Mining.
* Authentication and federation standards: SAML 2\.0, OAuth 2\.0, OpenID Connect (OIDC), SCIM, LDAP, FIDO2/WebAuthn and MFA.
* Integration with Microsoft Entra ID, Active Directory, SAP, Oracle, Salesforce, Workday, SuccessFactors, ServiceNow and custom applications.
* Knowledge of REST APIs, JSON, XML, JDBC, PowerShell, Shell scripting and Linux/Windows environments.
* Working knowledge of containers, Kubernetes and cloud platforms (Azure/AWS/GCP).
* Strong troubleshooting across TLS/HTTPS, certificates, federation and identity protocols.
* 8–12\+ years in enterprise IAM with at least 5 years in solution architecture or presales.
* Experience leading medium to large enterprise opportunities.
* Excellent executive communication, presentation and consultative selling skills.
* Preferred certifications: OpenText/NetIQ, CISSP, CISM, or Microsoft Identity.
* Ability to engage CIOs, CISOs, Enterprise Architects and Security Architects.
* Strong business acumen with the ability to map technology to business outcomes.
* Self\-driven, collaborative and capable of leading complex strategic engagements.


 OpenText's efforts to build an inclusive work environment go beyond simply complying with applicable laws. Our Employment Equity and Diversity Policy provides direction on maintaining a working environment that is inclusive of everyone, regardless of culture, national origin, race, color, gender, gender identification, sexual orientation, family status, age, veteran status, disability, religion, or other basis protected by applicable laws.
   

  

 If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application or recruiting process, please contact us at hr@opentext.com. Our proactive approach fosters collaboration, innovation, and personal growth, enriching OpenText's vibrant workplace.

343a148d.title: Solution Consultant Manager II
343a148d.description:
Arcadis is the world's leading company delivering sustainable design, engineering, and consultancy solutions for natural and built assets.
   

  

 We are more than 34,000 people, in over 30 countries, dedicated to improving quality of life. Everyone has an important role to play. With the power of many curious minds, together we can solve the world’s most complex challenges and deliver more impact together.
   

  

**Role description:**
 Lead, govern and continuously improve enterprise platforms to maximise business value, adoption, resilience and compliance across Arcadis.
   

  

**Role accountabilities:**
* Provide overall leadership and direction for platform management and support services.
* Own the operating model for platform support, adoption, and continuous improvement.
* Lead and develop Solutions Consultants across multiple seniority levels.
* Act as senior escalation point for complex platform, vendor, and business issues.
* Represent the platform portfolio in senior stakeholder and vendor governance forums.
* Drive strategic alignment between platform roadmaps and business priorities.
* Act as the senior technical and functional authority across assigned platforms.
* Define and approve platform standards, architectures, and integration patterns.
* Oversee platform lifecycle management, including upgrades, deprecations, and risk mitigation.
* Guide cross\-platform design decisions and best practices.
* Ensure robust knowledge management and documentation standards.
* Oversee platform performance, cost optimisation, and capacity planning.
* Ensure platforms are secure, compliant, and fit for enterprise\-scale use.
* Overall health, stability, and performance of assigned platforms.
* Effective vendor performance and contract outcomes.
* Compliance with Arcadis policies, security, and regulatory requirements.


**Qualifications \& Experience:**
* Deep enterprise\-scale platform leadership and technical expertise.
* Proven people leadership and organisational change experience.
* Strong strategic, stakeholder, and vendor management skills.


 Why Arcadis?
   

  

 We can only achieve our goals when everyone is empowered to be their best. We believe everyone's contribution matters. It’s why we are pioneering a skills\-based approach, where you can harness your unique experience and expertise to carve your career path and maximize the impact we can make together.
   

  

 You’ll do meaningful work, and no matter what role, you’ll be helping to deliver sustainable solutions for a more prosperous planet. Make your mark, on your career, your colleagues, your clients, your life and the world around you.
   

  

 Together, we can create a lasting legacy.
   

  

 Join Arcadis. Create a Legacy.
   

  

 Our Commitment to Equality, Diversity, Inclusion \& Belonging
   

  

 We want you to be able to bring your best self to work every day, which is why we take equality and inclusion seriously and hold ourselves to account for our actions. Our ambition is to be an employer of choice and provide a great place to work for all our people.

ea99ee34.title: Solutions Architect
ea99ee34.description:
**Be at the Forefront of the Agentic AI Revolution** 




  





 At Skan AI, we are pioneering the context engine for human and agentic execution, bringing context from enterprise operators, systems, and processes to power how the world's largest organizations execute their most complex, mission\-critical work.
 



  





**Why Skan AI** 




  





 We're in hyper\-growth mode at exactly the right moment in history. As enterprises race to adopt agentic AI, we're uniquely positioned to deliver the clear signal they desperately need: a platform that trains and grounds AI Agents in trillions of real execution signals, enabling reliable, compliant automation of their most complex processes.
 



  





 Backed by Dell Technologies Capital and other leading investors, we're the only company that can bridge the gap between AI's promise and enterprise reality, making us perfectly positioned to define the agentic era for modern enterprises.
 



  





 Our diverse, collaborative team of 250\+ innovators is solving category\-defining challenges at the intersection of AI, process intelligence, and enterprise work. Diverse perspectives fuel breakthrough thinking, cross\-functional collaboration is the norm, and our work directly transforms how Fortune 500 companies operate. We are shaping the future of work itself.
 



  





 AI Solutions is our global post\-sales and professional\-services organization — the team that takes process intelligence and agentic AI out of pilots and into production, and owns customer outcomes end\-to\-end. We are AI\-first by default: we spot repeating patterns and build agents to automate them, scaling the value we deliver with the book of business, not with headcount.
 



  





**The role.** 
 Set the technical bar for AI\-native delivery and be the first line of defense on every solution we build. You own architecture and solutioning end\-to\-end — from pre\-sales through delivery — and you see the whole picture: not just what the customer asked for, but why they bought us and what they actually need. You translate wants into needs, frame the real problem, and drive it from idea to implementation to impact. This is an AI\-native operational\-intelligence architect, not a traditional workflow or BPM architect.
 



  





**What you own** 



* End\-to\-end, AI\-native architecture and integration design for customer engagements — the build patterns the whole delivery team works to.
* The big picture — understanding why the customer is buying Skan, shaping the real problem behind the stated request, and designing to the outcome.
* Pre\-sales solutioning and the architecture gate\-review before anything reaches the customer; you are the quality bar.
* Reusable reference architectures, patterns and standards fed into the Center of Excellence.
* Architectures grounded in operational telemetry — the digital twin of work — and built for continuous optimization.
* Agentic systems design — perception, reasoning and planning; bounded autonomy, contextual memory, multi\-agent orchestration and runtime observability.



**What we look for** 



* Thinks in systems, not workflows — reasons about enterprise operational behavior, not requirements → approvals → implementation.
* Real agentic depth (well beyond 'instruct the agent' / 'let the agent decide') and telemetry\-native intelligence design.
* Sees needs behind wants — frames the business problem and drives idea → implementation → impact.
* Fluent in AI economics — inferencing, token and GPU modeling; scalability, hallucination\-containment and auditability tradeoffs.
* Runtime governance of autonomous systems; designs adaptive human \+ AI operating models.
* Challenges traditional software assumptions; AI\-first by default.

70fabfc7.title: Solutions Architect
70fabfc7.description:
***hackajob** 
 is collaborating with
 **Barclays** 
 to connect them with exceptional professionals for this role.*
**To Be Successful As a Solutions Architect, You Should**
* Possess excellent architectural design skills, including API strategy, integration patterns, and ability to align technical solutions with business objectives.
* Have strong expertise in Java\-based enterprise application design, including performance optimisation and modular architecture principles.
* Demonstrate hands\-on experience with event\-driven architectures using Apache Kafka, including stream processing and high\-throughput messaging patterns.
* Be proficient in container orchestration with Kubernetes, ensuring scalability, resilience, and secure deployments.
* Show practical knowledge of workflow automation and BPM platforms such as Camunda, with ability to integrate process orchestration into distributed systems.


**Other highly valued skills include:** 
**(Max 5 Bullets Preferred Skills)**
* Experience with distributed systems and high\-availability architectures, particularly in financial services or other mission\-critical environments.
* Familiarity with DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines, including tools like Jenkins, GitLab
* Understanding of performance tuning and capacity planning for large\-scale, low\-latency systems.
* Strong knowledge of relational databases and SQL optimisation, ideally with experience in Oracle or PostgreSQL.
* Knowledge of security best practices and regulatory compliance for designing secure solutions in banking.


**Purpose of the role**
 To design, develop, and implement solutions to complex business problems, collaborating with stakeholders to understand their needs and requirements, and design and implement solutions that meet those needs and create solutions that balance technology risks against business delivery, driving consistency.
   

  

**Accountabilities**
* Design and development of solutions as products that can evolve, meeting business requirements that align with modern software engineering practices and automated delivery tooling. This includes identification and implementation of the technologies and platforms.
* Targeted design activities that apply an appropriate workload placement strategy and maximise the benefit of cloud capabilities such as elasticity, serverless, containerisation etc.
* Best practice designs incorporating security principles (such as defence in depth and reduction of blast radius) that meet the Bank’s resiliency expectations.
* Solutions that appropriately balance risks and controls to deliver the agreed business and technology value.
* Adoption of standardised solutions where they fit. If no standard solutions fit, feed into their ongoing evolution where appropriate.
* Fault finding and performance issues support to operational support teams, leveraging available tooling.
* Solution design impact assessment in terms of risk, capacity and cost impact, inc. estimation of project change and ongoing run costs.
* Development of the requisite architecture inputs required to comply with the banks governance processes, including design artefacts required for architecture, privacy, security and records management governance processes.


**Director Expectations**
* To manage a business function, providing significant input to function wide strategic initiatives. Contribute to and influence policy and procedures for the function and plan, manage and consult on multiple complex and critical strategic projects, which may be business wide..
* They manage the direction of a large team or sub\-function, leading other people managers and embedding a performance culture aligned to the values of the business. Or for an individual contributor, they lead organisation wide projects and act as deep technical expert and thought leader, identifying new ways of working and collaborating cross functionally. They will train, guide and coach less experienced specialists and provide information affecting long term profits, organisational risks and strategic decisions..
* Provide expert advice to senior functional management and committees to influence decisions made outside of own function, offering significant input to function wide strategic initiatives.
* Manage, coordinate and enable resourcing, budgeting and policy creation for a significant sub\-function.
* Escalates breaches of policies / procedure appropriately.
* Foster and guide compliance, ensure regulations are observed that relevant processes in place to facilitate adherence.
* Focus on the external environment, regulators, or advocacy groups to both monitor and influence on behalf of Barclays, when appropriate.
* Demonstrate extensive knowledge of how the function integrates with the business division / Group to achieve the overall business objectives.
* Maintain broad and comprehensive knowledge of industry theories and practices within own discipline alongside up\-to\-date relevant sector / functional knowledge, and insight into external market developments / initiatives.
* Use interpretative thinking and advanced analytical skills to solve problems and design solutions in often complex/ sensitive situations.
* Exercise management authority to make significant decisions and certain strategic decisions or recommendations within own area.
* Negotiate with and influence stakeholders at a senior level both internally and externally.
* Act as principal contact point for key clients and counterparts in other functions/ businesses divisions.
* Mandated as a spokesperson for the function and business division.


 All Senior Leaders are expected to demonstrate a clear set of leadership behaviours to create an environment for colleagues to thrive and deliver to a consistently excellent standard. The four LEAD behaviours are: L – Listen and be authentic, E – Energise and inspire, A – Align across the enterprise, D – Develop others.
   

  

 All colleagues will be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Values of Respect, Integrity, Service, Excellence and Stewardship – our moral compass, helping us do what we believe is right. They will also be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Mindset – to Empower, Challenge and Drive – the operating manual for how we behave.

0c19b4b4.title: Solution Consultant Manager II
0c19b4b4.description:
Arcadis is the world's leading company delivering sustainable design, engineering, and consultancy solutions for natural and built assets.
   

  

 We are more than 34,000 people, in over 30 countries, dedicated to improving quality of life. Everyone has an important role to play. With the power of many curious minds, together we can solve the world’s most complex challenges and deliver more impact together.
   

  

**Role description:**
 Lead, govern and continuously improve enterprise platforms to maximise business value, adoption, resilience and compliance across Arcadis.
   

  

**Role accountabilities:**
* Provide overall leadership and direction for platform management and support services.
* Own the operating model for platform support, adoption, and continuous improvement.
* Lead and develop Solutions Consultants across multiple seniority levels.
* Act as senior escalation point for complex platform, vendor, and business issues.
* Represent the platform portfolio in senior stakeholder and vendor governance forums.
* Drive strategic alignment between platform roadmaps and business priorities.
* Act as the senior technical and functional authority across assigned platforms.
* Define and approve platform standards, architectures, and integration patterns.
* Oversee platform lifecycle management, including upgrades, deprecations, and risk mitigation.
* Guide cross\-platform design decisions and best practices.
* Ensure robust knowledge management and documentation standards.
* Oversee platform performance, cost optimisation, and capacity planning.
* Ensure platforms are secure, compliant, and fit for enterprise\-scale use.
* Overall health, stability, and performance of assigned platforms.
* Effective vendor performance and contract outcomes.
* Compliance with Arcadis policies, security, and regulatory requirements.


**Qualifications \& Experience:**
* Deep enterprise\-scale platform leadership and technical expertise.
* Proven people leadership and organisational change experience.
* Strong strategic, stakeholder, and vendor management skills.


 Why Arcadis?
   

  

 We can only achieve our goals when everyone is empowered to be their best. We believe everyone's contribution matters. It’s why we are pioneering a skills\-based approach, where you can harness your unique experience and expertise to carve your career path and maximize the impact we can make together.
   

  

 You’ll do meaningful work, and no matter what role, you’ll be helping to deliver sustainable solutions for a more prosperous planet. Make your mark, on your career, your colleagues, your clients, your life and the world around you.
   

  

 Together, we can create a lasting legacy.
   

  

 Join Arcadis. Create a Legacy.
   

  

 Our Commitment to Equality, Diversity, Inclusion \& Belonging
   

  

 We want you to be able to bring your best self to work every day, which is why we take equality and inclusion seriously and hold ourselves to account for our actions. Our ambition is to be an employer of choice and provide a great place to work for all our people.

470913e5.title: Lead Software Engineer - .NET with Angular and Cloud
470913e5.description:
*EPAM is a leading global provider of digital platform engineering and development services. We are committed to having a positive impact on our customers, our employees, and our communities. We embrace a dynamic and inclusive culture. Here you will collaborate with multi\-national teams, contribute to a myriad of innovative projects that deliver the most creative and cutting\-edge solutions, and have an opportunity to continuously learn and grow. No matter where you are located, you will join a dedicated, creative, and diverse community that will help you discover your fullest potential.*


We are seeking an experienced **Lead Software Engineer** to design and deliver large\-scale production applications using **.NET**, **Angular**, and **cloud technologies**. In this role, you will drive technical excellence across the full stack, architect scalable microservices, and leverage modern AI\-assisted development tools to accelerate delivery.

**Responsibilities**

* Lead the design and development of large\-scale production applications across the full stack
* Architect and implement robust REST APIs and microservices\-based solutions
* Build and maintain modern frontend experiences using Angular
* Develop backend services and APIs using .NET
* Design and deploy cloud\-native solutions on AWS and Azure
* Implement event\-driven and messaging patterns to support scalable systems
* Work with containerization and orchestration platforms, including Docker and Kubernetes (AKS/EKS)
* Establish and maintain CI/CD pipelines and Infrastructure as Code practices
* Leverage AI\-assisted development tools such as Cursor, Copilot, and Claude Code to enhance productivity
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to define technical direction and best practices

**Requirements**

* 8\+ years of experience building large\-scale production applications
* Proficiency in .NET for full\-stack development
* Strong modern frontend expertise in Angular, with acceptable alternatives in React and Node.js
* Background in backend and API development with depth in both areas
* Skills in designing microservices and robust REST APIs
* Expertise in cloud platforms, primarily AWS and Azure (in that order)
* Understanding of event\-driven and messaging concepts, along with databases
* Familiarity with containerization technologies, including Docker and Kubernetes (AKS/EKS)
* Comfort using AI\-assisted development tools such as Cursor, Copilot, and Claude Code (no AI specialization required)
* Proficiency in English at an Upper\-Intermediate level (B2\) or higher

**Nice to have**

* Exposure to Databricks
* Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and Infrastructure as Code

**We offer**

* Opportunity to work on technical challenges that may impact across geographies
* Vast opportunities for self\-development: online university, knowledge sharing opportunities globally, learning opportunities through external certifications
* Opportunity to share your ideas on international platforms
* Sponsored Tech Talks \& Hackathons
* Unlimited access to LinkedIn learning solutions
* Possibility to relocate to any EPAM office for short and long\-term projects
* Focused individual development
* Benefit package:
	+ Health benefits
	+ Retirement benefits
	+ Paid time off
	+ Flexible benefits
* Forums to explore beyond work passion (CSR, photography, painting, sports, etc.)

c4aeb24f.title: Solutions Engineer - Data Engineering
c4aeb24f.description:
Astronomer empowers data teams to bring mission\-critical software, analytics, and AI to life and is the company behind Astro, the industry\-leading unified DataOps platform powered by Apache Airflow®. Astro accelerates building reliable data products that unlock insights, unleash AI value, and powers data\-driven applications. Trusted by more than 800 of the world's leading enterprises, Astronomer lets businesses do more with their data. To learn more, visit www.astronomer.io.
   

  

**About This Role**
 As a Solutions Engineer \- Data Engineering, you will be part of the Global Services Delivery Team and will be involved in the delivery of the various use cases in which Airflow is implemented across our customers. These organizations range from seed\-stage startups to Fortune 500 enterprises. Although these organizations are in different phases of their data journey, they all can benefit from your expertise as a Solutions Engineer to implement Apache Airflow in a manner that follows best practices and allows continued growth.
   

  

 In this role, you will come to have a deep understanding of both Apache Airflow and Astronomer Products.
   

  

 Every Solutions Engineer will grow to become an Airflow expert and a trusted advisor to organizations looking to put their data in motion.
   

  

**Hybrid Work Model** 
 : For this role, you will embrace a flexible hybrid work model, working at least
 **3 days per week at our Office in Hyderabad** 
 while delivering a seamless experience that is digitally and physically connected.
   

  

**What You Get To Do**
 You'll be able to speak to and deliver solutions around Apache Airflow and the Astronomer platform. You'll interact with customers and partners to ensure successful Airflow implementation post\-sales. You'll be a trusted advisor and help architect data pipelines across all types of environments and use cases. Last but not least, you'll have the opportunity to engage with the Apache Airflow project, a thriving open\-source community with thousands of contributors.
   

  

* Maintain and continuously improve your technical expertise. You will become a trusted expert in both Airflow and Astronomer’s managed Airflow Platform. You stay up to date with the latest releases and features while focusing on those that have a greater impact on customers.
* Work with customers to educate and guide them regarding Airflow best practices. Perform Airflow code refactoring assessments as a trusted expert for new and existing customers.
* Collaborate with team members to design, prototype, and implement engineering solutions for internal and external use.
* Act as a liaison by collecting feedback and identifying Airflow/Astronomer improvements through client interactions and relaying these recommendations back to the Product.
* Review and optimize customer data workflows and Airflow system configurations for improved performance.


**What You Bring To The Role**
* 3\-5 years of data\-engineering experience, ideally working with Apache Airflow in production environments
* Experience creating DAGs, writing Python, and building Airflow custom operators and hooks
* Excitement about implementing ETL/ELT pipelines, knowledge of applying Data transformations, optimizing and monitoring data pipelines
* Experience with related market products such as Cloudera, Databricks, Snowflake, DBT, AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, ETL Technologies or other analytics solutions
* Empathetic, driven and team\-oriented
* Great prioritization skills and ability to execute on customer\-facing activities
* A strong verbal and written communicator interacting with assigned customers over a variety of mediums (slack, email, knowledge transfer, and pair programming sessions).
* Highly data\-driven and intrigued by the challenge of delivering an awesome Astronomer experience to hundreds of customers


**Bonus Points If You Have**
* Experienced with Production implementation of ETL/ELT processes using Modern Data Stack.
* Experience building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines
* Experience working on short and long\-term Customer engagements
* Experience with infrastructure tools like Docker and Kubernetes


 At Astronomer, we value diversity. We are an equal opportunity employer: we do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

997eb13a.title: Senior Solutions Engineer, India
997eb13a.description:
Rhombus Power, Inc. delivers AI\-powered predictive intelligence in real time for defense and national security organizations worldwide. Our mission\-built products— Ambient AI and Guardian— are transforming strategic, operational, and tactical decision\-making. By empowering the shift from reactive analysis to proactive, predictive intelligence and decision support, Rhombus Power is providing foresight and freedom of action when it matters most.
   

  

 Come join our cross\-disciplinary and world\-class team that is delivering game\-changing solutions to transform global security.
   

  

 Learn more about Rhombus Power, Inc. and watch a demonstration of Guardian, our AI Platform here:
   

  

 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v\=3PxY6su1Q\-Q
   

  

 https://www.youtube.com/@rhombuspower8558/videos
   

  

 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v\=Iby5WVNfQiI
   

  

 See the following articles to learn more about what we do:
   

  

 https://www.rhombuspower.com/news\-and\-media
   

  

**The Role**
 The Senior Solutions Engineer at Rhombus Power is an experienced technical leader responsible for driving the architecture and deployment of our most complex AI\-powered solutions. You will leverage significant previous solutions engineering experience to solve global business and national security challenges. This role requires a seasoned software generalist capable of operating independently to deliver production\-grade code across the full stack (DevOps, frontend, and backend) while serving as a trusted technical advisor to senior customer stakeholders. You will bring effective, real\-world solutions to life for our biggest clients.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead the technical architecture, design, and implementation phases of large\-scale AI solution deployments with strategic national security partners.
* Act as the subject matter expert on all Rhombus Power products and technologies, providing deep technical consultation to influence partner strategy and optimize solution effectiveness.
* Be a highly autonomous software generalist, quickly developing, iterating, and deploying high\-quality, full\-stack code (DevOps, backend systems, and sophisticated frontend UIs) to meet evolving mission needs.
* Mentor and provide technical guidance to junior Solutions Engineers, fostering best practices for coding, integration, and customer engagement.
* Work closely with Rhombus Power Product Managers and Engineering teams to synthesize complex customer requirements and directly influence the development of new products and platform features.
* Lead complex troubleshooting efforts and technical deep dives to ensure system reliability and performance in mission\-critical environments.
* Travel to customer sites for deployment leadership, high\-level technical consultation, and operational oversight.


**Qualifications**
* A minimum of 7 years of total professional work experience in software engineering, technical consulting, or a related field.
* Significant previous experience (3\+ years preferred) in a Solutions Engineering, Forward Deployed Engineering, or similar customer\-embedded role, focusing on complex enterprise software.
* Expert\-level command as a software generalist, capable of architecting and implementing solutions across the technology stack (DevOps, backend, and frontend).
* Deep proficiency in modern programming languages, cloud technologies (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP), data pipelines, and security best practices.
* Experience with Linux/Unix systems and system administration
* Proven ability to lead technical discussions, manage complex stakeholder relationships, and drive major projects to successful completion in fast\-paced environments.
* Exceptional problem\-solving skills and the capacity to translate high\-level mission objectives into concrete, technical solutions.
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field, or equivalent experience.

b4394135.title: Platform Customer Engineer, Google Cloud
b4394135.description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 6 years of experience with cloud native architecture in a customer\-facing or support role.
* Experience with cloud engineering and containerization platforms.
* Experience in programming languages, debugging, systems design, prototyping, demos, or customer workshops.
* Experience in architecting autonomous multi\-agent systems/integrating agentic AI workflows.
* Experience engaging with, or presenting to, technical stakeholders or executive leaders.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Experience selling technical solutions in one or more of the following: infrastructure modernization, application modernization, data management, data analytics, cloud AI, networking, migrations, security.
* Experience designing, building, and scaling agentic AI solutions or multi\-agent workflows using orchestrator frameworks (such as LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, or Vertex AI agent builder).
* Experience with security concepts (e.g., encryption, identity management, access control, attack vectors, pen testing).
* Experience migrating applications and services to cloud platforms.
* Experience prospecting, and building and maintaining new customer relationships from scratch, with excitement for building out greenfield territories.
* Experience working with, and passion for the startup ecosystem.


**About The Job**
 The Google Cloud Platform team helps customers transform and build what's next for their business — all with technology built in the cloud. Our products are developed for security, reliability and scalability, running the full stack from infrastructure to applications to devices and hardware. Our teams are dedicated to helping our customers — developers, small and large businesses, educational institutions and government agencies — see the benefits of our technology come to life. As part of an entrepreneurial team in this rapidly growing business, you will play a key role in understanding the needs of our customers and help shape the future of businesses of all sizes use technology to connect with customers, employees and partners.
   

  

 As a Platform Customer Engineer (CE), you will partner with technical Sales teams to differentiate Google Cloud to our customers. You will serve as the customer’s primary technical partner and trusted advisor, engaging in technical\-led conversations to understand their business challenges. You will troubleshoot technical questions and roadblocks, engage in proofs\-of\-concepts and demos, and use your expertise to architect cross\-pillar cloud solutions that solve these business challenges. You will drive the technical win and define the delivery and consumption plans. You will use your strategic acumen and presentation skills to engage with technical and business leaders, and persuasively present practical and useful solutions on Google Cloud. You will have excellent technical, communication and organizational skills.
   

  

 Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise\-grade solutions that leverage Google’s technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develop and own the technical account plan and strategy, participating in planning and supporting targeted sales motions.
* Combine sales, programming, and solutions architecture expertise to prove the value of Google Cloud Platform across the portfolio through complex demos, pilots and in\-depth workshops.
* Architect cross\-pillar solutions, drive technical wins, and define initial delivery plans for customers, continue to lead the technical engagement in the solution phase.
* Facilitate the post\-sales transition by supporting pricing activities and transitioning the final delivery plan to implementation teams.
* Maintain awareness of progress against the delivery plan, providing support to cross\-functional teams during ramp, delivery, migration or implementation phases.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

9a89d850.title: MuleSoft Architect
9a89d850.description:
**Req ID:** 374389
  
  

NTT DATA strives to hire exceptional, innovative and passionate individuals who want to grow with us. If you want to be part of an inclusive, adaptable, and forward\-thinking organization, apply now.
  
  

We are currently seeking a MuleSoft Architect to join our team in New Delhi, Delhi (IN\-DL), India (IN).
  
  

Mulesoft Solution Architect (SA)
  
  

**Once You Are Here, You Will:**  

* Develop a comprehensive understanding our client’s needs to create thorough configuration


designs, use cases, test conditions, and training documentation to support the successful
  
implementation of initiatives and processes
  
* Identify and recommend solutions, integration points and related implementation architecture


for business usage improvements, scalability, and performance
  
* Documentbusiness processes and wireframing system designs using process flow diagram tools,


UML, sequence diagrams, etc. as well as making recommendations for future state improved
  
processes and system designs
  
* Ensurethetechnical design aligns to overall enterprise architecture of the client and can scale


with it
  
  

**Required Qualifications:**  

* 6\+ Yearsof experience implementing enterprise level projects in MuleSoft platform
* 2Yearsofexperience creating solutions to business requirement


o Including 3 project implementations that leverage the full capabilities (client, design, implement
  
and optimize) of the MuleSoft platform
  
* 2yearsofexperience working with business and development teams to successfully design and


manage solutions by creating solution design documents, requirement documentation, business
  
process and workflow definitions and gap analysis
  
* Minimumof2\+years’project experience with MuleSoft AnyPoint Platform
* MuleSoft Certification\- Level 1, Level 2, MCIA
* 2Yearsof experience working on an agile projects and large data migration projects


**Preferred Experience:**  

* Excellent written and oral communication skills preferred


**Ideal Mindset:**  

* Visionary. You are responsible for providing the technical vision for the solution.


About NTT DATA
  
  

NTT DATA is a $30 billion business and technology services leader, serving 75% of the Fortune Global 100\. We are committed to accelerating client success and positively impacting society through responsible innovation. We are one of the world's leading AI and digital infrastructure providers, with unmatched capabilities in enterprise\-scale AI, cloud, security, connectivity, data centers and application services. our consulting and Industry solutions help organizations and society move confidently and sustainably into the digital future. As a Global Top Employer, we have experts in more than 50 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as established and start\-up partners. NTT DATA is a part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each year in RD.
  
  

Whenever possible, we hire locally to NTT DATA offices or client sites. This ensures we can provide timely and effective support tailored to each client’s needs. While many positions offer remote or hybrid work options, these arrangements are subject to change based on client requirements. For employees near an NTT DATA office or client site, in\-office attendance may be required for meetings or events, depending on business needs. At NTT DATA, we are committed to staying flexible and meeting the evolving needs of both our clients and employees. NTT DATA recruiters will never ask for payment or banking information and will only use @nttdata.com and @talent.nttdataservices.com email addresses. If you are requested to provide payment or disclose banking information, please submit a contact us form, https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact\-us.
  
  

NTT DATA endeavors to make https://us.nttdata.com accessible to any and all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please contact us at https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact\-us. This contact information is for accommodation requests only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications. NTT DATA is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status. For our EEO Policy Statement, please click here. If you'd like more information on your EEO rights under the law, please click here. For Pay Transparency information, please click here.

5ad702a9.title: AI Solution Architect
5ad702a9.description:
**Role Summary**
 The AI Architect plays a critical role in shaping, designing, and safeguarding how AI solutions are implemented across the organization. This role ensures that AI initiatives are technically feasible, secure, scalable, and aligned with business value while adhering to the company’s AI governance and architectural standards. The focus is on applying AI to real business problems; the AI Architect therefore combines a broad understanding of AI technologies with strong enterprise architecture thinking and business acumen.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* AI solution \& architecture design: translate business needs into robust AI solution architectures; design end\-to\-end AI solutions including data flows, integrations, platform components, and operational requirements; select appropriate models, frameworks, and cloud services.
* Support early\-phase use case exploration: participate in pre\-studies to advise on opportunities and constraints with AI; assess technical feasibility, data needs, and risks; lead PoC design and evaluation.
* Collaborate with internal development teams \& group\-wide AI program: align solutions with group\-wide AI platforms and capabilities; provide architectural guidance during PoC and early implementations.
* Vendor technology assessment \& orchestration: evaluate AI vendors, platforms, and tools; review vendor architectures and integration patterns; ensure vendor solutions comply with internal standards.
* Governance, compliance \& responsible AI: ensure AI designs adhere to governance, privacy, and security policies; support documentation for risk assessments and approvals.
* Enable reusability, standards \& best practices: develop AI architectural guidelines and reusable reference patterns; promote consistency across business units.
* Technology horizon scanning \& thought leadership: monitor industry trends and emerging AI capabilities; advise leadership on relevant opportunities and risks.


**Qualifications**
**Must Have:**
* Experience as a Solution Architect, Enterprise Architect, AI Architect, or similar.
* Broad understanding of AI concepts such as generative AI, Agentic AI, RAG, orchestration frameworks, and vector databases.
* Solid understanding of cloud architecture (Azure, AWS, or similar).
* Experience designing data\-intensive or integration\-based solutions.
* Ability to bridge business and technical perspectives.


**Nice to Have:**
* Experience from applying AI in commercial offerings.
* Experience from Robotic Process Automation.
* Knowledge of MLOps/AIOps principles.
* Experience working with global enterprise environments.


**Personal Characteristics**
* Strong communicator able to simplify complex technology.
* Pragmatic and value\-driven.
* Collaborative, comfortable leading activities in cross\-functional settings and getting things done.
* Curious, adaptive, and able to operate in ambiguous environments.


**We are the ASSA ABLOY Group**
 Our people have made us the global leader in access solutions. In return, we open doors for them wherever they go. With nearly 63,000 colleagues in more than 70 different countries, we help billions of people experience a more open world. Our innovations make all sorts of spaces – physical and virtual – safer, more secure, and easier to access.
   

  

 As an employer, we value results – not titles, or backgrounds. We empower our people to build their career around their aspirations and our ambitions – supporting them with regular feedback, training, and development opportunities. Our colleagues think broadly about where they can make the most impact, and we encourage them to grow their role locally, regionally, or even internationally.
   

  

 As we welcome new people on board, it’s important to us to have diverse, inclusive teams, and we value different perspectives and experiences.

8f25f9e4.title: Tech S and T-DA -SM Architect-MENA-GDSF04
8f25f9e4.description:
At EY, you’ll have the chance to build a career as unique as you are, with the global scale, support, inclusive culture and technology to become the best version of you. And we’re counting on your unique voice and perspective to help EY become even better, too. Join us and build an exceptional experience for yourself, and a better working world for all.
   

  

**Job Description: Digital Technology Architect – MENA**
 We are seeking an experienced Digital Technology Architect to define and shape end\-to\-end technology solutions for complex business opportunities and client engagements. This role is responsible for translating business requirements into scalable, secure, and practical architectures, while supporting proposal development and solution responses. The ideal candidate brings deep hands\-on experience across application development, database design, user interface design, and programming, along with strong expertise in at least one major cloud platform.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design and develop end\-to\-end digital technology solutions aligned with business goals, client requirements, and enterprise architecture standards.
* Lead solution shaping and architecture definition for strategic opportunities, ensuring technical feasibility, scalability, performance, security, and maintainability.
* Craft high\-quality proposal responses, solution write\-ups, technical estimations, and architecture narratives for client bids and pursuits.
* Work closely with business, delivery, engineering, and sales teams to convert requirements into compelling and practical solution approaches.
* Provide architecture leadership across application development, including service design, system integration, APIs, and modern development patterns.
* Define and review database designs, data models, and information flows to support application and business needs.
* Guide user interface and user experience considerations to ensure intuitive, scalable, and effective digital solutions.
* Apply strong programming and development knowledge to evaluate implementation approaches, engineering trade\-offs, and delivery risks.
* Drive architecture best practices, reusable patterns, standards, and governance across the solution lifecycle.
* Serve as a subject matter expert in at least one major cloud provider such as Microsoft Azure, Amazon Web Services, or Google Cloud Platform.
* Collaborate with delivery teams during implementation to ensure architectural integrity and successful execution.
* Support technology evaluations, proof of concepts, and innovation initiatives to strengthen solution quality and competitiveness.


**Required Qualifications**
* 15–18 years of overall experience in technology architecture, software engineering, or related digital technology roles.
* Proven experience in designing enterprise\-grade solutions across applications, data, and integration layers.
* Strong experience in solutioning and responding to proposals, RFPs, RFIs, or client pursuits.
* Deep expertise in at least one major cloud platform, with the ability to architect cloud\-native or hybrid solutions.
* Significant hands\-on exposure to application development, database design, user interfaces, and programming.
* Strong understanding of software architecture principles, design patterns, integration patterns, and non\-functional requirements.
* Ability to communicate complex technical ideas clearly to both technical and business stakeholders.
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Relevant cloud certifications in the chosen cloud platform.
* Experience in digital transformation, modernization, and enterprise solution architecture.
* Exposure to agile delivery, DevSecOps, API\-led integration, and modern engineering practices.
* Experience engaging with senior stakeholders and participating in pre\-sales or consulting discussions.
* Architecture certifications such as TOGAF or equivalent are an advantage.


**Core Competencies**
* Solution architecture and design
* Proposal response and technical solutioning
* Cloud architecture
* Application development and engineering leadership
* Database and data design
* User interface and experience awareness
* Programming and technical problem\-solving
* Stakeholder communication and collaboration


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY exists to build a better working world, helping to create long\-term value for clients, people and society and build trust in the capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data and technology, diverse EY teams in over 150 countries provide trust through assurance and help clients grow, transform and operate.
   

  

 Working across assurance, consulting, law, strategy, tax and transactions, EY teams ask better questions to find new answers for the complex issues facing our world today.

1ae7c712.title: Architect - Enterprise Application Salesforce P 4D
1ae7c712.description:
Architect \- Enterprise Application \- Salesforce P**Ready to turn bold ideas into real\-world impact?**  

 At Genpact, we don’t just adapt to change, we lead it. AI and digital innovation are transforming the way businesses work, and we’re at the forefront of it. Genpact’s AI Gigafactory, our industry\-first accelerator, exemplifies how we scale advanced technology solutions to help global enterprises work smarter, grow faster, and transform at scale. Whether tackling complex challenges through large\-scale models or agentic AI, our breakthrough solutions tackle companies’ most complex challenges.  

  

If you thrive in a fast\-moving, innovation\-driven environment, love building and deploying cutting\-edge AI solutions, and want to push the boundaries of what’s possible, this is your moment.  

  

Genpact (NYSE: G) is an agentic and advanced technology solutions company. We leverage process intelligence and artificial intelligence to deliver measurable outcomes. With a strong partner ecosystem and decades of client trust, we provide innovative solutions that transform how businesses run. Powered by a team with an active learning mindset and client centricity at its core, we deliver lasting value for the world’s leading enterprises.  

 Get to know us at genpact.com and on LinkedIn, YouTube, X, and Facebook.

**Job Description**


Inviting applications for the role of **Senior Principal Consultant, Sr. Leankor Developer**

  

This role is designed for a technical expert can extend and optimize Salesforce managed packages. **Leankor** experience is a plus but should have a deep understanding of how to build custom layers atop complex third\-party applications and manage the technical lifecycle of enterprise\-scale managed packages.

 **Responsibilities:**

* **Managed Package Architecture:** Lead the technical strategy for implementing and extending high\-scale managed packages, ensuring custom code remains compatible with package namespaces and future upgrade paths.

* **Leankor Optimization (Preferred):** Architect custom visual workflows and project management extensions within **Leankor**, leveraging its Kanban, Gantt, and Resource Management components to meet unique enterprise delivery needs.

* **Advanced Custom Development:** Develop high\-performance **Apex (Triggers, Controllers, Batch)** and **Lightning Web Components (LWC)** that interact seamlessly with managed package objects and protected metadata.

* **Package Upgrade Management:** Strategize and execute complex package version updates, performing impact analysis on custom triggers, overrides, and integrations to ensure zero downtime or regression.

* **Technical Governance \& Namespace Management:** Maintain strict adherence to Salesforce best practices regarding **Namespace Prefixes**, avoiding naming conflicts and ensuring robust error handling across the managed/unmanaged boundary.

* **UI/UX Customization:** Design custom interfaces using **Field Sets**, **Custom Settings**, and **LWC** to provide a bespoke user experience that enhances standard managed package layouts (e.g., customizing Leankor’s Project Setup or Board views).

* **Complex Data Modeling:** Design and maintain intricate data relationships between standard Salesforce objects, custom objects, and managed package entities (e.g., linking Leankor Projects to Salesforce Field Service Work Orders).
* **DevOps \& Deployment:** Support the CI/CD strategy for deployments involving managed package dependencies, ensuring stable migrations across sandbox tiers using tools like Copado, Gearset, or Salesforce DX

 **Qualifications we seek in you!**

**Minimum Qualification:**

  

* B.E or B.Tech or MCA
* Relevant experience in Salesforce development, with a strong focus on Field Service.
* Extensive experience with Apex, Visualforce, Lightning Web Components (LWC), and other Salesforce development tools.
* Deep understanding of Salesforce FSL architecture, data model, and functionality.
* Experience with FSL mobile app customization and offline capabilities.
* Proficiency in REST and SOAP APIs, and experience with integrating Salesforce with external systems.
* Strong understanding of object\-oriented programming principles and design patterns.
* Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies.
* Excellent problem\-solving and analytical skills.
* Strong communication and collaboration skills.
* Salesforce certifications (e.g., Platform Developer I/II, Field Service Lightning Consultant) are highly desirable.

 **Preferred Skills:**

* Experience with other Salesforce clouds (e.g., Sales Cloud, Service Cloud).
* Experience with CI/CD and DevOps practices.
* Experience with testing frameworks (e.g., Apex Unit Tests, Jest).

**Qualifications**


Bachelors \- Computer Engineering, Bachelors \- Computer Science, Bachelors \- Information Technology, Masters \- Software Engineering**Certifications**


MuleSoft Certified Developer \- Level 1 \- TrailheadTrailhead**Required Skills**


Agile Methodology, Change Management, Client Relations, Collaboration Tools, Design Thinking, Executive Presence, Inclusion, Modernizing Operations, People Leadership, Personal Effectiveness, Risk Management, Storytelling**Language**


English (Required)**Language Proficiency \-**

Proficient \- C2**Additional Job Location \-**

**Job Type**


Regular**Master Skill List \-**

Enterprise Application Salesforce P**Remote Type \-**

Hybrid**Work Shift \-**

Any (India)**Why join Genpact?**  

* **Lead AI\-powered transformation** – Drive innovation and solve real\-world business challenges that matter
* **Make an impact** – Help global enterprises solve business challenges that matter
* **Accelerate your career** – Gain hands\-on experience, mentorship, and world\-class learning opportunities to stay ahead
* **Work with the best** – Join 140,000\+ bold thinkers and problem\-solvers who push boundaries every day
* **Thrive in a values\-driven culture** – Our courage, curiosity, and incisiveness \- built on a foundation of integrity and inclusion \- allow your ideas to fuel progress


  

Come join the 140,000\+ coders, tech shapers, and growth makers at Genpact and take your career in the only direction that matters: Up.  

Let’s build tomorrow together.  

  

Genpact is an Equal Opportunity Employer and considers applicants for all positions without regard to race, color, religion or belief, sex, age, national origin, citizenship status, marital status, military/veteran status, genetic information, sexual orientation, gender identity, physical or mental disability or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws. Genpact is committed to creating a dynamic work environment that values respect and integrity, customer focus, and innovation.  

Furthermore, please do note that Genpact does not charge fees to process job applications and applicants are not required to pay to participate in our hiring process in any other way. Examples of such scams include purchasing a 'starter kit,' paying to apply, or purchasing equipment or training.
