**Job Description**


Inviting applications for the role of **Senior Principal Consultant** –**Salesforce FSL** **Tech Lead**

  

A Field Service Lightning (FSL) Tech Lead is responsible for leading the technical implementation of Salesforce's Field Service Lightning solution. This role typically involves designing, developing, and deploying FSL functionalities to optimize field service operations.


We are seeking a highly\-skilled Salesforce Technical Lead to design, develop, and manage Salesforce\-based systems and applications. The Technical Lead will be responsible for gathering project requirements, creating scalable solutions, providing data\-driven analysis, and guiding the development team throughout the project. Our ideal candidate has extensive knowledge and experience in the Salesforce CRM platform, its modules, architecture, and best practices. Familiarity with Salesforce development tools and methodologies is vital to excel in this role.


Here are some key responsibilities.

 **Responsibilities:**

* **Owns technical deliveries providing continuous feedback to Project plan, works closely with technical team and the program managers.**
* **Solution Architecture:** Designing scalable and efficient FSL solutions.
* **Implementation \& Configuration:** Setting up FSL data models, work orders, service appointments, and scheduling.
* **Integration:** Connecting FSL with other systems like ERP and Service Cloud.
* **Technical Leadership:** Guiding development teams, reviewing code, and ensuring best practices.
* **Client Interaction:** Understanding business requirements and translating them into technical solutions.
* **Certifications:** Salesforce Field Service Lightning Consultant \& Service Cloud Consultant certifications are often required
* Coordinate will all stakeholders specially with functional and technical team.
* **Understanding the user stories and ability to convert them into feasible solutions specially using out of the box features.**
* **Manage resources and provide technical specs to developers and oversee code reviews.**
* **Mentor junior team members in Salesforce technology, Force.com, Integration Technologies, and Salesforce best practices.**
* **Review codes and development practice, enforcing standard development practices.**
* Candidate should have the ability to contribute Individually, hence hands on experience with Coding, development is a must.
* **CI/CD implementation and release management**

**Qualifications we seek in you!**
==================================

### **Minimum Qualifications / Skills**

* **B.E or B.Tech or MCA**
* Domain knowledge in Salesforce is a must, experience in FSL, Sales cloud/Service Cloud/Data cloud
* **Expertise to develop applications on Force.com Platform**
* **Excellent Lightning, LWC, Aura and APEX code knowledge and extensively worked on Lightning components**
* Proven experience as a Salesforce Technical Lead, with a strong understanding of the Salesforce platform.
* Deep understanding of user\-centered design methods and standard processes.
* Ability to thrive in a fast\-paced, collaborative environment.
* Excellent problem\-solving and communication skills.
* Attention to detail and a strong sense of aesthetics.

### **Preferred Qualifications/ Skills**

* **Certifications in Salesforce Clouds**
* Excellent skills in HMTL5, CSS3 and Javascript
* **Hands on experience on APEX Data Loader/Middleware technologies**
* **Experience in building SOAP, REST enabled applications (Server to Server Web Services)**
* Hands on experience on Salesforce lightning, Angular
* **Object Oriented Programming (OOPs) and is a must Skill. Knowledge (JAVA) is desirable and advantageous.**
* **Knowledge of Salesforce APIs and integration with back\-end systems (Oracle EBS, SAP, etc).**
* **Solid Programming abilities in one or more of the following languages: JAVA, Oracle PL/SQL, JavaScript**
* **Experience working with source control and continuous integration.**


Excellent analytical and problem\-solving skills.

**Qualifications**


Bachelors \- Computer Engineering, Bachelors \- Computer Science, Bachelors \- Information Technology, Masters \- Software Engineering**Certifications**

8406f1f3.title: Lead Solutions Architect - Banking and Capital Markets
8406f1f3.description:
1. **JOB PURPOSE \& SUMMARY**



  





 This role requires a strategic and technically adept Solutions Lead to drive the design and delivery of winning solutions for RFPs, RFIs, and proposals, with a strong focus on the Banking \& Capital Markets (BCM) industry and adjacent financial services verticals. The ideal candidate will combine deep domain expertise in BCM processes, regulatory frameworks, and industry dynamics with proficiency in digital technologies, AI/ML, automation, cloud platforms, and data\-driven transformation to craft innovative, scalable, and client\-centric BPM solutions.
 



  





 The role demands cross\-functional collaboration with Sales, Delivery, Product, and Technology teams to architect end\-to\-end solutions, build compelling value propositions, and engage senior client stakeholders — including CIOs and CTOs — with clarity and executive presence. The individual will also contribute to building reusable solution assets, leveraging market intelligence for competitive positioning, and staying ahead of emerging technology and regulatory trends to strengthen EXL's solutioning capability and win rate in key BCM pursuits.
 



  





  




1. **PRINCIPAL ACCOUNTABILITIES**



  




* **RFP \& Proposal Leadership:** 
 Drive end\-to\-end solutioning for BPM\-related RFPs, RFIs, and proposals across BCM and adjacent financial services verticals.
* **Cross\-Functional Solution Design:** 
 Collaborate with Sales, Delivery, Product, and Technology teams to architect integrated solutions aligned with client goals and growth priorities.
* **Digital\-First BPM Solutioning:** 
 Convert complex business requirements into digital\-first BPM solutions leveraging automation, AI/ML, analytics, and cloud platforms.
* **Solution Architecture \& Value Engineering:** 
 Build solution blueprints, architecture frameworks, and tailored value propositions addressing BCM\-specific challenges — risk, compliance, payments, lending, and capital markets operations.
* **Client Engagement \& Storytelling:** 
 Present and defend solutions to internal and client stakeholders through orals, workshops, and demos with clarity and business impact.
* **Industry \& Regulatory Acumen:** 
 Track BCM industry trends, regulatory shifts, and emerging technologies; support cost modeling, risk assessment, and transition planning for proposed solutions.
* **Reusable Assets \& Accelerators:** 
 Build and refine reusable solution assets, delivery accelerators, and best\-practice playbooks to strengthen solutioning capability and reduce turnaround time.
* **Market Insights \& Competitive Intelligence:** 
 Leverage market intelligence to anticipate demand, shape Data \& AI offerings, and sharpen EXL's competitive positioning in BCM pursuits.
* **Tech Savviness \& Data \& AI Proficiency:** 
 Engage CIOs/CTOs with compelling, context\-driven articulation of EXL's Data \& AI capabilities within the client's technology landscape.



  





  




1. **SKILLS AND KNOWLEDGE**



  





  




* **Domain \& Industry Expertise:** 
 Deep understanding of Banking \& Capital Markets processes, systems, and regulatory/compliance landscape, with exposure to adjacent industries (e.g., Retail \& CPG, financial services).
* **BPM \& Technology Proficiency:** 
 Strong working knowledge of BPM platforms (e.g., Appian), AI/ML, RPA, data analytics, cloud ecosystems (AWS, Azure, GCP), and data platforms (Snowflake, Databricks).
* **RFP \& Solutioning Experience:** 
 Proven track record in crafting responses for large, complex RFPs and client engagements, with experience working across global delivery and offshore models.
* **Communication \& Executive Presence:** 
 Excellent presentation and stakeholder management skills with the ability to articulate complex Data \& AI concepts with clarity and impact across all levels — from ICs to C\-suite.
* **Analytical \& Creative Thinking:** 
 Strong analytical acumen combined with compelling storytelling skills to craft differentiated value propositions and drive creative, client\-specific solutions.
* **Customer\-First \& Commercial Acumen:** 
 Customer\-centric mindset with strong commercial judgment, long\-term relationship orientation, and the ability to translate client needs into high\-impact outcomes.
* **Ownership \& Execution Intensity:** 
 High accountability and execution drive in ambiguous, high\-stakes environments to bring order to complexity.
* **Collaboration \& Orchestration:** 
 Naturally collaborative with the ability to operate effectively across matrixed, global teams — delivering integrated, end\-to\-end solutions with clarity and decisiveness.
* **Curiosity \& Market Awareness:** 
 Passion for emerging technologies (Data, AI, Cloud, Digital) with a proactive approach to staying ahead of enterprise trends and translating them into client\-relevant solutions.



  





  




1. **Educational Qualifications \& Relevant years of Experience**



  





**Required** 



* **Bachelor’s degree** 
 in Business, Economics, Engineering, Technology, or a related discipline.



**Preferred (but not mandatory)** 



* **Master’s degree (MBA or equivalent)** 
 from a reputed institution, with a focus on Strategy, Marketing, Finance, or General Management.
* **10\+ years of experience** 
 in digital transformation, or solution architecture roles particularly in BCM industry and other related services industries.

1c988343.title: Senior Cloud Infrastructure Engineer
1c988343.description:
**Meet the Team**
 Join Cisco’s Enterprise AI team, the core group enabling Generative AI powered experiences across Cisco. Our mission is to build secure, scalable AI platforms that empower teams to safely develop, deploy, and operationalize AI\-powered solutions. We operate at the intersection of applied AI, cloud infrastructure and security \- partnering across engineering, security, compliance, and product teams to bring trusted AI to life at an enterprise scale.
   

  

 We are a fast\-growing, highly collaborative team of platform engineers, AI engineers, and data scientists who value technical depth, ownership, and pragmatic execution. What makes this team exciting is the opportunity to define how secure Generative AI is built and governed inside a global technology leader.
   

  

 As a Senior SRE in our India hub, you will tackle complex networking and service mesh challenges across a global footprint. Your expertise in Anthos and Istio will be critical in maintaining the high\-availability platform that powers Cisco's most advanced AI initiatives.
   

  

**Your Impact**
* Develop and maintain Terraform scripts to provision and manage scalable GCP and On\-premise Kubernetes resources and Docker containers.
* Configure and optimize Anthos Service Mesh (ASM) and Istio for service\-to\-service communication, security, and observability.
* Implement and audit IAM roles and GCP Quotas, ensuring the environment is "Secure by Design" with robust encryption and secrets updates.
* Build and leverage observability dashboards using Elasticsearch and Kibana to monitor system health and provide proactive alerts on performance and cost.
* Execute capacity planning and scaling for new feature rollouts, ensuring the environment stays within defined cost envelopes and security standards.


**Minimum Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Engineering or a related technical discipline.
* 10\+ years of hands\-on experience in Cloud/On\-prem Operations or DevOps.
* Strong proficiency in Terraform, Kubernetes, and Docker.
* Extensive experience with IAM implementation, GCP Quota management, and Anthos Service Mesh (ASM)/Istio.
* Proven experience with Apigee and the ELK stack.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with Jenkins, Spinnaker, and GitHub for automated delivery.
* Proven ability to manage hybrid traffic between cloud and on\-premise platforms.
* Strong analytical skills for cost envelope management and capacity planning.
* Advanced proficiency with cloud provider CLIs and automation scripting.


 Why Cisco?
   

  

 At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
   

  

 Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
   

  

 We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

ae18c5cd.title: Associate Azure Cloud Consultant
ae18c5cd.description:
**Role overview** 




 We are a Microsoft Solutions Partner and managed services provider. As an Azure Associate Consultant, you will manage and support Azure cloud infrastructure environments for multiple clients simultaneously. Your work spans virtual machines, networking, storage, backup, disaster recovery, and Windows Server infrastructure running on Azure.
 



 This is not a single\-client internal IT role. You manage several client environments in parallel, own your tickets end to end, and are expected to proactively monitor and flag issues before clients notice them. You will work alongside a delivery team and report to the Services Manager.
 



  





**Roles and responsibilities** 




 Manage and support Azure infrastructure across client environments — virtual machines, availability sets, disks, snapshots, and resource groups
 


* Administer Azure networking — VNets, subnets, NSGs, VPN gateways, peering, DNS, and Azure Firewall
* Manage Azure Backup and Azure Site Recovery (ASR) — configure backup policies, monitor jobs, test recovery, and handle restore requests
* Administer Azure Virtual Desktop (AVD) — host pools, session hosts, application groups, and user access
* Manage Windows Server environments on Azure — installation, configuration, patching, and troubleshooting
* Administer Active Directory (AD DS) — user and group management, OUs, GPOs, DNS, DHCP, and replication health
* Monitor Azure resource health, performance metrics, and alerts — respond to incidents and perform root cause analysis
* Use PowerShell and Azure CLI to automate routine administrative tasks and generate client reports
* Prepare monthly managed services reports covering resource health, backup status, incidents, and recommendations
* Maintain SOPs, runbooks, and client\-specific documentation for all managed environments



  





**Must have** 



* 2–4 years of hands\-on Azure infrastructure experience
* Azure compute — VM deployment, sizing, availability sets, scale sets, and troubleshooting
* Azure networking — VNets, NSGs, VPN gateways, DNS, load balancers, and basic firewall configuration
* Azure Backup and Azure Site Recovery — policy configuration, monitoring, and restore operations
* Windows Server administration — installation, patching, roles and features, event log analysis
* Active Directory (AD DS) — users, groups, OUs, GPOs, DNS, DHCP, and replication
* PowerShell — must be comfortable writing and adapting scripts for Azure resource management and reporting
* At least one active Microsoft certification — AZ\-104 strongly preferred; AZ\-900 with AZ\-104 in progress acceptable
* Good written and spoken English — you will communicate directly with clients on incidents and monthly reports



  





**Good to Have** 



* Azure Virtual Desktop (AVD) — host pool management, FSLogix, and session host troubleshooting
* Azure Monitor and Log Analytics — alert rules, dashboards, and query basics
* Microsoft Entra Connect (AAD Connect) — hybrid identity sync and basic troubleshooting
* Azure Storage — blob, file shares, and lifecycle management
* Basic understanding of SQL Server on Azure — managed instances or IaaS SQL
* Linux server administration basics



  





**What we are not looking for** 



* Candidates with only theoretical or certification\-level Azure knowledge and no hands\-on production environment experience
* Profiles from single large enterprise internal IT environments with no multi\-client or consulting exposure
* Anyone who treats monitoring as someone else’s job — proactive alerting and incident ownership is core to this role



  





**What good looks like beyond the tech** 



* Monitors client environments proactively — catches backup failures, VM performance degradation, or replication lag before the client raises a ticket
* Communicates clearly on incidents — updates clients with what happened, what was done, and what was put in place to prevent recurrence
* Documents everything — runbooks, incident RCAs, and monthly reports are delivered on time and are genuinely useful
* Manages multiple client environments without mixing up configurations — organised and disciplined about environment separation

5d141266.title: Architect - Enterprise Application Salesforce P 4D
5d141266.description:
Architect \- Enterprise Application \- Salesforce P**Ready to turn bold ideas into real\-world impact?**  

 At Genpact, we don’t just adapt to change, we lead it. AI and digital innovation are transforming the way businesses work, and we’re at the forefront of it. Genpact’s AI Gigafactory, our industry\-first accelerator, exemplifies how we scale advanced technology solutions to help global enterprises work smarter, grow faster, and transform at scale. Whether tackling complex challenges through large\-scale models or agentic AI, our breakthrough solutions tackle companies’ most complex challenges.  

  

If you thrive in a fast\-moving, innovation\-driven environment, love building and deploying cutting\-edge AI solutions, and want to push the boundaries of what’s possible, this is your moment.  

  

Genpact (NYSE: G) is an agentic and advanced technology solutions company. We leverage process intelligence and artificial intelligence to deliver measurable outcomes. With a strong partner ecosystem and decades of client trust, we provide innovative solutions that transform how businesses run. Powered by a team with an active learning mindset and client centricity at its core, we deliver lasting value for the world’s leading enterprises.  

 Get to know us at genpact.com and on LinkedIn, YouTube, X, and Facebook.

**Job Description**


Inviting applications for the role of **Senior** **Principal Consultant, Sr. Leankor Developer**

  

This role is designed for a technical expert can extend and optimize Salesforce managed packages. **Leankor** experience is a plus but should have a deep understanding of how to build custom layers atop complex third\-party applications and manage the technical lifecycle of enterprise\-scale managed packages.

 **Responsibilities:**

* **Managed Package Architecture:** Lead the technical strategy for implementing and extending high\-scale managed packages, ensuring custom code remains compatible with package namespaces and future upgrade paths.

* **Leankor Optimization (Preferred):** Architect custom visual workflows and project management extensions within **Leankor**, leveraging its Kanban, Gantt, and Resource Management components to meet unique enterprise delivery needs.

* **Advanced Custom Development:** Develop high\-performance **Apex (Triggers, Controllers, Batch)** and **Lightning Web Components (LWC)** that interact seamlessly with managed package objects and protected metadata.

* **Package Upgrade Management:** Strategize and execute complex package version updates, performing impact analysis on custom triggers, overrides, and integrations to ensure zero downtime or regression.

* **Technical Governance \& Namespace Management:** Maintain strict adherence to Salesforce best practices regarding **Namespace Prefixes**, avoiding naming conflicts and ensuring robust error handling across the managed/unmanaged boundary.

* **UI/UX Customization:** Design custom interfaces using **Field Sets**, **Custom Settings**, and **LWC** to provide a bespoke user experience that enhances standard managed package layouts (e.g., customizing Leankor’s Project Setup or Board views).

* **Complex Data Modeling:** Design and maintain intricate data relationships between standard Salesforce objects, custom objects, and managed package entities (e.g., linking Leankor Projects to Salesforce Field Service Work Orders).
* **DevOps \& Deployment:** Support the CI/CD strategy for deployments involving managed package dependencies, ensuring stable migrations across sandbox tiers using tools like Copado, Gearset, or Salesforce DX

 **Qualifications we seek in you!**

**Minimum Qualification:**

  

* B.E or B.Tech or MCA
* Relevant experience in Salesforce development, with a strong focus on Field Service.
* Extensive experience with Apex, Visualforce, Lightning Web Components (LWC), and other Salesforce development tools.
* Deep understanding of Salesforce FSL architecture, data model, and functionality.
* Experience with FSL mobile app customization and offline capabilities.
* Proficiency in REST and SOAP APIs, and experience with integrating Salesforce with external systems.
* Strong understanding of object\-oriented programming principles and design patterns.
* Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies.
* Excellent problem\-solving and analytical skills.
* Strong communication and collaboration skills.
* Salesforce certifications (e.g., Platform Developer I/II, Field Service Lightning Consultant) are highly desirable.

 **Preferred Skills:**

* Experience with other Salesforce clouds (e.g., Sales Cloud, Service Cloud).
* Experience with CI/CD and DevOps practices.
* Experience with testing frameworks (e.g., Apex Unit Tests, Jest).

**Qualifications**


Bachelors \- Computer Engineering, Bachelors \- Computer Science, Bachelors \- Information Technology, Masters \- Software Engineering**Certifications**


MuleSoft Certified Developer \- Level 1 \- TrailheadTrailhead**Required Skills**


Agile Methodology, Change Management, Client Relations, Collaboration Tools, Design Thinking, Executive Presence, Inclusion, Modernizing Operations, People Leadership, Personal Effectiveness, Risk Management, Storytelling**Language**

Proficient \- C2**Additional Job Location \-**

Any (India)**Why join Genpact?**  

* **Lead AI\-powered transformation** – Drive innovation and solve real\-world business challenges that matter
* **Make an impact** – Help global enterprises solve business challenges that matter
* **Accelerate your career** – Gain hands\-on experience, mentorship, and world\-class learning opportunities to stay ahead
* **Work with the best** – Join 140,000\+ bold thinkers and problem\-solvers who push boundaries every day
* **Thrive in a values\-driven culture** – Our courage, curiosity, and incisiveness \- built on a foundation of integrity and inclusion \- allow your ideas to fuel progress


  

Come join the 140,000\+ coders, tech shapers, and growth makers at Genpact and take your career in the only direction that matters: Up.  

Let’s build tomorrow together.  

  

Genpact is an Equal Opportunity Employer and considers applicants for all positions without regard to race, color, religion or belief, sex, age, national origin, citizenship status, marital status, military/veteran status, genetic information, sexual orientation, gender identity, physical or mental disability or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws. Genpact is committed to creating a dynamic work environment that values respect and integrity, customer focus, and innovation.  

Furthermore, please do note that Genpact does not charge fees to process job applications and applicants are not required to pay to participate in our hiring process in any other way. Examples of such scams include purchasing a 'starter kit,' paying to apply, or purchasing equipment or training.

40d345f1.description:
**About Grexa** 




 Grexa AI is a venture\-backed startup on a mission to build the world’s first Marketing AI Platform for small businesses \- a fully autonomous system that drives Real Revenue by automating and optimizing digital marketing.
 



  





 Founded by 4 seasoned IIT alumni and former Testbook Founders / CXOs (scaled to $30Mn ARR business with 1,000\+ employees, successfully acquired by a leading edtech company), the team brings deep product expertise, execution speed, and a track record of building at scale.
 



  





 We’re funded, building fast, and assembling a high\-performing team to disrupt the global digital marketing space from India. If you’re excited to solve real problems and build transformative AI products \- this is your calling.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Create and implement processes to deeply understand the client’s business as well as to onboard them such that they integrate Grexa into their daily operations confidently.
* Continuously monitor client engagement metrics to identify opportunities for optimization, proactively intervening to enhance platform adoption and satisfaction.
* Act as the strategic bridge between clients and internal teams, ensuring seamless resolution of operational needs while driving continuous improvement.
* Champion the voice of the client by collecting rich feedback and delivering it as actionable insights to influence product development and service innovation.
* Strategically identify growth opportunities among clients, advising clients on how to unlock more value through advanced features and tailored solutions.
* Own the client journey end\-to\-end such that Grexa’s renewal and revenue expansion objectives are met.



  





**Requirements** 



* **2\+ years of work experience** 
 in Program Management, Operations, or Growth roles etc
* Should have experience in
 **driving renewals, upsells/cross sells.**
* **Educational background from a Tier 1 institution (IITs, IIMs, top engineering or business schools preferred)**
* Experience in designing and scaling operational processes.
* Experienced in successfully
 **managing a team of 5\-10** 
 team members.
* Strong problem\-solving skills with a focus on execution and delivering results.
* Proactive, detail\-oriented, and outcomes\-driven — someone who can solve on\-ground problems in real time
* Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills.
* Proficiency in basic tech tools like CRM systems, Excel, WhatsApp APIs, marketing tools, etc.



  





**Why Join Us** 



* A high\-growth environment with real ownership from day one — this is not just a role, it’s a launchpad for your career
* Work directly with founders and cross\-functional teams on impactful client journeys and product feedback loops
* Energy and agility of a startup with structured processes that support long\-term growth
* Tools, support, and mentorship to fast\-track your learning curve
* Access to cutting\-edge AI\-driven solutions and automation technology
* Opportunity to be part of a mission that’s transforming how businesses scale and serve their clients

d64bb7ff.title: Associate Engagement Manager
d64bb7ff.description:
**Job Requirements**
 At Quest Global, it’s not just what we do but how and why we do it that makes us different. With over 25 years as an engineering services provider, we believe in the power of doing things differently to make the impossible possible. Our people are driven by the desire to make the world a better place—to make a positive difference that contributes to a brighter future. We bring together technologies and industries, alongside the contributions of diverse individuals who are empowered by an intentional workplace culture, to solve problems better and faster.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Account Planning \& Account Management: Develop detailed plans for the account, including setting objectives, identifying key stakeholders, and outlining strategies for growth. Oversee Account P\&L Mgt and Keep all QG stakeholders updated on account progress.
* Building Relationships \& Influence Customer Decision Makers: Utilize Quest Global relationships to influence customer decision\-makers, monitor milestones, track action item progress, and lead the campaign effort. Leverage current professional network, existing company relationships.
* Pitching Quest Global Differentiation to Clients: Understand and effectively communicate Quest’s value proposition and differentiators. Build deep understanding of the client's business, industry trends, and competitive landscape. Work with leadership to enhance these from the perspective of current and future clients.
* Driving Campaigns: Create and implement plans and proposals to achieve the revenue target from the account on a quarterly basis.
* Supporting Account\-Based Marketing Initiatives: Collaborate with the marketing team to develop and support account\-based marketing initiatives that align with the strategic goals.
* Understand Customer Pain Points and delivering Customer Specific Solutions: Leverage industry knowledge, to build engineering solutions tailored to client needs.


 We are known for our extraordinary people who make the impossible possible every day. Questians are driven by hunger, humility, and aspiration. We believe that our company culture is the key to our ability to make a true difference in every industry we reach. Our teams regularly invest time and dedicated effort into internal culture work, ensuring that all voices are heard.
   

  

 We wholeheartedly believe in the diversity of thought that comes with fostering a culture rooted in respect, where everyone belongs, is valued, and feels inspired to share their ideas. We know embracing our unique differences makes us better, and that solving the worlds hardest engineering problems requires diverse ideas, perspectives, and backgrounds. We shine the brightest when we tap into the many dimensions that thrive across over 21,000 difference\-makers in our workplace.
   

  

**Work Experience**
* Business Acumen \& Strategic Thinking
* Analyzes complex data and trends to shape business direction and anticipate potential impacts.
* Integrate current and future trends into strategic actions to refine go\-to\-market approaches and investment priorities
* Communicates strategic outcomes and seeks team input to facilitate dynamic discussions on strategy.
* Customer Focus
* Build trusted relationships with stakeholders.
* Understands client personas and develops business cases to engage clients and drive growth.
* Establishes and strengthens executive\-level relationships in customer organizations for key accounts.
* Execution Excellence and Accountability
* Drives for improvement of business results and higher levels of performance
* Ensure transparency and accountability by managing customer periodic reviews and leading monthly report\-outs
* Monitors milestones and tracks action item progress to ensure successful execution of plans
* Communication \& Interpersonal Skills
* Communicates effectively at all levels, both verbally and in writing.
* Builds strong, influential relationships at a global level through excellent interpersonal skills
* Collaborates across functions to drive comprehensive solutions and achieve.

6b495774.title: Program Manager - Technology / IT
6b495774.description:
Role Requirements
**What We're Looking For**
--------------------------


Everything you need to know about this role — responsibilities and the skills we value.


01
### **Job Description**


**Product Strategy \& Product Management**  

  



Collaborate with leadership to define product vision, roadmap, and long\-term technology strategy.


Convert business requirements into well\-defined product features and technical deliverables.


Own product lifecycle management from ideation to production release.


Gather and prioritize customer feedback, market trends, and competitive insights.


Define Product Requirement Documents (PRDs), user stories, feature specifications,
  

and acceptance criteria.


Prioritize product backlog based on business value, customer impact, and technical
  

feasibility.


Drive feature planning for AI products, enterprise platforms, and SaaS offerings.


**Technical Program Management**  

  



Lead multiple cross\-functional technical programs simultaneously.


Own execution of complex AI and software engineering initiatives.


Define program goals, milestones, dependencies, and release schedules.


Coordinate engineering efforts across backend, frontend, AI, infrastructure, DevOps, and QA teams.


Manage interdependencies between multiple engineering workstreams.


Identify execution risks early and proactively drive mitigation plans.


Ensure alignment between engineering execution and business objectives.


**Project Management**  

  



Develop detailed project plans with timelines, deliverables, resource allocation, and milestones.


Drive Agile ceremonies including sprint planning, stand\-ups, retrospectives, and release planning.


Track project progress and remove execution bottlenecks.


Manage project scope, timelines, budgets, and stakeholder expectations.


Ensure predictable delivery with measurable outcomes.


Monitor engineering velocity, sprint health, and delivery metrics.


**AI \& Technical Leadership**  

  



Partner with Engineering Managers, Architects, Product Managers, and Technical Leads to drive the successful execution of engineering initiatives.


Develop a strong understanding of the product architecture, system design, APIs, cloud infrastructure, and software development lifecycle to effectively manage technical programs.


Coordinate development across Backend, Frontend, Mobile, AI, DevOps, QA,
  

Security, and Infrastructure teams.


Facilitate technical discussions to identify dependencies, risks, implementation strategies, and delivery milestones.


Work with engineering teams to estimate effort, prioritize technical debt, and balance feature development with platform stability.


Ensure engineering best practices, coding standards, release processes, and quality benchmarks are followed across projects.


Monitor technical progress, resolve cross\-team blockers, and ensure alignment between engineering execution and business priorities.


Support architecture reviews and design discussions by driving decision\-making, documentation, and stakeholder alignment without being directly responsible for solution design.


Coordinate product releases, production deployments, and post\-release monitoring in collaboration with Engineering and DevOps teams.


Stay informed about emerging technologies, AI trends, cloud platforms, and
  

enterprise software practices to make informed program and product decisions, without requiring deep hands\-on expertise.


**Cross\-Functional Leadership**  

  



Act as the central point of coordination between Product, Engineering, AI Research, Design, QA, Security, DevOps, Customer Success, Sales, and Leadership.


Foster collaboration across distributed technical teams.


Drive decision\-making through structured discussions and data\-backed insights.


Facilitate executive reviews and program governance meetings.


**Customer \& Business Engagement**  

  



Engage with enterprise customers to understand business challenges and product requirements.


Translate customer needs into scalable technical solutions.


Participate in solution discussions, product demonstrations, and strategic customer
  

meetings.


Support pre\-sales and post\-sales teams during enterprise implementations.


**Execution \& Delivery Excellence**  

  



Ensure timely delivery of high\-quality product releases.


Define release plans and deployment strategies.


Coordinate UAT, production rollout, and post\-release monitoring.


Drive continuous improvement in engineering processes.


Establish measurable KPIs for product success and engineering efficiency.


02
### **Required Skills \& Qualifications**


* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, Electronics, or related field.
* MBA, M.Tech, or equivalent postgraduate qualification is preferred.
* Experience working in AI, SaaS, Cloud, Enterprise Software, or Platform Products.
* Strong understanding of software development lifecycle and Agile product development. Required Competencies
* Strong technical aptitude with product thinking.
* Ability to balance customer needs with engineering feasibility.
* Excellent leadership and stakeholder management skills.
* Exceptional communication and presentation abilities.
* Strong analytical and data\-driven decision\-making skills.
* Ability to influence without direct authority.
* High ownership, accountability, and execution focus.
* Comfortable managing ambiguity in a fast\-paced startup environment.
* Strategic thinker with a bias for action and execution.
  


Job Overview


Department


Project \& Program Management


Location


Bangalore


Job Type


Full\-Time


Work Mode


Hybrid


Experience


5\-10 Years


Date Posted


24 July 2026


As a Technical Program Manager, you will own the complete lifecycle of strategic AI products and platformsfrom product planning and roadmap definition to engineering execution, customer rollout, and continuous improvement. You will work directly with leadership, product teams, engineering managers, AI researchers, customers, and business stakeholders to prioritize initiatives, define execution strategies, monitor product health, and ensure timely delivery of enterprise\-grade AI solutions. This role requires someone who is equally comfortable discussing LLM architectures with engineers, business priorities with leadership, and customer requirements with enterprise clients.

6ed14e65.title: Senior Engineering Program Manager
6ed14e65.description:
**Job Description**
 Adobe InDesign is the industry\-leading page design software and layout app that lets you create, preflight and publish beautiful documents for print and digital media. InDesign has everything you need to make posters, books, digital magazines, eBooks, interactive PDFs and more.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Knowledge \& Skills
   

  

* Exhibits a high degree of autonomy and is determined. Should be a go\-getter who can multitask and manage multiple initiatives at once.
* Excellent verbal, presentation, and written communication skills.
* Have a good understanding of Gen AI tech stack.
* Ability to build dashboards using AI tools that can automate status reporting, progress tracking and tracking risks.
* Leads by example. Sets high standards \& communicates expectations of high achievement to others.
* Establishes credibility with peers and senior managers and is a driving force for change across the organization.
* Ability to tie team objectives back to the broader organizational objectives and goals.
* Proven track record of influencing without authority while being adept at team member management and conflict management.
* Should have good knowledge of a software product development lifecycle.
* Recommend and champion process improvement with an intent to drive efficiency and optimisation.
* Knowledge of agile development techniques and project management tools.
* Strong conflict resolution and negotiation skills.
* Executive presentation skills are required
* Bias to action and willingness to question established processes in favour of optimisation and incorporation of industry\-wide standard processes
* Ability to communicate in a geographically distributed environment with diverse collaborators such as Product marketing, Legal, Finance \& Operations and function in ambiguous situations while bringing clarity.


 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Coordinate all aspects of the business for development and release of technologies, products, features \& functions in the InDesign organization.
* Build the project schedule, including putting together the framework and identifying dependencies—negotiating with 3rd parties/internal teams.
* Balance the current tasks with future asks such that we are simultaneously working on a release while preparing for the next
* Understand and assess critical paths and dependencies for delivering and shipping products/services and facilitate discussions between product/client teams, product management, and engineering.
* Effectively negotiate, persuade and motivate extended project teams \& senior management across BUs, provide justifiable proposals and recommendations, and clearly outline courses of action to follow.
* Assess future challenges on projects and initiatives and mobilize immediate and extended team members to take action, proactively addressing issues.
* Initiate, champion, develop and effectively complete plans for change (new process, tool, etc) and drive adoption across multiple teams.
* Identify, track, monitor and communicate project\-related issues, scope changes, variances and contingencies arising during project implementation.
* Implement process improvements, including identifying the problem areas and process improvements – some cross\-product or cross\-BU focus.
* Bring up and resolve issues timely, including problems that impact multiple projects. Propose workable solutions to complex problems while considering the needs of all teams that are impacted.
* Manage multiple competing projects or tasks independently, effectively balancing work between critical short\-term issues with longer\-term strategic goals.
* Leverage data to drive key decisions and changes in the team.
* Leverage automation for recurring tasks.
* Drive repeatable and quantifiable processes that can help team function autonomously
* Evaluate existing processes and procedures. Make recommendations and drive process improvement and adoption of guidelines (processes, tools, etc) to improve team efficiency and effectiveness.

14185442.title: Program Manager/Lead, Program Management (DESIS Tech PMO)
14185442.company: D. E. Shaw India Private Limited
14185442.description:
The D. E. Shaw group is a global investment and technology development firm with more than $100 billion in investment capital as of June 1, 2026, and offices in North America, Europe, and Asia. Since our founding in 1988, our firm has earned an international reputation for successful investing based on innovation, careful risk management, and the quality and depth of our staff. We have a significant presence in the world’s capital markets, investing in a wide range of companies and financial instruments in both developed and developing economies.
   

  

 We are looking for an exceptional individual to join the Tech Portfolio Management Office (PMO) in the firm’s office in Hyderabad. This team serves as the strategy office for the Head of the DESIS Tech Business Unit (BU) encompassing over 1,200 technical staff in India. DESIS Tech PMO acts as a centralized backbone, providing strategic consultations to the Tech leadership group, driving firm\- and BU\-wide initiatives, and compiling analytics and insights to empower leadership decision\-making. This is a role for a “Technologist with Strategic Aspirations”. It requires deep technical fluency (gained from significant hands\-on software development experience) combined with high\-level organizational strategy skills (demonstrated by education and/or experience collaborating with senior leadership). You will engage with engineering leads on system design or similar technical discussions, serving as a bridge between engineering and business\-level strategy.
   

  

**WHAT YOU'LL DO DAY\-TO\-DAY:**
 In this role, you will partner with the relevant stakeholders (Tech leadership, team leads) to work on BU\-wide tech strategies, programs, and initiatives. Specifically, you will serve as a technical thought partner on technical strategy and decision making, evaluate the technical health of programs, identifying short\- and long\-term risks before they impact the business. You will lead and coordinate complex, cross\-departmental projects and deliver actionable business intelligence by working with complex datasets and synthesizing insights for leadership. Additionally, you will encourage and institutionalize a culture of high performance, collaboration, and continuous improvement.
   

  

**WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:**
 The ideal candidate should hold\-
   

  

 Basic qualifications:
   

  

* Overall work experience of 4 to 8 years with a minimum of 3 years of software engineering experience
* A degree in computer science engineering or a related technical field; an MBA (or equivalent) from a premier institution would be a plus
* Software engineering experience in areas such as full\-stack development, backend systems, and/or data engineering
* Proficiency in System Design (HLD/LLD) with the ability to whiteboard solutions and share technically sound opinions about technology/architecture choices
* Good grasp of modern technology development tools and development processes of enterprise\-scale products
* Proven ability to manage multiple strategic programs, including end\-to\-end planning, execution, and cross\-team collaboration
* Comfort working with ambiguity, navigating dynamic environments, and aligning the perspectives of diverse stakeholders (from technical engineers to senior executives)
* Exceptional verbal and written communication skills, the ability to confidently interact with both senior management and technical teams in a multicultural, global context


 Preferred qualifications:
   

  

* Experience in management consulting and/or program management (ideally in a technology\-driven organization e.g., office of the Chief Technology Officer)


 Interested candidates can apply through our website: https://www.deshawindia.com/recruit/jobs/Ads/Link/TechPMOLeadJuly26
   

  

 We encourage candidates with relevant experience looking to restart their careers after a break to apply for this position. Learn about Recommence, our gender\-neutral return\-to\-work initiative.
   

  

 The Firm offers excellent benefits, a casual, collegial working environment, and an attractive compensation package. For further information about our recruitment process, including how applicant data will be processed, please visit https://www.deshawindia.com/careers
   

  

 Members of the D. E. Shaw group do not discriminate in employment matters on the basis of sex, race, colour, caste, creed, religion, pregnancy, national origin, age, military service eligibility, veteran status, sexual orientation, marital status, disability, or any other protected class.

8d921577.title: Engineering Program Manager 5
8d921577.description:
**Job Description**
 Adobe stands out as a top player in customer intelligence. We have solutions to empower our enterprises to understand their customers as people – what they want, need, and believe and to leverage insights to help business deliver the most delightful customer experiences.
   

  

 Our engineering team is responsible for uniquely poised to offer its services to build solutions to bring the delightful experience and intelligence in a far superior way which otherwise would not have been to manage and bring value to our customers. We help them make sense of that data, glean insights and run algorithms, so they can deliver delightful experiences in real\-time, every time.
   

  

 Building a robust fault tolerant and highly available system at very high scale while providing ease and convenience to disparate solutions and enterprise customer team is a key to our success. We use Big Data, Open source technologies and home grown solutions to develop various services for Adobe Solutions, Customers and Partners.
   

  

 We support very large enterprise products to support their customers spread across geographies. This requires disparate data sources and ingestion mechanism. The data has to be made easily accessible at very low latency to support different scenarios and use cases. We are looking for dedicated individuals with extensive experience in developing low latency services at a significant level. The candidates would be leading our path to accomplish our vision.
   

  

**What You Will Need To Succeed**
* 12 to 15 years of proven experience in technical program management, with a strong focus on advanced AI technologies and enterprise scale implementations
* Strong technical literacy in software engineering, AI and ML systems and cloud infrastructure, with practical understanding of model deployment, scaling and integration into enterprise platforms.
* Strong exposure to Generative AI and emerging agentic systems, including experience driving adoption of large language models, autonomous agents and AI powered applications from concept to production
* 3 to 4 years of people management experience with the ability to lead, mentor and grow high performing engineering and program teams
* Outstanding skills in negotiation, influencing, and collaborator management, capable of aligning executive leadership and engineering teams around intricate AI initiatives
* Proven ability to manage ambiguity and provide clear direction in dynamic, rapidly evolving technology landscapes
* Experience managing global, cross functional programs and assignments within matrixed organizations
* Familiarity with or experience working in startup or high growth environments, where new technologies and experimentation are central to success
* Exceptional critical thinking combined with strong operational execution, ensuring alignment between long term AI strategy and near term deliverables
* Excellent communication, presentation and executive presence skills to engage with senior leadership and diverse customer groups
* Ability to act as a trusted partner to senior technology teams, coordinating initiatives in AI and advanced systems and driving complex programs to successful outcomes


 At Adobe, you will be immersed in an exceptional work environment that is recognised throughout the world on Best Companies list. you will also be surrounded by colleagues who are committed to helping each other grow through our unique Check\-In approach where ongoing feedback flows freely.
   

  

 If you're looking to build a difference, Adobe's the place for you. discover what our employees are saying about their career experiences on the Adobe life blog and explore meaningful benefits we offer.

0a5d0f3f.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
0a5d0f3f.description:
**Role : Senior Technical Program Manager** 




  





**ABOUT THE ROLE** 




  





 Rafay is seeking a hands\-on Senior Technical Program Management to lead strategic customer deployments and drive execution across Rafay’s Kubernetes and GPU PaaS platform initiatives. This is a highly visible leadership role responsible for overseeing complex enterprise implementations while remaining deeply engaged in technical delivery, customer architecture discussions, and cross\-functional execution.
 



  





 The ideal candidate combines strong program leadership with deep technical expertise in Kubernetes, cloud infrastructure, GPU/AI workloads, and enterprise platform delivery. This leader will serve as a trusted advisor to customers and internal stakeholders, helping drive successful onboarding, modernization, migration, and adoption initiatives across large\-scale enterprise environments.
 



  





 Unlike a traditional people\-management\-only director role, this position requires hands\-on involvement in technical project execution, customer solutioning, escalation management, and operational leadership.
 



  





**TOP 3 REQUIRED SKILLS / EXPERIENCE** 




  





 • Proven leadership managing complex enterprise technical programs and customer\-facing implementations in cloud, Kubernetes, AI/ML, or infrastructure environments.
 



 • Deep technical expertise in Kubernetes, GPU workloads, cloud platforms, containers, and modern infrastructure architectures.
 



 • Strong executive communication and stakeholder management skills with the ability to influence customer leadership, engineering teams, and cross\-functional partners. RESPONSIBILITIES
 



 • Lead and oversee strategic customer implementations for Rafay’s Kubernetes and GPU PaaS platform offerings across EMEA.
 



 • Serve as the primary technical program leader for large\-scale onboarding, migration, modernization, and platform adoption initiatives.
 



 • Drive program execution across multiple concurrent enterprise engagements while maintaining hands\-on involvement in technical planning and delivery.
 



 • Partner directly with customer engineering, platform, infrastructure, DevOps, and executive stakeholders to define scope, align priorities, and ensure successful outcomes. • Lead customer discovery workshops, architecture reviews, technical planning sessions, and implementation governance.
 



 • Collaborate closely with Product, Engineering, Customer Success, Pre\-Sales, and Partner teams to align delivery priorities and remove execution blockers.
 



 • Provide technical leadership and guidance around Kubernetes, GPU infrastructure, cloud\-native architectures, AI/ML platform deployments, hybrid cloud, and multicloud implementations.
 



 • Establish scalable delivery processes, implementation methodologies, operational best practices, and program governance frameworks. • Own program risk management, escalation handling, dependency tracking, and executive\-level communication throughout the delivery lifecycle.
 



 • Drive accountability across internal and external teams to ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and aligned with customer expectations.
 



 • Act as a senior escalation point for complex customer issues, deployment challenges, and critical implementation risks.
 



 • Mentor and guide TPMs, solutions architects, and technical delivery resources while helping scale Rafay’s customer delivery organization.
 



 • Maintain hands\-on familiarity with supporting technologies and frameworks including Observability, DevSecOps, CI/CD, GitOps, FinOps, GPU orchestration, and cloud infrastructure tooling.
 



 • Contribute to strategic initiatives that improve customer onboarding, operational efficiency, deployment automation, and overall customer experience.
 



  





**QUALIFICATIONS** 




  





 • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or related field. • 10\+ years of experience in technical program management, technical project management, cloud infrastructure, or enterprise software delivery.
 



 • 5\+ years leading complex enterprise customer deployments involving Kubernetes, cloud\-native technologies, infrastructure modernization, or AI/ML platforms.
 



 • Strong hands\-on technical expertise with Kubernetes, containers, cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), networking, infrastructure, and distributed systems.
 



 • Experience leading cross\-functional technical teams in fast\-paced startup or highgrowth technology environments.
 



 • Strong understanding of enterprise architecture, cloud operations, infrastructure scalability, and modernization initiatives.
 



 • Proven ability to communicate effectively with executives, architects, engineers, and customer stakeholders.
 



 • Experience managing multiple concurrent programs with complex dependencies and executive visibility.
 



 • Preferred certifications include PMP, AWS Solutions Architect, CKA/CKAD, or equivalent cloud/Kubernetes certifications.

a27896e8.title: Program Manager I, Tech
a27896e8.description:
**About The Role And Team**
 As a Program Manager I, Tech within the GSS Risk Operations team, you will play a pivotal role in tackling complex challenges by bringing a software engineering and data\-driven mindset to address emerging risks and technical operational hurdles.
   

  

 A core focus of this position is building and scaling technical solutions to investigate fraud and abuse cases, identifying and analyzing architectural vulnerabilities and crafting automated solutions to combat and prevent fraudulent activity. You'll partner closely with the Engg and Product teams as a technical lead, ensuring that feedback loops are established to continuously refine and improve risk detection systems through code and algorithm optimizations.
   

  

 In this role, creative problem\-solving, marketplace risk and fraud knowledge, and an eye for detail will be essential. You will work cross\-functionally, manage stakeholders effectively, and drive projects to meet timelines and budgetary constraints. Your contributions will help protect the platform, enhance user trust, and optimize Uber's overall approach to risk management.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Risk Management: Identify and mitigate program risks and issues, ensuring timely escalation and resolution.
* Execution and Delivery: Independently provide qualitative and quantitative insights to help improve the Risk Operations team
* Program Leadership: Define program scope, OKRs, and KPIs. Ensure alignment with stakeholder objectives.
* Cross\-functional Collaboration: Coordinate with cross\-functional teams across ops, engineering, and product for all risk ops needs with Uber.
* Continuous Improvement: Analyze program performance and implement optimizations to improve efficiency and outcomes.
* Communication: Provide regular program updates to stakeholders, including executive leadership. Conduct weekly, monthly, and quarterly business reviews.


****Basic Qualifications****
* Proficiency in SQL, Python, or similar languages for data analysis and automation
* Understanding of system architecture and API integrations
* Experience of working with scaled operations teams
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills. Ability to influence people across a wide variety of job functions through your relationships
* Self\-motivated with a strong affinity for strategic problem solving, operations management, and driving action
* Willing to explore and learn new technologies, hybrid processes
* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field


****Preferred Qualifications****
* Minimum 4\+ years of experience in Risk program management
* Experience in solving problems, both structured and ambiguous, at scale with strong attention to detail in fast\-changing business environments with a technical mindset
* Strong analytical and quantitative skills with the ability to use data and metrics to back up assumptions, and recommendations and drive customer\- and product\-focused decisions
* Experience working on large\-scale projects
* Vendor/account management experience


**Ready to Ride?**
 This isn't the kind of place where you follow a playbook \- it's where you help write one. If you're driven by impact, energized by challenge, and ready to shape how the world moves \- we'd love to hear from you.
   

  

 You may be eligible for bonuses, equity, and other compensation, as well as a range of benefits. Explore our benefits.
   

  

 Offices remain key to collaboration and Uber's culture. Unless approved for full remote work, employees must spend at least 50% of their time in\-office. Some roles, like those at greenlight hubs, require full\-time in\-office presence. Ask your Recruiter for details about this role's requirements.
   

  

 Uber is proud to be an Equal Opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, race, color, religion, national origin, disability, protected Veteran status, age, or any other characteristic protected by law. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing this form.

342e4b35.title: Technical Delivery Manager, Java, Microservices, AI driven software product development
342e4b35.description:
**Introduction: A Career at HARMAN Automotive**
 We’re a global, multi\-disciplinary team that’s putting the innovative power of technology to work and transforming tomorrow. At HARMAN Automotive, we give you the keys to fast\-track your career.
   

  

* Creating the next software platforms to drive the automotive industry
* Combine ingenuity, in\-depth research, and a spirit of collaboration with design and engineering excellence
* Advance in\-vehicle infotainment, safety, efficiency, and enjoyment


**About The Role**
* We are seeking a Technical Team Manager to join our Customer Delivery Group in India, responsible for end‑to‑end customer delivery, workflow and release execution, and technical leadership across the full development lifecycle.
* Our software product solutions are among the most advanced in the automotive industry. This role plays a critical execution and customer‑facing function, ensuring delivery commitments are met while serving as the regional first line of Tier‑4 (T4\) technical support, assisting in urgent escalations and complex, cross‑system issues.
* The role is acting as the main point of contact for customer release status and maintaining continuous alignment with Customer Success, TAM, Architecture, Product, and other Engineering teams. Responsibilities include workflow and release management, delivery planning and commitments, T4 backlog ownership, and knowledge sharing and facilitation across teams.
* In addition, the role provides technical guidance and consultancy to Solution Management and Product, including cost estimates, RFI/RFQ analysis, and feasibility assessments. As a people leader, the role is responsible for planning, mentoring, administration, and resource allocation, while continuously improving team capability and delivery effectiveness.
* Your Team: Leads engineering team while have full responsibility for E2E delivery of our products.


**What You Will Do**
* Lead end‑to‑end customer delivery across Development full life cycle
* Act as Workflow Release Manager, owning release planning, execution, readiness, and delivery commitments
* Serve as the main point of contact for customer release status, ensuring predictable and transparent E2E delivery
* Manage the Tier‑4 (T4\) project backlog, including prioritization, execution, and closure
* Be available for urgent Tier‑4 activities and critical escalations as the regional first line of support (in working hours)
* Write production‑level code to deliver customer features, improve core products, and validate technical feasibility
* Investigate complex technical issues, perform root‑cause analysis, and drive improvements in software quality
* Clarify customer requirements and translate them into actionable delivery plans for global teams
* Embrace and enhance new AI capabilities and ways to shorten our response time and development/testing efforts
* Represent the organization in customer technical workshops and onsite meetings when required
* Own planning, delivery commitments, and resource allocation
* Mentor team members and continuously raise the team’s technical maturity
* Drive knowledge sharing and facilitation across Development, QA, and Support
* Coordinate onboarding and technical training within the team and across regions
* Transfer knowledge through documentation, reviews, and technical sessions
* Establish and evolve automated testing environments


**What You Need To Be Successful**
* 15 \- 18 years of work experience in Java programming with Education: B.E / B.Tech or higher education.
* 5\+ years of team management experience
* Should have rich experience in RESTful/micro services based product development
* Should possess sound experience \& understanding of OOPS, design patterns/concepts
* Should be proficient in Spring, Spring boot, Docker and Maven/Gradle
* Hands\-on experience with development tools like: Bitbucket, GitHub
* Expertise in AI driven software product development \& management.
* Experience in using AI as part of product development life cycle and engineering compliances.
* Hands\-on experience in Linux
* Independent, experienced in learning new environments and assembling POC quickly, experienced in working under pressure and deadlines
* Independent and Self Motivated
* Business Level English skills (meeting, reporting and collaboration)
* Experience \& knowledge of DB – PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch
* Experience with Cloud Services like AWS/Azure/GCP


**Bonus Points if You Have**
* Hands on experience in C, C\+\+, Android / QNX, GO and Rust
* Experience in SW development for the automotive industry with proven experience in ASPICE


**What We Offer**
* HARMAN FlexConnect Program, offering a flexible hybrid work environment that fosters stronger collaboration, meaningful connections, and innovation through a minimum of three in\-office days per week..
* Access to employee discounts on world\-class Harman and Samsung products (JBL, HARMAN Kardon, AKG, etc.)
* Extensive training opportunities through our own HARMAN University.
* Competitive wellness benefits.
* Tuition Reimbursement.
* Access to HARMAN Campus Fitness Center and Cafeteria.
* An inclusive and diverse work environment that fosters and encourages professional and personal development.

 Please be aware that HARMAN recruiters will always communicate with you from an '@harman.com', ‘@careers.harman.com’ or ‘harmanglobal.avature.net’ email address.
